Numbers20:15 Ènya be mía tɔgbuiwo ʋu va Egipte
Numbers20:16 eye míedo ɣli yɔ Aƒetɔ be nexɔ na mí. Ese míaƒe ɣlidodo
Numbers20:17 Míeɖe kuku
Numbers20:18 Ke Edom ɖo eŋu be: “Míana miato afii ava yi o. Ne mietee kpɔ la
Numbers20:19 Tete Israelviwo gblɔ nɛ be: “Mɔ gã dzi ko míedi be míato ayi. Ne míawo loo
Numbers20:20 Ke woawo gaɖo eŋu be: “Míegbe. Miele edzi to ge ayi akpɔ o!” Ale Edomtɔwo tso ɖe wo ŋu kple aʋakɔ sesẽ aɖe be ne wokatsa la
Numbers20:21 Esi Edomtɔwo gbe be Israelviwo mato yewoƒe anyigba dzi ayi o ta la
Numbers20:22 Israel ƒe ha blibo la ho tso Kades
Numbers20:23 To sia le Edom-nyigba ƒe liƒo dzi. Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose kple Aron le afi ma be:
Numbers20:24 “Aron made anyigba si ŋugbe medo na Israelviwo la dzi o. Aku
Numbers20:25 Kplɔ Aron kple via ŋutsu Eleazar yi Hor-to la dzi.”
Numbers20:26 Ɖe eƒe awuwo le eŋu nàdo na via Eleazar; ke Aron aku ɖe afi ma.”
Numbers20:27 Mose wɔ abe ale si Aƒetɔ gblɔ nɛ ene. Wolia to la le ha blibo la ŋkume
Numbers20:28 eye Mose ɖe awuawo le Aron ŋu hedo na via Eleazar. Ale Aron ku le toa tame le afi ma
Numbers20:29 Esi ha blibo la kpɔ be Aron megali o la
Numbers21:1 Esi Kanaantɔ
Numbers21:2 Tete Israelviwo ɖe adzɔgbe na Aƒetɔ be: “Ne àna míaɖu dukɔ sia dzi la
Numbers21:3 Aƒetɔ se woƒe gbedodoɖa
Numbers21:4 Esi woho tso Hor-to la gbɔ la
Numbers21:5 eye wogblɔ nyawo ɖe Mawu kple Mose ŋu. Wogblɔ be: “Nu ka ta miekplɔ mí tso Egipte va gbedadaƒo le afii be míava ku ɖi? Nuɖuɖu kple tsi aɖeke meli o. Gawu la
Numbers21:6 Tete Aƒetɔ ɖo da vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖe wo dome siwo ɖu wo ale be ame geɖe ku le Israel.
Numbers21:7 Dukɔ la va Mose gbɔ va gblɔ nɛ be: “Míewɔ nuvɔ̃ be míegblɔ nya ɖe wò kple Aƒetɔ ŋu. Ɖe kuku na Aƒetɔ na mí ne wòana daawo nadzo le mía dome.” Ale Mose do gbe ɖa ɖe dukɔa ta.
Numbers21:8 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose be: “Wɔ da vɔ̃ɖi la ƒe dzedzeme
Numbers21:9 Ale Mose tsɔ akɔbli wɔ da heku ɖe ati ŋu
Numbers21:10 Israelviwo ho va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Obot.
Numbers21:11 Esi woho tso afi ma la
Numbers21:12 Woho tso afi ma heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Zered-bali me.
Numbers21:13 Esi wotso le afi ma la
Numbers21:14 Esia tae woŋlɔ ɖe “Aƒetɔ ƒe aʋawɔwɔwo ŋutinyagbalẽ” me be: “Waheb-du le Sufa-nutome kple Arnon-baliwo
Numbers21:15 kple tɔʋu la ƒe go si ɖo ta Ar-nutowo me
Numbers21:16 Emegbe woho tso afi ma
Numbers21:17 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Numbers21:18 Vudo si fiaviwo ɖe. Vudo si bubumewo ɖe. Woƒe atikplɔ kple woƒe atizɔtiwoe wotsɔ ɖee.” Esi wotso le gbedadaƒo sia la
Numbers21:19 Wotso le Matana va Naxaliel
Numbers21:20 Tso Bamot wova bali la me le Moab-nyigba dzi le Pisga-to si dze ŋgɔ gbedadaƒoa la gbɔ.
Numbers21:21 Tete Israelviwo dɔ amewo ɖe Sixon
Numbers21:22 “Na mato wò anyigba me ayi. Míadze ato agblewo alo wainbɔwo me o
Numbers21:23 Ke Sixon gbe be yemaɖe mɔ na Israelviwo be woato yeƒe anyigba me ayi o. Eƒo eƒe dukɔ blibo la nu ƒu
Numbers21:24 Israelviwo wu wo dometɔ geɖe le aʋa la me
Numbers21:25 Ale Israelviwo xɔ Amoritɔwo ƒe duwo katã. Woxɔ Xesbon kple eŋu duwo katã hã
Numbers21:26 Xesbon nye Amoritɔwo ƒe fia Sixon ƒe du gã. Sixon wɔ aʋa kple Moab-fia si nɔ anyi tsã
Numbers21:27 Eya ta hɛnɔwo sia ahama gblɔna be: “Miva Xesbon. Mina woagbugbɔe atso. Mina woagbugbɔ Sixon ƒe du la atso
Numbers21:28 Dzo do tso Xesbon. Dzo ƒe aɖe tso Sixon ƒe du la me
Numbers21:29 Baba na mi
Numbers21:30 Ale woƒe dzidzimeviwo tsrɔ̃ tso Xesbon va se ɖe Dibon. Míetsrɔ̃ wo tso Nasim va do ɖe Nofa le Medeba gbɔ.”
Numbers21:31 Ale Israelviwo nɔ Amoritɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi
Numbers21:32 eye Mose dɔ amewo be woayi aɖatsa ŋku le Yazer. Woxɔ eŋu duwo eye wonya Amoritɔ siwo le afi ma la ɖa.

Numbers22:25 Tedzia gakpɔ mawudɔla la
Numbers22:26 Mawudɔla la gayi ŋgɔ ɖatsi tsitre ɖe teƒe xaxɛ aɖe. Mɔ aɖeke mele afi sia be woadze ato ayi ŋgɔ o.
Numbers22:27 Esi tedzia gakpɔ mawudɔlaa la

Numbers22:30 Tedzi la gblɔ na Bileam be: “Menye nye koe nye wò tedzi si nèdo le wò agbe me ŋkekewo katã me va se ɖe egbe oa? Ɖe mewɔ nu sia tɔgbe ɖe ŋuwò kpɔa?” Eɖo eŋu be: “Gbeɖe!”

Numbers22:32 Mawudɔla la gblɔ nɛ be: “Nu ka tae nèƒo wò tedzia zi etɔ̃ sɔŋ nenema? Nyee va xe mɔ na wò elabe nu si gbe yim nèle la medze ŋunye o.

Numbers23:1 Bileam gblɔ na Balak be: “Na woaɖi vɔsamlekpui adrẽ ɖe afi sia nam

Numbers27:21 Eya anɔ tsitre ɖe nunɔla Eleazar gbɔ eye wòatsɔ Urim abia nu nɛ le Aƒetɔ ŋkume. Eƒe nya nue woado ayi afi aɖe
Numbers27:22 Mose wɔ abe ale si Aƒetɔ gblɔ nɛ la ene pɛpɛpɛ. Ekplɔ Yosua vɛ
Numbers27:23 Mose da eƒe asiwo ɖe edzi
Numbers28:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose be:
Numbers28:2 “Milé ŋku ɖe nye dzovɔsa ŋu
Numbers28:3 Nuɖuɖu si miatsɔ asa vɔe nam lae nye esi: Alẽvi eve siwo sɔ keŋ
Numbers28:4 Miawu ɖeka le ŋdi me eye miawu evelia le ɣetrɔ me.
Numbers28:5 Miatsɔ wɔ memee kilo ɖeka si wodzaba kple dzomi lita ɖeka awɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa lae.
Numbers28:6 Enye numemevɔsa si wowɔna edziedzi tso Sinai-to la gbɔ ke
Numbers28:7 Mitsɔ nunonovɔsa lita ɖeka kpe ɖe alẽvia ɖe sia ɖe ŋu
Numbers28:8 Miwɔ alẽvi evelia ŋudɔ le fiẽ me
Numbers28:9 “Le Dzudzɔgbe la
Numbers28:10 Miasa numemevɔ sia dzudzɔgbe sia dzudzɔgbe. Numemevɔsa kple nunonovɔsa si miewɔna gbe sia gbe la nakpe ɖe eŋuti.
Numbers28:11 “Gbe si gbe dzinu dze dzi la
Numbers28:12 Le nuɖuɖuvɔsa gome la
Numbers28:13 Mitsɔ wɔ memee kilo ɖeka si wodzaba kple ami la wɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpe ɖe alẽviawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu. Numemevɔsa siawo nye nuɖuɖuvɔsa siwo ƒe ʋeʋẽ lílili dzea Aƒetɔ ŋu.
Numbers28:14 Mitsɔ wain lita eve wɔ nunonovɔsa kpe ɖe nyitsuawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu. Wain lita ɖeka kple afã nakpe ɖe agbo ɖeka la ŋu
Numbers28:15 Hekpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple nunonovɔsa siwo miawɔ gbe sia gbe ŋu la
Numbers28:16 “Ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke wui enelia nye Paska na Aƒetɔ.
Numbers28:17 Ŋkeke Nyuia ɖuɖu nadze egɔme tso ŋkeke wui atɔ̃lia gbe
Numbers28:18 Ŋkeke gbãtɔ nye takpegbe si le kɔkɔe; migawɔ dɔ aɖeke gbe ma gbe o.
Numbers28:19 Misa nuɖuɖuvɔ si nye numemevɔsa nam. Nu siwo ŋudɔ miawɔ lae nye: Nyitsuvi eve
Numbers28:20 Mitsɔ wɔ memee kilo etɔ̃ si wodzaba kple ami la wɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpe ɖe nyitsuawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu. Wɔ memee kilo eve nakpe ɖe agbo ɖeka ŋu
Numbers28:21 eye wɔ memee kilo ɖeka nakpe ɖe alẽviawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu.
Numbers28:22 Mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa nuvɔ̃vɔe be wòalé avu na dukɔ la.
Numbers28:23 Misa vɔ sia kpe ɖe numemevɔ si miesana gbe sia gbe ŋdi la ŋu.
Numbers28:24 Hekpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple nunonovɔsa si miesana gbe sia gbe ŋu la
Numbers28:25 Le ŋkeke adrẽa gbe la
Numbers28:26 “Le Nuŋeŋkeke Nyui ɖuɣi ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ gbe la
Numbers28:27 Mitsɔ nyitsuvi eve
Numbers28:28 Mitsɔ wɔ memee kilo etɔ̃ si wodzaba kple ami wɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpe ɖe nyitsuawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu
Numbers28:29 eye kilo ɖeka nakpe ɖe alẽviawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu.
Numbers28:30 Emegbe woatsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka asa nuvɔ̃vɔ atsɔ alé avu na dukɔ lae.
Numbers28:31 Hekpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple eƒe nuɖuɖuvɔsa si miewɔna edziedzi ŋu la
Numbers29:1 “Ɣleti adrẽlia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ nanye takpegbe tɔxɛ si le kɔkɔe. Migawɔ dɔ aɖeke gbe ma gbe o. Miku kpẽwo gbe ma gbe.
Numbers29:2 Misa numemevɔ si ʋẽna lílili ɖem la nam. Nu siwo ŋudɔ miawɔ lae nye: nyitsuvi ɖeka
Numbers29:3 Mitsɔ wɔ memee kilo etɔ̃ si wodzaba kple ami wɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpe ɖe nyitsu ɖeka la ŋu. Mitsɔ wɔ memee kilo eve kpe ɖe agbo la ŋu
Numbers29:4 eye mitsɔ wɔ memee kilo ɖeka kpe ɖe agbovi adrẽawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu.
Numbers29:5 Mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa nuvɔ̃vɔ ne miatsɔ alé avu na dukɔ la.
Numbers29:6 Mitsɔ nu siawo sa vɔe kpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple eŋu nuɖuɖuvɔsa si miewɔna ne dzinu dze dzi la ŋuti. Nenema ke mitsɔ numemevɔsa kple eŋu nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpakple nunonovɔsa si miewɔna gbe sia gbe la kpe ɖe eŋuti.
Numbers29:7 “Ɣleti adrẽlia ƒe ŋkeke ewoa gbe nye takpegbe si le kɔkɔe na mi. Mitsi nu dɔ gbe ma gbe
Numbers29:8 Mitsɔ nyitsuvi ɖeka
Numbers29:9 Mitsɔ wɔ memee kilo etɔ̃ si wodzaba kple ami la wɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpe ɖe nyitsu la ŋu. Nenema ke mitsɔ wɔ kilo eve kpe ɖe agbo ɖeka la ŋu
Numbers29:10 eye mitsɔ wɔ kilo ɖeka kpe ɖe agbovi adrẽawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu.
Numbers29:11 Emegbe mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa nuvɔ̃vɔe kpe ɖe nuvɔ̃vɔsa si wotsɔ lé avui kple numemevɔsa kple eŋu nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpakple nunonovɔsa si miewɔna gbe sia gbe la ŋuti.
Numbers29:12 “Ɣleti adrẽlia ƒe ŋkeke wui atɔ̃lia nye takpegbe si le kɔkɔe. Miɖu ŋkekenyui sia ŋkeke adrẽ sɔŋ tsɔ de bubu ŋunye. Ame aɖeke megawɔ dɔ aɖeke le ɣeyiɣi sia me o.
Numbers29:13 Le ŋkeke gbãtɔ gbe la
Numbers29:14 Mitsɔ wɔ memee kilo etɔ̃ si wodzaba kple ami la wɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpe ɖe nyitsu wui eneawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu
Numbers29:15 eye wɔ kilo ɖeka nakpe ɖe agbovi wui eneawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋuti.
Numbers29:16 Emegbe mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa nuvɔ̃vɔe kpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple eŋu nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpakple nunonovɔsa si miewɔna gbe sia gbe la ŋuti.
Numbers29:17 “Le ŋkeke evea gbe la
Numbers29:18 Miwɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kple nunonovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:19 Emegbe mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa nuvɔ̃vɔe kpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple eŋu nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpakple nunonovɔsa siwo miewɔna gbe sia gbe la ŋuti.
Numbers29:20 “Le ŋkeke etɔ̃lia gbe la
Numbers29:21 Miwɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kple nunonovɔsa
Numbers29:22 Emegbe mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa nuvɔ̃vɔe kpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple eŋu nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpakple nunonovɔsa siwo miewɔna gbe sia gbe la ŋuti.
Numbers29:23 “Le ŋkeke enea gbe la
Numbers29:24 Miwɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kple nunonovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:25 Emegbe mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa nuvɔ̃vɔe kpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpakple nunonovɔsa siwo miewɔna gbe sia gbe la ŋuti.
Numbers29:26 “Le ŋkeke atɔ̃lia gbe la
Numbers29:27 Miwɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kple nunonovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:28 Emegbe mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa nuvɔ̃vɔe kpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpakple nunonovɔsa siwo miewɔna gbe sia gbe la ŋuti.
Numbers29:29 “Le ŋkeke adelia gbe la
Numbers29:30 Miwɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kple nunonovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:31 Emegbe mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa nuvɔ̃vɔe kpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple eŋu nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpakple nunonovɔsa siwo miewɔna gbe sia gbe la ŋuti.
Numbers29:32 “Le ŋkeke adrẽlia gbe la
Numbers29:33 Miwɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kple nunonovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:34 Emegbe mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa nuvɔ̃vɔe kpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple eŋu nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpakple nunonovɔsa siwo miewɔna gbe sia gbe la ŋuti.
Numbers29:35 “Ŋkeke enyilia gbe nye takpegbe na mi
Numbers29:36 Mitsɔ nyitsu ɖeka
Numbers29:37 Miwɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsa kple nunonovɔsa ɖe nyitsuawo
Numbers29:38 Emegbe mitsɔ gbɔ̃tsu ɖeka sa nuvɔ̃vɔe kpe ɖe numemevɔsa kple eŋu nuɖuɖuvɔsa kpakple nunonovɔsa siwo miewɔna gbe sia gbe la ŋuti.
Numbers29:39 “Esiawoe nye ɖoɖo siwo ku ɖe numemevɔsa
Numbers29:40 Ale Mose gblɔ nya siwo katã Aƒetɔ gblɔ nɛ be negblɔ na Israelviwo la na wo pɛpɛpɛ.
Numbers30:1 Mose gblɔ na Israelviwo ƒe toawo ƒe tatɔwo be Aƒetɔ de se be:
Numbers30:2 “Ne ame aɖe ɖe adzɔgbe na Aƒetɔ alo ka atam tsri nane na eɖokui la
Numbers30:3 “Ne ɖetugbi aɖe gale tɔ́a ƒe dzikpɔkpɔ te le eƒeme
Numbers30:4 ele be wòawɔ adzɔgbe si wòɖe alo atam si wòka la dzi
Numbers30:5 Gake ne tɔ́a see
Numbers30:6 Ne nyɔnu aɖe ɖe adzɔgbe alo nya ge le enu alo wòka atam tsri nu na eɖokui hafi ɖe srɔ̃
Numbers30:7 eye gbe si gbe srɔ̃a se nyaa wòzi kpi kpɔe la
Numbers30:8 Gake gbe si gbe srɔ̃a se nyaa hegbe nɛ ko la
Numbers30:9 Ele be ahosi alo nyɔnu srɔ̃tɔ si wogbe la nawɔ eƒe adzɔgbeɖeɖe kple nu si wòtsri na eɖokui la dzi.
Numbers30:10 Ne nyɔnu srɔ̃tɔ aɖe ɖe adzɔgbe alo ka atam hetsri nu na eɖokui
Numbers30:11 eye srɔ̃a see gake zi kpi eye megbe nɛ o la
Numbers30:12 Ke ne gbe si gbe srɔ̃a se nyaa eye wògbe nɛ la
Numbers30:13 Ne nyɔnu srɔ̃tɔ aɖe ɖe adzɔgbe alo ka atam tsri nu na eɖokui la
Numbers30:14 Ke ne gbe si gbe srɔ̃a se nya la wòzi kpi
Numbers30:15 Gake ne srɔ̃ŋutsua se nyaa
Numbers30:16 Esiawoe nye ɖoɖo siwo ku ɖe adzɔgbeɖeɖe ŋu na ɖetugbi si meɖe srɔ̃ haɖe o
Numbers31:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose be:
Numbers31:2 “Bia hlɔ̃ Midiantɔwo le nu si wowɔ Israelviwo la ta. Ne èwɔ esia vɔ la
Numbers31:3 Ale Mose gblɔ na dukɔ la be: “Mina miaƒe ŋutsuwo nadzra ɖo ne miaho aʋa ɖe Midiantɔwo ŋu
Numbers31:4 Miaƒe toawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe naɖe ame akpe ɖeka aɖo ɖe aʋa la wɔƒe.”
Numbers31:5 Ale Israel-toawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ɖe ame akpe ɖeka ɖo ɖa
Numbers31:6 Mose na Pinehas
Numbers31:7 Woho aʋa ɖe Midiantɔwo ŋu abe ale si Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose ene
Numbers31:8 Wowu Midian-fia atɔ̃awo hã. Woawoe nye: Evi
Numbers31:9 Israelviwo ɖe aboyo Midian-nyɔnuwo kple ɖeviwo
Numbers31:10 eye wotɔ dzo woƒe duwo katã kple woƒe asaɖawo.
Numbers31:11 Wokplɔ aboyomeawo kple lãawo
Numbers31:12 Wokplɔ aboyomeawo kple nu siwo woha kpakple aboyonu bubuawo katã va Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar kpakple Israelviwo ƒe ha blibo la gbɔ le Moab-gbegbe le Yordan nu le Yerixo kasa.
Numbers31:13 Mose
Numbers31:14 Tete Mose do dɔmedzoe ɖe aʋakplɔla siwo te ame akpewo kple esiwo nɔ ame alafawo nu de aʋaa gbɔ la ŋuti.
Numbers31:15 Ebia wo be: “Nu ka ta miena nyɔnuawo katã tsi agbe?
Numbers31:16 Ɖe menye nyɔnuawoe xɔ Bileam ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖo la
Numbers31:17 Eya ta miwu ameawo dome ŋutsuvi siwo katã de asi nyɔnu ŋu kpɔ. Nenema ke miwu nyɔnuvi siwo katã de ŋutsu gbɔ kpɔ la hã.
Numbers31:18 Ke nyɔnuvi siwo katã mede ŋutsu gbɔ kpɔ o le wo dome la natsi anyi na mi.
Numbers31:19 Azɔ mia dometɔ si wu ame alo ka asi ame kuku ŋu la netsi asaɖa la godo ŋkeke adrẽ. Le ŋkeke etɔ̃lia kple adrẽlia gbe la
Numbers31:20 Nenema ke miɖe nuvɔ̃ ɖa le avɔwo katã kple nu siwo katã wotsɔ lãgbalẽ
Numbers31:21 Nunɔla Eleazar gblɔ na aʋadelaawo be: “Se siwo Aƒetɔ de na Mose lae nye esiwo be:
Numbers31:22 Mitsɔ sika kple klosalo
Numbers31:23 kpakple nu sia nu si ate ŋu ade dzo me la haha dzoe
Numbers31:24 Le ŋkeke adrẽa gbe la
Numbers31:25 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose be:
Numbers31:26 “Wò kple nunɔla Eleazar kpakple Israel-toawo ƒe amegãwo
Numbers31:27 Mima nuawo ɖe akpa eve me. Aʋadelawo naxɔ akpa ɖeka
Numbers31:28 Le aʋadelaawo tɔ gome la
Numbers31:29 Tsɔ wo na nunɔla Eleazar
Numbers31:30 Le ha la tɔ gome la
Numbers31:31 Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar wɔ abe ale si Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose ene.
Numbers31:32 Aboyonu siwo aʋawɔlawo ha la ƒe susɔea le: alẽ akpe alafa ade bla adrẽ vɔ atɔ̃;
Numbers31:33 nyi akpe bla adrẽ vɔ eve;
Numbers31:34 tedzi akpe bla ade vɔ ɖekɛ;
Numbers31:35 nyɔnuvi siwo mede ŋutsu gbɔ kpɔ o la le akpe bla etɔ̃ vɔ eve.
Numbers31:36 Nu siwo aʋadelawo xɔ la woe nye: alẽ akpe alafa etɔ̃ bla etɔ̃ vɔ adrẽ alafa atɔ̃.
Numbers31:37 Adzɔ si woɖe le alẽawo ŋu na Aƒetɔ la le alẽ alafa ade bla adrẽ vɔ atɔ̃.
Numbers31:38 Nyiwo le akpe bla etɔ̃ vɔ ade
Numbers31:39 Tedziwo le akpe bla etɔ̃ alafa atɔ̃
Numbers31:40 Amewo le akpe wui ade
Numbers31:41 Ale Mose tsɔ adzɔ siwo wona Aƒetɔ la na nunɔla Eleazar abe ale si Aƒetɔ ŋutɔ gblɔ na Mose ene.
Numbers31:42 Israelviwo ƒe afã si Mose ɖe ɖa tso aʋadelawo gbɔ tɔe nye esi;
Numbers31:43 ameha la ƒe afã tɔe nye akpe alafa etɔ̃ bla etɔ̃ vɔ adrẽ alafa atɔ̃;
Numbers31:44 nyi akpe bla etɔ̃ vɔ ade;
Numbers31:45 tedzi akpe bla etɔ̃ alafa atɔ̃
Numbers31:46 kple ame akpe wui ade.
Numbers31:47 Mose ɖe ame ɖekaɖeka alo lã ɖekaɖeka le ame alo lã bla atɔ̃ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu tso Israelviwo tɔ ŋu na Levitɔwo le woƒe dɔwɔwɔ le godoƒegbadɔ la ŋu ta abe ale si Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose ene.
Numbers31:48 Aʋakplɔla siwo kplɔ aʋakɔ la de aʋa lae la va Mose gbɔ
Numbers31:49 eye wogblɔ nɛ be: “Amegã
Numbers31:50 Eya ta míetsɔ sikanu siwo mía dome ame sia ame ha la vɛ be míana Aƒetɔ. Nuawoe nye: Sikanuwo
Numbers31:51 Ale Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar xɔ sika la. Sika sia nye sikatsyɔ̃ɖonu ƒomevi vovovowo.
Numbers31:52 Sikanu siwo aʋakplɔlaawo katã tsɔ vɛ la ƒe kpekpeme ade kilo alafa eve.
Numbers31:53 Nu siwo aʋawɔla siwo menye aʋakplɔlawo o ya ha la tsi wo si; wometsɔ wo na o.
Numbers31:54 Mose kple Eleazar tsɔ sikanuawo yi godoƒegbadɔ la me ale be woanye ŋkuɖodzinu na Aƒetɔ be wòakpɔ Israelviwo ta.
Numbers32:1 Lãha geɖe le Ruben viwo kple Gad viwo si. Esi wokpɔ be anyigba si le Yazer kple Gilead nyo na lãnyinyi la
Numbers32:2 woyi Mose kple nunɔla Eleazar kpakple ha la ƒe amegãwo gbɔ
Numbers32:3 “Atarot
Numbers32:4 anyigba siwo Aƒetɔ xɔ le Israel ŋkume la nyo na lãnyinyi
Numbers32:5 Eya ta míeɖe kuku
Numbers32:6 Mose ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Nu ka! Ɖe miedi be miawo miatsi afii
Numbers32:7 Nu ka ta miedi be yewoaɖe dzi le Israelviwo ƒo
Numbers32:8 Alea tututu mia tɔ́wo wɔ
Numbers32:9 Amedɔdɔawo zɔ ʋuu va ɖo Eskol Bali me
Numbers32:10 Eya ta Aƒetɔ do dɔmedzoe gbe ma gbe ka atam be:
Numbers32:11 ‘Ne mi ŋutsu siwo xɔ ƒe bla eve heyi
Numbers32:12 Ame sia ame le eme
Numbers32:13 Aƒetɔ do dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel-dukɔ la ŋu elabe wowɔ nuvɔ̃ eya ta wòna wotsa le gbedadaƒo ƒe bla ene sɔŋ va se ɖe esime dzidzime ma katã tsrɔ̃ vɔ keŋ.
Numbers32:14 Azɔ mi nuvɔ̃wɔlawo ƒe dzidzime yeye
Numbers32:15 Ne mi
Numbers32:16 Tete wote ɖe Mose ŋu gblɔ nɛ be: “Fifia la
Numbers32:17 Emegbe míawo ŋutɔ míabla akpa adze ŋgɔ na dukɔ la va se ɖe esime míakplɔ wo aɖo wo teƒe. Ke mía viwo ya anɔ megbe le du sesẽawo me be anyigba la dzi nɔlawo nagawɔ nu vevi wo o.
Numbers32:18 Míatrɔ agbɔ va mía nɔƒewo o
Numbers32:19 Míawo míegale anyigba aɖeke xɔ ge ɖe wo dome le Yordan godo o
Numbers32:20 Mose ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Nenye aleae nye miaƒe susu la
Numbers32:21 Mina mia dome aʋawɔlawo katã nabla akpa atso Yordan-tɔsisi la
Numbers32:22 eye wòaxɔ anyigba la. Emegbe miatrɔ agbɔ
Numbers32:23 Ke ne miewɔ miaƒe ŋugbedodoa dzi o la
Numbers32:24 Eya ta mitso duwo na mia viwo
Numbers32:25 Gad viwo kple Ruben viwo gblɔ na Mose be: “Amegã
Numbers32:26 Míana mía viwo
Numbers32:27 Ke mí ame mamlɛawo katã míabla akpa le Aƒetɔ ƒe kpɔkplɔ te ayi aʋa le tɔa godo le wò gbeɖeɖe nu.”
Numbers32:28 Ale Mose ɖe gbe na nunɔla Eleazar
Numbers32:29 “Ne Gad viwo kple Ruben viwo katã bla akpa le Aƒetɔ ƒe kpɔkplɔ te yi aʋa kpli mi le Yordan godo
Numbers32:30 Evɔ ne womebla akpa yi tɔa godo kpli mi ɖakpe ɖe mia ŋu le aʋa me o la
Numbers32:31 Tete Gad viwo kple Ruben viwo ɖo eŋu be: “Míawɔ nu si Aƒetɔ gblɔ na eƒe dɔlawo la pɛpɛpɛ.
Numbers32:32 Míabla akpa le Aƒetɔ ƒe kpɔkplɔ te ayi Kanaan-nyigba dzi aɖawɔ aʋa be anyigba si su mía si le Yordan ƒe ɣedzeƒe afii la natsi mía si.”
Numbers32:33 Ale Mose tsɔ Sixon
Numbers32:34 Du sesẽ siwo Gad viwo tso la woe nye: Dibon
Numbers32:35 Aterot-Sofan
Numbers32:36 Bet-Nimra kple Bet-Xaran. Wotɔ alẽkpɔwo ɖe du siawo ŋu.
Numbers32:37 Du siwo Ruben viwo tso la woe nye: Xesbon
Numbers32:38 Nebo
Numbers32:39 Manase vi
Numbers32:40 Ale Mose tsɔ Gilead na Manase vi
Numbers32:41 Yair
Numbers32:42 Nobax yi ɖaxɔ Kenat kple eŋu kɔƒewo
Numbers33:1 Esime Israelviwo ʋu tso Egipte-nyigba dzi yina le Mose kple Aron ƒe kpɔkplɔ te la
Numbers33:2 Ne woɖo teƒe aɖe heƒu asaɖa anyi ɖi la
Numbers33:3 Woho tso Ramses le ƒè la ƒe ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke wui atɔ̃lia dzi. Le ŋutitoto la ƒe ŋufɔke la
Numbers33:4 esime Egiptetɔwo le woƒe ŋgɔgbevi siwo katã Aƒetɔ wu le wo dome la ɖim. Aƒetɔ he to na woƒe mawuwo hã.
Numbers33:5 Israelviwo ho tso Ramses va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Sukot.
Numbers33:6 Wogaho tso Sukot va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Etam le kegbegbe la nu.
Numbers33:7 Esi woho tso afi ma la
Numbers33:8 Woho tso Pihaxirot eye wotso ƒu la va Sur-gbedadaƒo. Wozɔ Etam-gbedadaƒo ŋkeke etɔ̃
Numbers33:9 Esi woho tso afi ma la
Numbers33:10 Woho tso Elim va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Aƒlaƒu la nu.
Numbers33:11 Esi wotso le afi sia la
Numbers33:12 Eyome wova ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Dofka.
Numbers33:13 Tso Dofka wova Alus.
Numbers33:14 Esi wotso le Alus la
Numbers33:15 Esi woho tso Refidim la
Numbers33:16 Woho tso Sinai-gbedadaƒo heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Kibrot-Hatava.
Numbers33:17 Woho tso Kibrot-Hatava heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Xazerot.
Numbers33:18 Woho tso Xazerot heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Ritma.
Numbers33:19 Woho tso Ritma
Numbers33:20 Woho tso Rimon-Perez heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Libna.
Numbers33:21 Woho tso Libna
Numbers33:22 Woho tso Risa heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Kehelata.
Numbers33:23 Woho tso Kehelata heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Sefer-to la gbɔ.
Numbers33:24 Woho tso Sefer-to la gbɔ va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Xarada.
Numbers33:25 Woho tso Xarada heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Makehelot.
Numbers33:26 Woho tso Makehelot heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Taxat.
Numbers33:27 Woho tso Taxat heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Tarax.
Numbers33:28 Woho tso Tarax heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Mitka.
Numbers33:29 Woho tso Mitka heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Xasmona.
Numbers33:30 Woho tso Xasmona heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Moserot.
Numbers33:31 Woho tso Moserot heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Bene-Yakan.
Numbers33:32 Woho tso Bene-Yakan heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Xor-Hagidgad.
Numbers33:33 Woho tso Xor-Hagidgad heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Yotbata.
Numbers33:34 Woho tso Yotbata heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Abrona.
Numbers33:35 Woho tso Abrona heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Ezeon-Geber.
Numbers33:36 Woho tso Ezeon-Geber heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Zin-gbedadaƒo. Eya kee nye Kades.
Numbers33:37 Woho tso Kades heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Hor-to la gbɔ le Edom ƒe liƒo dzi.
Numbers33:38 Nunɔla Aron lia Hor-to la
Numbers33:39 Aron xɔ ƒe alafa ɖeka bla eve vɔ etɔ̃ hafi ku le Hor-to la dzi.
Numbers33:40 Arad-fia si le Kanaan ƒe anyigbeme gome la se be Israelviwo gbɔna.
Numbers33:41 Woho tso Hor-to la gbɔ heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Zalmona.
Numbers33:42 Woho tso Zalmona heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Punon.
Numbers33:43 Woho tso Punon heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Obot.
Numbers33:44 Woho tso Obot heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Iyim-Abarim le Moabtɔwo ƒe nutome.
Numbers33:45 Woho tso Ayim heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Dibon-Gad.
Numbers33:46 Woho tso Dibon-Gad heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Almon-Diblatayim.
Numbers33:47 Woho tso Almon-Diblatayim heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Abarim-towo gbɔ le Nebo ŋgɔ.
Numbers33:48 Woho tso Abarim-towo gbɔ heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Moab-gbegbe le Yordan nu le Yerixo kasa.
Numbers33:49 Woƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Yordan nu tso Bet-Yesimot va se ɖe Abel-Sitim le Moab-gbegbe.
Numbers33:50 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose le Moab-gbegbe le Yordan nu le Yerixo kasa be:
Numbers33:51 Gblɔ na Israelviwo be: “Ne mietso Yordan-tɔsisia va Kanaan-nyigba dzi la
Numbers33:52 minyà anyigbaa dzi nɔlawo katã ɖa le anyigba la dzi. Migbã woƒe aklama kpakpɛwo katã
Numbers33:53 Mixɔ anyigba la le wo si mianɔ edzi
Numbers33:54 Midzidze nu ɖe anyigba la dzi
Numbers33:55 Ke ne mienyà anyigba la dzi nɔlawo ɖa o la
Numbers33:56 Eya ta ne mienyà wo ɖa o la
Numbers34:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose be:
Numbers34:2 “Gblɔ na Israelviwo be: “Ne mieɖo Kanaan-nyigba
Numbers34:3 Miaƒe anyigbemeliƒo natso Zin-gbedadaƒo amlo ato Edom ŋu. Adze egɔme tso Ƒukuku la ƒe mlɔenu le ɣedzeƒe gome
Numbers34:4 wòaɖo ta Akrabim-todzimɔ ƒe anyigbeme gome. Ato Zin ŋu ayi ɖe Kades Barnea ƒe anyigbeme lɔƒo
Numbers34:5 Liƒo la anyè kpo tso Azmon afii ayi ɖe Egipte-tɔʋu la ŋu
Numbers34:6 “Miaƒe ɣetoɖoƒeliƒo nanye Domeƒu la.
Numbers34:7 “Miaƒe dzigbemeliƒo la natso Domeƒu la nu
Numbers34:8 Atso le Hor-to la gbɔ aɖo ta Xamat
Numbers34:9 Liƒo la nato Zifron ava wu nu ɖe Xazar-Enan. Miaƒe dzigbemeliƒo la nanye esi.
Numbers34:10 “Miaƒe ɣedzeƒeliƒo la natso Xazar-Enan ayi Sefam
Numbers34:11 ato Ribla le Ain ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome
Numbers34:12 Nezɔ Yordan ŋu
Numbers34:13 Ale Mose gblɔ na Israelviwo be: “Esiae nye anyigba si Aƒetɔ gblɔ be woatsɔ na to asieke kple afã. Ɖe woadzidze nu ɖe edzi hafi amae na mi.
Numbers34:14 Ruben viwo ƒe to kple Gad viwo hã tɔ kpakple Manase ƒe to afã xɔ woƒe anyigba xoxo ɖe woƒe aƒekɔwo nu.
Numbers34:15 Woxɔ anyigba le Yordan ƒe go kemɛ dzi le Yerixo kasa.”
Numbers34:16 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose be:
Numbers34:17 “Nunɔla Eleazar kple Yosua
Numbers34:18 Azɔ
Numbers34:19 Ŋutsuawo ŋkɔwo nye: Kaleb
Numbers34:20 Semuel
Numbers34:21 Elidad
Numbers34:22 kplɔla Buki
Numbers34:23 Yosef viŋutsuwo tɔwo nye: kplɔla Xaniel
Numbers34:24 kple kplɔla Kemuel
Numbers34:25 Kplɔla Elizafan
Numbers34:26 kplɔla Paltiel
Numbers34:27 kplɔla Axihud
Numbers34:28 kple kplɔla Pehadel
Numbers34:29 Ame siawoe Aƒetɔ ɖo be woama anyigba la na Israelviwo le Kanaan-nyigba dzi.
Numbers35:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose le Moab-gbegbe le Yordan nu le Yerixo kasa be:
Numbers35:2 “Gblɔ na Israelviwo be woana duwo Levitɔwo ɖe woƒe anyigba dzi
Numbers35:3 Levi viawo nanɔ duawo me
Numbers35:4 Lãnyiƒeawo nadidi meta alafa ene bla atɔ̃ ayi ŋgɔgbe tso dugliawo gbɔ akpe ɖo
Numbers35:5 ale be lãnyiƒe si le dua ƒe akpa eneawo ƒe didime kple kekeme nasɔ; woanye meta alafa asieke le goawo katã me
Numbers35:6 Mitsɔ sitsoƒedu ade siwo me hlɔ̃dola si meɖo wu ame o la
Numbers35:7 Ale du siwo katã miatsɔ na Levitɔwo hekpe ɖe wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo ŋu nanye bla ene vɔ enyi.
Numbers35:8 Anyigba si to aɖe xɔ la ƒe lolome ŋue wòle be wòana duawo ɖo. To siwo ƒe anyigba lolo la
Numbers35:9 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose
Numbers35:10 be: Gblɔ na Israelviwo be: ‘Ne mietso Yordan-tɔsisi la ge ɖe Kanaan-nyigba dzi la
Numbers35:11 mitia duwo ne woanye sitsoƒe na mi. Du siawo mee ame si meɖo wu ame o la lasí ayi.
Numbers35:12 Woanye sitsoƒe na mi le hlɔ̃bialawo ta. Hafi woawu hlɔ̃dola aɖe la
Numbers35:13 Mitia sitsoƒedu ade.
Numbers35:14 Etɔ̃ nanɔ Yordan ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome
Numbers35:15 Du ade siawo nanye sitsoƒe na Israelviwo
Numbers35:16 Ke ne etsɔ lãnu aɖe dza ame aɖe wòku la
Numbers35:17 Ne etsɔ kpe si adze ame wòaku ƒui wòku la
Numbers35:18 Alo ne etsɔ kpo si adze ame wòaku la ƒoe wòku la
Numbers35:19 Ame si dze abia hlɔ̃ le ƒomea me la kpɔ mɔ abia hlɔ̃e. Ne edo goe le afi aɖe la
Numbers35:20 Ne ame aɖe lé fu ame aɖe
Numbers35:21 alo ƒoe kple kɔ wòku la
Numbers35:22 “Mitsɔe be ame aɖe melé fu ame aɖe o
Numbers35:23 Alo ame aɖe melé fu ame aɖe o alo ɖo vɔ̃ ɖe eŋu o
Numbers35:24 Ne eva eme alea la
Numbers35:25 Ha la naɖe amewula la tso ƒometɔ si di be yeabia hlɔ̃ la si me. Woana woakplɔe agbugbɔ yi sitsoƒedu si me wòsí yi la me
Numbers35:26 Ke nenye be amewula la do le sitsoƒedu si me wòsí yi ɖo la me
Numbers35:27 eye ƒometɔ si di be yeabia hlɔ̃e do goe le afi aɖe hewui la
Numbers35:28 Ele be amewula la nanɔ sitsoƒedua me va se ɖe esime nunɔlagã la naku. Le nunɔlagã la ƒe ku megbe la
Numbers35:29 Mina miaƒe dzidzimeviwo nawɔ ɖoɖo siawo dzi le afi sia afi si miayi la.
Numbers35:30 “Ne wobe ame aɖe wu ame la
Numbers35:31 Ne ame aɖe wu ame la
Numbers35:32 Ne amewula aɖe sí yi sitsoƒedu aɖe me la
Numbers35:33 Amewuwu ɖe wògblẽa kɔ ɖo na anyigba
Numbers35:34 Migagblẽ kɔ ɖo na anyigba si dzi miele la o
Numbers36:1 Gilead nye Maxir vi. Gilead tɔgbuie nye Manase
Numbers36:2 Wogblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ gblɔ na nye aƒetɔ be woadzidze nu ama anyigba la na Israelviwo. Egagblɔ hã be míatsɔ mía nɔvi Zelofxad ƒe anyigba na via nyɔnuwo.
Numbers36:3 Ke nenye be woɖe srɔ̃ le to bubu me la
Numbers36:4 Ne Nugbugbɔxɔ ƒe ƒè ɖo na Israel la
Numbers36:5 Tete Mose gblɔ nya si Aƒetɔ de esi be negblɔ na wo la na wo. Ebe Aƒetɔ be: “Yosef viwo ƒe to la gblɔe ɖe eteƒe.
Numbers36:6 Zelofxad vinyɔnuwo kpɔ mɔ aɖe ame sia ame si dze wo ŋu la
Numbers36:7 Mele be to aɖeke ƒe anyigba nayi ɖe to bubu me o. Ame sia ame neku ɖe eya ŋutɔ tɔ́a ƒe anyigba ŋu.
Numbers36:8 Nyɔnu siwo katã xɔ wo tɔ́ ƒe anyigba ɖe Israelviwo ƒe toawo me la
Numbers36:9 eye anyigba matso to ɖeka si me ayi ɖe bubu si me o. Toawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ƒe anyigba anye eya ko tɔ tegbee.”
Numbers36:10 Ale Zelofxad vinyɔnuwo wɔ abe ale si Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose ene
Numbers36:11 elabe Zelofxad vinyɔnu siwo ŋkɔwo nye Maxla
Numbers36:12 Woɖe srɔ̃ le Yosef vi Manase ƒe ƒomeawo me
Numbers36:13 Esia nye se kple ɖoɖo siwo Aƒetɔ na Mose gblɔ na Israelviwo le Moab-gbegbe le Yordan nu le Yerixo kasa.
Deuteronomy1:1 Esiawo nye nya siwo Mose gblɔ na Israel-dukɔ la
Deuteronomy1:2 Mɔzɔzɔ tso Xoreb gbɔ to Seir-nyigba dzi yi Kades-Barnea xɔa ŋkeke wuiɖekɛ.
Deuteronomy1:3 Esi Israelviwo ʋu tso Egipte
Deuteronomy1:4 Mose gblɔ nya siawo na wo esi wòɖu Sixon
Deuteronomy1:5 Esime dukɔa le Yordan ƒe ɣedzeƒe le Moab-nyigba dzi lae Mose de asi se la me ɖeɖe kple efiafia me be:
Deuteronomy1:6 “Aƒetɔ
Deuteronomy1:7 Mitrɔ ne miaho adzo. Miyi Amoritɔwo ƒe tonyigba kple anyigba siwo katã ƒo xlã wo le nuto ma me la dzi. Teƒe siawoe nye: Yordan-bali me
Deuteronomy1:8 Kpɔ ɖa
Deuteronomy1:9 “Ɣe ma ɣi la
Deuteronomy1:10 Aƒetɔ
Deuteronomy1:11 Aƒetɔ
Deuteronomy1:12 Ke ale ke nye ɖeka mate ŋu atsɔ miaƒe fuɖenamewo ƒe agba
Deuteronomy1:13 Miɖe ame nam tso to sia to me ne matsɔ wo aɖo mia nu. Ame siawo nanye nunyala siwo sea nu gɔme
Deuteronomy1:14 Tete mieda asi ɖe nye nya la dzi be edze yewo ŋu.
Deuteronomy1:15 Ale mexɔ nunyala kple nuteƒekpɔla siwo mieɖe nam tso toawo me
Deuteronomy1:16 Megblɔ na ʋɔnudrɔ̃laawo le ɣe ma ɣi me be: ‘Ne dzre dzɔ ɖe amewo dome la
Deuteronomy1:17 Migadrɔ̃ ame le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me o. Midrɔ̃ amegãwo kple ame bubuawo katã ƒe nya sɔsɔe. Migasi ame aɖeke o
Deuteronomy1:18 Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
Deuteronomy1:19 “Míewɔ nu si Aƒetɔ
Deuteronomy1:20 Megblɔ na mi be: ‘Mieva ɖo Amoritɔwo ƒe tonyigba si Aƒetɔ
Deuteronomy1:21 Kpɔ ɖa
Deuteronomy1:22 Ke mi katã mieva gbɔnye hegblɔ nam be: ‘Na míadɔ amewo ɖe mía ŋgɔ be woayi ɖatsa ŋku le anyigba la dzi
Deuteronomy1:23 Nya la dze ŋunye eya ta meɖe ŋutsu wui eve
Deuteronomy1:24 Mena woyi tonyigba la dzi ɖado ɖe keke Eskol-bali me ke
Deuteronomy1:25 Wotsɔ kutsetse siwo wokpɔ le afi ma la ƒe ɖewo vɛ na mí
Deuteronomy1:26 “Ke miawo miedze aglã ɖe Aƒetɔ
Deuteronomy1:27 Mielĩ liʋiliʋĩ le miaƒe agbadɔwo me be: ‘Aƒetɔ lé fu mí. Eya tae wòkplɔ mí tso Egipte be yeatsɔ de asi na Amoritɔwo ne woatsrɔ̃ ɖo.
Deuteronomy1:28 Nu ka ta míele afi ma yim? Vɔvɔ̃ ɖo mí! Elabe míaƒe amedɔdɔawo va gblɔ be dukɔa me tɔwo sɔ gbɔ wu mí
Deuteronomy1:29 Ke nyea megblɔ na mi be: ‘Migavɔ̃ ame mawo o. Milé dzi ɖe ƒo.
Deuteronomy1:30 Aƒetɔ
Deuteronomy1:31 kple gbedadaƒo la miekpɔ ene. Miekpɔ ale si wòkplɔ mí le míaƒe mɔzɔzɔ bliboa me dedie va ɖo afii
Deuteronomy1:32 Togbɔ be wòwɔ nu siawo katã na mi hã la
Deuteronomy1:33 Evɔ wònye eyae dzea ŋgɔ na mi
Deuteronomy1:34 “Esi Aƒetɔ se miaƒe nyawo la
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Ne dzidzime vɔ̃ɖi sia me tɔ aɖe aɖo afɔ anyigba nyui si ŋugbe medo be matsɔ na wo tɔgbuiwo la dzi fĩi.
Deuteronomy1:36 Kaleb
Deuteronomy1:37 Le miaƒe nuwɔna ta la
Deuteronomy1:38 Ke de dzi ƒo na wò kpeɖeŋutɔ Yosua
Deuteronomy1:39 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ na mí katã be: ‘Mia vi suesue siwo mele naneke nyam o

Deuteronomy1:44 Tete Amoritɔ siwo nɔ togbɛawo dzi la do bibibi abe anyiwo ene va kpe mi. Wonyà mi ɖe du nu va ɖo keke Xorma ke
Deuteronomy1:45 Ale miegbugbɔ va fa avi na Aƒetɔ be wòaxɔ na mi
Deuteronomy1:46 “Ale míenɔ Kades ŋkeke geɖe le miaƒe afi ma nɔnɔ me ɣe ma ɣi.

Deuteronomy2:25 Tso egbe dzi la

Deuteronomy3:1 “Emegbe míetrɔ ɖo ta Basan-nutome. Tete Og
Deuteronomy3:2 Ke Aƒetɔ gblɔ nam be: ‘Mègavɔ̃e o. Matsɔ eya ŋutɔ
Deuteronomy3:3 Ale Aƒetɔ
Deuteronomy3:4 Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
Deuteronomy3:5 Du siawo katã nye du sesẽwo. Wo ŋu gliwo kɔ
Deuteronomy3:6 Míetsrɔ̃ du sia du me tɔwo. Míewu ŋutsuwo
Deuteronomy3:7 Ke míelé lãwo katã
Deuteronomy3:8 Ale míexɔ anyigba si le Yordan ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome
Deuteronomy3:9 (Sidontɔwo yɔa Xermon-to la be Sirion
Deuteronomy3:10 Míexɔ Og

Joshua2:20 Ke ne ègblɔ nu si wɔ ge míeva ame aɖe se la
Joshua2:21 Raxab gblɔ na wo be: “Meda asi ɖe miaƒe nya la dzi.” Ena ŋutsuawo dzo. Esa ka dzĩ la ɖe fesre la ŋu.
Joshua2:22 Ŋutsuawo dzo
Joshua2:23 Emegbe ŋutsu eveawo gbɔ va Yosua

Joshua3:1 Esi ŋu ke ŋdi kanya la
Joshua3:2 Le ŋkeke etɔ̃ megbe la
Joshua3:3 eye wogblɔ na ameawo be: “Ne miekpɔ Levitɔwo ƒe nunɔlawo wotsɔ Aƒetɔ
Joshua3:4 ale be miate ŋu anya mɔ si to ge miala
Joshua3:5 Yosua gblɔ na ameawo be: “Mikɔ mia ɖokui ŋu
Joshua3:6 Azɔ Yosua gblɔ na nunɔlawo be: “Mikɔ nubablaɖaka la miadze ameawo ŋgɔ.” Wokɔe hedze wo ŋgɔ.
Joshua3:7 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yosua be: “Tso egbe dzi la
Joshua3:8 Gblɔ na nunɔla siwo tsɔ nubablaɖaka la be: ‘Ne mieva ɖo Yordan-tɔsisia nu la
Joshua3:9 Tete Yosua gblɔ na Israelviwo be: “Mite va afii ne miase Aƒetɔ
Joshua3:10 Ebe: ‘Azɔ ko miele si dze gee kɔtɛe be Mawu gbagbe la le mia dome
Joshua3:11 Mikpɔ ɖa
Joshua3:12 Eya ta azɔ la
Joshua3:13 Ne nunɔla siwo tsɔ anyigba la katã ƒe Aƒetɔ
Joshua3:14 Ale dukɔ la do tso woƒe agbadɔwo me
Joshua3:15 Esi aɖakatsɔlaawo va ɖo Yordan nu
Joshua3:16 tɔsisia tsò ɖe dzigbeme
Joshua3:17 Esime ameawo nɔ tɔgoa me zɔm alea la
Joshua4:1 Esi dukɔ blibo la tso Yordan-tɔsisi la vɔ la
Joshua4:2 “Tia ŋutsu wui eve tso dukɔ la me
Joshua4:3 Gblɔ na wo be: ‘Miyi ɖe teƒe si tututu nunɔlawo tsi tsitre ɖo le Yordan-tɔsisia titina la
Joshua4:4 Ale Yosua yɔ ŋutsu wui eve siwo wòtia tso toawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe me le Israelviwo dome
Joshua4:5 eye wògblɔ na wo be: “Midze ŋgɔ na Aƒetɔ
Joshua4:6 Kpe siawo nanye dzesi na mi
Joshua4:7 ekema miaɖo eŋu na wo be gbe aɖe gbe la
Joshua4:8 Ale ŋutsuawo wɔ nu siwo Yosua gblɔ na wo be woawɔ la. Woɖe kpe wui eveawo tso Yordan titina vɛ
Joshua4:9 Yosua ŋutɔ hã tsɔ kpe wui eve tu tsitre ɖe teƒe si nunɔla siwo tsɔ nubablaɖakaa tsi tsitre ɖo le Yordan-tɔgoa titina. Kpeawo gale afi ma va se ɖe egbe.
Joshua4:10 Nunɔlaawo tsi tsitre ɖe Yordan-tɔgoa titina ʋuu va se ɖe esime wowɔ nu siwo katã Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yosua be woawɔ la vɔ. Nu siawoe Mose ɖo na Yosua be wonewɔ. Dukɔ la zɔ kabakaba ɖo tɔa godo.
Joshua4:11 Esi ame sia ame ɖi go ɖe go kemɛ dzi vɔ la
Joshua4:12 Ruben-to ƒe ŋutsuwo
Joshua4:13 Ŋutsu siwo bla akpa alea na aʋawɔwɔ le Aƒetɔ ŋkume anɔ ame akpe bla ene. Woɖo ta gbegbe si te ɖe Yerixo-dua ŋu.
Joshua4:14 Gbe ma gbe la
Joshua4:15 Azɔ Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yosua be:
Joshua4:16 “Gblɔ na nunɔla siwo tsɔ nubablaɖaka la be woado go le Yordan-tɔgoa me.”
Joshua4:17 Ale Yosua gblɔ na nunɔlaawo be: “Mido go le tɔgoa me!”
Joshua4:18 Kaka nunɔla siwo tsɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe nubablaɖaka la naɖi go ko la
Joshua4:19 Dukɔa ɖi go ɖe Yordan godo le ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi
Joshua4:20 Azɔ Yosua tsɔ kpe wui eve siwo woɖe le Yordan-tɔgoa me la tu ɖe Gilgal.
Joshua4:21 Egblɔ na Israelviwo be: “Ne mia viwo bia mi gbe aɖe gbe be: ‘Nu ka ta kpe siawo le afii?’ mahã la
Joshua4:22 miɖo eŋu na wo be: ‘Mí Israelviwo míezɔ anyigba ƒuƒui to Yordan me kpɔ.
Joshua4:23 Elabe Aƒetɔ
Joshua4:24 Le esia ta
Joshua5:1 Esi Amoritɔwo ƒe fia siwo katã le Yordan-tɔsisia ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe gome kple Kanaanitɔwo ƒe fia siwo le ƒu nu se be Aƒetɔ na Yordan-tɔsisia mie zu ƒuƒuiƒe
Joshua5:2 Ɣe ma ɣi la

Joshua6:4 Nunɔla adrẽ natsɔ agbodzokpẽawo adze nubablaɖaka la ŋgɔ. Le ŋkeke adrẽa gbe la

Joshua6:15 Le ŋkeke adrẽa gbe la
Joshua6:16 Hafi woaƒo xlãe zi adrẽlia la

Joshua6:18 Ke nu siwo wòle be miatsrɔ̃ keŋkeŋ la
Joshua6:19 Ke nu siwo katã wotsɔ klosalo

Joshua6:23 Ale ŋkutsalaawo yi ɖakplɔ Raxab

Joshua7:1 Ke Israel-dukɔ la mewɔ nuteƒe na Mawu le busunu siwo wòbe ame aɖeke megatsɔ o la ƒe nya me o. Ŋutsu aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Axan la tsɔ busunuawo ƒe ɖewo ɣla na eɖokui ale be Aƒetɔ do dɔmedzoe vevie ɖe Israel-dukɔ la ŋu. Axan sia tso Zerax ƒe ƒome me le Yuda-to la me. Tɔ́a ŋkɔe nye Karmi
Joshua7:2 Yosua dɔ ŋutsu aɖewo tso Yerixo ɖo ɖe Ai
Joshua7:3 Wogbɔ
Joshua7:4 Ale woɖo ame akpe etɔ̃ lɔƒo ko ɖa. Ke Israelviwo sí le Aitɔwo nu!
Joshua7:5 Aitɔwo wu wo dome ame bla etɔ̃ vɔ ade. Wonyà wo ɖe nu tso dua ƒe agbo nu va se ɖe Sebarim si le afi ma lɔƒo la me ke
Joshua7:6 Yosua kple dumegãwo dze woƒe awuwo
Joshua7:7 Tete Yosua gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ Mawu
Joshua7:8 Aƒetɔ
Joshua7:9 Gawu la
Joshua7:10 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yosua be: “Tsi tre! Nu ka ta nètsyɔ mo anyi?
Joshua7:11 Nu vɔ̃e Israel wɔ! Wotu nu
Joshua7:12 Esia tae Israelviwo megate ŋu le te nɔm ɖe woƒe futɔwo nu o ɖo. Woasí le futɔwo nu elabe fiƒode le wo dzi be woatsrɔ̃ godoo. Nyemaganɔ kpli mi azɔ o
Joshua7:13 Tsi tre nàkɔ dukɔ la ŋuti! Gblɔ na wo be woakɔ wo ɖokui ŋuti hena etsɔ si gbɔna la. Elabe nya si gblɔm Aƒetɔ
Joshua7:14 Eya ta le ŋdi me la
Joshua7:15 Ŋutsu si dzi metɔ asii
Joshua7:16 Le ŋufɔke ŋdi kanya la
Joshua7:17 Ena ƒome siwo le Yuda-to la me la te va ɖekaɖeka
Joshua7:18 Azɔ la
Joshua7:19 Yosua gblɔ na Axan be: “Vinye
Joshua7:20 Axan ɖo eŋu be: “Nyateƒee
Joshua7:21 le nu siwo míeɖe aboyoe me la
Joshua7:22 Ale Yosua dɔ amewo ɖo ɖe agbadɔ la me
Joshua7:23 Wofɔ nuawo le agbadɔ la me vɛ na Yosua kple Israel-dukɔ blibo la
Joshua7:24 Tete Yosua kple Israelviwo katã lé Axan
Joshua7:25 Yosua biae be: “Nu ka ta nèhe fukpekpe sia va mía dzi? Aƒetɔ ana wò hã nakpe fu egbe!” Tete Israelviwo katã ƒu kpe Axan wòku. Woƒu kpe srɔ̃a kple viawo hã
Joshua7:26 Wofɔ kpewo li kɔ gã aɖe ɖe wo dzi. Kpekɔ la gali va se ɖe egbe. Tete Aƒetɔ ƒe dzi fa. Eya ta woyɔa teƒe ma be Axor-bali.
Joshua8:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yosua be: “Mègavɔ̃ o
Joshua8:2 Nu si nèwɔ na Yerixo-dua kple eƒe fia la la
Joshua8:3 Ale Yosua kple eƒe aʋawɔlawo katã ho ɖe Ai ŋu. Etia kalẽtɔ akpe bla etɔ̃
Joshua8:4 Egblɔ na wo be: “Miyi ɖade xa ɖe dua ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe lɔƒo. Miganɔ adzɔge tso egbɔ o. Minɔ klalo ne mialũ ɖe edzi.
Joshua8:5 Ke nye kple nye amewo katã ya la míazɔ ɖe dua dzi. Ne wodo va kpe mí la
Joshua8:6 Wole mía nya ge ɖe nu va se ɖe esime míana woahe ɖa le dua gbɔ. Wole bubu ge be sisím míegale le yewo nu. Ale míasí le wo gbɔ.
Joshua8:7 Ekema miawo miado le xadeƒe la axɔ dua
Joshua8:8 Ne miexɔ dua vɔ la
Joshua8:9 Ale Yosua na wodzo yi
Joshua8:10 Le ŋdi kanya la
Joshua8:11 Aʋawɔla siwo katã le eŋu la zɔ yi ŋgɔ te ɖe dua ŋu. Woƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe bali si le woawo kple Ai-dua dome la me le dua ƒe dzigbeme lɔƒo.
Joshua8:12 Eɖe aʋawɔla akpe atɔ̃ lɔƒo
Joshua8:13 Ale wona aʋawɔlaawo dze aʋa ɖi; akpa gãtɔ le dua ƒe dzigbe gome
Joshua8:14 Esi Ai-fia kpɔ Yosua ƒe amewo la
Joshua8:15 Yosua kple eƒe amewo nɔ gbugbɔɖemegbe zɔm ɖo ta gbedadaƒo abe ɖe wole sisím le wo nu ene.
Joshua8:16 Tete Aitɔwo yɔ dua me tɔwo katã ƒo ƒu be woati Yosua kple etɔwo yome. Yosua na wonyà wo ɖe nu hedzo le dua gbɔ sãa.
Joshua8:17 Ŋutsu ɖeka hɔ̃ hã mesusɔ ɖe Ai alo Betel o. Wo katã wonyà Israelviwo ɖe nu eye dua tsi nuvo.
Joshua8:18 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yosua be: “Kɔ wò akplɔ dzi do ɖe Ai-dua gbɔ lɔƒo
Joshua8:19 Kaka wòado asi ɖe dzi la
Joshua8:20 Esi Aitɔwo nye kɔ kpɔ megbe la
Joshua8:21 Yosua kple Israelviwo kpɔ be xadelawo xɔ dua
Joshua8:22 Israelvi siwo ge ɖe dua me hã do va
Joshua8:23 negbe Ai-fia la ko. Wolé eya agbagbee
Joshua8:24 Esi Israelviwo wu Aitɔ siwo katã nyà wo ɖe nu le gbedadaƒo kple yi vɔ keŋ la
Joshua8:25 Ame siwo katã wowu gbe ma gbe la ƒe xexlẽme de akpe wui eve sɔŋ
Joshua8:26 Elabe Yosua megbugbɔ eƒe asi si wòtsɔ do akplɔ la ɖe dzi ɖe megbe o
Joshua8:27 Israelviwo ha aboyonuwo kple nyihawo na wo ɖokui
Joshua8:28 Ale Yosua tɔ dzo Ai-dua wòfiã keŋkeŋ
Joshua8:29 Ede ka ve na Ai-fia ɖe ati aɖe me
Joshua8:30 Azɔ la
Joshua8:31 Eɖii abe ale si Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla Mose gblɔ be woaɖii ene le nya si le segbalẽa me la nu. Nu si woŋlɔ ɖi lae nye be: “Vɔsamlekpui si woɖi kple kpe blibo siwo ŋu gakpe meka kpɔ o la.” Le vɔsa gbãtɔ si wowɔ le edzi me la
Joshua8:32 Azɔ la
Joshua8:33 Tete Israelviwo katã: eɖanye ame tsitsi
Joshua8:34 Tete Yosua xlẽ seawo katã
Joshua8:35 Exlẽ se siwo katã Mose de la na takpelaawo keŋ; nyɔnuwo
Joshua9:1 Fia siwo katã le Yordan ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe gome la se Israelviwo ƒe dziɖuɖu la. Woawoe nye Xititɔwo
Joshua9:2 Ale woƒo ƒu
Joshua9:3 Ke Gibeontɔwo ya se nu si Yosua tu kple Yerixotɔwo kple Aitɔwo.
Joshua9:4 Ale woawo ya wɔ aye aɖe. Wodi nuɖuɖu na mɔzɔzɔ
Joshua9:5 Wodo afɔkpa xoxo
Joshua9:6 Tete woyi Yosua gbɔ le asaɖa la me le Gilgal eye wògblɔ na eya kple Israel-ŋutsuwo be: “Anyigba si dzi míetso va la metsɔ o. Ale míedi be miabla nu kpli mí.”
Joshua9:7 Ke Israel-ŋutsuwo gblɔ na Xivitɔwo be: “Ðewohĩ mietso didiƒe aɖeke o. Ale ke wɔ míabla nu kpli mi?”
Joshua9:8 Gibeontɔwo ɖo eŋu be: “Wò dɔlawo míenye.” Yosua bia wo be: “Ame kawo mienye? Afi kae mietso?”
Joshua9:9 Woɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Amegã
Joshua9:10 kple nu si wòtu kple Amoritɔwo ƒe fia eveawo
Joshua9:11 Míaƒe ame tsitsiwo kple dukɔmetɔwo katã gblɔ na mí be míadi nuɖuɖu ɖe asi ne míadze mɔ ava do go mi. Wobe miaƒe dɔlawo yewonye eya ta míava bla nu kpli mi.
Joshua9:12 Abolo si míetsɔ ɖe asi lae nye esi. Gbe si gbe míedze mɔ tso mía de la
Joshua9:13 Waingolo siawo la
Joshua9:14 Ale Israel-ŋutsuwo xɔ Gibeontɔwo ƒe nuɖuɖua ƒe ɖe. Evɔ la
Joshua9:15 Tete Yosua wɔ ŋutifafa kple Gibeontɔwo
Joshua9:16 Esi wobla nu kple Gibeontɔwo vɔ ƒe ŋkeke etɔ̃ megbe la
Joshua9:17 Israelviwo dze mɔ eye le ŋkeke etɔ̃a gbe la
Joshua9:18 Ke Israelviwo mewu wo o
Joshua9:19 Tete wo kplɔlawo katã gblɔ na wo be: “Míetà Aƒetɔ
Joshua9:20 Le atam si míeka ta la
Joshua9:21 Tete kplɔlaawo gagblɔ na wo be: “Mina ne woatsi agbe.” Ale Gibeontɔwo va zu nakefɔlawo kple tɔmedelawo na ameha blibo la abe ale si kplɔlaawo gblɔe ene.
Joshua9:22 Azɔ Yosua na woyɔ Gibeontɔwo va egbɔ eye wògblɔ na wo be: “Nu ka ta mieble mí gblɔ be didiƒe kee yewotso
Joshua9:23 Azɔ aɖi mia ŋu. Kluviwo
Joshua9:24 Woɖo eŋu na Yosua be: “Nu si ta míetre aye sia lae nye be míese be Aƒetɔ
Joshua9:25 Kpɔ ɖa
Joshua9:26 Ale Yosua xɔ na wo
Joshua9:27 Ke tso gbe ma gbe dzi la
Joshua10:1 Yerusalem-fia
Joshua10:2 Nya sia sese do ŋɔdzi na fia la ŋutɔŋutɔ
Joshua10:3 Ale Yerusalem-fia
Joshua10:4 “Miva kpe ɖe ŋunye ne míaho aʋa ɖe Gibeontɔwo ŋu elabe woyi ɖawɔ ŋutifafa kple Yosua kpakple Israelviwo.”
Joshua10:5 Tete Yerusalem-fia
Joshua10:6 Gibeontɔwo dɔ ame ɖo ɖe Yosua le asaɖa la me le Gilgal be: “Amegã
Joshua10:7 Ale Yosua kple eƒe aʋakɔ kpakple kalẽtɔwo katã ho tso Gilgal.
Joshua10:8 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yosua be: “Mègavɔ̃ wo o
Joshua10:9 Yosua kple eƒe aʋakɔ la zɔ zã tso Gilgal va Gibeon eye wova ƒo ɖe Amoritɔwo dzi kpoyi.
Joshua10:10 Tete Aƒetɔ na wolulu esime wokpɔ Israelviwo. Israelviwo wu wo nyamanyama le Gibeon
Joshua10:11 Esi wonɔ sisím le Israel nu tso Bet-Xoron nɔ abu ɖim yina la
Joshua10:12 Gbe si gbe Aƒetɔ na Israelviwo ɖu Amoritɔwo dzi la
Joshua10:13 Tete ɣe nɔ te ɖi
Joshua10:14 Ale Aƒetɔ wɔ ɖe amegbetɔ ƒe gbe dzi gbe ma gbe. Ŋkeke aɖeke menɔ nenema kpɔ o
Joshua10:15 Le esia megbe la
Joshua10:16 Ke fia atɔ̃awo ya sí yi ɖabè ɖe agado me le Makeda.
Joshua10:17 Ame aɖe yi ɖagblɔ na Yosua be wokpɔ fia atɔ̃awo
Joshua10:18 Yosua gblɔ be: “Mimli kpe gãwo tu agadoa nu
Joshua10:19 ke miawo ŋutɔ miganɔ afi ma o. Miawo miti futɔawo yome
Joshua10:20 Yosua kple Israel-ʋakɔwo wu futɔawo nyamanyama hetsrɔ̃ wo katã kloe. Ke wo dome ame ʋɛ aɖewo sí yi ɖabè ɖe woƒe sitsoƒedu sesẽwo me.
Joshua10:21 Aʋawɔlaawo katã gbugbɔ va Yosua gbɔ le asaɖa la me le Makeda dedie. Ema megbe la
Joshua10:22 Azɔ Yosua gblɔ be: “Miɖe nu le agadoa nu ne miakplɔ fia atɔ̃ mawo do goe vɛ nam.”
Joshua10:23 Wokplɔ fia atɔ̃awo
Joshua10:24 Esi wokplɔ wo va Yosua gbɔe la
Joshua10:25 Yosua gblɔ na wo be: “Migavɔ̃ o
Joshua10:26 Emegbe Yosua wu fiaawo. Ede ka ve na wo ɖe ati atɔ̃ ŋu
Joshua10:27 Esi ɣe yina to ɖo ge la
Joshua10:28 Yosua xɔ Makeda-du gbe ma gbe
Joshua10:29 Eyome eya kple eƒe aʋakɔ la katã ho tso Makeda yi Libna
Joshua10:30 Aƒetɔ tsɔ dua kple emefia siaa de asi na Israelviwo
Joshua10:31 Yosua kple eƒe aʋakɔ la katã ho tso Libna yi Laxis. Woɖe to ɖe dua
Joshua10:32 Aƒetɔ na Israelviwo ɖu Laxistɔwo dzi le ŋkeke evea gbe. Wowu dua me tɔwo katã abe ale si wowɔ le Libna ene; womegblẽ ɖeke ɖi o.
Joshua10:33 Gezer-fia Horam ho va be yeava xɔ na Laxistɔwo. Ke Yosua ɖu eya kple eƒe aʋakɔwo hã dzi keŋkeŋ ale be wo dometɔ aɖeke metsi agbe o.
Joshua10:34 Yosua ho kple eƒe aʋakɔ la tso Laxis yi Eglon. Woɖe to ɖe dua
Joshua10:35 Woɖu dua me tɔwo dzi gbe ma gbe ke
Joshua10:36 Emegbe la
Joshua10:37 Woɖu Xebrontɔwo dzi. Wowu woƒe fia kple ame sia ame le woƒe duwo me. Yosua gbã dua gbidigbidi abe ale si wòwɔ Eglon-du la ene. Ame ɖeka hɔ̃ hã metsi agbe le eme o.
Joshua10:38 Eyome eya kple eƒe aʋakɔ la trɔ ɖe Debir-du ŋu
Joshua10:39 Woɖu Debirtɔwo dzi. Asi su woƒe fia dzi
Joshua10:40 Ale Yosua ɖu anyigba la katã dzi. Eɖu fia siwo katã le tonyigbawo dzi
Joshua10:41 Ale Yosua ɖu wo dzi tso Kades-Barnea va se ɖe Gaza
Joshua10:42 Yosua ɖu fia siawo katã dzi le aʋahoho zi ɖeka ko me
Joshua10:43 Le nu siawo megbe la
Joshua11:1 Esi Xazor-fia
Joshua11:2 Eɖo ame ɖe fia siwo le tonyigbawo dzi le dzigbeme
Joshua11:3 Nenema ke wòɖo ame ɖe Kanaanitɔ siwo le ɣedzeƒe kple ɣetoɖoƒe
Joshua11:4 Tete woho va kple woƒe aʋakɔwo katã bibibi. Wosɔ gbɔ abe ƒutake ene; sɔwo kple tasiaɖamwo le wo si fũu.
Joshua11:5 Fia siawo katã ƒo ƒu woƒe aʋakɔwo ɖekae eye wova ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Merom-tɔʋu la nu be woawɔ aʋa kple Israelviwo.
Joshua11:6 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yosua be: “Mègavɔ̃ wo o. Hafi etsɔ ɣe alewo ɣi naɖo la
Joshua11:7 Ale Yosua kple eƒe aʋakɔwo va ƒo ɖe wo dzi kpoyi le Merom-tɔʋu la nu
Joshua11:8 Aƒetɔ na Israelviwo ɖu wo dzi. Wonyà wo ɖe nu va se ɖe Sidon kple Misrefot-Mayim kpakple Mizpa-bali me le ɣedzeƒe gome. Wowu wo keŋkeŋ; womesusɔ ame ɖeka hã ɖi o.
Joshua11:9 Ale Yosua na woƒe sɔwo ƒe ata tu eye wòtɔ dzo woƒe tasiaɖamwo
Joshua11:10 Azɔ la
Joshua11:11 Wowu ame sia ame le dua me
Joshua11:12 Ale wɔ Yosua ɖu duawo katã kple woƒe fiawo katã dzi
Joshua11:13 Ke Yosua metɔ dzo du siwo le togbɛwo dzi la ya o; Xazor ɖeɖe koe wòtɔ dzoe.
Joshua11:14 Israelviwo ha aboyonuawo kple lãhawo le duawo katã me; wowu ame sia ame kple yi; womegblẽ ame ɖeka pɛ hã ɖi o.
Joshua11:15 Nu si Aƒetɔ gblɔ na eƒe dɔla Mose be newɔ la
Joshua11:16 Ale Yosua xɔ anyigba la katã. Anyigba la tso tonyigbawo kple woƒe balimewo
Joshua11:17 Anyigba la gatso Xalak-to si le anyigbeme le Seir gbɔ la dzi yi keke Baal-Gad le dzigbeme va se ɖe Lebanon-bali si le anyigbeme na Xermon-to la te. Eɖe aboyo woƒe fiawo katã
Joshua11:18 Yosua wɔ aʋa kple fia mawo eteƒe didi.
Joshua11:19 Duawo dometɔ aɖeke mewɔ ŋutifafa kple Israelviwo o
Joshua11:20 Aƒetɔ ŋutɔ ƒe nuɖoɖo wònye be woasẽ dzi me be yewoawɔ aʋa kple Israelviwo ale be to ema me la
Joshua11:21 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Joshua11:22 Anakitɔ aɖeke megasusɔ ɖe Israel-nyigba dzi o
Joshua11:23 Ale Yosua xɔ anyigba la katã abe ale si tututu Aƒetɔ la gblɔe na Mose ene. Tete Yosua tsɔ anyigba la na Israelviwo abe woƒe domenyinu ene

Joshua13:3 hekpe ɖe Avitɔwo ƒe anyigba si le anyigbeme la ŋu. Wobua anyigba si tso Sixor-tɔʋu la nu le Egipte ƒe liƒo dzi le ɣedzeƒe gome heyi dzigbeme va se ɖe Ekron ƒe liƒo dzi la be enye Kanaanitɔwo tɔ. Filistitɔwo ƒe dziɖula atɔ̃ le du siwo gbɔna la me: Gaza
Joshua13:4 Kanaanitɔwo ƒe anyigba la katã kple Meara
Joshua13:5 Anyigba bubu siwo gasusɔ la woe nye: Giblitɔwo tɔ

Joshua13:10 Anyigba la se ɖe keke Amonviwo ƒe liƒo dzi ke
Joshua13:11 Anyigba la tsɔ Gilead
Joshua13:12 Etsɔ Og ƒe fiaɖuƒe la katã ɖe eme. Fia sia nye ame dzɔtsu mlɔetɔ si susɔ
Joshua13:13 Ke Israelviwo menyà Gesuritɔwo kple Maaxatitɔwo ya ɖa o. Woawo gale Israel-nyigba dzi va se ɖe egbe.

Joshua13:20 Bet-Peor

Joshua15:1 Anyigba la ƒe akpa si Yuda viwo xɔ ɖe woƒe ƒomeawo nu lae nye esi: Woƒe anyigba ƒe anyigbeme de keke Zin-gbegbe ƒe mlɔenu ke le Edom ƒe liƒo dzi.
Joshua15:2 Anyigbemeliƒo sia to Dzeƒu la ƒe mlɔenu tso adɔ̃ si dze ŋgɔ anyigbeme lɔƒo la gbɔ

Joshua15:4 Eyi edzi va ɖo Azmon eye wòzɔ Egipte-tɔʋu la ŋu va wu nu ɖe Domeƒu la nu. Yuda-to la ƒe anyigba la ƒe anyigbemeliƒo lae nye esi.
Joshua15:5 Ɣedzeƒeliƒo lae nye Dzeƒu la va se ɖe afi si Yordan-tɔsisi la de nu ƒu la me le. Dzigbemeliƒo la dze egɔme tso afi si Yordan-tɔsisi la ge ɖe Dzeƒu me le.

Joshua15:8 Liƒo la to Hinom vi ƒe bali la me va to Yebusitɔwo ƒe to la ŋu le anyigbeme afi si Yerusalem le la. Eyome liƒo la to to si le Hinom-bali la nu le ɣetoɖoƒe gome la tame le Refaim-bali la ƒe mlɔenu le dzigbeme.

Joshua15:13 Yosua tsɔ Yuda viwo ƒe anyigba la ƒe akpa aɖe na Yefune vi

Joshua17:6 elabe Manase viŋutsuwo kple via nyɔnuwo xɔ anyigba ɖe teƒe ɖeka. Ke wotsɔ Gilead-nyigba na Manase vi mamlɛawo.

Joshua17:18 Tonyigba la anye mia tɔ. Togbɔ be teƒea nye ave hã la
Joshua18:1 Esi Israelviwo ɖu anyigba la dzi vɔ keŋ la
Joshua18:2 Azɔ la Israelviwo ƒe to adrẽ susɔ siwo mexɔ anyigba si mam wole la ƒe ɖeke haɖe o.
Joshua18:3 Ale Yosua gblɔ na Israelviwo be: “Miaƒe kuviawɔɣi didi. Ɣe ka ɣi gɔ̃ miayi aɖaxɔ anyigba si Aƒetɔ
Joshua18:4 Miɖe ŋutsu etɔ̃etɔ̃ tso toawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe me nam. Mele wo dɔ ge be woayi aɖatsa le anyigba la dzi
Joshua18:5 Woama anyigba la ɖe akpa adrẽ me. Yuda-to la neganɔ eƒe anyigba dzi le anyigbeme
Joshua18:6 Miɖɔ anyigba la ƒe memama adrẽawo wotɔxɛwotɔxɛ ɖe agbalẽ me vɛ nam le afii. Eyome madzidze nu ɖe wo dzi na mi le Aƒetɔ
Joshua18:7 Levitɔwo maxɔ anyigba aɖeke ɖe mia dome o
Joshua18:8 Ale ŋutsuawo dzo yi. Hafi woadzo la
Joshua18:9 Ale ŋutsuawo yi ɖatsa le anyigba la katã dzi. Woɖɔ ale si womae ɖe akpa adrẽ me ɖe woƒe duwo nu la ɖe agbalẽ me. Azɔ wogbugbɔ va Yosua gbɔ le asaɖa la me le Silo.
Joshua18:10 Tete Yosua dzidze nu ɖe anyigba la dzi na wo le Aƒetɔ ŋkume le Silo
Joshua18:11 Anyigba la ƒe memama akpa gbãtɔ ƒe nudzidze dze Benyamin viwo ƒe to la dzi ɖe woƒe ƒomeawo nu. Woƒe anyigba la le Yuda-to la kple Yosef-to la dome.
Joshua18:12 Woƒe dzigbeliƒo tso Yordan-tɔsisi la nu eye wòyi dzi to Yerixo-to la ƒe dzigbeme
Joshua18:13 Azɔ liƒo la tso le afi sia ɖo ta Luz si wogayɔna be Betel le anyigbeme lɔƒo. Eto Aterot-Adar ŋu va zɔ toawo dzi le anyigbeme ɖado ɖe Bet-Xoron ƒe anyigbeme.
Joshua18:14 Le ɣetoɖoƒe gome la
Joshua18:15 Anyigbemeliƒo la dze egɔme tso Kiryat-Yearim godo
Joshua18:16 Liƒo la trɔ zɔ va to
Joshua18:17 Azɔ liƒo la trɔ ɖo ta dzigbeme va to En-Semes
Joshua18:18 Eyi edzi zɔ to la ŋu le gbadzaƒe la ƒe dzigbeme va se ɖe Araba.
Joshua18:19 Tso afi sia la
Joshua18:20 Yordan-tɔsisi lae nye liƒo le ɣedzeƒe gome. Liƒo siawoe ƒo xlã Benyamin viwo ƒe anyigba godoo va kpe le woƒe ƒomeawo nu.
Joshua18:21 Azɔ du siwo nye Benyamin viwo tɔ le woƒe ƒomeawo nu la woe nye: Yerixo
Joshua18:22 Bet-Araba
Joshua18:23 Bubuwoe nye Avim Para
Joshua18:24 Kefar-Amonai
Joshua18:25 Bubuwo hã nye Gibeon
Joshua18:26 Mizpe
Joshua18:27 Rekem
Joshua18:28 Zela
Joshua19:1 Nudzidze evelia dze Simeon viwo ƒe to dzi
Joshua19:2 Woƒe duwoe nye: Beer-Seba
Joshua19:3 Xazar-Sual
Joshua19:4 Eltolad
Joshua19:5 Ziklag
Joshua19:6 Bet-Lebaot kple Saruxen. Wole du wui ene hekpe ɖe woƒe kɔƒewo ŋu.
Joshua19:7 Du bubuwo hã nye Ayin Rimon
Joshua19:8 Kɔƒe siwo katã le du siawo gbɔ va se ɖe Baalat-Beer alo Ramat le anyigbeme la hã le eme. Esiae nye anyigba si Simeon viwo ƒe to la xɔ le woƒe ƒomeawo nu abe woƒe domenyinu ene.
Joshua19:9 Anyigba si Yuda viwo ƒe to la xɔ la lolo na wo akpa eya ta woka ɖe le eŋu tsɔ na Simeon viwo ƒe to la
Joshua19:10 Nudzidze etɔ̃lia dze Zebulon viwo ƒe to la dzi
Joshua19:11 Liƒo la zɔ ɣetoɖoƒe gome va to Marala heto Bedabaset ŋu
Joshua19:12 Liƒo la trɔ tso Sadrid ɖo ta ɣedzeƒe gome va to Kislot-Tabor ƒe liƒo ŋu
Joshua19:13 Esi wòtso le afi sia la
Joshua19:14 Le dzigbeme la
Joshua19:15 Woƒe duwoe nye: Katat
Joshua19:16 Esiae nye anyigba si Zebulon viwo xɔ hekpe ɖe woƒe duwo kple kɔƒewo ŋu
Joshua19:17 Nudzidze enelia dze Isaxar viwo ƒe to la dzi
Joshua19:18 Woƒe anyigba la tsɔ teƒe siawo ɖe eme: Yezreel
Joshua19:19 Xafarayim
Joshua19:20 Rabit Kision
Joshua19:21 Remet
Joshua19:22 Liƒo la va ke ɖe Tabor
Joshua19:23 Esiae nye anyigba si Isaxar viwo xɔ hekpe ɖe woƒe duwo kple kɔƒewo ŋu
Joshua19:24 Nudzidze atɔ̃lia dze Aser viwo ƒe to la dzi
Joshua19:25 Woƒe anyigba la tsɔ teƒe siawo ɖe eme: Xelkat
Joshua19:26 Alamelex
Joshua19:27 Azɔ etrɔ ɖo ta ɣedzeƒe gome va ke ɖe Bet-Dagon
Joshua19:28 Ebron
Joshua19:29 Azɔ liƒo la trɔ va Rama kple Tiro
Joshua19:30 Uma
Joshua19:31 Esiae nye anyigba si Aser viwo ƒe to la xɔ hekpe ɖe woƒe duwo kple kɔƒewo ŋu
Joshua19:32 Nudzidze adelia dze Naftali viwo ƒe to la dzi
Joshua19:33 Woƒe liƒo la tso Xelef kple logotiwo gbɔ le Zaananim
Joshua19:34 Azɔ liƒo la trɔ ɖo ta ɣetoɖoƒe gome va to Aznot-Tabor
Joshua19:35 Woƒe du sesẽwoe nye: Zidim
Joshua19:36 Adama
Joshua19:37 Kedes
Joshua19:38 Yireon
Joshua19:39 Esiae nye anyigba si Naftali ƒe to la xɔ hekpe ɖe woƒe duwo kple kɔƒewo ŋu
Joshua19:40 Nudzidze adrẽlia dze Dan viwo ƒe to dzi
Joshua19:41 Du siwo le woƒe anyigba me la woe nye: Zora
Joshua19:42 Saalabin
Joshua19:43 Elon
Joshua19:44 Elteke
Joshua19:45 Yehud
Joshua19:46 Me-Yarkon kple Dakon kple eƒe anyigba si le Yafo kasa.
Joshua19:47 Ɣeyiɣi aɖewo megbe la
Joshua19:48 Esiae nye anyigba si Dan viwo ƒe to la xɔ hekpe ɖe woƒe duwo kple kɔƒewo ŋu
Joshua19:49 Esi Israelviwo ma anyigba la vɔ la
Joshua19:50 Wotsɔ du si eya ŋutɔ bia la nɛ abe ale si Aƒetɔ gblɔ ene. Du la ŋkɔe nye Timnat-Serax le Efrayim-to dzi. Yosua gbugbɔe tso eye wòɖo nɔƒe ɖe eme.
Joshua19:51 Anyigba siae nunɔla Eleazar kple Yosua
Joshua20:1 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yosua be: “Gblɔ na Israelviwo be:
Joshua20:2 ‘Mitia sitsoƒedu siwo ŋu meƒo nu le na mi va yi to Mose dzi la.
Joshua20:3 Du siawo mee amewula si meɖoe wu ame o la
Joshua20:4 Ne amewula la sí yina du siawo dometɔ aɖe me
Joshua20:5 Nenye be hlɔ̃biala la ti eyome va afi ma la
Joshua20:6 Amewula sia anɔ dua me va se ɖe esime woakplɔe va ameha la ŋkume
Joshua20:7 Ale
Joshua20:8 Le Yordan-tɔsisi la ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome le Yerixo ƒe ɣedzeƒe lɔƒo la
Joshua20:9 Du siawoe woɖo ɖi na Israelviwo katã kple amedzro siwo katã le wo dome la. Amewula si meɖo amewuwu hafi wu ame o la
Joshua21:1 Azɔ Levi-to la ƒe amegãwo va nunɔla Eleazar kple Yosua
Joshua21:2 le Silo le Kanaan-nyigba dzi. Wogblɔ na wo le afi ma be: “Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Mose be wòana duwo mí míanɔ wo me eye lãnyiƒewo nakpe ɖe wo ŋu na míaƒe lãhawo.”
Joshua21:3 Ale Israelviwo wɔ nu si Aƒetɔ di be wonewɔ: wotsɔ woƒe du aɖewo kple wo ŋu nyigbawo na Levitɔwo.
Joshua21:4 Ðe wodzidze nu hafi ƒome ɖe sia ɖe xɔ eƒe du. Kehat ƒome si tso nunɔla Aron ƒe dzidzimeviwo dome lae xɔ eƒe duwo gbã. Exɔ du wui ene tso Yuda
Joshua21:5 Kehat ƒomea me tɔ mamlɛawo xɔ du ewo tso Efrayim kple Dan towo kpakple Manase-to afã ɣetoɖoƒetɔ me.
Joshua21:6 Wodzidze nu eye wotsɔ du wui ene na Gerson viwo tso Isaxar
Joshua21:7 Wotsɔ du wui eve na Merari viwo le woƒe ƒomewo nu ɖe Ruben
Joshua21:8 Ale wɔ Israelviwo dzidze nu eye to ewɔwɔ me la
Joshua21:9 Wotsɔ du siwo gbɔna la tso Yuda kple Simeon toawo me na
Joshua21:10 Kehat ƒome si tso Aron ƒe dzidzimeviwo dome
Joshua21:11 Arba. Du sia nye Anak tɔ́ ƒe du. Woyɔnɛ fifia be Xebron. Ele Yuda-tonyigba dzi
Joshua21:12 Ke wotsɔ agbledeƒe siwo le dua gbɔ kple dua ƒe kɔƒewo na Kaleb
Joshua21:13 Hekpe ɖe Xebron si nye sitsoƒedu ŋu la
Joshua21:14 Yatir
Joshua21:15 Xolon
Joshua21:16 Ayin
Joshua21:17 Du siwo wona wo le Benyamin-to la me la woe nye: Gibeon
Joshua21:18 Anatot kple Almon. Wole du ene kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo.
Joshua21:19 Du siwo katã wotsɔ na nunɔla Aron ƒe dzidzimeviwo la le du wui ene hekpe ɖe wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo ŋu.
Joshua21:20 Le Kehat viwo ƒe ƒome mamlɛawo siwo hã nye Levitɔwo gome la
Joshua21:21 Du siawoe nye Sixem
Joshua21:22 Kibzayim
Joshua21:23 Wotsɔ du ene kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo na wo ɖe Dan-to me. Woawoe nye: Elteke
Joshua21:24 Ayalon kple Gat-Rimon.
Joshua21:25 Du eve kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒe siwo wotsɔ na wo le Manase-to afã ɣetoɖoƒetɔ me la woe nye Tanax kple Gat-Rimon.
Joshua21:26 Du kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒe siwo katã wotsɔ na Kehat viwo ƒe ƒome mamlɛa le ewo.
Joshua21:27 Levitɔwo ƒe ƒome bubu aɖe hãe nye Gerson viwo. Wotsɔ du eve kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo na woawo hã le Manase-to afã ɣedzeƒetɔ me. Duawoe nye: Golan le Basan
Joshua21:28 Du ene kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒe siwo wotsɔ na wo ɖe Isaxar-to la me la woe nye: Kision
Joshua21:29 Yarmut kple En-Ganim.
Joshua21:30 Wotsɔ du ene kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo na wo ɖe Aser-to la me. Woawoe nye: Misal
Joshua21:31 Xelkat kple Rexob.
Joshua21:32 Du etɔ̃ kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒe siwo wotsɔ na wo le Naftali-to la me la woe nye: Kedes le Galilea
Joshua21:33 Ale Gerson viwo ƒe ƒomeawo ƒe duwo hekpe ɖe wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo katã ŋu va le du wui ene.
Joshua21:34 Levitɔ siwo ko gasusɔ la woe nye Merari viwo ƒe ƒomeawo. Wotsɔ du ene kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo na wo le Zebulon-to la me. Woawoe nye: Yokneam
Joshua21:35 Dimna kple Nahalal.
Joshua21:36 Wotsɔ du ene kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo na wo le Ruben-to la me. Woawoe nye: Bezer
Joshua21:37 Kedemot kple Mefaat.
Joshua21:38 Du ene kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒe siwo wotsɔ na wo le Gad-to la me la woe nye: Ramot le Gilead si nye sitsoƒedu
Joshua21:39 Xesbon kple Yazer.
Joshua21:40 Ale du siwo katã Merari viwo
Joshua21:41 Levitɔwo ƒe du siwo le Israelviwo ƒe anyigba dzi la le du bla ene vɔ enyi kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo.
Joshua21:42 Lãnyiƒewo le du siawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ŋu godoo va kpe. Nenema wònɔ na du siawo katã.
Joshua21:43 Ale Aƒetɔ tsɔ anyigba si wòka atam be yele tsɔtsɔ ge ana Israelviwo tɔgbuiwo la katã na Israel-dukɔ la. Esi woxɔ anyigba la le edzinɔlawo si vɔ keŋ la
Joshua21:44 Aƒetɔ na woƒe dzi dze eme le anyigba blibo la dzi
Joshua21:45 Nu nyui siwo katã ŋugbe Aƒetɔ do na Israel-dukɔa la su wo si keŋ; ɖeke mesusɔ o.
Joshua22:1 Tete Yosua yɔ Ruben kple Gad towo me tɔwo kpakple Manase-to afã ɣedzeƒetɔ la me tɔwo ƒo ƒu.
Joshua22:2 Egblɔ na wo be: “Miewɔ nu siwo katã Mose
Joshua22:3 Le ɣeyiɣi siwo katã va yi me va se ɖe egbe la
Joshua22:4 Ke azɔ la
Joshua22:5 Ke mikpɔ egbɔ be yewolé ɖoɖo kple se siwo katã Mose
Joshua22:6 Tete Yosua yra wo
Joshua22:7 Azɔ la Mose na anyigba Manase-to afã ɖe Basan. Ke Yosua na anyigba afã mamlɛa ɖe wo nɔviwo gbɔ le Yordan ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe. Esi Yosua do mɔ wo ɖo ɖe wo nɔƒewo la
Joshua22:8 Egblɔ na wo be: “Mitrɔ yi mia nɔƒewo kple kesinɔnu gbogbo siwo miekpɔ. Lãha gbogbo
Joshua22:9 Ale Ruben kple Gad toawo me tɔwo kple Manase-to afã me tɔawo gbugbɔ yi wo nɔƒe. Woklã ɖa tso wo nɔvi Israelvi bubuawo gbɔ le Silo le Kanaan-nyigba dzi
Joshua22:10 Esi Ruben kple Gad kple Manase-to afã ɣedzeƒetɔ va ɖo Yordan-nutowo me le Kanaan-nyigba dzi la
Joshua22:11 Tete wogblɔ na wo nɔvi Israelvi bubuawo be: “Mía tɔwo! Ruben viwo kple Gad viwo kpakple Manase viwo ƒe to afã va ɖi vɔsamlekpui ɖe Yordan-tɔsisi to le míaƒe akpa dzi.”
Joshua22:12 Esi Israelviwo se nya sia la
Joshua22:13 Tete Israelviwo dɔ Pinehas
Joshua22:14 Woɖe ame ŋkuta ewo hã kpe ɖe Pinehas ŋu. Ame siawo tso toawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe me
Joshua22:15 Wova Ruben viwo kple Gad viwo kpakple Manase-to afã ɣedzeƒetɔ la gbɔ le Gilead-nyigba dzi
Joshua22:16 “Ale ke wɔ miedze aglã ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu
Joshua22:17 Mele be míaŋlɔ nuvɔ̃ si míewɔ le Peor la ƒe yomedzenu be o. Ðe menye dɔ vɔ̃e va ɖo Aƒetɔ ŋutɔ ƒe ameha la dome oa? Míeklɔ mía ɖokui ŋuti gɔ̃ hã vɔ o ɖe! Tohehe sia mesu mí oa?
Joshua22:18 Ale ke wɔ miebe yewoagbugbɔ le Aƒetɔ yome azɔ? Ne miawo ɖeɖe miegbugbɔ le Aƒetɔ yome egbe la
Joshua22:19 Ke azɔ la
Joshua22:20 Esi Axan
Joshua22:21 Tete Ruben viwo kple Gad viwo kpakple Manase-to afã ɣedzeƒetɔ me tɔwo ɖo eŋu na ƒometatɔ siwo tso Israelviwo dome va la be:
Joshua22:22 “Mawu ŋusẽtɔ ɖeka la! Eyae nye Aƒetɔ! Ŋusẽtɔ ɖeka lae nye Mawu! Eyae nye Aƒetɔ! Eya ŋutɔ nya nu si ta míewɔ nu sia ɖo. Israel-dukɔ hã nenyae! Nenye aglãe míebe míadze alo atu nu
Joshua22:23 Nenye ɖe míeɖi vɔsamlekpui la be míagbugbɔ le Aƒetɔ yome
Joshua22:24 Madzɔ akpɔ o! Etsɔ si gbɔna tae míeɖii ɖo. Míevɔ̃ be gbe aɖe gbe la
Joshua22:25 Etsɔ Yordan-tɔsisi la do liƒo na míawo kpakple mi Ruben viwo kple Gad viwo. Kadodo aɖeke mele mia kple Aƒetɔ dome o.’ Ale miaƒe dzidzimeviwo ana míaƒe dzidzimeviwo adzudzɔ Aƒetɔ subɔsubɔ.
Joshua22:26 Esia tae míeɖi vɔsamlekpui la ɖo
Joshua22:27 Dzesi si anye ɖase anɔ mí kple miawo
Joshua22:28 Ale míebu be nenye be wova gblɔ nya sia na míawo ŋutɔ alo míaƒe dzidzimeviwo gbe aɖe gbe la
Joshua22:29 Vɔ̃ neto dzi! Mava susu me na mí gbeɖegbeɖe be míadze aglã ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu
Joshua22:30 Esi nunɔla Pinehas kple ƒometatɔawo se Ruben viwo
Joshua22:31 Ale Pinehas
Joshua22:32 Tete Pinehas kple ame ŋkuta siwo kpe ɖe eŋu la trɔ tso Ruben viwo kple Gad viwo gbɔ le Gilead-nyigba dzi heva Israelviwo gbɔ le Kanaan-nyigba dzi
Joshua22:33 Nya si wova gblɔ la dze Israelviwo ŋu eye wokafu Mawu. Ale womegadi be yewoaho aʋa ɖe Ruben viwo kple Gad viwo ŋu ahagblẽ anyigba si dzi wole la o.
Joshua22:34 Ruben viwo kple Gad viwo gblɔ be: “Vɔsamlekpui sia le ɖase ɖim na mí katã be Aƒetɔ nye Mawu.” Ale wona ŋkɔe be “Ðaseɖiɖi.”
Joshua23:1 Le esiawo megbe la
Joshua23:2 Eya ta eyɔ Israelviwo katã
Joshua23:3 Miawo ŋutɔ miekpɔ nu siwo katã Aƒetɔ

Joshua23:5 Aƒetɔ

Joshua23:7 Migatsaka kple dukɔ siwo susɔ ɖe mia dome la me tɔwo o. Migayɔ woƒe mawuwo ŋkɔ
Joshua23:8 Ke boŋ miku ɖe Aƒetɔ

Joshua24:1 Tete Yosua na Israel-toawo katã va kpe ta ɖe Sixem. Eyɔ ame tsitsiwo
Joshua24:2 Tete wòƒo nu na ameha la katã gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ
Joshua24:3 Tete mekplɔ mia tɔgbui Abraham tso Frat-tɔsisia godo va afii
Joshua24:4 eye metsɔ Yakob kple Esau na Isak hã. Metsɔ Seir- tonyigba na Esau
Joshua24:5 Azɔ medɔ Mose kple Aron ɖa eye mewɔ nu geɖe tsɔ ɖe fu na Egiptetɔwo. Emegbe la
Joshua24:6 Esi mekplɔ mia tɔgbuiwo dzoe le Egipte va ɖo Aƒlaƒu la nu la
Joshua24:7 Tete wodo ɣli yɔm. Ale mena viviti do hema mi kple Egiptetɔwo dome. Mena ƒu la ŋe gbagba ɖe Egiptetɔwo dzi
Joshua24:8 Tete mekplɔ mi va Amoritɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi le Yordan-tɔsisi ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome. Wowɔ aʋa kpli mi
Joshua24:9 Azɔ Moab-fia Balak
Joshua24:10 Ke megbe toɖoɖo Bileam eye wòyra mi boŋ. Ale meɖe mi tso esime.
Joshua24:11 Eyome mietso Yordan-tɔsisi la va Yerixo
Joshua24:12 Menyà Amoritɔwo ƒe fia eveawo ɖa le mia ŋgɔ. Wotɔtɔ le du dzi abe nutéame aɖewoe kplɔ wo ɖo ene. Menye miaƒe yi alo dae ye wɔe o.
Joshua24:13 Metsɔ anyigba si ta miekpe fu aɖeke ɖo kpɔ o la na mi. Nenema ke metsɔ du siwo mietso o la hã na mi be mianɔ wo me. Azɔ metsɔ wainbɔ kple amitibɔ siwo mietso o la na mi be miaɖu wo me kutsetsewo.”
Joshua24:14 “Eya ta azɔ la
Joshua24:15 Ke ne Aƒetɔ subɔsubɔ medze mia ŋu o la
Joshua24:16 Tete ameha la ɖo eŋu be: “Míagblẽ Aƒetɔ ɖi aɖasubɔ mawu bubua? Madzɔ akpɔ o!
Joshua24:17 Esime míenye kluviwo le Egipte la
Joshua24:18 Esi míegbɔna anyigba sia dzi la
Joshua24:19 Ke Yosua gblɔ na ameha la be: “Miate ŋu asubɔ Aƒetɔ o
Joshua24:20 Togbɔ be Aƒetɔ wɔ nyui na mi kpɔ va yi hã la
Joshua24:21 Ameha la gblɔ na Yosua be: “Gbeɖe! Aƒetɔ ko míasubɔ.”
Joshua24:22 Yosua gblɔ na wo be: “Yoo
Joshua24:23 Egblɔ na wo be: “Ekema miɖe mawu bubu siwo le mia dome la ɖa
Joshua24:24 Tete ameha la gblɔ na Yosua be: “Aƒetɔ
Joshua24:25 Ale Yosua bla nu kple dukɔ la gbe ma gbe le Sixem
Joshua24:26 Yosua ŋlɔ nya siawo ɖe Mawu ƒe segbalẽ la me. Azɔ eɖi kpe gã aɖe ɖe afi ma ɖe logoti si le Aƒetɔ ƒe kɔkɔeƒea gbɔ la te.
Joshua24:27 Egblɔ na ameha blibo la be: “Mikpɔ ɖa
Joshua24:28 Emegbe Yosua ɖe asi le ameha la ŋu
Joshua24:29 Le ɣeyiɣi aɖewo megbe la
Joshua24:30 Woɖii ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe anyigba dzi le Timnat-Serax
Joshua24:31 Le Yosua ƒe agbenɔɣi blibo la me la
Joshua24:32 Azɔ Israelviwo ɖi Yosef ƒe ƒu siwo wotsɔ tso Egipte vɛ la ɖe Yakob ƒe anyigba dzi le Sixem. Yakob ƒle anyigba sia le Xamor

Judges1:1 Le Yosua ƒe ku megbe la
Judges1:2 Aƒetɔ ɖo eŋu be: “Yuda-to la neho yi. Kpɔ ɖa
Judges1:3 Tete Yuda gblɔ na nɔvia Simeon be: “Va kplɔm yi anyigba si wotsɔ nam la dzi ne maɖawɔ aʋa kple Kanaanitɔwo. Emegbe la
Judges1:4 Esi woyi la
Judges1:5 Wodo go Adoni-Bezek le afi ma
Judges1:6 Esí
Judges1:7 Tete Adoni-Bezek gblɔ be: “Fia bla adrẽ siwo ƒe asi kple afɔ degblefetsuwo wolã la fɔa nuɖuɖu wuwlui le nye kplɔ̃ te ɖuna. Nu si mewɔ na wo la
Judges1:8 Yuda-to la me tɔwo wɔ aʋa kple Yerusalem-dua
Judges1:9 Emegbe la
Judges1:10 Wozɔ ɖe Kanaanitɔ siwo le Xebron-du me la dzi. Woyɔa du sia tsã be Kiryat-Arba. Woɖu Sesai
Judges1:11 Esi Yuda-to la me tɔwo tso le afi ma la
Judges1:12 Tete wo dometɔ ɖeka si ŋkɔe nye Kaleb la gblɔ be: “Ame si ke aɖu Debir-dua dzi ahaxɔe la
Judges1:13 Kaleb ƒe tsɛ ŋutsu Kenaz vi si ŋkɔe nye Otniel lae va xɔ dua. Ale Kaleb tsɔ via Axsa nɛ wòɖe.
Judges1:14 Le srɔ̃ɖegbea la
Judges1:15 Nyɔnua ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Na nanem. Esi nèdam ɖe anyigbemekegbegbe la
Judges1:16 Ke Mose to
Judges1:17 Yuda-to la me tɔwo ho aʋa kpe ɖe wo nɔvi Simeon-to la me tɔwo ŋu
Judges1:18 Yuda-to la me tɔwo xɔ Gaza
Judges1:19 Aƒetɔ nɔ kple Yuda-to la
Judges1:20 Wotsɔ Xebron na Kaleb
Judges1:21 Ke Benyamin-to la me tɔwo menyà Yebusitɔ siwo nɔ Yerusalem la ɖa o
Judges1:22 Yosef ƒe dzidzimeviwo hã ho aʋa ɖe Betel-du ŋu
Judges1:23 Yosef ƒe dzidzimeviwo na woyi ɖatsa ŋku le Betel. Azɔ la
Judges1:24 Tete ŋkutsalaawo kpɔ ŋutsu aɖe si do tso dua me. Wogblɔ nɛ be: “Fia mɔ si míato age ɖe dua me la mí
Judges1:25 Ale ŋutsua fia mɔ wo. Efrayim kple Manase toawo me tɔwo wu ame sia ame le dua me
Judges1:26 Azɔ ŋutsua yi ɖatso du ɖe Xititɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi
Judges1:27 Ke Manase-to la menyà Bet-Sean
Judges1:28 Ke esi ŋusẽ va ɖo Israelviwo ŋu la
Judges1:29 Efrayim-to la me tɔwo hã menyà Kanaantɔ siwo nɔ Gezer la ɖa o
Judges1:30 Zebulon-to la me tɔwo menyà Kitrontɔwo kple Nahaloltɔwo ɖa o
Judges1:31 Aser-to la me tɔwo menyà Akotɔwo
Judges1:32 Esi Aser-to la me tɔwo menyà Kanaantɔ siwo nye anyigba la dzi nɔlawo ɖa o ta la
Judges1:33 Naftali-to la me tɔwo menyà Bet-Semestɔwo kple Bet-Anatetɔwo ɖa o
Judges1:34 Amoritɔwo nyà Dan-to la me tɔwo ɖo ɖe tonyigba dzi
Judges1:35 Ke Amoritɔwo ɖoe kplikpaa be yewomadzo le Ayalon
Judges1:36 Amoritɔwo ƒe liƒo tso Akrabim todomemɔ si le Sela gbɔ
Judges2:1 Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla tso Gilgal va Boxim eye wògblɔ be: “Mena mieʋu tso Egipte
Judges2:2 eye migabla nu kple anyigba sia dzi tɔwo o. Migbã woƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo gudugudu.’ Gake miegbe nye gbe dzi wɔwɔ. Menye nu si tututu mebe migawɔ o lae nye esi miewɔ oa?
Judges2:3 Eya ta nye hã mele egblɔm na mi azɔ be nyemanyà ameawo ɖa le mia ŋgɔ o
Judges2:4 Kaka dɔla la nawu nya la nu la
Judges2:5 Wona ŋkɔ teƒe ma be Boxim
Judges2:6 Esi Yosua na Israelviwo dzo la
Judges2:7 Azɔ le Yosua ƒe agbenɔɣi la
Judges2:8 Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla Yosua
Judges2:9 Woɖii ɖe anyigba si dome wònyi la dzi le Timnat-Xeres si le Efrayim-to dzi le Gaas-to ƒe dzigbeme lɔƒo.
Judges2:10 Esi dzidzime ma katã ku vɔ la
Judges2:11 Tete Israelviwo wɔ vɔ̃ ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu elabe wosubɔ Baalwo.
Judges2:12 Wogblẽ Aƒetɔ
Judges2:13 Wodzudzɔ Aƒetɔ subɔsubɔ
Judges2:14 Ðe esia ta
Judges2:15 Afi sia afi si woyi la
Judges2:16 Tete Aƒetɔ na ɖelawo do na wo
Judges2:17 Ke Israelviwo mese ɖelawo ƒe gbe o. Wodzo le woƒe Mawu gbɔ
Judges2:18 Nenye be Aƒetɔ ɖo ɖela na wo la
Judges2:19 Evɔ kasia ɖela la naku ko la
Judges2:20 Ale Aƒetɔ do dziku ɖe Israelviwo ŋu vevie
Judges2:21 ta la
Judges2:22 Matsɔ dukɔ siawo ado Israelviwo akpɔ be woalé ŋku ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe mɔ la ŋu abe wo tɔgbuiwo ene loo
Judges2:23 Eya ta Aƒetɔ na dukɔ siawo susɔ
Judges3:1 Ale Aƒetɔ na dukɔ aɖewo susɔ be yeatsɔ wo ado Israelvi siwo katã mekpɔ aʋawɔwɔ teƒe kpɔ le Kanaan-nyigba dzi o la kpɔe.
Judges3:2 Ewɔ esia bene yeatsɔ afia aʋawɔwɔ Israelviwo ƒe dzidzime siwo mekpɔ aʋawɔƒe kpɔ o la
Judges3:3 Dukɔawoe nye: Filistitɔwo ƒe amegã atɔ̃awo ƒe duwo
Judges3:4 Wotsi anyi bene Aƒetɔ natsɔ wo ado Israelviwo kpɔ be woawɔ yeƒe se siwo yede na wo tɔgbuiwo to Mose dzi la dzi mahã.
Judges3:5 Israelviwo nɔ Kanaantɔwo
Judges3:6 Israelviwo ɖe dukɔ siawo me nyɔnuwo
Judges3:7 Israelviwo wɔ nuvɔ̃ le Aƒetɔ ŋkume
Judges3:8 Ale Aƒetɔ do dziku ɖe Israelviwo ŋu. Ena Mesopotamia-fia
Judges3:9 Tete Israelviwo do ɣli yɔ Aƒetɔ
Judges3:10 Aƒetɔ ƒe gbɔgbɔ nɔ edzi
Judges3:11 Ale wɔ tomefafa nɔ anyigba la dzi ƒe bla ene va se ɖe esime Otniel
Judges3:12 Tete Israelviwo gawɔ nuvɔ̃ɖi ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu. Eya ta Aƒetɔ na ŋusẽ gaɖo Moab-fia
Judges3:13 Eglon ƒo ƒu Amontɔwo kple Amalekitɔwo kpe ɖe eɖokui ŋu
Judges3:14 Ale wɔ Israelviwo nɔ Moab-fia
Judges3:15 Israelviwo do ɣli yɔ Aƒetɔ
Judges3:16 Ehud tu adekpui nu evee si didi abe sentimeta bla atɔ̃ ene. Esae ɖe ali
Judges3:17 Azɔ la
Judges3:18 Esi Ehud tsɔ nunanaawo nɛ vɔ la
Judges3:19 Ke Ehud ŋutɔ trɔ le dulegba siwo le Gilgal la gbɔ
Judges3:20 Esime fia Eglon le xɔta me
Judges3:21 Enumake Ehud do miasi ɖa
Judges3:22 Adekpuia kple asiléƒea katã bu ɖe lã me nɛ
Judges3:23 Emegbe Ehud do go ɖe akpata me. Edo ʋɔa
Judges3:24 Esi wòdo go dzo la
Judges3:25 Ke esi wolala ʋuu meʋu ʋɔa o la
Judges3:26 Esime wohe ɖe megbe la
Judges3:27 Esi wògbɔ va la
Judges3:28 Egblɔ na wo be: “Mikplɔm ɖo. Aƒetɔ na míeɖu dzi! Míeɖu míaƒe futɔ
Judges3:29 Wowu Moabtɔ kalẽtɔ kako abe akpe ewo sɔŋ ene; ɖeka hɔ̃ hã mesí o.
Judges3:30 Ale Moabtɔwo ge ɖe Israelviwo si me tso ɣe ma ɣi dzi
Judges3:31 Ðela bubu si gado lae nye Samgar
Judges4:1 Le Ehud ƒe ku megbe la
Judges4:2 Ale Aƒetɔ na Kanaan-fia

Judges4:4 Ɣe ma ɣi la

Judges4:7 Makplɔ Sisera

Judges4:9 Debora ɖo eŋu be: “Yoo

Judges4:11 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la

Judges4:15 Kasia Barak nado la
Judges4:16 Barak ti tasiaɖamawo kple aʋakɔ la yome va do ɖe Xaroset-Goyim
Judges4:17 Ke Sisera to afɔ ʋuu va nyɔnu aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Yael
Judges4:18 Tete Yael yi ɖakpe Sisera hegblɔ nɛ be: “Va

Judges5:1 Tete gbe ma gbe la
Judges5:2 “Mikafu Aƒetɔ! Elabe esi dukɔa ƒe aʋakplɔlawo dze ŋgɔ la
Judges5:3 “Mi fiawo
Judges5:4 “Aƒetɔ
Judges5:5 Towo ʋuʋu nyànyanya le Aƒetɔ ŋkume; Sinai-to ma ʋuʋu le Aƒetɔ
Judges5:6 “Le Samgar
Judges5:7 Aʋakplɔlawo nu tso le Israel; wo nu tso keŋkeŋ
Judges5:8 Esi Israelviwo tia mawu yeyewo la
Judges5:9 Nye dzi ku ɖe Israelviwo kplɔlawo kple ame siwo lɔ̃ faa
Judges5:10 “Miƒo nu le eŋu
Judges5:11 Miɖo to miase ɖa! Tsikulawo ƒe ha le ɖiɖim le vudowo to
Judges5:12 “Nyɔ
Judges5:13 Tete dukɔ la ƒe bubume mamlɛawo ɖi abu va; Aƒetɔ ƒe amewo ɖi va egbɔ ɖe kalẽawo ŋu.
Judges5:14 Tso Efrayim woho ɖo ta bali la me
Judges5:15 Isaxar-megãwo le Debora ŋu va do. Isaxar wɔ nuteƒe na Barak. Wole eyome kpledukpledu ɖo ta balia me. Ruben tokɔmetɔwo ya yi adaŋu me; womenya ne ɖe woayi loo
Judges5:16 Nu ka ta nètsi alẽhawo gbɔ? Be nànɔ alẽkplɔlawo ƒe alẽwo yɔyɔ sem ta loo? Ruben tokɔmetɔwo ya yi adaŋu me.
Judges5:17 Gilead ya tsi Yordan ƒe go kemɛ dzi. Nu ka ta Dan ya le tɔdziʋuwo gbɔ? Aser-to la me tɔwo bɔbɔ nɔ ƒuta
Judges5:18 Zebulon nye ame siwo tsɔ woƒe agbe ke ku faa; Naftali hã nenema
Judges5:19 “Fiawo va wɔ aʋa
Judges5:20 Ɣletiviwoe nɔ dziƒo wɔ aʋa la
Judges5:21 Kison-tsisisi lae si kplɔ wo yii
Judges5:22 “Tete sɔwo le du dzi
Judges5:23 Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla be: “Neɖi Meros ŋu! Neɖi emenɔlawo ŋu kpékpekpe! Elabe womeva kpe ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu o; kpe ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu akpe akɔ kple ŋusẽtɔ la o.
Judges5:24 “Woyra Yael
Judges5:25 Tsie Sisera bia
Judges5:26 Yael do asi ɖa tsɔ tsyoti
Judges5:27 Sisera tsra wɔɔ
Judges5:28 “Edo mo ɖe fesre nu; Sisera nɔ do mo ɖa to adzrala me: edo ɣli to adzrala me be: “Ale ke wɔ eƒe tasiaɖamwo meva do kpɔ o? Ale ke wɔ eƒe tasiaɖamfɔwo ƒe ɖiɖi tsi megbe ale?”
Judges5:29 Eƒe nyɔnu nunyalawo ɖo eŋu
Judges5:30 ‘Ðe womele kekem ɖe aboyonuwo ŋu le mamam oa? Nyɔnuvi ɖeka alo eve na ŋutsu ɖe sia ɖe. Sisera naxɔ awu ŋɔŋɔewo
Judges5:31 “Aƒetɔ
Judges6:1 Israelviwo gawɔ nuvɔ̃ɖi ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu
Judges6:2 Midiantɔwo sesẽ wu Israelviwo. Ale be le wo ta la
Judges6:3 Nenye be Israelviwo ƒã nu la
Judges6:4 Ame siawo hona va tsia Israelviwo gbɔ
Judges6:5 Wova dona bibibi kple woƒe lãhawo kple avɔgbadɔwo abe ʋetsuviwo ene. Woawo ŋutɔ kple woƒe kposɔwo mele xexlẽme o. Ðeko wovana gblẽa nu sia nu le anyigba blibo la dzi.
Judges6:6 Ale wɔ wɔna aɖeke mele Israelviwo ŋu le Midiantɔwo gbɔ o
Judges6:7 Esi Israelviwo do ɣli yɔ Aƒetɔ la be neɖe yewo tso Midiantɔwo si me ta la
Judges6:8 Aƒetɔ dɔ eƒe gbeƒãɖela aɖe ɖo ɖe wo gbɔ. Egblɔ na wo be: “Aƒetɔ
Judges6:9 Meɖe mi tso Egiptetɔwo kple ame siwo katã te mi ɖe anyi la si me. Menyà wo ɖa le mia ŋgɔ hetsɔ woƒe anyigba na mi.
Judges6:10 Megblɔ na mi be nyee nye Aƒetɔ
Judges6:11 Tete Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla va kɔƒe aɖe si woyɔna be Ofra la me
Judges6:12 Kasia Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla do ɖe edzi gblɔ nɛ be: “Ŋutsuwɔla kalẽtɔ
Judges6:13 Gideon biae be: “Nye amegã
Judges6:14 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ nɛ be: “Tso kple ŋusẽ si le asiwò la
Judges6:15 Ke Gideon ɖo eŋu be: “Taflatsɛ
Judges6:16 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ nɛ be: “Nyee be meli kpli wò. Àɖu Midiantɔwo dzi abe ŋutsu ɖeka ene.”
Judges6:17 Gideon ɖo eŋu be: “Ne èkpɔ ŋudzedze le ŋunye la
Judges6:18 Meɖe kuku
Judges6:19 Ale Gideon yi aƒeme. Ewu gbɔ̃tsui ɖeka ƒo detsii
Judges6:20 Mawudɔla la gblɔ nɛ be: “Tsɔ lã la kple abolo la da ɖe kpe sia dzi
Judges6:21 Azɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla la tsɔ atizɔti si le esi la nu tɔ lã la kple abolo la dzi. Enumake dzo do tso agakpe la me hefiã lã la kple abolo la katã. Tete mawudɔla la bu vĩi le egbɔ.
Judges6:22 Tete Gideon kpɔ dze sii azɔ be Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔlae yekpɔ eya ta edo ɣli gblɔ be: “Aléle! Aƒetɔ Mawu! Mekpɔ wò dɔla ŋkume kple ŋkume!”
Judges6:23 Ke Aƒetɔ gblɔ nɛ be: “Wò dzi nedze eme. Mègavɔ̃ o. Mèle kuku ge o.”
Judges6:24 Gideon ɖi vɔsamlekpui ɖe afi ma na Aƒetɔ
Judges6:25 Zã ma me ke la
Judges6:26 Emegbe la
Judges6:27 Ale Gideon ɖe ŋutsu ewo le eƒe dɔlawo dome
Judges6:28 Dua me ŋutsuwo fɔ ŋdi kanya
Judges6:29 Wobia wo nɔewo se be: “Ame kae wɔ nu sia?” Le nua wɔla didi tsitotsito vɔ megbe la
Judges6:30 Tete wogblɔ na Yoas be: “Kplɔ viwò ŋutsuvia do go va afii. Edze na ku elabe egbã vɔsamlekpui si míeɖi na Baal
Judges6:31 Ke Yoas gblɔ na ame siwo katã tsi tre ɖe eŋu la be: “Dzree miebe yewoawɔ ɖe Baal nua? Etae miebe yewoaʋlia? Ne ame aɖe ʋli eta la
Judges6:32 Tso gbe ma gbe la
Judges6:33 Tete Midiantɔwo
Judges6:34 Aƒetɔ ƒe Gbɔgbɔ dze Gideon dzi
