Judges6:36 Tete Gideon gblɔ na Mawu be: “Ègblɔ be dzinye to ge yeala aɖe Israel-dukɔ la. Ne ele eme nyateƒe la
Judges6:37 ekema mele alẽgbalẽ tsɔ ge ada ɖe lugbɔƒe. Ne ŋu ke ŋdi
Judges6:38 Eva eme nenema tututu. Esi Gideon fɔ ŋdi la
Judges6:39 Tete Gideon gblɔ na Mawu be: “Meɖe kuku
Judges6:40 Mawu wɔ nenema le zã ma me. Zãmu ƒo anyigba la katã
Judges7:1 Tete Yerub-Baal si nye Gideon kple eƒe amewo katã fɔ ŋdi kanya
Judges7:2 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Gideon be: “Medi be mana miaɖu Midiantɔwo dzi
Judges7:3 Eya ta azɔ la
Judges7:4 Ke Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Gideon be: “Ameawo gasɔ gbɔ akpa kokoko. Kplɔ wo yi ɖe tɔ la nu bene mado wo kpɔ na wò le afi ma. Ne megblɔ be ame aɖe neyi kpli wò la
Judges7:5 Esi Gideon kplɔ ameawo va tɔa nu la
Judges7:6 Ame siwo ku tsia ɖe asiƒome no kple aɖe la le ame alafa etɔ̃
Judges7:7 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Gideon be: “Matsɔ ame alafa etɔ̃ siwo ku tsia no kple aɖe abe avu ene la aɖe mi
Judges7:8 Ale Gideon na ame sia ame gbugbɔ yi enɔƒe
Judges7:9 Le zã ma me ke la
Judges7:10 Ke ne èvɔ̃ be yeayi la
Judges7:11 Ne mieyi la
Judges7:12 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Judges7:13 Esi Gideon va ɖo la
Judges7:14 Ke xɔlɔ̃a ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Israeltɔ Gideon
Judges7:15 Esi Gideon se drɔ̃e la kple eƒe gɔmeɖeɖe la
Judges7:16 Ema ame alafa etɔ̃ la ɖe aʋalɔgo etɔ̃ me
Judges7:17 Egblɔ na wo be: “Ne míezɔ tu woƒe asaɖa la dzi kpuie la
Judges7:18 Ne nye kple nye aʋalɔgo la míeku míaƒe kpẽawo la
Judges7:19 Ale Gideon kple ame alafa ɖeka si le eŋu la zɔ tu futɔwo ƒe asaɖa la kpuie hafi zã titina ɖo. Ŋudzɔnɔlawo ɖɔli wo nɔewo teti ko wova ɖo. Tete Gideon kple etɔwo ku kpẽawo
Judges7:20 Enumake aʋalɔgo eve mamlɛawo hã wɔ nenema ke. Wolé kpẽawo ɖe ɖusi helé akakatiawo ɖe mia
Judges7:21 Wo dome ame sia ame tɔ te ɖe eteƒe le futɔawo ƒe asaɖa la ŋu godoo. Zi tɔ le asaɖa la me eye wode asi dusisi me kple ɣli nɔ sísim.
Judges7:22 Esime Gideon ƒe amewo nɔ kpẽawo kum la
Judges7:23 Woyɔ Israel-ŋutsuwo tso Naftali kple Aser kpakple Manase-to eveawo me
Judges7:24 Gideon dɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Efrayim-tonyigba blibo la dzi be woaɖagblɔ be: “Miɖi va kpe Midiantɔwo. Mixe tɔʋuawo kple Yordan-tɔsisi la nu va se ɖe keke Bet Bara ke!” Ale woyɔ Efrayim-ŋutsuwo katã ƒo ƒu
Judges7:25 Tete woƒe asi su Midian-fia eveawo
Judges8:1 Tete Efrayimtɔwo bia Gideon be: “Nu ka ta nègbe mía yɔyɔ esime nèho aʋa ɖe Midiantɔwo ŋu? Nu ka ta nèwɔ nu sia ɖe mía ŋu?”
Judges8:2 Ke eɖo eŋu na wo be: “Nu si mete ŋu wɔ la
Judges8:3 Mawu na miawo miewu Midian-fia eveawo
Judges8:4 Ɣeyiɣi sia me la
Judges8:5 Esi wova ɖo Sukot la
Judges8:6 Ke Sukot-dumegãwo ɖo eŋu be: “Ðe wò asi su Zebax kple Zalmuna dzi xoxo hafi nèbe míadi nuɖuɖu na wò aʋakɔ la?”
Judges8:7 Gideon ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Yoo
Judges8:8 Esi woho tso afi ma la
Judges8:9 Ale wògblɔ na Penueltɔwo be: “Ne metrɔ gbɔ dedie la
Judges8:10 Zebax kple Zalmuna va ɖo Karkor kple woƒe aʋakɔ la. Ame akpe wui atɔ̃ koe susɔ le ɣedzeƒeviwo dome
Judges8:11 Gideon to asimɔ gã dzi le Nobax kple Yogbeha ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome
Judges8:12 Tete Midian-fia eveawo
Judges8:13 Esi Gideon trɔ tso aʋagbea dzi gbɔna la
Judges8:14 Ekpɔ ɖekakpui aɖe si nye Sukotetɔ
Judges8:15 Esi Gideon va ɖo Sukotetɔwo gbɔ la
Judges8:16 Ale wòtsɔ ŋu kple aŋuka siwo wòwɔ le gbedadaƒo la he to na Sukotetɔwo vevie.
Judges8:17 Emegbe egbã mɔ́ si le Penuel-du me
Judges8:18 Azɔ Gideon bia Zebax kple Zalmuna be: “Ale ke ŋutsu siwo miewu le Tabor-to gbɔ la le?” Woɖo eŋu be: “Woɖi wò ŋutɔ. Wo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe ɖi fia vi.”
Judges8:19 Ke Gideon gblɔ na wo be: “Nɔvinye ŋutsuwoe. Dadaviwo míenye! Metà Mawu na mi
Judges8:20 Enumake wògblɔ na eƒe ŋgɔgbevi Yeter be: “Tso nàwu wo!” Ke eya vɔ̃
Judges8:21 Tete Zebax kple Zalmuna gblɔ na Gideon be: “Wò ŋutɔ tso nàdza mí wu. Ŋutsu ŋutɔe ɖea eƒe ŋusẽ fiana.” Ale Gideon tso hewu wo
Judges8:22 Azɔ Israeltɔwo gblɔ na Gideon be: “Míedi be wò ŋutɔ kple wò dzidzimeviwo nazu mía dziɖula
Judges8:23 Gideon ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Nye ŋutɔ loo
Judges8:24 Eyi edzi gblɔ na wo be: “Medi be mabia nane mi. Ame sia ame netsɔ togɛ si wòha tso gbea dzi la nam.” Midiantɔwo dea sikatogɛ vevie abe Ismaeltɔ bubuawo ene.
Judges8:25 Woɖo eŋu be: “Míana wò faa.” Ale wokeke awu aɖe ɖi
Judges8:26 Sikatogɛ si wonae la ƒe kpekpeme de abe kilo bla eve ene
Judges8:27 Gideon tsɔ sikatogɛawo wɔ nunɔlawo ƒe kɔmewu
Judges8:28 Ale Israelviwo ɖu Midiantɔwo dzi keŋkeŋ
Judges8:29 Azɔ la
Judges8:30 Viŋutsu bla adrẽ nɔ Gideon si. Wonye eya ŋutɔŋutɔ vidzidziwo elabe eɖe srɔ̃ geɖe.
Judges8:31 Ahiãvi hã nɔ esi le Sixem. Eya dzi ŋutsuvi ɖeka nɛ
Judges8:32 Gideon tsi ŋutɔ hafi ku
Judges8:33 Esi Gideon nyaku ko la
Judges8:34 Mlɔeba la
Judges8:35 Gawu la
Judges9:1 Abimelex
Judges9:2 woabia Sixemtɔwo be: “Ne Gideon viŋutsu bla adrẽa katã naɖu mia dzi
Judges9:3 Ale wɔ Abimelex nɔ nɔviwo yi ɖagblɔ nya siawo katã na Sixem-dumegãwo tso Abimelex ŋu ɖe enu. Woƒe dzi trɔ ɖe Abimelex ŋu
Judges9:4 Wotsɔ klosaloga bla adrẽ tso Baal-Berit ƒe gbedoxɔ me nɛ
Judges9:5 Eyi tɔ́a ƒeme le Ofra
Judges9:6 Azɔ Sixemtɔwo kple Bet-milonɔlawo katã va kpe ta le Sixem ɖe logoti si nye ŋkuɖodziti le afi ma la gbɔ
Judges9:7 Esi Yotam se nu si dzɔ la
Judges9:8 Gbe ɖeka la
Judges9:9 Ke amiti gblɔ na wo be: ‘Ðe madzudzɔ nye ami si wotsɔna dea bubu mawuwo kple amegbetɔwo ŋu la wɔwɔ ava nɔ ya ƒom le atiwo tamea?’
Judges9:10 Atiawo gblɔ na gboti be: ‘Wò
Judges9:11 Ke gboti gblɔ na wo be: ‘Ðe magblẽ nye tsi vivi kple kutsetse nyuiwo ɖi ava nɔ ya ƒom le atiwo tamea?’
Judges9:12 Atiwo gblɔ na wainti be: ‘Wò
Judges9:13 Ke wainti gblɔ na wo be: ‘Ðe magblẽ nye kutsetsemetsi si doa dzidzɔ na mawuwo kple amegbetɔwo ɖi ava ɖu fia ɖe mi atiwo dzia?’
Judges9:14 Tete atiwo katã gblɔ na aŋɔka be: ‘Wò
Judges9:15 Ke aŋɔka gblɔ na wo be: ‘Nenye nyateƒe gblɔm miele be miasi ami nam ne manye fia ɖe mia dzi la
Judges9:16 Yotam yi edzi gblɔ na Sixemtɔwo be: “Azɔ esi mieɖo Abimelex fiae ɖe
Judges9:17 Miɖo ŋku edzi
Judges9:18 Ke egbe la
Judges9:19 Azɔ nenye be nu si miewɔ egbe ɖe Gideon kple eƒe ƒomea ŋu tso miaƒe dzime
Judges9:20 Evɔ ne menye nenema o la
Judges9:21 Yotam nɔ vɔvɔ̃m na nɔvia Abimelex eya ta esí yi ɖanɔ Beer.
Judges9:22 Abimelex ɖu Israel-dukɔ dzi ƒe etɔ̃.
Judges9:23 Emegbe la
Judges9:24 Nu sia dzɔ bene woahe to na Abimelex kple Sixemtɔwo kutɔkutɔe
Judges9:25 Sixemtɔwo ɖe amewo woyi ɖade xa ɖe towo dzi ɖe Abimelex ŋuti
Judges9:26 Azɔ la
Judges9:27 Woyi agblewo me ɖagbe woƒe waintsetsewo tsɔ wɔ wain
Judges9:28 Gaal gblɔ be: “Ame ka tɔgbewoe míenye le Sixem? Nu ka ta míele Abimelex subɔm ɖo? Evɔ ɖe
Judges9:29 Ame aɖee tsɔm wɔ dukɔ sia kplɔlae! Anye ne meɖe Abimelex ɖa xoxo! Ɖeko magblɔ nɛ be: ‘Di amewo kpe wò aʋakɔ
Judges9:30 Esi Zebul
Judges9:31 Edɔ dɔlawo dzaa ɖo ɖe Abimelex gbɔ woɖagblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
Judges9:32 Eya ta mia kple wò amewo mifɔ zã miaɖade xa ɖe gbe me.
Judges9:33 Ne ŋu ke ɣe dze la
Judges9:34 Tete Abimelex kple eƒe aʋakɔ la fɔ zã
Judges9:35 Esi Gaal do yi ɖatsi tsitre ɖe dua ƒe agbo nu la
Judges9:36 Gaal kpɔ aʋakɔ la
Judges9:37 Ke Gaal gagblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
Judges9:38 Tete Zebul gblɔ nɛ be: “Menye wòe le nu me ɖim le gbɔgblɔm be: ‘Ame kae nye Abimelex be míasubɔe’ o mahã? Aʋakɔ si ŋu nèle alɔ me ɖem le lae nye esi. Ho azɔ nàyi ɖakpe aʋa kpli wo.”
Judges9:39 Tete Gaal ho dze ŋgɔ na Sixemtɔwo
Judges9:40 Ke Gaal sí
Judges9:41 Abimelex tsi Aruma
Judges9:42 Esi ŋu ke la
Judges9:43 Ekplɔ eƒe aʋakɔ la
Judges9:44 Abimelex kple eƒe aʋalɔgo la va xe dua ƒe agbo nu
Judges9:45 Emegbe Abimelex wɔ aʋa kple dua ŋkeke blibo la. Exɔ du la
Judges9:46 Esi ame siwo le mɔ́ sesẽ si le Sixem me la se nu si dzɔ la
Judges9:47 Amewo yi ɖagblɔe na Abimelex be ameawo ƒo ƒu ɖe afi ma
Judges9:48 ale wòkplɔ eƒe aʋakɔ la yi ɖe Zalmon-to dzi. Azɔ etsɔ fia lã atilɔ da ɖe abɔ. Egblɔ na eƒe amewo be: “Nu si mewɔ miekpɔ la
Judges9:49 Tete ame sia ame le aʋakɔ blibo la me lã atilɔ ɖe asi
Judges9:50 Emegbe Abimelex ho yi ɖatu Tebez. Eƒo xlã dua
Judges9:51 Mɔ́ sesẽ aɖe le dua titina eye dua me tɔwo katã
Judges9:52 Abimelex te ɖe mɔ́ la ŋu be yeawɔ aʋa kple emenɔlawo
Judges9:53 Tete nyɔnu aɖe da tevi tso dzi wova dze ta na Abimelex hegbã ta nɛ.
Judges9:54 Eyɔ eƒe adekplɔvi enumake gblɔ nɛ be: “He wò yi ɖe go nàwumee
Judges9:55 Esi Israeltɔwo kpɔ be Abimelex ku la
Judges9:56 Aleae Mawu ɖo Abimelex ƒe nu vlo si wòwɔ ɖe tɔ́a ŋu hewu nɔvia bla adrẽ la teƒe nɛ.
Judges9:57 Mawu na Sixemtɔwo kpe fu vevie le woƒe ŋutasesẽ ta. Ale Yotam
Judges10:1 Le Abimelex ƒe ku megbe la
Judges10:2 Ekplɔ Israel-dukɔ la ƒe bla eve vɔ etɔ̃. Emegbe la
Judges10:3 Le Tola megbe la
Judges10:4 Ŋutsuvi bla etɔ̃ nɔ esi
Judges10:5 Yair ku
Judges10:6 Azɔ la
Judges10:7 Ðe esia ta
Judges10:8 Wote Israelvi siwo katã nɔ Yordan-tɔsisi la ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome
Judges10:9 Amon viwo ya tso Yordan-tɔsisi la kura gɔ̃
Judges10:10 Tete Israelviwo do ɣli yɔ Aƒetɔ. Wogblɔ nɛ be: “Míewɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe ŋuwò; míegblẽ wò
Judges10:11 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na wo be: “Esi Egiptetɔwo
Judges10:12 Sidontɔwo
Judges10:13 Ke miawo miegblẽm ɖi yi ɖale mawu bubuwo subɔm. Nyemegale xɔxɔ ge na mi azɔ akpɔ o.
Judges10:14 Mawu siwo mietia la
Judges10:15 Ke Israelviwo gblɔ na Aƒetɔ be: “Míewɔ nuvɔ̃. Nu si dze ŋuwò la
Judges10:16 Ale woɖe mawu bubuawo ɖa le wo dome
Judges10:17 Azɔ Amon viwo kpe ta
Judges10:18 Tete Gileadtɔwo kple woƒe kplɔlawo bia wo nɔewo be: “Ame kae adze ŋgɔ akpe aʋa kple Amon viwo? Ame si dze ŋgɔ la
Judges11:1 Yefta nye aʋawɔla kalẽtɔ aɖe tso Gilead
Judges11:2 Gilead srɔ̃ dzi viŋutsuviwo nɛ
Judges11:3 Tete Yefta sí le nɔviawo nu yi ɖanɔ Tob-nyigba dzi. Ame ɖigbɔwo va bɔa ha kplii le afi ma
Judges11:4 Ɣeyiɣi aɖewo megbe la
Judges11:5 Esi aʋa la dzɔ la
Judges11:6 Wogblɔ na Yefta be: “Va nye míaƒe aʋakplɔla
Judges11:7 Ke Yefta ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Mielé fum vevie henyàm do goe tso tɔ́nye ƒeme. Nu ka ta miava nɔ diyem esime mieɖo xaxa me?”
Judges11:8 Ame tsitsiawo gblɔ na Yefta be: “Esia ta tututue míeva be míakpɔ wò ɖo. Míedi be nàyi kpli mí
Judges11:9 Yefta gblɔ na wo be: “Ne miekplɔm meyi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Amon viwo
Judges11:10 Ame tsitsiawo ɖo eŋu be: “Míelɔ̃ ɖe wò nya la dzi. Míaƒe ɖasefoe nye Aƒetɔ.”
Judges11:11 Ale Yefta yi kple ame tsitsiawo
Judges11:12 Yefta dɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Amon viwo ƒe fia gbɔ be woabia be: “Dzre ka le mía dome? Nu ka ta nètso ɖe ŋunye be yeawɔ aʋa kple nye dukɔ?”
Judges11:13 Amon viwo ƒe fia gblɔ na Yefta ƒe amedɔdɔawo be: “Esime Israel-dukɔ tso Egipte va la
Judges11:14 Yefta gadɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Amon viwo ƒe fia gbɔ ake.
Judges11:15 Egblɔ ɖo ɖee be: “Nye Yefta ŋutɔe le nya sia gblɔm: Israel-dukɔ la mexɔ anyigba aɖeke le Moabtɔwo kple Amonviwo si o.
Judges11:16 Nya lae nye be esi Israel-dukɔ tso Egipte gbɔna la
Judges11:17 Wodɔ ame ɖo ɖe Edom-fia be wòaɖe mɔ yewoato eƒe anyigba dzi ayi. Ke egbe. Wodɔ ame ɖo ɖe Moab-fia hã gbɔ; ke eya hã gbe. Ale wɔ Israel-dukɔ la tsi Kades.
Judges11:18 Emegbe la
Judges11:19 Azɔ la
Judges11:20 Ke Sixon meka ɖe Israelviwo dzi ne wòana woato eƒe anyigba dzi ayi o. Ale Sixon ƒo eƒe aʋakɔwo katã nu ƒu
Judges11:21 Tete Aƒetɔ
Judges11:22 Woxɔ Amoritɔwo ƒe anyigba blibo la tso Arnon-tɔsisi la nu le anyigbeme va se ɖe Yabok-tɔsisi la nu le dzigbeme
Judges11:23 Ale wɔ Aƒetɔ
Judges11:24 Nu si wò mawu Kemos tsɔ na wò la
Judges11:25 Wòe de ŋgɔ wu Moab-fia Balak
Judges11:26 Ƒe alafa etɔ̃ sɔŋ nye esi
Judges11:27 Nyemewɔ vɔ̃ aɖeke ɖe ŋuwò o. Nu ka ta wò ya nèwɔ vɔ̃ ɖe ŋunye heho aʋa ɖe ŋunye? Aƒetɔ ye nye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la la. Adrɔ̃e na Israelviwo kple Amon viwo egbe ɖeka.”
Judges11:28 Ke Amon viwo ƒe fia metsɔ ɖeke le Yefta ƒe nya la me o.
Judges11:29 Tete Aƒetɔ ƒe Gbɔgbɔ va Yefta dzi. Eto Gilead kple Manase va do ɖe Mizpa le Gilead
Judges11:30 Azɔ la
Judges11:31 eye metrɔ gbɔ tso wo dziɖuƒe dedie la
Judges11:32 Ale Yefta tso tɔsisi la hekpe aʋa kple Amon viwo
Judges11:33 Du bla evee wòsi
Judges11:34 Esi Yefta gbɔ va wo de Mizpa la
Judges11:35 Esi Yefta kpɔe la
Judges11:36 Egblɔ na tɔ́a be: “Tɔ́nye
Judges11:37 Eyi edzi gblɔ na tɔ́a be: “Medi be nàwɔ nu ɖeka ko nam: ‘Ðe mɔ nam ɣleti eve manɔ ɖokuinye si
Judges11:38 Tɔ́a ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Yi!” Ale wòɖe mɔ nɛ ɣleti eve
Judges11:39 Esi ɣleti evea wu enu la
Judges11:40 be Israel vinyɔnuviwo yina ɖafaa konyi na Gileadtɔ
Judges12:1 Efrayimtɔwo ho aʋa. Wotso Yordan-tɔsisi la va Zafon
Judges12:2 Yefta gblɔ na wo be: “Mía kple nye dukɔ míewɔ aʋa dziŋɔ aɖe kple Amon viwo
Judges12:3 Esi mekpɔ be miele xɔxɔ ge nam o la
Judges12:4 Tete Yefta ƒo Gileadtɔwo katã nu ƒu
Judges12:5 Gileadtɔwo yi ɖaxe Yordan-tɔsisi la tsoƒewo na Efrayimtɔwo. Ne Efrayimtɔ aɖe le sísim va ɖo tɔtsoƒea la
Judges12:6 Wogblɔna nɛ be: “Gblɔ be Sibolet!” Ke eya gblɔna be Zibolet

Judges13:1 Azɔ Israelviwo gawɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu
Judges13:2 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Judges13:3 Tete Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla ɖe eɖokui fia nyɔnu la
Judges13:4 Eya ta lé be na ɖokuiwò. Mègano wain alo aha muame aɖeke o. Nenema ke mègaɖu nu makɔmakɔ aɖeke hã o!
Judges13:5 Nyateƒee
Judges13:6 Tete nyɔnu la yi ɖagblɔ na srɔ̃a be: “Mawu ƒe ame aɖe va gbɔnye. Ele abe mawudɔla ene
Judges13:7 Ke egblɔ nam be: ‘Kpɔ ɖa èle fu fɔ ge adzi ŋutsuvi
Judges13:8 Tete Manoax do gbe ɖa na Aƒetɔ gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ
Judges13:9 Mawu se Manoax ƒe gbedodoɖa la. Esi Manoax srɔ̃ bɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe agble me la
Judges13:10 Ale nyɔnua ƒu du enumake yi ɖagblɔ na srɔ̃a be: “Kpɔ ɖa
Judges13:11 Manoax tso dze nyɔnua yome. Esi wova ŋutsua gbɔ la
Judges13:12 Azɔ Manoax biae be: “Ne wò nya la va eme la
Judges13:13 Mawudɔla la ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Nu siwo katã megblɔ na srɔ̃wò be newɔ la
Judges13:14 Megaɖu wainkanu aɖeke o. Megano wain alo aha muame aɖeke o. Nenema ke megaɖu nu makɔmakɔ aɖeke hã o. Newɔ se siwo katã mede nɛ la dzi.”
Judges13:15 Tete Manoax gblɔ na Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla la be: “Taflatsɛ
Judges13:16 Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla la ɖo eŋu na Manoax be: “Ne èsikam ɖi hã la
Judges13:17 Manoax biae be: “Ŋkɔwò ɖe? Míedi be ne wò nya la va eme la
Judges13:18 Mawudɔla la bia be: “Nu ka ta nèle nye ŋkɔ biam? Mènya be ŋkɔ wɔnuku wònye oa?”
Judges13:19 Ale Manoax lé gbɔ̃vi aɖe
Judges13:20 Esi dzo ƒe aɖewo de dzi le vɔsamlekpuia dzi la
Judges13:21 Ke Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla megaɖe eɖokui fia Manoax kple srɔ̃a kpɔ o. Azɔ Manoax dze sii be Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla wònye.
Judges13:22 Manoax gblɔ na srɔ̃a be: “Míele kuku ge

Judges13:24 Emegbe nyɔnu la dzi ŋutsuvi
Judges13:25 Aƒetɔ ƒe Gbɔgbɔ de asi dɔwɔwɔ me le eme le Dan ƒe asaɖa si le Zora kple Estaol dome la me.
Judges14:1 Simson yi Timna gbe ɖeka
Judges14:2 Esi wògbɔ va aƒe la
Judges14:3 Ke tɔ́a kple nɔa biae be: “Nu ka ta nèdi be yeayi aɖaɖe srɔ̃ tso Filistitɔ bolobolotɔwo dome? Ðe mèkpɔ nyɔnu aɖeke aɖe le nɔviwòwo vinyɔnuwo dome alo tso dukɔ blibo la dome o taea?” Ke Simson gblɔ na tɔ́a be: “Bia eta nam maɖe; eya ƒe nue lé dzi nam.”
Judges14:4 Ke tɔ́a kple nɔa medze sii be Aƒetɔ ye de susua tame nɛ o
Judges14:5 Ale Simson kple tɔ́a kpakple nɔa yi ɖe Timna. Esime wonɔ Timnatitɔwo ƒe waingblewo me tom yina la
Judges14:6 Tete Aƒetɔ ƒe Gbɔgbɔ ɖo Simson me kple ŋusẽ
Judges14:7 Azɔ la
Judges14:8 Ŋkeke aɖewo megbe la
Judges14:9 Eɖee ɖe asi nɔ nyinyim va tɔ́a kple nɔa gbɔ. Ena ɖe woawo hã wonyi
Judges14:10 Simson tɔ́ yi nyɔnuvia ƒeme
Judges14:11 Esi Filistitɔwo kpɔe la
Judges14:12 Simson gblɔ na wo be: “Medi be mato adzo na mi. Ne mieɖe egɔme nam le srɔ̃ɖeŋkeke adrẽawo me la
Judges14:13 Evɔ ne miete ŋu ɖe egɔme nam o la
Judges14:14 Simson gblɔ be: “Nuɖuɖu do tso nuɖula la me; nu vivi aɖe do tso ŋusẽtɔ la me.” Ŋkeke etɔ̃ sɔŋ va yi wode adzo la gɔme ɖe ge do kpo.
Judges14:15 Le ŋkeke enea gbe la
Judges14:16 Tete Simson srɔ̃ fa avi nɛ gblɔ be: “Èlém ɖe dɔme! Mèlɔ̃m kura o! Èto adzo na mía deviwo
Judges14:17 Ke ele avia fafa dzi le srɔ̃ɖeŋkeke adrẽawo katã ɖuɖu me. Mlɔeba le ŋkeke adrẽa gbe la
Judges14:18 Le ŋkeke adrẽa gbe hafi ɣe naɖo to la
Judges14:19 Tete Aƒetɔ ƒe Gbɔgbɔ ɖo Simson me ŋusẽtɔe
Judges14:20 Azɔ wotsɔ Simson srɔ̃ la na exɔlɔ̃ si wòdi wònɔ eŋu kplíkplikpli le srɔ̃ɖeŋkekea ɖuɖu me la
Judges15:1 Ɣeyiɣi aɖewo megbe la
Judges15:2 Egblɔ na Simson be: “Nye ya mebu be mègadi eƒe nya aɖeke kura o
Judges15:3 Simson gblɔ be: “Fifia ya la
Judges15:4 Ale Simson yi ɖalé abei alafa etɔ̃. Eɖe wo eveve
Judges15:5 Etɔ dzo akakatiawo nu eye wòɖe asi le abeiawo ŋu ɖo ɖe Filistitɔwo ƒe agblewo me. To mɔ sia nu la
Judges15:6 Esi Filistitɔwo bia ame si wɔ nua la ta se la
Judges15:7 Simson gblɔ na wo be: “Ne miewɔ alea hã la
Judges15:8 Elũ ɖe wo dzi eye wòwu wo dometɔ geɖe nyamanyama. Emegbe la
Judges15:9 Azɔ Filistitɔwo ho va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Yuda
Judges15:10 Tete Yuda-ŋutsuwo bia wo be: “Nu ka ta mieva xa mí?” Woɖo eŋu be: “Simson lé ge míeva abla
Judges15:11 Ale Yuda-ŋutsu akpe etɔ̃ yi ɖe agado la me le Etam
Judges15:12 Wogblɔ nɛ be: “Ðe míeva be míalé wò abla aɖade Filistitɔwo si.” Simson gblɔ na wo be: “Mika atam tsɔ ɖo kpe edzi nam be menye miawo ŋutɔe be yewoawum o.”
Judges15:13 Wogblɔ nɛ be: “Gbeɖe! Ðeko míebe míabla wò aɖade wo si
Judges15:14 Esi wova ɖo Lexi-dua me la
Judges15:15 Ekpɔ tedziglã mumu aɖe
Judges15:16 Ale Simson dzi ha be: “Tedzi ƒe glã metsɔ wu ame akpee! Tedzi ƒe glãe metsɔ li kɔ woe gleglegle!”
Judges15:17 Esi wòdzi ha la vɔ la
Judges15:18 Tete tsikɔ wui vevie
Judges15:19 Tete Mawu fé teƒe globo aɖe si le Lexi eye tsi do le eme wòno. Esi agbe gaɖo eme la
Judges15:20 Simson kplɔ Israel-dukɔ la le Filistitɔwo ƒe dziɖuɣi ƒe bla eve sɔŋ.
Judges16:1 Simson yi ɖe Gaza si nye Filistitɔwo ƒe du aɖe me. Ekpɔ gbolo aɖe le afi ma

Judges16:4 Emegbe la

Judges16:9 Ameawo dometɔ aɖewo de xa ɖe xɔ bubu si le wo gbɔ la me. Nyɔnua do ɣli gblɔ nɛ be: “Simson

Judges16:14 Ale esi Simson dɔ alɔ̃ la

Judges16:16 Nyɔnu la nɔ fu ɖem nɛ nɔ ebiabia dzi gbe sia gbe. Mlɔeba fuɖename la va glo Simson abe wòaku boŋ gɔ̃ hã ene
Judges16:17 eye wògblɔ eƒe dzimenyawo katã na Delila. Ebe: “Talũhɛ mede ta ŋu nam kpɔ o

Judges16:21 Filistitɔwo lée

Judges16:24 Esi dukɔ la kpɔe la
Judges16:25 Esi wonɔ dzidzɔ kpɔm la

Judges16:27 Azɔ la ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo yɔ xɔa taŋ; Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo katã le afi ma. Ŋutsu kple nyɔnu siwo ade ame akpe etɔ̃ la le xɔa tame

Judges17:1 Ŋutsu aɖe nɔ Efrayim-tonyigba dzi kpɔ si ŋkɔe nye Mixa.
Judges17:2 Egblɔ na nɔa be: “Ɣe ma ɣi esi ame aɖe fi wò klosaloga akpe ɖeka alafa ɖeka la
Judges17:3 Esi wògbugbɔ ga la na nɔa la
Judges17:4 Azɔ la egbugbɔ ga la na nɔa. Ke nɔa ɖe klosaloga alafa eve le eŋu tsɔ yi na klosalonutula
Judges17:5 Mawuxɔ nɔ Mixa si. Etɔ kɔmewu
Judges17:6 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Judges17:7 Ɣe ma ɣi me tututu la
Judges17:8 Eʋu tso Betlehem le Yuda nɔ afi si wòanɔ la dim. Ezɔ mɔ ʋuu va ɖo Efrayim-tonyigba la dzi
Judges17:9 Mixa biae be: “Afi ka nètso va?” Eɖo eŋu be: “Levitɔ menye tso Betlehem le Yuda. Ðeko mele tsatsam le afi aɖe dim manɔ.”
Judges17:10 Mixa gblɔ be: “Tsi gbɔnye ne nànye tɔ́ kple nunɔla nam. Maxe klosaloga ewo na wò ƒe sia ƒe. Madi avɔ na wò
Judges17:11 Levitɔ la lɔ̃ be yeanɔ egbɔ

Judges17:13 Tete Mixa gblɔ be: “Menya azɔ be Aƒetɔ le nana ge be agbenɔnɔ nadze edzi nam

Judges18:10 Ne mieyi afi ma la

Judges18:13 Esi woho tso afi ma la

Judges18:15 Ale woge ɖe aƒea me
Judges18:16 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la

Judges18:20 Nya la dzɔ dzi na nunɔla la
Judges18:21 Wotrɔ hedze mɔ. Wona ɖeviwo

Judges18:24 Eɖo eŋu na wo be: “Mibiam be nya kae dzɔ hã. Mietsɔ nye mawu si mewɔ hekplɔ nye nunɔla hã kpe ɖe eŋu dzo yinae. Nu kae gasusɔ hafi miebiam be nya ka dzɔ mahã?”
Judges18:25 Ke Dan viwo gblɔ nɛ be: “Ne mèdi be dɔmedzoetɔwo nadze yewo dzi atsrɔ̃ wò kple wò aƒemetɔwo keŋkeŋ o la
Judges18:26 Ale Dan viwo gayi woƒe mɔzɔzɔ dzi. Esi Mixa kpɔ be wosẽ wu ye la

Judges19:1 Ɣe ma ɣi la

Judges19:4 Ðetugbia tɔ́ si nye toa la na wòtsi egbɔ ŋkeke etɔ̃. Woɖu nu

Judges19:15 Tete wodze le mɔa dzi ge ɖe Gibea-dua me be yewoatsi afi ma adɔ. Woyi ɖadro ɖe dua ƒe ablɔ me elabe ame aɖeke mena dzeƒe wo ɖe eƒeme o.

Judges20:34 Ŋutsu aʋawɔla akpe ewo tso Israel blibo la me dze Gibea-dua dzi. Aʋa la nu sẽ ŋutɔ. Ke Benyamin viawo menya be dzɔgbevɔ̃e le dzɔdzɔ ge ɖe yewo dzi o.
Judges20:35 Aƒetɔ na Israelviwo ɖu Benyamin viwo dzi ŋɔdzitɔe. Benyamin viwo ƒe aʋawɔla akpe bla eve vɔ atɔ̃ kple alafa ɖeka tsi aʋa gbe ma gbe.

Judges20:40 Tete dzudzɔ de dzi le du la ŋu kɔtɔɔ

Judges20:42 Wosí le Israel-ŋutsuwo nu to gbedzimɔ
Judges20:43 Woɖe to ɖe Benyamin viwo eye wonyà wo ɖe nu. Wotsrɔ̃ wo tso afi si wodro ɖo va se ɖe Gibea-dua kasa le ɣedzeƒe gome.
Judges20:44 Aʋawɔla kalẽtɔ akpe wui enyi sɔŋ tsi aʋa le Benyamin viwo dome.
Judges20:45 Tete wotrɔ hesí ɖo ta gbedzi va se ɖe Rimon-kpe la gbɔ. Wowu ame akpe atɔ̃ le woƒe megbexelawo ŋu le mɔ dzi. Woti wo yome va se ɖe Gidom
Judges20:46 Aʋawɔla kalẽtɔ siwo katã kpla yi

Judges21:1 Israel-ŋutsuwo ƒo ƒu ɖe Mizpa eye woka atam be: “Ne mía dometɔ aɖe tsɔ via nyɔnu na Benyamintɔ aɖe wòɖe fĩi!”
Judges21:2 Esi dukɔ la va Betel la
Judges21:3 Wogblɔ be: “O Aƒetɔ
Judges21:4 Ŋufɔke ŋdi kanya la
Judges21:5 Wobia be: “Ame ka le Israel-toawo katã me si meva takpeƒe le Aƒetɔ gbɔ le Mizpa o?” Do ŋgɔ la

Judges21:14 Ale Benyamin viwo trɔ gbɔ ɣe ma ɣi

Judges21:16 Tete ameha la ƒe amegãwo gblɔ be: “Ale ke míawɔ hafi akpɔ nyɔnu na ame siwo susɔ laa? Elabe nyɔnuwo vɔ le Benyamin viwo dome keŋkeŋ.”
Judges21:17 Wogblɔ be: “Benyamin viwo ƒe anyigba nye woƒe ame siwo susɔ la tɔ. To aɖeke matsrɔ̃ keŋkeŋ le Israel-dukɔ me o.

Judges21:19 Wogblɔ be

Judges21:23 Tete Benyamin viwo wɔ nenema
Judges21:24 Azɔ la
Judges21:25 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Ruth1:1 Esime ɖelawo nɔ dzi ɖum le Israel-dukɔ me la
Ruth1:2 Ŋutsua ŋkɔe nye Elimelex
Ruth1:3 Ke Elimelex
Ruth1:4 Ŋutsuvi eve siawo ɖe Moab-nyɔnuwo; ɖeka ŋkɔe nye Orpa
Ruth1:5 eye Maxlon kple Xilion va ku. Ale Naomi tsi anyi
Ruth1:6 Esi Naomi se le Moab be dɔa ke le wo de elabe Aƒetɔ ganyo dɔme na wo
Ruth1:7 Ale wòdze mɔ tso afi si wònɔ la kple lɔ̃xoyɔvi eveawo hetrɔ yina Yuda-nyigba dzi.
Ruth1:8 Ke Naomi gblɔ na lɔ̃xoyɔvi eveawo be: “Mitrɔ
Ruth1:9 Aƒetɔ neve mia dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe nu be miakpɔ atsuƒe anɔ.” Tete wògbugbɔ nu na wo
Ruth1:10 eye wogblɔ nɛ be: “Gbeɖe
Ruth1:11 Ke Naomi gblɔ be: “Vinyewo
Ruth1:12 Vinyewo
Ruth1:13 ɖe miaxa ɖe wo ta anɔ lalam ʋuu
Ruth1:14 Tete wogafa avi sesĩe. Emegbe Orpa gbugbɔ nu na lɔ̃xoa
Ruth1:15 Naomi gblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ nɔviwò ɖa! Etrɔ yina wo detɔwo kple eƒe mawuwo gbɔ. Wò hã trɔ nàdze eyome.”
Ruth1:16 Ke Rut ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Mègaƒoe ɖe nunye be magblẽ wò ɖi alo agbugbɔ le yowòme o. Elabe afi si nàyi la
Ruth1:17 afi si nàku ɖo ko nye hã maku ɖo
Ruth1:18 Azɔ esi Naomi kpɔ be Rut ɖoe kplikpaa be yeayi kple ye kokoko la
Ruth1:19 Ale wo ame eve la zɔ ʋuu va ɖo Betlehem. Esi wova ɖo Betlehem la
Ruth1:20 Ke eɖo eŋu na wo be: “Migayɔm be Naomi o; miyɔm be Mara boŋ
Ruth1:21 Nunɔamesitɔ menye yi nua gbe
Ruth1:22 Ale Naomi trɔ gbɔ kple lɔ̃xoyɔvia Rut
Ruth2:1 Azɔ Naomi srɔ̃
Ruth2:2 Gbe ɖeka Rut
Ruth2:3 Ale Rut yi agblea
Ruth2:4 Tete Boaz tso Betlehem va ɖo. Edo gbe na luxalawo be: “Aƒetɔ la nenɔ kpli mi!” Woɖo eŋu be: “Aƒetɔ la neyra wò!”
Ruth2:5 Azɔ Boaz bia eƒe dɔla si le dɔwɔlawo dzi kpɔm la be: “Ame ka ƒe nyɔnuvie nye ema?”
Ruth2:6 Dɔdzikpɔla la ɖo eŋu be: “Moab-nyɔnuvi si gbɔ kple Naomi tso Moab-nyigba dzi lae.
Ruth2:7 Eva bia be yeanɔ luxalaawo yome anɔ lu si ge ɖi la fɔm. Tso ŋdi kanya
Ruth2:8 Tete Boaz gblɔ na Rut be: “Vinye
Ruth2:9 Lé ŋku ɖe agble si me wole lua xam le la ŋu
Ruth2:10 Tete Rut de ta agu tsyɔ mo anyi
Ruth2:11 Ke Boaz ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Wogblɔ nu siwo katã nèwɔ na lɔ̃xowò tso esime srɔ̃wò ku la nam keŋ. Wobe ègblẽ nɔwò kple tɔ́wò kpakple mia denyigba ɖi
Ruth2:12 Aƒetɔ neɖo nu si nèwɔ la teƒe na wò. Aƒetɔ
Ruth2:13 Tete Rut gblɔ nɛ be: “Nye Aƒetɔ
Ruth2:14 Esi nuɖuɣi ɖo la
Ruth2:15 Esi Rut tsi tsitre be yeayi lua fɔfɔ dzi la
Ruth2:16 Hekpe ɖe esia ŋu la
Ruth2:17 Ale Rut fɔ lu le agblea me ʋuu va se ɖe fiẽ. Azɔ la
Ruth2:18 Etsɔe yi aƒeme ɖafia lɔ̃xoa. Eɖe nu si wòɖu susɔ la hã nɛ.
Ruth2:19 Lɔ̃xoa biae be: “Afi ka nèyi ɖafɔ lua le egbe? Afi ka nèwɔ dɔ le? Mawu neyra ame si tsɔ le eme na wò.” Ale Rut gblɔ ame si gbɔ wòde ɖawɔ dɔ la na lɔ̃xoa. Ebe: “Ŋutsu si gbɔ mede ɖawɔ dɔ egbe la ŋkɔe nye Boaz.”
Ruth2:20 Naomi gblɔ na lɔ̃xoyɔvia be: “Aƒetɔ
Ruth2:21 Rut gblɔ nɛ be: “Gawu la
Ruth2:22 Tete Naomi gblɔ na lɔ̃xoyɔvia Rut be: “Vinye
Ruth2:23 Ale Rut nɔ Boaz ƒe dɔlanyɔnuawo ŋu nɔ lu kple ƒo fɔm va se ɖe esime nuŋeɣi la wu nu. Enɔ lɔ̃xoa gbɔ.
Ruth3:1 Gbe ɖeka Rut lɔ̃xo
Ruth3:2 Míaƒe ƒometɔe nye Boaz
Ruth3:3 Eya ta yi ɖale tsi nàsi ami ʋeʋẽe
Ruth3:4 Nenye be wòyi ɖamlɔ anyi la
Ruth3:5 Rut ɖo eŋu be: “Mawɔ nu siwo katã nègblɔ nam la.”
Ruth3:6 Ale wòyi lugbɔƒe la
Ruth3:7 Ke esi Boaz ɖu nu
Ruth3:8 Le zã titina la
Ruth3:9 Ebia be: “Wò ame kae?” Rut ɖo eŋu be: “Nye Rut
Ruth3:10 Egblɔ nɛ be: “Vinye
Ruth3:11 Azɔ la
Ruth3:12 Ele eme baa be menye ƒometɔ si ate ŋu axɔ na wò
Ruth3:13 Tsi afii dɔ. Ne ŋu ke
Ruth3:14 Ale wòmlɔ Boaz ƒe afɔnu va se ɖe fɔŋli. Efɔ hafi xexeme kɔ
Ruth3:15 Boaz gblɔ nɛ be: “Ðe wò taɖedzia ɖo ɖi.” Esi Rut ɖoe ɖi la
Ruth3:16 Esi Rut gbɔ va aƒeme la
Ruth3:17 Ebe: “Etsɔ lu nudzidzenu ade sia nam hegblɔ be: ‘Mele be nàgbugbɔ ayi lɔ̃xowò gbɔ asi ƒuƒlu o.’ ”
Ruth3:18 Tete Naomi gblɔ nɛ be: “Vinye
Ruth4:1 Azɔ Boaz yi takpeƒe le dua ƒe agbo nu ɖanɔ anyi ɖe afi ma. Kasia ƒometɔ si ŋu Boaz ƒo nu le lae nye esi va yina. Tete Boaz yɔe hegblɔ nɛ be: “Xɔ̃nye
Ruth4:2 Boaz di dumemetsitsi ewo hã vɛ
Ruth4:3 Azɔ edoe ɖe eƒe ƒometɔ la gbɔ be: “Naomi
Ruth4:4 Eya ta mebui be mana nyanya wò tso eŋuti. Nye susue nye be nàƒlee le ame siwo le afi sia kple míaƒe dumemetsitsi siwo nɔ anyi la ŋkume. Ne èdi be yeaxɔe la
Ruth4:5 Boaz gblɔ nɛ be: “Ne èƒle anyigba sia le Naomi si la
Ruth4:6 Tete eƒe ƒometɔ la gblɔ be: “Togbɔ be nyee wòle be maxɔ nuawo hafi hã la
Ruth4:7 Tsã la
Ruth4:8 Eya ta esi ƒometɔ la gblɔ na Boaz be: “Wò boŋ xɔ nuawo” la
Ruth4:9 Azɔ Boaz gblɔ na dumemetsitsiawo kple dua me tɔwo katã be: “Miawoe nye nye ɖasefowo egbe
Ruth4:10 Nenema ke mexɔ Rut
Ruth4:11 Takpeƒea valawo kple dumemetsitsiawo katã lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be: “Míenye wò ɖasefowo vavã. Aƒetɔ neyra nyɔnu si gbɔna aƒewò me la. Nena wòadzi abe ale si Raxel kple Lea dzii ene. Ame eve siawoe tso Israel ƒe aƒe la
Ruth4:12 Vi siwo Aƒetɔ ana nyɔnu sia nadzi na wò la
Ruth4:13 Ale wɔ Boaz ɖe Rut wòzu srɔ̃a. Enɔ anyi kplii
Ruth4:14 Nyɔnuwo gblɔ na Naomi be: “Woakafu Aƒetɔ
Ruth4:15 Ana agbe yeye nagaɖo mewò
Ruth4:16 Naomi xɔ ɖevi la ɖe akɔ
Ruth4:17 Eƒe aƒelikawo tsɔ ŋkɔ na ɖevia be Obed. Wogblɔ na amewo be: “Wodzi ŋutsuvi na Naomi.” Obed ye va zu Yese tɔ́
Ruth4:18 Perez ƒe dzidzimeviwoe nye esi: Perez dzi Xezron.
Ruth4:19 Xezron dzi Ram
Ruth4:20 Aminadab dzi Naxeson
Ruth4:21 Salma dzi Boaz
Ruth4:22 Obed dzi Yese
1Samuel1:1 Ŋutsu aɖe nɔ Ramataim-Zofim si nye du aɖe le Efrayim-tonyigba dzi. Eŋkɔe nye Elkana eye wònye Yeroxam vi. Yeroxam tɔ́e nye Elihu
1Samuel1:2 Srɔ̃ eve nɔ Elkana si. Ðeka ŋkɔe nye Xana
1Samuel1:3 Azɔ ƒè sia ƒè la
1Samuel1:4 Gbe si gbe Elkana sa vɔ la
1Samuel1:5 Togbɔ be elɔ̃ Xana ŋutɔ hã la
1Samuel1:6 Atsusia
1Samuel1:7 Aleae nuwo nɔ edzi yimee ƒè sia ƒè. Ne wonyayina vɔ sa ge na Aƒetɔ ko la
1Samuel1:8 Ale srɔ̃a Elkana bianɛ be: “Xana
1Samuel1:9 Esi woɖu nu eye wono nu vɔ le Silo la
1Samuel1:10 Xana nɔ nu xam vevie
1Samuel1:11 Xana ɖe adzɔgbe gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ
1Samuel1:12 Esi wòganɔ gbea dom ɖa kokoko le Aƒetɔ ŋkume la
1Samuel1:13 Xana nɔ nu ƒom le eƒe dzime
1Samuel1:14 Egblɔ na Xana be: “Ɣe ka ɣi gɔ̃ aha akɔ le wò ŋkume? Dzudzɔ ahanono dzro!”
1Samuel1:15 Ke Xana ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Gbeɖe
1Samuel1:16 Mègabu wò nyɔnudɔla nyɔnu maɖɔʋui o
1Samuel1:17 Tete Eli gblɔ nɛ be: “Heyi le ŋutifafa me. Israel ƒe Mawu ana nu si nèbiae la wòasu asiwò.”
1Samuel1:18 Egblɔ be: “Ne ànya ve wò nyɔnudɔla la nu ko.” Emegbe nyɔnua dzo
1Samuel1:19 Ŋdi kanya la
1Samuel1:20 Ale Xana fɔ fu le ɣe ma ɣi me eye wòdzi viŋutsuvi. Etsɔ ŋkɔ nɛ be Samuel eye wòɖe eme be: “Ðe mebia Aƒetɔ wònam.”
1Samuel1:21 Esi ƒe trɔ la
1Samuel1:22 Ke Xana ya meyi o. Egblɔ na srɔ̃a be: “Ne ɖevia ɖe asi le no ŋu la
1Samuel1:23 Elkana ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Wɔ nu si nèkpɔ be enyo la. Lala va se ɖe esime ɖevia ɖe asi le no ŋu. Aƒetɔ nena eƒe ŋugbedodo la nava eme.” Ale Xana tsi aƒe kpɔ ɖevia dzi va se ɖe esime wòɖee le no nu.
1Samuel1:24 Esi ɖevia ɖe asi le no ŋu la
1Samuel1:25 Wowu nyitsu la eye wokplɔ ɖevi la yi na Eli.
1Samuel1:26 Xana gblɔ nɛ be: “Amegã
1Samuel1:27 Ðevi siae mebia be wòanam. Aƒetɔ se nye kokoƒoƒo eye wòna nu si mebiae lam.
1Samuel1:28 Eya ta metsɔe na Aƒetɔ. Ezu Aƒetɔ tɔ koŋ
1Samuel2:1 Xana hã do gbe ɖa gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ na nye dzi vu gblotoo le aseye tsom. Aƒetɔ ɖe nye ŋusẽ fia eye dzidzɔ yɔ menye. Meko nye futɔwo; elabe èxɔ nam eye dzi le dzɔyem.
1Samuel2:2 “Ame aɖeke mele kɔkɔe abe Aƒetɔ ene o. Ame aɖeke meli abe wò ene o. Agakpe aɖeke meli abe mía Mawu la ene o.
1Samuel2:3 Midzudzɔ adegbeƒoƒo dàdatɔe eye nya vlowo meganɔ dodom le mia nu o. Elabe Aƒetɔ nye Mawu si nya nu sia nu. Eyae tsoa nya me le amegbetɔwo ƒe nuwɔnawo ŋu.
1Samuel2:4 Kalẽtɔwo ƒe datiwo ŋe klíklikli
1Samuel2:5 Ame siwo ɖua nu ɖia ƒo tsã la
1Samuel2:6 Aƒetɔ wua ame
1Samuel2:7 Aƒetɔ wɔa ame dahe
1Samuel2:8 Eyae ɖea ame dahewo tso ké me
1Samuel2:9 Ekpɔa eƒe ame wɔnuteƒewo ta be woanya zɔzɔ; ke ame vɔ̃ɖiwo atsrɔ̃ ɖe viviti me
1Samuel2:10 Woatsrɔ̃ Aƒetɔ ƒe futɔwo; aɖe gbe ɖe wo dzi tso dziƒo. Aƒetɔ adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu xexea me katã
1Samuel2:11 Emegbe Elkana trɔ yi wo de Rama
1Samuel2:12 Eli viŋutsuwo nye yakamewo. Womebua Aƒetɔ ɖe naneke me o
1Samuel2:13 eye wometsɔ ɖeke le kɔnu si le nunɔlawo si na dukɔa la hã me o. Ne ame aɖe va le vɔ sam la
1Samuel2:14 nunɔla ƒe dɔla tɔa lãwo le gaze alo ze
1Samuel2:15 Gawu la
1Samuel2:16 Ne vɔsala la ɖo eŋu be: “Nà woatɔ dzo amia gbã
1Samuel2:17 Eli viawo ƒe nuvɔ̃ sia vɔ̃ɖi le Aƒetɔ ŋkume ŋutɔ
1Samuel2:18 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
1Samuel2:19 Nɔa tɔa dziwui ɖagbee aɖe ɖananɛ ƒè sia ƒè
1Samuel2:20 Emegbe Eli biaa yayra na Elkana kple srɔ̃a gblɔna be: “Aƒetɔ negana nyɔnu sia nadzi viwo na wò nàtsɔ ɖo esi nètsɔ nɛ la teƒe.” Emegbe wotrɔna yia wo de.
1Samuel2:21 Aƒetɔ ve Xana nu
1Samuel2:22 Azɔ Eli tsi ku amegã. Enɔ nu siwo katã via ŋutsuwo nɔa wɔwɔm ɖe Israel-dukɔmeviwo ŋu la sem. Ese hã be viawo dɔna kple nyɔnu siwo subɔna le godoƒegbadɔ nu la gɔ̃ hã.
1Samuel2:23 Ale wògblɔ na wo be: “Nu ka ta miele nu siawo wɔm? Ame sia ame le nu vlo siwo wɔm miele la gblɔm.
1Samuel2:24 Vinyewo
1Samuel2:25 Ne ame wɔ vɔ̃ ɖe ehavi ŋu la
1Samuel2:26 Samuel ɖevi la tsi ɖe edzi
1Samuel2:27 Azɔ Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela aɖe va Eli gbɔ gblɔ nɛ be: “Aƒetɔ be: ‘Meɖe ɖokuinye fia tɔ́wò ƒe ƒome esime wonye kluviwo na Egipte Fiagã le Egipte-nyigba dzi.
1Samuel2:28 Metia ƒome sia tso Israel-toawo katã dome be woanye nye nunɔlawo. Woawoe asubɔm le nye vɔsamlekpui la ŋgɔ
1Samuel2:29 Ale ke wɔ nèklẽ ŋu ɖe nye vɔsa kple nunana si mebia la ŋu? Nu ka ta nède bubu viwòwo ŋu wum? Mieɖu nye dukɔ ƒe vɔsalã ƒe akpa nyuitɔwo heda ami.
1Samuel2:30 Le esia ta Aƒetɔ
1Samuel2:31 Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel2:32 Ne esia va eme la
1Samuel2:33 Gake magblẽ wò dzidzimevi ɖeka aɖe ɖi si anye nunɔla asubɔm. Ke mana eƒe ŋkuwo agbã eye agbenɔnɔ azu dɔ nɛ. Aƒewòmeviwo ya la
1Samuel2:34 Ne viwòawo kple evea
1Samuel2:35 Maɖo nunɔla nuteƒewɔla
1Samuel2:36 Wò dzidzimevi siwo asusɔ la ayi nunɔla la gbɔ aɖabia ga kple nuɖuɖui
1Samuel3:1 Azɔ Samuel ɖevi la nɔ Eli te nɔ Aƒetɔ subɔm. Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
1Samuel3:2 Azɔ Eli tsi
1Samuel3:3 Samuel ya mlɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe gbedoxɔ me
1Samuel3:4 Aƒetɔ yɔe be: “Samuel! Samuel!” Etɔ be: “Nyee nye esi!”
1Samuel3:5 eye wòƒu du yi Eli gbɔ hegblɔ nɛ be: “Nyee nye esi
1Samuel3:6 Ke Aƒetɔ gayɔ Samuel ake. Efɔ gayi Eli gbɔ gblɔ be: “Nyee nye esi
1Samuel3:7 Azɔ la
1Samuel3:8 Aƒetɔ gayɔ Samuel zi etɔ̃lia. Efɔ yi Eli gbɔ ɖagblɔ nɛ be: “Nyee nye esi
1Samuel3:9 ale wògblɔ na Samuel be: “Yi ɖamlɔ anyi. Ne egayɔ wò la
1Samuel3:10 Aƒetɔ gava eye wòle tsitre yɔe abe tsã ene be: “Samuel! Samuel!” Samuel ɖo eŋu be: “Ƒo nu
1Samuel3:11 Aƒetɔ gblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel3:12 Gbe ma gbe la mana nya siwo katã megblɔ ɖe Eli ƒe aƒe la ŋu la nava eme tso gɔmedzeƒe va se ɖe nuwuƒe.
1Samuel3:13 Megblɔ nɛ va yi be nyemadzudzɔ tohehe na eƒe aƒe akpɔ o. Elabe enya nu tso viawo ƒe vodada kple busunya siwo wogblɔna ɖe Mawu ŋu la ŋu
1Samuel3:14 Eya ta meka atam be Eli ƒe aƒe la matsɔ vɔsa alo nunana aɖeke alé avu eƒe vodada la akpɔ o.”
1Samuel3:15 Samuel gamlɔ anyi va se ɖe esime ŋu ke. Efɔ eye wòʋu gbedoxɔa ƒe ʋɔwo. Ke evɔ̃ ŋutega si wòkpɔ la gbɔgblɔ na Eli.
1Samuel3:16 Gake Eli yɔe be: “Vinye Samuel!” Samuel ɖo eŋu be: “Nyee nye esi!”
1Samuel3:17 Eli biae be: “Nya ka Mawu gblɔ na wò? Gblɔ wo katã nam; mègaɣla ɖeke ɖem o. Ne mègblɔ wo katã nam o la
1Samuel3:18 Ale Samuel gblɔ nya la katã nɛ; ɖeke mesusɔ o. Eli gblɔ be: “Eyae nye Aƒetɔ. Newɔ nu si dze eŋu la faa.”
1Samuel3:19 Samuel va tsi. Aƒetɔ nɔ kplii eye wòna nya sia nya si Samuel gblɔ la va eme.
1Samuel3:20 Israel-dukɔ blibo la
1Samuel3:21 Aƒetɔ gaɖe eɖokui fia le Silo. Aƒetɔ ɖe eɖokui fia Samuel le afi sia to nya si wògblɔ nɛ la me.
1Samuel4:1 Samuel ƒe nya siwo wòɖea gbeƒãe la dea afi sia afi le Israel-dukɔa me. Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
1Samuel4:2 Filistitɔwo ho yi ɖakpe aʋa kple Israelviwo; aʋa la nu sẽ ŋutɔ. Filistitɔwo ɖu Israelviwo dzi eye wowu ame akpe ene le gbea dzi.
1Samuel4:3 Esi ame siwo susɔ la gbɔ va asaɖa la me la
1Samuel4:4 Ale wodɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Silo woyi ɖatsɔ Aƒetɔ
1Samuel4:5 Esi nubablaɖaka la va ɖo asaɖa la me la
1Samuel4:6 Filistitɔwo se ɣlidodoa eye wobia be: “Nu ka ta ɣli sesẽ sia le ɖiɖim le Hebritɔwo ƒe asaɖa me?” Esi wova nya be Aƒetɔ ƒe nubablaɖaka lae wotsɔ va asaɖa la me la
1Samuel4:7 vɔvɔ̃ ɖo wo ŋutɔ. Tete wogblɔ be: “Mawu aɖe va ɖo woƒe asaɖa la me. Baba na mí! Nu sia tɔgbe medzɔ kpɔ o.
1Samuel4:8 Nane wɔ mí pɛ! Ame kae ate ŋu aɖe mí tso mawu triakɔ mawo si me? Mawu siawoe he dɔ vɔ̃ vovovowo de Egiptetɔwo dome
1Samuel4:9 Filistitɔwo
1Samuel4:10 Ale Filistitɔwo wɔ aʋa la kalẽtɔe eye woɖu Israelviwo dzi; wosí yi wo nɔƒewo. Ame geɖe ŋutɔ tsi aʋa le Israelviwo dome. Wowu asrafo akpe etɔ̃ sɔŋ le Israelviwo dome.
1Samuel4:11 Woxɔ Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la eye wowu Eli vi eveawo
1Samuel4:12 Gbe ma gbe ke la
1Samuel4:13 Ɣe ma ɣi la
1Samuel4:14 Eli se ɣlia eye wòbia be: “Nya ka dzɔ ɣli le ɖiɖim ale?” Enumake ŋutsua ɖe abla va to nya la nɛ.
1Samuel4:15 Ɣe ma ɣi la
1Samuel4:16 Tete ŋutsua gblɔ nɛ be: “Ðe mesí le aʋagbea dzi
1Samuel4:17 Dɔla la ɖo eŋu be: “Israelviwo sí le Filistitɔwo nu. Wowu ame geɖe le mía dome. Viwò ŋutsuvi eveawo
1Samuel4:18 Esi ŋutsua nyayɔ Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la Eli se ko la
1Samuel4:19 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
1Samuel4:20 Esi wòle kudɔ ƒom la
1Samuel4:21 Ena ŋkɔ ɖevi la be Ikabod hegblɔ be: “Ŋutikɔkɔe dzo le Israel!” elabe woxɔ Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la dzoe
1Samuel4:22 Egblɔ be: “Ŋutikɔkɔe dzo le Israel elabe woxɔ Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la.”
1Samuel5:1 Esi Filistitɔwo xɔ Mawu ƒe nubablaɖakaa dzoe la
1Samuel5:2 Wokɔe yi woƒe mawu Dagon ƒe xɔ me
1Samuel5:3 Ŋdi kanya la
1Samuel5:4 Esi ŋu gake ŋdi kanya la
1Samuel5:5 Le esia ta
1Samuel5:6 Aƒetɔ he to na Asdodtɔwo vevie
1Samuel5:7 Esi Asdodtɔwo kpɔ nu si nɔ dzɔdzɔm la
1Samuel5:8 Ale wodɔ ame woyi ɖaƒo Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo katã nu ƒu eye wobia wo be: “Ale ke míele Israel ƒe Mawu la ƒe nubablaɖaka la wɔ gee?” Woɖo eŋu be: “Mitsɔe ɖo ɖe Gat.” Ale wokɔe yi Gat si nye Filistitɔwo ƒe du bubu aɖe.
1Samuel5:9 Esi nubablaɖaka la va ɖo la
1Samuel5:10 Ale woawo hã woɖo Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la ɖe Ekron
1Samuel5:11 Tete wodɔ ame woyi ɖaƒo Filistitɔwo ƒe amegãwo katã nu ƒu. Wogblɔ be: “Migbugbɔ Israel ƒe Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la ɖo ɖe eteƒe
1Samuel5:12 Ame siwo meku o la
1Samuel6:1 Esi Aƒetɔ ƒe nubablaɖaka la tsi Filistitɔwo gbɔ ɣleti adrẽ la
1Samuel6:2 Filistitɔwo yɔ nunɔlawo kple afakalawo hebia wo be: “Ale ke míele Aƒetɔ ƒe nubablaɖaka la wɔ gee? Migblɔ nu si míatsɔ akpe ɖe eŋu hafi atrɔe yi eteƒe la na mí.”
1Samuel6:3 Woɖo eŋu be: “Ne miele Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la trɔ ge aɖo ɖa la
1Samuel6:4 Wobia be: “Vɔsanu ka míatsɔ akpe ɖe eŋu be wòalé avu le mía kplii dome?” Woɖo eŋu be: “Sikaƒoƒoe atɔ̃ siwo wome kple sikafi atɔ̃ siwo wome ɖe Filistitɔwo ƒe amegã atɔ̃awo nu
1Samuel6:5 Eya ta ele be miame ƒoƒoeawo kple afi siwo le nuwo gblẽm le anyigbaa dzi la ƒe nɔnɔme
1Samuel6:6 Nu ka ta miasẽ to abe Egipte Fiagã kple Egiptetɔwo ene? Esi Mawu do vlo wo vɔ megbe la
1Samuel6:7 Fifia la
1Samuel6:8 Mikɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe nubablaɖaka la da ɖe tasiaɖam la me. Mitsɔ nu siwo mieme kple sika be woatsɔ alé avu le mia dome la de aɖaka me da ɖe exa. Ale miado mɔe be wòayi le eɖokui si.
1Samuel6:9 Minɔ ekpɔm; ne èɖo ta wo de
1Samuel6:10 Wowɔ nenema; wolé nyinɔ dzaa eve
1Samuel6:11 Wotsɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe nubablaɖaka la de tasiaɖam la me
1Samuel6:12 Enumake nyinɔawo ɖo ta mɔ gã si yi Bet-Semes la dzi tututu; womedze ɖe ɖusime alo miame o. Nyiawo nɔ xɔxlɔ̃m le mɔa dzi. Filisti-fiaawo le wo yome ʋuu va se ɖe Bet-Semes ƒe liƒo dzi.
1Samuel6:13 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
1Samuel6:14 Tasiaɖam la zɔ ʋuu va tɔ ɖe kpe gã aɖe gbɔ le Bet-Semestɔ
1Samuel6:15 Levitɔwo kɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe nubablaɖakaa kple aɖaka si kpe ɖe eŋu
1Samuel6:16 Filistitɔwo ƒe fia atɔ̃awo kpɔ nu si wowɔ la teƒe
1Samuel6:17 Sikaƒoƒoe siwo Filistitɔwo ɖo ɖe Aƒetɔ be woalé avu le wo dome la
1Samuel6:18 Nenema ke wotsɔ sikafi ɖekaɖeka ɖe Filisti fiadu atɔ̃awo
1Samuel6:19 Aƒetɔ wu Bet-Semestɔ bla adrẽ elabe wokpɔ eƒe nubablaɖaka la me. Dua me tɔwo fa konyi vevie le ame siwo ku le wo dome la ta.
1Samuel6:20 Bet-Semestɔwo bia be: “Ame ka ate ŋu anɔ te ɖe Aƒetɔ
1Samuel6:21 Ale wodɔ dɔlawo ɖo ɖe Kiriat-Yearimtɔwo be: “Filistitɔwo gbugbɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe nubablaɖaka la ɖo ɖa. Miva kɔe yi mia gbɔe.”
1Samuel7:1 Tete Kiriat-Yearimtɔwo va kɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe nubablaɖaka la yi ɖada ɖe Abinadab ƒeme le togbɛ dzi. Wokɔ̀ via Eleazar ŋu be wòakpɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe nubablaɖakaa dzi.
1Samuel7:2 Nubablaɖaka la nɔ Kiriat-Yearim ƒè geɖee
1Samuel7:3 Azɔ Samuel gblɔ na Israel-dukɔ blibo la be: “Nenye Aƒetɔ ŋue miele tɔtrɔm ɖo kple miaƒe dzi blibo la
1Samuel7:4 Ale Israeltɔwo ɖe Baal ƒe legbawo kple nyɔnumawu Astarte ƒe legbawo ɖa le wo dome eye wosubɔ Aƒetɔ ɖeka ko.
1Samuel7:5 Emegbe Samuel ɖo gbe ɖe Israeltɔwo katã be: “Miva ƒo ƒu ɖe Mizpa ne mado gbe ɖa na Aƒetɔ ɖe mia ta.”
1Samuel7:6 Ale wo katã va ƒo ƒu ɖe Mizpa. Woku tsi
1Samuel7:7 Esi Filistitɔwo se be Israelviwo kpe ta le Mizpa la
1Samuel7:8 Wogblɔ na Samuel be: “Mègadzudzɔ kokoƒoƒo na Aƒetɔ
1Samuel7:9 Ale Samuel lé alẽ dzaa aɖe
1Samuel7:10 Esime Samuel le numemevɔsa la wɔm la
1Samuel7:11 Israeltɔwo kplɔ wo ɖo tso Mizpa ʋuu va se ɖe esime wogogo Bet-Kar. Wowu wo dometɔ geɖe le mɔ dzi.
1Samuel7:12 Azɔ Samuel tsɔ kpe ɖi ɖe Mizpa kple Sen dome
1Samuel7:13 Le nyateƒe me la
1Samuel7:14 Wogbugbɔ du siwo woxɔ le Israelviwo si tso Ekron va ɖo Gat la na wo. Ale woƒe anyigba si Filistitɔwo xɔ la gaɖo wo si. Ŋutifafa nɔ Israeltɔwo kple Amoritɔwo dome azɔ.
1Samuel7:15 Samuel kplɔ Israel-dukɔ le eƒe agbenɔɣi katã.
1Samuel7:16 Ƒe sia ƒe la
1Samuel7:17 Emegbe egatrɔna vaa Rama
1Samuel8:1 Esi Samuel tsi la
1Samuel8:2 Via ŋutsu ŋgɔgbea ŋkɔ nye Yoel
1Samuel8:3 Ke viawo meto eƒe ʋe me o. Woti ga yome
1Samuel8:4 Ale Israel-megãwo katã kpe ta eye woyi Samuel gbɔ le Rama
1Samuel8:5 ɖagblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel8:6 Esi wogblɔ na Samuel be neɖo fia na yewo be wòaɖu yewo dzi la
1Samuel8:7 Aƒetɔ gblɔ nɛ be: “Ðo to nya sia nya si dukɔa agblɔ na wò eye nàwɔ edzi
1Samuel8:8 Ale si wowɔ ɖe ŋunye
1Samuel8:9 Eya ta ɖo to wo. Ke ɖe nya me na wo nyuie do ŋgɔ le ale si fia si biam wole la le wo dzi ɖu gee la ŋu.”
1Samuel8:10 Ale Samuel gblɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe nyawo katã na dukɔ si le ebiam be wòaɖo fia na yewo la.
1Samuel8:11 “Nu siwo wɔ ge fia si le mia dzi ɖu ge la le lae nye ana miaƒe ŋutsuviwo azu asrafowo. Ðewo anɔ tasiaɖamwo me
1Samuel8:12 Awɔ wo dometɔ aɖewo asrafomegãwo
1Samuel8:13 Fia la axɔ mia vinyɔnuwo. Ðewo anɔ ami ʋeʋẽe sim nɛ
1Samuel8:14 Axɔ miaƒe agble nyuitɔwo
1Samuel8:15 Axɔ nuku siwo mieŋe kple miaƒe wain ƒe akpa ewolia atsɔ na eƒe dumegãwo kple dɔlawo.
1Samuel8:16 Azi miaƒe ŋutsu kple nyɔnu apatɔwo
1Samuel8:17 Axɔ miaƒe lãha ƒe akpa ewolia hã eye miazu eƒe kluviwo.
1Samuel8:18 Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
1Samuel8:19 Gake dukɔ la gbe toɖoɖo Samuel hegblɔ be: “Gbeɖe
1Samuel8:20 ale be míawo hã míanɔ abe dukɔ bubuwo ene. Aɖu mía dzi eye wòanɔ ŋgɔ akplɔ mí ayi aʋa aɖawɔ aʋa na mí.”
1Samuel8:21 Samuel ɖo to se woƒe nyawo katã eye wòyi ɖagblɔ wo na Aƒetɔ ake.
1Samuel8:22 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Samuel be: “Wɔ ɖe woƒe didi dzi. Ðo fia na wo.” Ale Samuel gblɔ na Israelviwo be ame sia ame negbugbɔ yi eƒe du me.
1Samuel9:1 Kesinɔtɔ aɖe nɔ Benyamin-to la me. Eŋkɔe nye Kis
1Samuel9:2 Viŋutsuvi dzeɖekɛ aɖe si ɖo ɖekakpuime la le esi. Eŋkɔe nye Saul. Enyakpɔ ale gbegbe be ame aɖeke medze ɖeka wui le Israelviwo dome o. Saul kɔ ŋutɔ; ame kɔkɔtɔ kekeake le Israel-dukɔ me se abɔta ko nɛ.
1Samuel9:3 Eva ve me gbe ɖeka be Kis ƒe tedzinɔ aɖewo bu. Ale wògblɔ na via Saul be: “Yɔ dɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka kpe ɖe ɖokuiwò ŋu
1Samuel9:4 Woyi ɖatsa le Efrayim-tonyigba dzi kple Salisa-nutome
1Samuel9:5 Esi woɖo Zuf-nyigba dzi la
1Samuel9:6 Tete dɔla la gblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel9:7 Saul bia eƒe dɔlaa be: “Ne míeyi ɖe
1Samuel9:8 Dɔlaa ɖo eŋu be: “Klosaloga memama akpa enelia le asinye. Matsɔe na mawunua la be wòafia afi si míaɖo tae la mí.”
1Samuel9:9 Tsã la
1Samuel9:10 Saul gblɔ na dɔla la be: “Enyo
1Samuel9:11 Esi wolia togbɛa yina la
1Samuel9:12 Woɖo eŋu be: “Ẽ
1Samuel9:13 Ne mieɖo kaba la
1Samuel9:14 Ale woɖo ta dua me. Esi woɖo la
1Samuel9:15 Azɔ hafi ŋu nake ne Saul nava la
1Samuel9:16 “Etsɔ ɣe alewo ɣi la
1Samuel9:17 Esi Samuel kpɔ Saul la
1Samuel9:18 Tete Saul te ɖe Samuel ŋu le agboa nu hebiae be: “Meɖe kuku
1Samuel9:19 Samuel ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Nyee nye nukpɔla la. Midze ŋgɔnye yi vɔsaƒea. Egbea miaɖu nu kplim. Etsɔ ŋdi la
1Samuel9:20 Azɔ mègatsi dzi ɖe tedzinɔ siwo bu egbe ŋkeke etɔ̃ sɔŋ nye esi la ŋu o
1Samuel9:21 Saul ɖo eŋu be: “Benyamin-to si nye suetɔ kekeake le Israel-dukɔa me la mee metso. Nye ƒome la hãe nye gblɔetɔ wu le Benyamin-to ƒe ƒomeawo dome. Nya ka nye esi gblɔm nèle nam?”
1Samuel9:22 Tete Samuel kplɔ Saul kple eƒe dɔlaa yi ɖe xɔa me
1Samuel9:23 Egblɔ na nuɖala la be: “Tsɔ lã si megblɔ na wò be nenɔ vovo la vɛ.”
1Samuel9:24 Ale nuɖalaa tsɔ lã ƒe ata kple nu siwo kpe ɖe eŋu la va ɖo Saul kɔme. Samuel gblɔ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel9:25 Esi wotrɔ tso vɔsaƒea va ɖo dua me la
1Samuel9:26 Fɔŋli la
1Samuel9:27 Esi woɖo dua ƒe gbɔto la
1Samuel10:1 Tete Samuel tsɔ amigoe eye wòkɔ ami ɖe tame na Saul. Egbugbɔ nu nɛ hegblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ si ami na wò be nàzu amegã ɖe yeƒe dukɔ Israel dzi. Àɖu dukɔa dzi eye àʋli wo ta tso woƒe futɔwo katã si me. Dzesi si le kpe ɖom esia dzi be Aƒetɔ si ami na wò be nànye amegã ɖe yeƒe domenyinu dzi lae nye be:
1Samuel10:2 Ne èdzo le gbɔnye egbe la
1Samuel10:3 Ne ètso le afi ma la
1Samuel10:4 Woado gbe na wò ahana abolo eve wò. Xɔ wo le wo si.
1Samuel10:5 Emegbe àva Gibea-Elohim
1Samuel10:6 Enumake eƒe gbɔgbɔ adze dziwò
1Samuel10:7 Azɔ ne dzesi siawo le me vam la
1Samuel10:8 Ekem do ŋgɔ nànɔ Gilgal yim. Megbɔna gbɔwò ava eme nu
1Samuel10:9 Esi Saul trɔ be yeadzo le Samuel gbɔ la
1Samuel10:10 Azɔ esi wòva toa dzi la
1Samuel10:11 Ke esi ame siwo katã dze sii tsã la kpɔe wòle gbeƒã ɖem le Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖelawo dome la
1Samuel10:12 Ŋutsu aɖe si tso dua me la bia be: “Ame ka gɔ̃e nye ame siawo tɔ́?” Esia va zu lo wodona le wo dome ɖaa be: “Saul hã ye le Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖelawo domea?”
1Samuel10:13 Esi wòɖe gbeƒãa vɔ la
1Samuel10:14 Saul nyrui kpɔ eya kple eƒe dɔla la eye wòbia wo be: “Afi ka mietso?” Saul ɖo eŋu be: “Míetso tedzinɔawo di ge. Esi míele wo kpɔm o la
1Samuel10:15 Saul nyruia bia be: “Nya ka wògblɔ na mi?”
1Samuel10:16 Saul gblɔ nɛ be: “Egblɔ na mí kɔtɛe be wokpɔ tedziawo xoxo.” Gake megblɔ nya siwo Samuel gblɔ nɛ tso eya ŋutɔ ƒe fiaɖuɖu ŋu ya la
1Samuel10:17 Azɔ Samuel yɔ Israel-dukɔ la ƒo ƒu hena ŋkekenyui ɖuɖu le Mizpa
1Samuel10:18 eye wògblɔ na wo be: “Aƒetɔ
1Samuel10:19 Ke egbe la
1Samuel10:20 Ale Samuel na Israel-toawo katã te va ŋgɔ
1Samuel10:21 Ena Benyamin-to la me tɔwo do va ŋgɔ ɖe woƒe ƒomeawo nu
1Samuel10:22 Ale wogabia nu Aƒetɔ be: “Ɖe ame la va afi siaa?” Aƒetɔ ɖo eŋu be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel10:23 Ale woƒu du yi ɖakplɔe tso afi ma vɛ. Esi wòtsi tsitre ɖe ameawo dome la
1Samuel10:24 Azɔ Samuel gblɔ na dukɔ la be: “Ame si Aƒetɔ tia lae nye esi! Ame aɖeke mesɔ kplii le dukɔa me o.” Tete ameawo katã do ɣli hoo be: “Fia nenɔ agbe tegbee!”
1Samuel10:25 Azɔ Samuel xlẽ fiaɖuɖu ŋuti kɔnuwo katã fia dukɔ la. Eŋlɔ wo ɖe agbalẽ me hetsɔ da ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋkume. Emegbe Samuel ɖe asi le ame sia ame ŋu wòtrɔ yi eƒeme.
1Samuel10:26 Saul hã trɔ yi enɔƒe le Gibea. Kalẽtɔ aɖewo
1Samuel10:27 Ke ame vlo aɖewo gblɔ be: “Ale ke ame sia ate ŋu axɔ na mí?” Wodo vloe eye wometsɔ nunana aɖeke vɛ nɛ o. Ke elé eɖokui kpoo abe ɖe mesee o ene.
1Samuel11:1 Emegbe ʋɛ la
1Samuel11:2 Ke Nahas ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Hafi mabla nu kpli mi la

1Samuel11:4 Amedɔdɔawo ɖo Gibea
1Samuel11:5 Le ɣe ma ɣi me la
1Samuel11:6 Esi wòse nyaa la
1Samuel11:7 Enumake wòlé nyi eve
1Samuel11:8 Saul na woƒo ƒu ɖe Bezek: ame siwo do tso Israel la le ame akpe alafa etɔ̃ eye esiwo do tso Yuda la le akpe bla etɔ̃.
1Samuel11:9 Azɔ wogblɔ na amedɔdɔ siwo tso Yabes va la be: “Miyi ɖagblɔ na Yabestɔwo be hafi ɣe naɖo ta etsɔ la
1Samuel11:10 eye wogblɔ na Nahas be: “Etsɔ la

1Samuel12:1 Azɔ Samuel gblɔ na Israel-dukɔ blibo la be: “Mikpɔ ɖa
1Samuel12:2 eya akplɔ mi azɔ. Nye la metsi
1Samuel12:3 Nyee nye esi. Ne mewɔ vɔ̃ aɖe la
1Samuel12:4 Woɖo eŋu be: “Mèba mí loo
1Samuel12:5 Samuel gblɔ na wo be: “Aƒetɔ kple fia
1Samuel12:6 Samuel gblɔ na wo yi edzi be: “Aƒetɔ lae nye ame si tia Mose kple Aron
1Samuel12:7 Eya ta miva ɖo ɖe afii ne maxlẽ dɔ siwo Aƒetɔ wɔ xɔ na mi kple mia tɔgbuiwo la afia mi le eŋkume.
1Samuel12:8 Esi Yakob kple eƒe ƒomea yi ɖe Egipte
1Samuel12:9 Ke woŋlɔ Aƒetɔ

1Samuel12:11 Ale Aƒetɔ dɔ Yerub-Baal
1Samuel12:12 Ke esi miekpɔ be Amontɔwo ƒe fia Nahas ɖo be yeawɔ aʋa kple mi la
1Samuel12:13 “Mikpɔ ɖa
1Samuel12:14 Ne mi kple fia si le mia dzi ɖum la mianɔ Aƒetɔ
1Samuel12:15 Gake ne miase Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe o
1Samuel12:16 Azɔ minɔ te ne miakpɔ nu gã si wɔ ge Aƒetɔ ala le mia ŋkume teƒe la ɖa.
1Samuel12:17 Dzomeŋɔli nye esia eye miele lu ŋem egbe. Gake mele egblɔ ge na Aƒetɔ wòana dzi naɖe gbe
1Samuel12:18 Ale Samuel do gbe ɖa na Aƒetɔ. Tete dzi ɖe gbe eye tsi dza gbe ma gbe. Ameawo katã vɔ̃ Aƒetɔ kple Samuel.
1Samuel12:19 Tete dukɔ la katã gblɔ na Samuel be: “Ðe kuku na Aƒetɔ
1Samuel12:20 Samuel ɖo eŋu na dukɔ la be: “Migavɔ̃ o. Togbɔ be miewɔ nuvɔ̃ɖi sia gbegbe hã la
1Samuel12:21 Migatrɔ dze nu dzodzro siwo me viɖe aɖeke mele o
1Samuel12:22 Le Aƒetɔ ŋutɔ ŋkɔ ta la
1Samuel12:23 Ke le gonyeme ya la
1Samuel12:24 Miawo ya miɖo ŋui miavɔ̃ Aƒetɔ
1Samuel12:25 Gake ne miegawɔ nuvɔ̃ɖi la
1Samuel13:1 Saul xɔ ƒe…. esime wòdze fiaɖuɖu gɔme
1Samuel13:2 Saul tia ŋutsu akpe etɔ̃ le Israel-dukɔa me wozu asrafowo. Wo dome ame akpe eve nɔ eƒe kpɔkplɔ te le Mixmas kple Betel nutowo me le togbɛawo dzi. Ame akpe ɖeka nɔ Yonatan te le Gibea le Benyamin-nutoa me. Ke Saul ɖe asi le ame mamlɛawo ŋu be wo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe natrɔ yi eƒe nɔƒe.
1Samuel13:3 Yonatan ɖu Filistitɔwo ƒe asrafo siwo le Geba la dzi
1Samuel13:4 Israelviwo katã see be Saul wu Filistitɔwo ƒe asrafo siwo nye dzɔlawo
1Samuel13:5 Filistitɔwo kpe ta be yewoawɔ aʋa kple Israel. Wotsɔ tasiaɖam akpe etɔ̃
1Samuel13:6 Wodze Israelviwo dzi hemimi wo
1Samuel13:7 Ame bubuwo tso Yordan-tɔsisi la yi Gad kple Gilead nutowo me. Ke Saul ya ganɔ Gilgal ko
1Samuel13:8 Elala ŋkeke adrẽ sɔŋ abe ale si Samuel ɖo nɛ la ene
1Samuel13:9 Ale Saul gblɔ be: “Mitsɔ lã si woame asa vɔe kple esiwo woatsɔ ada akpee la vɛ nam.” Eme lã la tsɔ va sa vɔe.
1Samuel13:10 Esa vɔa vɔ teti ko Samuel nye esi va do. Saul do go yi ɖakpee hedo gbe nɛ.
1Samuel13:11 Ke Samuel biae be: “Nu ka nèwɔ?” Saul ɖo eŋu be: “Ameawo nɔ dzodzom le gbɔnye
1Samuel13:12 Ale mebu be wogbɔna mía dzi dze ge le Gilgal; evɔ la
1Samuel13:13 Samuel ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Èwɔ movinu. Mèwɔ ɖe se si Aƒetɔ
1Samuel13:14 Ke azɔ la
1Samuel13:15 Tete Samuel trɔ tso Gilgal yi Gibea le Benyamin-nutome. Saul xlẽ ame siwo susɔ ɖe egbɔ la
1Samuel13:16 Saul kple via Yonatan kpakple asrafo siwo tsi eŋu la ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Geba le Benyamin-nutome. Ke Filistitɔwo ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Mixmas.
1Samuel13:17 Filisti-srafowo ma ɖe aʋalɔgo etɔ̃ me
1Samuel13:18 Evelia yi Bet-Xoron-nutome eye etɔ̃lia ɖo ta liƒo si dzi nànɔ akpɔ Zeboim-bali me kple gbedadaƒo la.
1Samuel13:19 Azɔ nutula aɖeke menɔ Israel-nyigba blibo la dzi o. Ale Filistitɔwo bu be
1Samuel13:20 Ale Israelviwo dome ame sia ame yia Filistitɔwo gbɔ ɖanyrea woƒe agblenuwo
1Samuel13:21 Woxea ga ɖuɖu suetɔ ɖeka ɖe agblenuwo kple hɛ gobɛwo ta
1Samuel13:22 Ale gbe si gbe wokpe aʋa la
1Samuel13:23 Filistitɔwo dɔ asrafoha aɖe ɖa be woaɖadzɔ Mixmas todomemɔ ŋu.
1Samuel14:1 Gbe ɖeka la
1Samuel14:2 Saul bɔbɔ nɔ yevuboɖati te le Migron si te ɖe Gibea ŋu. Asrafo siwo nɔ eŋu la anɔ ame alafa ade.
1Samuel14:3 Nunɔla Axiya tsɔ kɔmewu la. Enye Axitub vi si nye Ikabod nɔviŋutsu Axitub vi. Enye Pinehas vi eye tɔgbuiae nye Eli. Ameawo menya be Yonatan dzo le yewo gbɔ o.
1Samuel14:4 Agakpe tsyɔƒu eve nɔ todomemɔ si dzi Yonatan le toto ge ayi Filistitɔwo ƒe asaɖa me la ƒe akpa eveawo dzi. Woyɔa ɖeka be Bozez
1Samuel14:5 Esi le dzigbeme lɔƒo la dze ŋgɔ Mixmas
1Samuel14:6 Yonatan gblɔ na eƒe adekplɔvi la be: “Va míyi bolobolotɔ siawo ƒe asaɖa la me. Ðewohĩ Aƒetɔ awɔ aʋa ɖe mía nu elabe naneke mexe mɔ nɛ be wòato ame geɖe alo ame ʋɛ aɖe dzi aɖe ame o.”
1Samuel14:7 Eƒe adekplɔvi la gblɔ nɛ be: “Wɔ nu si wò susu gblɔ na wò. Nye la meli kpli wò be mawɔ nu si nèdi la.”
1Samuel14:8 Yonatan gblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel14:9 Ne wogblɔ be mítɔ ne yewoava mía gbɔ la
1Samuel14:10 Evɔ ne woyɔ mí be míava yewo gbɔ la
1Samuel14:11 Ale wona Filistitɔwo ƒe dzɔlawo kpɔ wo kple eve la. Wogblɔ be: “Mikpɔ ɖa
1Samuel14:12 Tete dzɔlawo gblɔ sesĩe ɖo ɖe Yonatan kple adekplɔvi la be: “Miva mía gbɔ ne míagblɔ nya aɖe na mi.” Ale Yonatan gblɔ na eƒe adekplɔvi la be: “Dze yonyeme
1Samuel14:13 Tete Yonatan ta
1Samuel14:14 Ame siwo Yonatan kple eƒe adekplɔvi wu gbã la anɔ ame bla eve. Woƒe nuwɔƒe nɔ abe nyi eve ƒe nuŋlɔƒe le ŋkeke afã me ene.
1Samuel14:15 Ŋɔdzi ɖo asaɖa la kple nutoa me eye dzidzi ƒo ameawo. Dzidzi ƒo dzɔlawo kple aʋamenuhalawo gɔ̃ hã wodzo nyànyanya. Anyigba ʋuʋu eye wòzu zitɔtɔ gã aɖe ŋutɔ.
1Samuel14:16 Kasia Saul ƒe gbetakpɔla siwo le Gibea le Benyamin-nutome nakpɔ la
1Samuel14:17 Saul ɖe gbe na eŋunɔlawo be: “Mixlẽ asrafoawo ne miakpɔ ɖa be ame aɖe bu le mía dome hã.” Esi woxlẽ ameawo la
1Samuel14:18 Ale Saul gblɔ na Axiya be: “Tsɔ Mawu ƒe aɖaka la va afii” elabe Mawu ƒe aɖaka la nɔ Israelviwo gbɔ le ɣe ma ɣi me.
1Samuel14:19 Esime Saul nɔ nu ƒom na nunɔla la
1Samuel14:20 Tete Saul kple aʋakɔ blibo la lũ ɖe wo dzi hekpe aʋa kpli wo. Va kpɔ
1Samuel14:21 Hebritɔ aɖewo nɔ Filistitɔwo gbɔ tsã
1Samuel14:22 Nenema ke esi Israelvi siwo katã bè ɖe togbɛwo dzi le Efrayim-nutome la se be Filistitɔwo le sísim la
1Samuel14:23 ʋuu keke to Bet-Aven ŋu yi. Ale Aƒetɔ xɔ Israelviwo ɖe agbe gbe ma gbe.
1Samuel14:24 Gbe ma gbe la
1Samuel14:25 Azɔ wo katã wova ɖo ave aɖe me eye wokpɔ anyitsi le anyigba.
1Samuel14:26 Esi woge ɖe avea me la
1Samuel14:27 Ke Yonatan ya mese be ye tɔ́ ka atam na dukɔ la o. Ale wòtsɔ atikplɔ si le esi la nu tɔ anyiɖaɖa la me hede asi eme de nu me. Enumake eƒe mo kɔ.
1Samuel14:28 Tete ameawo dometɔ ɖeka gblɔ be: “Tɔ́wò ka atam na dukɔ la be: ‘Aɖi ame si ɖu nu egbea la ŋu kpékpekpe!’ ” Evɔ nu te dukɔ la ŋu hafi.
1Samuel14:29 Ale Yonatan ɖo eŋu be: “Tɔ́nye he dzɔgbevɔ̃e va anyigba la dzi. Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel14:30 Ðe aʋakɔ la ɖu aboyonu si woxɔ le woƒe futɔwo si egbea faa la
1Samuel14:31 Israelviwo si Filistitɔwo gbe ma gbe tso Mixmas ʋuu va se ɖe Ayalon
1Samuel14:32 Ale aʋakɔ la dze aboyonuawo dzi
1Samuel14:33 Tete wova gblɔ na Saul be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel14:34 Saul ɖe gbe be: “Mikaka ɖe aʋakɔ la dome eye migblɔ na wo be: ‘Ame sia ame nekplɔ eƒe nyi alo alẽ vɛ. Newu wo le afii ne wòaɖu. Ke migawɔ vɔ̃ ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu ahaɖu lã si ƒo ʋu la o.’ ” Ale ameawo dome ame sia ame kplɔ eƒe nyi vɛ zã ma me
1Samuel14:35 Saul ɖi vɔsamlekpui na Aƒetɔ; esiae nye vɔsamlekpui gbãtɔ si wòɖi na Aƒetɔ.
1Samuel14:36 Azɔ Saul gblɔ be: “Mina míalũ ɖe Filistitɔwo dzi
1Samuel14:37 Ale Saul bia Mawu se be: “Maho aʋa ɖe Filistitɔwo ŋua? Àna Israelviwo naɖu wo dzia?” Ke Mawu meɖo nyaa ŋu gbe ma gbe o.
1Samuel14:38 Tete Saul gblɔ be: “Mi dukɔa ƒe kplɔlawo katã
1Samuel14:39 Metà Aƒetɔ gbagbe si xɔna na Israel
1Samuel14:40 Azɔ egblɔ na Israel-dukɔ blibo la be: “Mi katã miɖo ɖe akpa ɖeka eye nye kple vinye Yonatan hã míanɔ akpa evelia.” Ameawo gblɔ na Saul be: “Wɔ nu sia nu si nèkpɔ be enyo.”
1Samuel14:41 Eya ta Saul gblɔ be: “O Aƒetɔ
1Samuel14:42 Azɔ Saul gblɔ be: “Midzidze nu ɖe nye kple vinye Yonatan dzi.” Wodzidzee eye wòdze Yonatan dzi.
1Samuel14:43 Ale Saul bia Yonatan be: “Nu ka nèwɔ? Gblɔe nam.” Yonatan ʋu eme nɛ be: “Metsɔ atikplɔ si le asinye la nu tɔ anyitsi me heɖɔ kpɔ. Nyee nye esi. Mele klalo be maku.”
1Samuel14:44 Saul gblɔ be: “Yonatan
1Samuel14:45 Ke dukɔ la bia Saul be: “Ðe Yonatan
1Samuel14:46 Esia megbe la
1Samuel14:47 Esi Saul le fia ɖum le Israel la
1Samuel14:48 Ewɔ kalẽ
1Samuel14:49 Saul viŋutsuwoe nye Yonatan
1Samuel14:50 Saul srɔ̃ ŋkɔ nye Axinoam
1Samuel14:51 Saul tɔ́e nye Kis eye eya kple Ner
1Samuel14:52 Saul wɔ aʋa vevie kple Filistitɔwo le eƒe agbenɔɣi katã. Ne ekpɔ ŋutsu dzɔtsu alo kalẽtɔ ɖe sia ɖe ko la
1Samuel15:1 Samuel gblɔ na Saul be: “Aƒetɔ dɔm be masi ami na wò nànye fia ɖe Israel-dukɔ nu. Eya ta fifia la ɖo to nàse Aƒetɔ ƒe gbedeasi.
1Samuel15:2 Aƒetɔ
1Samuel15:3 Azɔ yi ɖasì Amalekitɔwo eye nàtsrɔ̃ woƒe nu sia nu keŋkeŋ. Mègagblẽ woƒe naneke ɖi o; tsrɔ̃ ŋutsu kple nyɔnu
1Samuel15:4 Tete Saul ƒo asrafoawo nu ƒu ɖe Telaim
1Samuel15:5 Saul kplɔ asrafoawo va Amalek-du ƒe bali me eye wode xa ɖe afi ma.
1Samuel15:6 Azɔ Saul ɖo du ɖe Kenitɔwo be: “Netsɔ na mi
1Samuel15:7 Saul si Amalekitɔwo tso Xavila va se ɖe Sur le Egipte ƒe ɣedzeƒe lɔƒo.
1Samuel15:8 Elé Agag
1Samuel15:9 Ke Saul kple eƒe asrafowo ɖe asi le fia Agag ŋu. Wona alẽ nyuitɔwo
1Samuel15:10 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Samuel be:
1Samuel15:11 “Evem be meɖo Saul fiae elabe etrɔ le yonyeme
1Samuel15:12 Efɔ ŋdi kanya be yeaɖado go Saul. Wogblɔ na Samuel be: “Saul va Karmel. Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel15:13 Esi Samuel va Saul gbɔ la
1Samuel15:14 Samuel biae be: “Alẽ kple nyi kawo ƒe xɔxlɔ̃ nye esi sem mele?”
1Samuel15:15 Saul ɖo eŋu be: “Nye asrafoawoe kplɔ wo tso Amalekitɔwo gbɔ vɛ. Wotsɔ alẽ kple nyitsu nyuitɔwo vɛ be yewoatsɔ asa vɔ na Aƒetɔ
1Samuel15:16 Tete Samuel gblɔ na Saul be: “Zi ɖoɖoe
1Samuel15:17 Samuel gblɔ nɛ be: “Togbɔ be wò ŋutɔ mèbu ɖokuiwò ɖe naneke me o hã
1Samuel15:18 eye wòdɔ wò ɖe dɔgbe gblɔ na wò be: ‘Yi nàɖatsrɔ̃ Amalekitɔ nuvɔ̃wɔlawo keŋkeŋ. Wɔ aʋa kpli wo va se ɖe esime wo dometɔ aɖeke mesusɔ o.’
1Samuel15:19 Nu ka ta mèɖo to Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe o? Nu ka ta nèdze aboyonuawo dzi lɔ vɛ
1Samuel15:20 Saul gblɔ na Samuel be: “Mewɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe dzi ɖe. Mede dɔ si gbe Aƒetɔ ɖom ɖa lae. Mesi Agag
1Samuel15:21 Negbe asrafoawo koe ha aboyonuawo ƒe ɖe: alẽwo
1Samuel15:22 Tete Samuel gblɔ be: “Ɖe Aƒetɔ kpɔa ŋudzedze le numemevɔsawo kple vɔsawo ŋu abe toɖoɖo Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe enea? Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel15:23 Elabe aglãdzedze le abe afakaka ƒe nuvɔ̃ ene
1Samuel15:24 Tete Saul gblɔ na Samuel be: “Mewɔ nuvɔ̃. Meda Aƒetɔ ƒe se dzi eye nyemewɔ wò nya dzi o. Mesi dukɔ la ɖa
1Samuel15:25 Eya ta azɔ la
1Samuel15:26 Samuel ɖo eŋu be: “Nyemagbugbɔ ayi kpli wò o
1Samuel15:27 Ke esi Samuel trɔ be yeadzo la
1Samuel15:28 Samuel gblɔ nɛ be: “Aƒetɔ dze Israel-fiaɖuƒe la le asiwò egbe
1Samuel15:29 Israel ƒe Ŋutikɔkɔetɔ la mekaa aʋatso alo trɔa susu o
1Samuel15:30 Ale Saul gagblɔ be: “Mewɔ nuvɔ̃; ke hã la de bubu ŋunye le dukɔmemetsitsiwo kple Israelviwo katã ŋkume. Gbugbɔ kplim yi ko be maɖasubɔ Aƒetɔ
1Samuel15:31 Ale Samuel gbugbɔ kple Saul yi wòɖasubɔ Aƒetɔ.
1Samuel15:32 Azɔ Samuel ɖe gbe be: “Mikplɔ Agag
1Samuel15:33 Samuel gblɔ be: “Ale si wò yi wɔ vi nɔwo wòzu vi manɔsitɔwo la
1Samuel15:34 Emegbe Samuel dzo yi Rama
1Samuel15:35 Samuel megakpɔ Saul kpɔ o va se ɖe eƒe kugbe; ke exa nu ɖe Saul ŋu. Eve Aƒetɔ be eɖo Saul fiae ɖe Israel nu.
1Samuel16:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Samuel be: “Va se ɖe ɣe ka ɣi nàfa konyi le Saul ŋu? Megbe be magaɖu fia ɖe Israel dzi o. Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel16:2 Samuel bia be: “Ale ke mawɔ ayi? Ne Saul see la
1Samuel16:3 Kpe Yese va vɔsaƒea eye mafia nu si nàwɔ la wò. Ame si ŋkɔ mayɔ na wò la
1Samuel16:4 Samuel wɔ nu si Aƒetɔ gblɔ nɛ eye wòyi Betlehem. Dumemegãwo va do goe. Vɔvɔ̃ ɖo wo eye wobia be: “Ehe nya nyui aɖe vɛ na mía?”
1Samuel16:5 Samuel ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Ẽ
1Samuel16:6 Esi wova kpe ta eye wòkpɔ Eliab la
1Samuel16:7 Gake Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Samuel be: “Mègakpɔ eƒe dzedzeme kple eƒe atsudzɔdzɔ o
1Samuel16:8 Ale Yese yɔ via Abinadab vɛ wòtsi tsitre ɖe Samuel ŋkume. Samuel gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ metia eya hã o.”
1Samuel16:9 Yese kplɔ Sama va to Samuel ŋkume. Samuel gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ metia eya hã o.”
1Samuel16:10 Ale Yese kplɔ via adrẽawo dome ame sia ame va to Samuel ŋkume yi
1Samuel16:11 “Viwòawo katãe nye esi le afi sia?” Yese ɖo eŋu be: “Ðevitɔ koe susɔ. Eya kplɔ alẽwo yi gbedzi.” Samuel gblɔ na Isai be: “Dɔ ame ɖa ne woaɖakplɔe vɛ
1Samuel16:12 Tete Yese dɔ ame ɖa woyi ɖakplɔe vɛ. Ebiã
1Samuel16:13 Samuel tsɔ lãdzo si me ami le
1Samuel16:14 Azɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe Gbɔgbɔ do le Saul me
1Samuel16:15 Ale Saul ƒe subɔlawo gblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel16:16 Míaƒe aƒetɔ
1Samuel16:17 Tete Saul gblɔ na eƒe dɔlawo be: “Miyi ɖadi ŋutsu si nya saŋkuƒoƒo nyuie la
1Samuel16:18 Subɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka gblɔ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel16:19 Ale Saul dɔ dɔlawo ɖe Yese gbɔ be woagblɔ nɛ be: “Ðo viwò David
1Samuel16:20 Tete Yese kplɔ tedzi ɖeka
1Samuel16:21 Ale David va Saul gbɔ va zu eƒe subɔla. Saul lɔ̃ David ƒe nya ŋutɔ eye wòwɔe wòzu eƒe adekplɔvi.
1Samuel16:22 Emegbe Saul dɔ ame ɖo ɖe Yese be woagblɔnɛ be: “Medi be nàɖe mɔ na David wòatsi gbɔnye asubɔm
1Samuel16:23 Ale ɣe si ɣi gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ la nyadze Saul dzi ko la
1Samuel17:1 Azɔ Filistitɔwo ƒe asrafowo va ƒo ƒu ɖe Soko le Yuda-nutome
1Samuel17:2 Saul kple Israel-srafowo hã ƒo ƒu
1Samuel17:3 Filistitɔwo ɖo ɖe toa ƒe abu ɖeka nu
1Samuel17:4 Tete ŋutsu dzɔtsu aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Goliat la do tso Filistitɔwo ƒe asaɖa la me. Etso Gat-du me eye wòkɔ abe meta etɔ̃ ene.
1Samuel17:5 Eɖɔ akɔbligakuku eye wòdo aʋawɔgawu si ƒe kpekpeme anɔ abe kilo bla atɔ̃ vɔ adrẽ ene.
1Samuel17:6 Edo akɔblikpoxɔnu ɖe akpaligbe eye wolé akɔblikplɔ
1Samuel17:7 Eƒe akplɔti tri abe abaladoti ene
1Samuel17:8 Etsi tsitre dzɔ ka do ɣli ɖo ɖe Israel-ʋakɔ la be: “Nu ka ta mieva dze aʋa ɖo? Menye miawoe nye Saul ƒe dɔlawo oa? Filistitɔwo nye ya menye. Mitia ŋutsu ɖeka le mia dome ne wòava do gom.
1Samuel17:9 Ne wòwɔ aʋa kplim wum la
1Samuel17:10 Azɔ Filistitɔ la yi edzi gblɔ be: “Israeltɔwo
1Samuel17:11 Esi Saul kple Israelviwo se Filistitɔ la ƒe nya siawo la
1Samuel17:12 Azɔ David ye nye Yese vi. Etso Efrat-ƒome me le Betlehem le Yuda-nyigba dzi. Ŋutsuvi enyi le Yese si. Le Saul ŋɔli la
1Samuel17:13 Via ŋutsuvi tsitsitɔ etɔ̃ yi aʋagbedzi kple Saul. Yese vi etɔ̃ siawoe nye Eliab
1Samuel17:14 Woƒe ɖevitɔe nye David eye tsitsitɔ etɔ̃awo yi aʋagbedzi kple Saul.
1Samuel17:15 David dzona le Saul gbɔ enuenu ɖakplɔa tɔ́a ƒe alẽwo yia Betlehem nuɖuƒee.
1Samuel17:16 Le ŋkeke bla ene sɔŋ me la
1Samuel17:17 Gbe ɖeka la
1Samuel17:18 Tsɔ notsi babla lalɛ ewo siawo hã yi na woƒe aʋakplɔla si kpɔa asrafo akpe ɖeka dzi la. Bia nɔviwòwo ƒe dɔdɔ ta se eye nàxɔ ŋkuɖodzinu aɖe tso wo gbɔ vɛ.
1Samuel17:19 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
1Samuel17:20 Ale David fɔ ŋdi kanya
1Samuel17:21 Israeltɔwo kple Filistitɔwo ƒe aʋakɔwo dze ŋgɔ wo nɔewo be woakpe aʋa.
1Samuel17:22 Tete David gblẽ nu si wòtsɔ vɛ la ɖe ame si kpɔa aʋawɔnuwo dzi la si me
1Samuel17:23 Esime wòle nu ƒom kpli wo la
1Samuel17:24 Ke esi Israel-ŋutsuwo katã nyakpɔ ŋutsua ko la
1Samuel17:25 Azɔ Israel-srafoawo gblɔ le wo nɔewo dome be: “Miekpɔ ŋutsu sia si do go vaa? Ðe koŋ wòva be yeaɖe alɔ me le Israelviwo ŋu. Ame si awui la
1Samuel17:26 Tete David bia ame siwo le egbɔ la se be: “Nu ka woawɔ na ame si awu Filistitɔ sia
1Samuel17:27 Ameawo ɖo eŋu nɛ abe ale si wogblɔe va yi ene be: “Ale kple ale woawɔ na ame si wui lae nye esi.”
1Samuel17:28 Azɔ esi David le nu ƒom kple ameawo la
1Samuel17:29 David ɖo eŋu bia be: “Nu ka mewɔ fifia? Menye nya ta koe mebia oa?”
1Samuel17:30 Ale wòtrɔ le egbɔ
1Samuel17:31 Esi wose David ƒe nyaawo la
1Samuel17:32 David gblɔ na Saul be: “Dzika megatso ame aɖeke ƒo le ŋutsua ƒe nyawo ta o. Wò dɔla ayi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Filistitɔ sia.”
1Samuel17:33 Saul gblɔ na David be: “Màte ŋu ayi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Filistitɔ sia o
1Samuel17:34 Ke David gblɔ na Saul be: “Wò dɔla la
1Samuel17:35 mekplɔnɛ ɖo ɖaƒonɛ ƒua anyi eye meɖea lã la le eƒe nu me. Nenye be lã la ho ɖe ŋunye be yeawɔ nu vevim la
1Samuel17:36 Wò dɔla wu dzata kple sisiblisiwo siaa kpɔ. Nenema ke wòanɔ na Filistitɔ bolobolotɔ sia hã
1Samuel17:37 David gayi edzi gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ
1Samuel17:38 Tete Saul tsɔ eƒe aʋawɔnuwo do na David. Eɖɔ akɔbligakuku nɛ
1Samuel17:39 David kpla eƒe yi ɖe gawua dzi eye wòdze agbagba be yeazɔ
1Samuel17:40 Tete wòtsɔ eƒe lãkplɔti ɖe asi
1Samuel17:41 Tete Filistitɔ la zɔ ɖe ŋgɔ nɔ tetem ɖe David ŋu. Eƒe akpoxɔnutsɔla le eŋgɔ.
1Samuel17:42 Esi Filistitɔ la kpɔ David la
1Samuel17:43 Ebia David be: “Avue menye be nètsɔ kpo ɖe ŋunyea?” Ale Filistitɔ la ƒo fi de David le eƒe mawuwo ŋkɔ me.
1Samuel17:44 Egblɔ na David be: “Katse nàva afii eye woana wò ŋutilã azu nuɖuɖu na dziƒoxeviwo kple gbemelãwo.”
1Samuel17:45 David ɖo eŋu na Filistitɔ la be: “Wò la
1Samuel17:46 Aƒetɔ atsɔ wò de asi nam egbea
1Samuel17:47 Nenema ke ameha blibo sia adze sii be Aƒetɔ metsɔa yi alo akplɔ xɔna na ame o. Aƒetɔ ye ɖua dzi le aʋa me
1Samuel17:48 Esi Filistitɔ la gaɖe zɔ nɔ tetem ɖe David ŋu la
1Samuel17:49 Tete David de asi eƒe golo me tsɔ kpe ɖeka
1Samuel17:50 Ale David ɖu Filistitɔ la dzi kple akafo kpakple kpe ko. Eƒoe ƒu anyi hewui
1Samuel17:51 Tete David ƒu du ɖe Filistitɔ la dzi
1Samuel17:52 Aʋaɣli ɖi eye Israelviwo kple Yudatɔwo ƒe asrafowo ho
1Samuel17:53 Esi Israelviwo trɔ le Filistitɔwo yome la
1Samuel17:54 David tsɔ Filistitɔ la ƒe ta yi Yerusalem
1Samuel17:55 Esi Saul kpɔ David wòyina aʋa kpe ge kple Filistitɔ la la
1Samuel17:56 Fia la gblɔ be: “Bia ame si vi ɖekakpui sia nye la ta se.”
1Samuel17:57 Azɔ esi David trɔ gbɔ
1Samuel17:58 Ale Saul biae se be: Ðekakpui
1Samuel18:1 Esi David ƒo nu kple Saul vɔ ko la
1Samuel18:2 Tso gbe ma gbe dzi la
1Samuel18:3 Azɔ Yonatan bla nu kple David elabe elɔ̃e vevie.
1Samuel18:4 Eɖe awu ʋlaya si le eŋu la tsɔ na David. Nenema ke wòtsɔ eƒe aʋawu
1Samuel18:5 Afi sia afi si Saul dɔe ɖo ɖa la
1Samuel18:6 Esi David trɔ gbɔ va aƒe
1Samuel18:7 Nyɔnuawo nɔ aseye tsom nɔ ha dzim be: “Saul wu akpewo eye David wu akpe ewowo.”
1Samuel18:8 Nya la medze Saul ŋu o eye wòkpɔ dziku vevie. Egblɔ be: “Wobe David wu ame akpeakpewo eye nye la
1Samuel18:9 Tso gbe ma gbe heyina la
1Samuel18:10 Evea gbe la
1Samuel18:11 Eda akplɔ la
1Samuel18:12 Azɔ Saul de asi vɔvɔ̃ me na David
1Samuel18:13 Esia ta Saul na be David nadzo le ye gbɔ
1Samuel18:14 Nu sia nu si wòwɔna la dzea edzi
1Samuel18:15 Esi Saul kpɔ be David ƒe wɔna ɖe sia ɖe dzea edzi nɛ nyuie la
1Samuel18:16 Ke ame siwo katã le Israel kple Yuda ya lɔ̃a eƒe nya gbɔ
1Samuel18:17 Azɔ Saul gblɔ na David be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel18:18 Ale David gblɔ na Saul be: “Ame ka menye eye ame kawoe nye ƒonyemetɔwo kple tɔ́nye ƒomeawo le Israel-nyigba dzi
1Samuel18:19 Ke ɣeyiɣi si wòle be Saul natsɔ via nyɔnuvi Merab na David wòaɖe la
1Samuel18:20 Eva dzɔ be David ƒe nu va lé dzi na Saul vinyɔnuvi Mixal boŋ. Esi wogblɔ nya sia na Saul la
1Samuel18:21 Saul gblɔ le eɖokui me be: “Matsɔe nɛ wòaɖe; ekem atrɔ zu mɔ̀ nɛ ale be Filistitɔwo ƒe asi asu edzi.” Eya ta Saul gblɔ na David zi evelia be: “Àzu tonye azɔ.”
1Samuel18:22 Tete Saul gblɔ na eƒe amegãwo be: “Miɖe kpɔ David ne miagblɔ nɛ be
1Samuel18:23 Ale Saul ƒe dɔlawo na nya siawo va ɖo David ƒe to me. Azɔ David gblɔ be: “Nu tsɛ ko miawo miebui be ame nanye fia toa? Nye la
1Samuel18:24 Tete Saul ƒe dɔlawo va gblɔ nɛ be ale kple ale David gblɔ enye si.
1Samuel18:25 Eya ta Saul gagblɔ be: “Mina David nase egɔme nyuie be fia la mehiã srɔ̃ɖenu aɖeke o
1Samuel18:26 Esi fia la ƒe dɔlawo gblɔ nya sia na David la
1Samuel18:27 David kple eƒe asrafowo ho aʋa yi ɖawu Filistitɔ alafa eve. Esẽ woƒe aʋanuyiwo eye wòtsɔ wo katã vɛ na fia la ale be wòate ŋu zu fia to. Ale Saul tsɔ via Mixal nɛ wòɖe.
1Samuel18:28 Gake esi Saul kpɔ dze sii be Aƒetɔ li kple David
1Samuel18:29 Saul gavɔ̃ David wu. Esia ta David zu Saul ƒe futɔ ɖikaa.
1Samuel18:30 Enuenu la
1Samuel19:1 Azɔ Saul de gbe to me na via Yonatan kple eƒe dɔlawo katã be woawu David. Ke David ƒe nu lé dzi na Saul vi
1Samuel19:2 Ale Yonatan gblɔ na David be: “Tɔ́nye Saul le didim be yeawu wò
1Samuel19:3 Ke nye la
1Samuel19:4 Tete Yonatan yi ɖaƒo nu nyui le David ŋu na tɔ́a Saul gblɔ nɛ be: “Megava eme be fia nawɔ vɔ̃ ɖe eƒe dɔla David ŋu o
1Samuel19:5 Etsɔ eƒe agbe ke faa yi ɖawu Filistitɔ la
1Samuel19:6 Saul se Yonatan ƒe gbe eye wòka atam be: “Metà Aƒetɔ gbagbe la! Ne mewu David fĩi!”
1Samuel19:7 Tete Yonatan yɔ David eye wògblɔ nya siawo katã nɛ. Ekplɔ David yi Saul gbɔ eye wòganɔ egbɔ abe ale si wònɔe tsã la ene.
1Samuel19:8 Eva eme be aʋa gava dzɔ. David yi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Filistitɔwo eye wòwu wo dometɔ geɖe. Bubuawo sí le enu.
1Samuel19:9 Tete gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ tso Aƒetɔ gbɔ va dze Saul dzi esime wòlé akplɔ ɖe asi hebɔbɔ nɔ eƒeme. David nɔ kasaŋku ƒom.
1Samuel19:10 Saul di be yeada akplɔ David atɔe amimi ɖe gli ŋu. Ke David do axa na akplɔ la eye wòyi ɖatɔ glia. David ƒu du sí dzo.
1Samuel19:11 Gbe ma gbe ƒe zã me la
1Samuel19:12 Ale Mixal na David ɖiɖi to fesre hesí dzo.
1Samuel19:13 Mixal tsɔ aklama kpakpɛ da ɖe eƒe aba dzi
1Samuel19:14 Esi Saul ɖo amewo ɖa be woava kplɔ David vɛ la
1Samuel19:15 Azɔ Saul dɔ dɔlawo ɖa be woaɖasra David kpɔ. Egblɔ na wo be: “Miyi ɖakɔe kple aba la vɛ nam ne mawu.”
1Samuel19:16 Esi amedɔdɔawo ge ɖe eme la
1Samuel19:17 Saul bia Mixal be: “Nu ka ta nèflum alea eye nèna nye futɔ sí dzo?” Mixal ɖo eŋu be: “Egblɔ nam be
1Samuel19:18 Azɔ esi David sí la
1Samuel19:19 Emegbe wova gblɔ na Saul be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel19:20 Eya ta Saul dɔ amewo ɖa be woaɖakplɔ David vɛ. Esi wova ɖo la
1Samuel19:21 Esi wova gblɔ nya sia na Saul la
1Samuel19:22 Azɔ Saul ŋutɔ ɖo ta Rama. Eva ɖo vudo gã aɖe si le Sexu la gbɔ eye wòbia be: “Afi ka Samuel kple David le?” Ame aɖe ɖo eŋu be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel19:23 Edze mɔ ɖo ta afi ma. Tete Mawu ƒe Gbɔgbɔ va dze eya hã dzi esi wole mɔa dzi yina. Enɔ gbeƒã ɖem va se ɖe esime wova ɖo Nayot le Rama-nutome.
1Samuel19:24 Eya hã ɖe eƒe awu ɖi eye wòɖe gbeƒã le Samuel gbɔ. Enɔ amama ŋkeke blibo ma kple zã katã. Afi sia nyagbɔgblɔ sia dzɔ tso amewo gblɔna be: “Ðe Saul hã le Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖelawo domea?”
1Samuel20:1 Azɔ David sí le Nayot le Rama. Eva Yonatan gbɔ va bia be: “Nu ka gɔ̃ mewɔ? Vo ka meda? Nu vɔ̃ ka mewɔ ɖe tɔ́wò ŋu hafi wòdi be yeawum?”
1Samuel20:2 Yonatan ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Gbeɖe! Mèle kuku ge o. Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel20:3 Ke David gblɔ nɛ be: “Tɔ́wò nya nyuie be mèlɔ̃a nu le gbɔnye o. Eƒe susu anye be
1Samuel20:4 Esia ta Yonatan do ŋugbe na David be: “Nu sia nu si nàbia la mawɔe na wò.”
1Samuel20:5 Ale David gblɔ na Yonatan be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel20:6 Ne tɔ́wò de dzesii be nyemeli o la
1Samuel20:7 Ne egblɔ be: ‘Enyo
1Samuel20:8 Eya ta meɖe kuku
1Samuel20:9 Yonatan gblɔ nɛ be: “Gbeɖe
1Samuel20:10 David bia Yonatan be: “Ame ka nu masee le ne tɔ́wò do dziku ɖe ŋuwò?”
1Samuel20:11 David gblɔ na Yonatan be: “Va míyi gbedzi.” Ale wo kple eve la yi gbedzi.
1Samuel20:12 Eyi edzi gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ
1Samuel20:13 Evɔ ne wònye vɔ̃ tɔ́nye ɖo be yeawɔ wò la
1Samuel20:14 Ne megale agbe la
1Samuel20:15 Mègana ŋugbe si nèdo na nye aƒe be yeawɔ nyui nɛ la nabu gbeɖe o. Ne Aƒetɔ tsrɔ̃ David ƒe futɔwo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe le anyigba dzi hã la
1Samuel20:16 megagblẽ nubabla si le Yonatan kple David ƒe aƒe la ya dome o. Aƒetɔ ŋutɔ nebia hlɔ̃ David ƒe futɔwo.”
1Samuel20:17 Ale Yonatan na David gaka atam ɖe lɔlɔ̃ si wòtsɔ nɛ la dzi
1Samuel20:18 Tete Yonatan gblɔ nɛ be: “Etsɔ anye Dzinu Yeye Ŋkeke Nyui. Woabia tawò le nua ɖuƒe elabe wò nɔƒe aɖi gbɔlo.
1Samuel20:19 Le etɔ̃a gbe la
1Samuel20:20 Mele aŋutrɔ etɔ̃ da ge ɖo ɖe kpekɔ la gbɔ lɔƒo
1Samuel20:21 Emegbe madɔ ɖekakpui aɖe ɖa agblɔ nɛ be: ‘Heyi
1Samuel20:22 Gake ne megblɔ na ɖekakpuia be
1Samuel20:23 Ke le nya si nye kpli wò míegblɔ ɖo kpe edzi gome ya la
1Samuel20:24 Eya ta David yi ɖabè ɖe gbea dzi. Esi Dzinu Yeye Ŋkeke Nyui la ɖo la
1Samuel20:25 eye wòbɔbɔ nɔ teƒe si wònɔna edziedzi le glia ŋu la. Yonatan tsi tsitre eye Abner bɔbɔ nɔ Saul xa. Ke David nɔƒe ɖi gbɔlo.
1Samuel20:26 Gake Saul megblɔ nya aɖeke gbe ma gbe o. Eƒe susu koe nye be: “Nane dzɔ ɖe David dzi ale be eŋu mekɔ o. Ẽ
1Samuel20:27 Le Dzinu Yeye Ŋkeke Nyui ƒe evea gbe ŋdi hã la
1Samuel20:28 Yonatan ɖo eŋu na Saul gblɔ be: “David bia mɔ be yeayi Betlehem.
1Samuel20:29 Ebe
1Samuel20:30 Tete Saul do dziku helihelĩ ɖe Yonatan ŋu
1Samuel20:31 Eme nekɔ na wò be
1Samuel20:32 Ale Yonatan bia tɔ́a Saul se be: “Nu ka ta wòle be wòaku? Nu ka wòwɔ?”
1Samuel20:33 Enumake Saul da akplɔ Yonatan be yeawui. Tete Yonatan dze sii be ye tɔ́ ɖoe kplikpaa be yeawu David.
1Samuel20:34 Yonatan do dziku
1Samuel20:35 Le ŋufɔke la
1Samuel20:36 Egblɔ na ŋutsuvia be: “Ƒu du yi ɖadi aŋutrɔ siwo da ge mala.” Esi ŋutsuvia de asi duƒuƒu me yina la
1Samuel20:37 Ke esi ŋutsuvia ɖo afi si Yonatan da aŋutrɔ wòva dze la
1Samuel20:38 Eyi dzi gado ɣli ɖe eyome be: “Netsɔ
1Samuel20:39 Ke ŋutsuvia menya nu si le edzi yim o
1Samuel20:40 Tete Yonatan tsɔ eƒe aʋawɔnua de ŋutsuvia si eye wògblɔ nɛ be: “Trɔ nàtsɔ wo yi dua mee.”
1Samuel20:41 Kasia ŋutsuvia nadzo la
1Samuel20:42 Tete Yonatan gblɔ na David be: “Heyi le ŋutifafa me
1Samuel21:1 Azɔ David zɔ mɔ va ɖo nunɔla Aximelex gbɔ le Nob. Aximelex do go va kpe David kple vɔvɔ̃ gã aɖe eye wòbiae be: “Nu ka ta wò ɖeka nèva eye ame aɖeke mekpe ɖe ŋutiwò o?”
1Samuel21:2 David gblɔ na nunɔla Aximelex be: “Fia lae de gbe asi nam be
1Samuel21:3 Nuɖuɖu aɖe le asiwò fifia? Nà abolo atɔ̃ alo nuɖuɖu ɖe sia ɖe ƒomevi si le asiwò lam.”
1Samuel21:4 Nunɔla la gblɔ na David be: “Abolo dzodzro aɖeke mele asinye o
1Samuel21:5 David gblɔ na nunɔla la be: “Nye ŋutimewo metena ɖe nyɔnu ŋu ɣeaɖekeɣi ne míedo go dzro yi gbedzi hã o
1Samuel21:6 Ale wɔ nunɔla la tsɔ abolo si ŋuti kɔ la na David elabe abolo bubu aɖeke meli wu ema o
1Samuel21:7 Ke Saul ƒe lãkplɔlawo ƒe amegã si ŋkɔe nye Doeg
1Samuel21:8 David gblɔ na Aximelex be: “Akplɔ alo yi aɖeke mele asiwò le afii nàtsɔ nam oa? Fia ƒe nya la na metsi dzi ale gbegbe be nyemetsɔ nye yi alo aʋawɔnu bubu aɖeke ɖe asi hafi dze mɔ o.”
1Samuel21:9 Aximelex ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Goliat
1Samuel21:10 Ale David dze mɔ gbe ma gbe hesí le Saul nu eye wòva fia Axis gbɔ le Gat.
1Samuel21:11 Tete fia Axis ŋutimewo va gblɔ nɛ be: “Menye David
1Samuel21:12 Nya siawo wɔ dɔ ɖe David dzi ale gbegbe be wòde asi fia Axis vɔvɔ̃ me.
1Samuel21:13 Ale David trɔ eƒe nɔnɔme le wo ŋkume hele nu wɔm abe tsukunɔ ene. Enɔ fli tem ɖe agbo la ŋu nyamanyama eye ade nɔ tsyɔtsyɔm le enu ɖe ge me nɛ.
1Samuel21:14 Tete Axis gblɔ na eŋumewo be: “Mikpɔ ɖa! Tsukunɔe! Nu ka ta miekplɔe vɛ nam?
1Samuel21:15 Tsukunɔwoe le hiãyem ta miekplɔ ame sia vɛ be woava nɔ aɖaʋanu wɔm le gbɔnyea? Ðe wòle be ame sia tɔgbe nage ɖe nye aƒemea?”
1Samuel22:1 David sí le Gat-dua me eye wòyi ɖe agado si te ɖe Adulam-du ŋu la me. Esi nɔvia ŋutsuwo kple eƒe ƒometɔ mamlɛawo se be ele afi ma la
1Samuel22:2 Ame siwo le xaxa me
1Samuel22:3 David dzo le afi ma eye wòyi Mizpa le Moab-nyigba dzi eye wòɖagblɔ na Moab-fia be: “Meɖe kuku
1Samuel22:4 Ale David gblẽ edzilawo ɖe Moab-fia la gbɔ
1Samuel22:5 Tete Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela Gad va David gbɔ eye wògblɔ nɛ be: “Mègatsi agado sia me o; ʋu nàyi Moab-nyigba dzi.” Ale David dzo le afi ma eye wòyi ɖe ave me le Xaret.
1Samuel22:6 Saul se be wokpɔ David kple ŋutsu siwo le eŋu la. Saul bɔbɔ nɔ ati aɖe te le togbɛ aɖe dzi
1Samuel22:7 Saul gblɔ na eƒe subɔla siwo le tsitre ƒo xlãe la be: “Mi Benyamin viwo
1Samuel22:8 Esiawoe miebu tae mi katã miewɔ ɖeka heɖo nugbe ɖe ŋunyea? Esime vinye wɔ ɖeka kple Isai vi la la
1Samuel22:9 Doeg tsi tsitre ɖe Saul ƒe dɔlawo gbɔ eye wòɖo nyaa ŋu be: “Isai vi la va Aximelex
1Samuel22:10 Aximelex bia nu ta na David le Aƒetɔ gbɔ. Emegbe la
1Samuel22:11 Tete Saul dɔ ame ɖa be woayi aɖayɔ nunɔla Aximelex kple eƒe ƒometɔwo katã
1Samuel22:12 Saul gblɔ na Aximelex be: “Axitub vi
1Samuel22:13 Saul biae be: “Nu ka ta wò kple David miewɔ ɖeka heɖo nugbe ɖe ŋunye? Nu ka ta nètsɔ nuɖuɖu kple yi nɛ eye nèbia nu Mawu nɛ? Èkpɔea? Azɔ la
1Samuel22:14 Aximelex ɖo eŋu be: “Ame aɖeke mele wò ŋutimewo dome si wɔa nuteƒe abe David ene o. Azɔ wò ŋutɔ towòe eye wòganye wò ŋutimewo ƒe amegã. Gawu la
1Samuel22:15 Ele eme baa be mebia nu Mawu nɛ
1Samuel22:16 Fia la gblɔ be: “Aximelex
1Samuel22:17 Tete fia la gblɔ na eŋudzɔla siwo le tsitre ɖe egbɔ la be: “Miwu Aƒetɔ ƒe nunɔlaawo! Wowɔ ɖeka kple David ɖo nugbe ɖe ŋunye. Wonya be ɖe wòsí gake womeva fi tofi nam o.” Ke eŋudzɔlaawo gbe be yewomawu Aƒetɔ ƒe nunɔlaawo o.
1Samuel22:18 Fia la gblɔ na Doeg be: “Wòa te yi nàwu wo!” Enumake Doeg wu wo katã. Ewu nunɔla bla enyi vɔ atɔ̃ siwo do aklalakɔmewu la gbe ma gbe.
1Samuel22:19 Azɔ Saul ɖe gbe be woawu nunɔlawo katã le Nob-du me. Ale wowu ame sia ame le dua me: ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo
1Samuel22:20 Ke Abyatar
1Samuel22:21 Egblɔ ale si Saul wu Aƒetɔ ƒe nunɔlaawoe la na David.
1Samuel22:22 David gblɔ nɛ be: “Esi mekpɔ Doeg le afi ma gbe ma gbe la
1Samuel22:23 Nɔ gbɔnye eye mègavɔ̃ o
1Samuel23:1 David se be Filistitɔwo le aʋa wɔm kple Kegila-dua
1Samuel23:2 Eya ta David bia Aƒetɔ be: “Mayi ɖawɔ aʋa kpli woa?” Aƒetɔ ɖo eŋu be: “Yi nàɖawɔ aʋa kpli wo eye nàxɔ na Kegila-dua.”
1Samuel23:3 Ke David ƒe amewo gblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel23:4 Ale David gabia nu Aƒetɔ ake eye wòɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Tso nàyi Kegila elabe mana nàɖu Filistitɔwo dzi.”
1Samuel23:5 Ale David kple amewo yi Kegila
1Samuel23:6 Esi Abyatar
1Samuel23:7 Wova gblɔ na Saul be David yi Kegila eye wògblɔ be: “Mawu tsɔe de asi nam
1Samuel23:8 Ale wɔ Saul yɔ eƒe aʋakɔwo ƒo ƒu be woaho ayi Kegila aɖawɔ aʋa kple David kple eƒe amewo.
1Samuel23:9 Esi David nya be Saul le vɔ̃ ɖom ɖe ye ŋu la
1Samuel23:10 Tete David gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ
1Samuel23:11 Ðe Kegilatɔwo le asi ɖe ge le ŋunye nɛa? Ðe Saul le vava ge vavã abe ale si mesee enea? Aƒetɔ
1Samuel23:12 David gabia be: “Ekema ɖe Kegilatɔwo le asi ɖe ge le nye kple nye amewo ŋu na Saul mahã?” Aƒetɔ ɖo eŋu be: “Woaɖe asi le mia ŋu nɛ.”
1Samuel23:13 Tete David kple eƒe amewo dzo le Kegila enumake. Woanɔ ame alafa ade. Wodzo henɔ yiyim ko
1Samuel23:14 David nɔ teƒe sesẽ siwo wòabè ɖo le tonyigba dzi le gbedadaƒo si te ɖe Sif ŋu. Saul dii vevie gbe sia gbe gake Mawu meɖe asi le eŋu nɛ o.
1Samuel23:15 David kpɔ be Saul ɖoe kplikpaa be yeawu ye. Ale David dzo yi Xores le gbedadaƒo si te ɖe Sif ŋu.
1Samuel23:16 Yonatan
1Samuel23:17 Egblɔ nɛ be: “Mègavɔ̃ o. Tɔ́nye mate nu awɔ nu vevi aɖeke wò o. Eya ŋutɔ nya nyuie be wòe gbɔna Israel-fia nye ge
1Samuel23:18 Wo ame evea wobla nu le Aƒetɔ ŋkume. David tsi Xores eye Yonatan yi aƒe.
1Samuel23:19 Siftɔ aɖewo va Saul gbɔ le Gibea eye wogblɔ nɛ be: “David va bè ɖe tonyigba dzi le Xores. Ele Xaxila-togbɛ si le Yesimon ƒe anyigbeme la dzi.
1Samuel23:20 Fia bubutɔ
1Samuel23:21 Saul gblɔ na wo be: “Aƒetɔ neyra mi elabe mienyo dɔme nam.
1Samuel23:22 Migbugbɔ yi miaka ɖe edzi. Mikpɔ afi si tututu wòle kple ame si kpɔe le afi ma
1Samuel23:23 Miyi ɖadii le teƒe siwo katã wobè ɖo la
1Samuel23:24 Ale wotrɔ do ŋgɔ na Saul gbugbɔ yi Sif. David kple eƒe amewo le gbedadaƒo si le Maon. Teƒe sia nye gbadzaƒe si le anyigbeme le gbedadaƒo si le Yuda.
1Samuel23:25 Saul kple eƒe amewo yi David di ge
1Samuel23:26 Togbɛ la le wo dome; Saul kple eƒe amewo le akpa ɖeka eye David kple eƒe amewo hã le akpa kemɛ. David nɔ ʋaʋãm be yeasí le Saul nu adzo
1Samuel23:27 Ɣe ma ɣi me tututu la
1Samuel23:28 Ale wɔ Saul gbugbɔ le David yome
1Samuel23:29 David dzo le afi ma eye wòyi ɖanɔ totamemɔ́ me le En-Gedi.
1Samuel24:1 Esi Saul yi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Filistitɔwo gbɔ la
1Samuel24:2 Tete Saul tia ŋutsu kalẽtɔ akpe etɔ̃ le Israel-dukɔa me
1Samuel24:3 Eva ɖo agado aɖe si te ɖe alẽkpo aɖe ŋu le mɔ to la gbɔ
1Samuel24:4 David ƒe amewo gblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel24:5 Emegbe la
1Samuel24:6 Egblɔ na eƒe amewo be: “Aƒetɔ megana mawɔ nu vevi aɖeke nye amegã
1Samuel24:7 David ƒe nya la dze eƒe ameawo ŋu eye mena wowɔ nu vevi aɖeke Saul o. Saul tsi tsitre eye wòdzo le agadoa me heyi eƒe mɔzɔzɔ dzi.
1Samuel24:8 Azɔ la David do go le agadoa me kplɔe ɖo eye wòyɔe sesĩe be
1Samuel24:9 David gblɔ na Saul be: “Nu ka ta nèle ame siwo le gbɔgblɔm be nye David
1Samuel24:10 Wò ŋutɔ kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel24:11 Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel24:12 Aƒetɔ nedrɔ̃ nye kple wò domenya ne wòahe to na wò nam; ke nyemawɔ nu vevi aɖeke wò akpɔ gbeɖe o.
1Samuel24:13 Ame tsitsiwo doa lo be: ‘Ame vɔ̃ɖi koe wɔa nuvɔ̃ɖi’
1Samuel24:14 Mikpɔ ame si Israel-fia kplɔ ɖo la ɖa! Mikpɔ ame si yome tim wòle la ɖa! Avu kuku aɖee! Dosu aɖee!
1Samuel24:15 Aƒetɔ nedrɔ̃ nye kple wò domenya eye wòatso afia na ame si tɔ dzɔ. Eya ŋutɔ nekpɔ nya la me ne wòaʋli tanye eye wòaɖem tso asiwò me.”
1Samuel24:16 Esi David ƒo nu na Saul vɔ la
1Samuel24:17 Azɔ la egblɔ na David be: “Tɔwò dzɔ
1Samuel24:18 Èɖe nyui si nèwɔ nam la fia egbe elabe togbɔ be Aƒetɔ tsɔm de asi na wò hã la
1Samuel24:19 Ame ƒe asi ɖe wòsua eƒe futɔ dzi vɔ tso
1Samuel24:20 Azɔ meka ɖe edzi be ègbɔna Israel-fia zu ge
1Samuel24:21 Eya ta tà Aƒetɔ nam be yematsrɔ̃ nye dzidzimeviwo bene woaŋlɔm be le tɔ́nye ƒeme o.”
1Samuel24:22 Tete David ka atam ɖe nya sia dzi na Saul. Emegbe Saul trɔ yi aƒe
1Samuel25:1 Samuel ku
1Samuel25:2 Ke ŋutsu aɖe nɔ Moan
1Samuel25:3 Ŋutsua ŋkɔe nye Nabal
1Samuel25:4 David se le gbedadaƒoa be Nabal va le fu kom na eƒe alẽwo.
1Samuel25:5 Ale David dɔ ɖekakpui ewo tso eƒe ameawo dome be woayi Karmel-dua me aɖadi Nabal
1Samuel25:6 Egblɔ na wo be woaɖagblɔ na Nabal be: “Xɔ̃wò David be yedo gbe na wò. Èdɔa? Aƒewòmetɔwo dɔa? Wò nuwo katã li nyuiea?
1Samuel25:7 Ese be èle fu kom na wò alẽwo
1Samuel25:8 Wò ya bia wo ko
1Samuel25:9 David ƒe dɔlaawo yi ɖagblɔ nya la na Nabal le David ŋkɔ me
1Samuel25:10 Ke Nabal ɖo nyaa ŋu azɔ na amedɔdɔawo be: “David hã? Ame ka wònye? Isai vi? Nyemese eŋkɔ kpɔ o! Kluvi geɖe le sísim le woƒe aƒetɔwo gbɔ le ŋkeke siawo me.
1Samuel25:11 Nu ka tae matsɔ nye nuɖuɖu kple tsi kpakple lã si mewu na ame siwo le fu kom na nye alẽwo la ana ame siwo tso afi si nyemenya o?”
1Samuel25:12 David ƒe amewo trɔ yi egbɔ eye wogblɔ nya si Nabal gblɔ na wo la nɛ.
1Samuel25:13 Tete David ɖe gbe na wo be: “Ame sia ame nekpla eƒe yi!” Wo katã wowɔ ɖe edzi; David ŋutɔ hã kpla etɔ eye wòdze mɔ kple ame alafa ene. Ame alafa eve tsi woƒe nuwo gbɔ.
1Samuel25:14 Nabal ƒe dɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka gblɔ na Nabal srɔ̃ Abigail be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel25:15 Evɔ la esime míele yiyim kpli wo le gbea dzi la
1Samuel25:16 Esime míele alẽha kplɔm le wo gbɔ la
1Samuel25:17 Eya ta azɔ la
1Samuel25:18 Tete Abigail wɔ kaba tsɔ abolo alafa eve wain lãgbalẽgolo eve
1Samuel25:19 Egblɔ na eƒe dɔlawo be: “Mido ŋgɔ nam. Mele mia yome dze ge.” Ke megblɔ nya aɖeke na srɔ̃a Nabal o.
1Samuel25:20 Esi wòdo tedzi ɖi abu ɖo toa xa yina la
1Samuel25:21 David gblɔ be: “Menye dɔ vlo nye esi mewɔ oa? Mekpɔ ŋutsu sia ƒe nuwo dzi nɛ le gbea dzi
1Samuel25:22 Nenye be ŋu ke ŋdi
1Samuel25:23 Esi Abigail kpɔ David la
1Samuel25:24 Edze klo ɖe David ƒe afɔnu eye wògblɔ nɛ be: “Nye amegã
1Samuel25:25 Nye amegã
1Samuel25:26 Aƒetɔ xe mɔ na wò be mègawu wò futɔwo tsɔ bia hlɔ̃e o. Azɔ la metà Aƒetɔ gbagbe la na wò be ne womehe to na wò futɔwo kple ame siwo katã ɖo vɔ̃ ɖe ŋuwò abe Nabal ene o la fĩi.
1Samuel25:27 Meɖe kuku
1Samuel25:28 Taflatsɛ
1Samuel25:29 Ne ame aɖe tso ɖe ŋuwò le yowòme tim be yeawu wò la
1Samuel25:30 Ne Aƒetɔ na nu nyui siwo katã ŋugbe wòdo na wò la wò pɛpɛpɛ
1Samuel25:31 megave wò be yewu ame madzemadzee alo yebia hlɔ̃ na ye ɖokui o. Ne Aƒetɔ na nu nyo na wò la
1Samuel25:32 David gblɔ nɛ be: “Mikafu Aƒetɔ
1Samuel25:33 Akpe na Mawu be wòna nunya wò le nu si nèwɔ nam egbe la ta. Elabe èva xe mɔ nam ale be nyemewu ame alo bia hlɔ̃ na ɖokuinye o.
1Samuel25:34 Aƒetɔ xe mɔ nam be magawɔ vɔ̃ aɖeke wò o. Evɔ la metà Israel ƒe Mawu gbagbe la be
1Samuel25:35 David xɔ nu siwo keŋ wòtsɔ vɛ la eye wògblɔ nɛ be: “Yi aƒe le ŋutifafa me. Kpɔ ɖa
1Samuel25:36 Esi Abigail gbɔ va aƒe la
1Samuel25:37 Esi ŋu ke ŋdi la
1Samuel25:38 Anɔ abe ŋkeke ewo megbe ene la
1Samuel25:39 Esi David se be Nabal ku la
1Samuel25:40 David ƒe amedɔdɔawo yi egbɔ le Karmel eye wogblɔ nɛ be: “David dɔ mí ɖe gbɔwò. Ebe míkplɔ wò vɛ nàva zu ye srɔ̃.”
1Samuel25:41 Abigail bɔbɔ tsyɔ mo anyi gblɔ be: “Eƒe nyɔnudɔla menye. Mele klalo be maklɔ eƒe dɔlawo ƒe afɔ.”
1Samuel25:42 Etso enumake eye wòde eƒe tedzi dzi. Nyɔnu subɔla atɔ̃ kpe ɖe eŋu eye wòdze mɔ kple David ƒe dɔlaawo eye wòyi ɖazu David srɔ̃.
1Samuel25:43 Do ŋgɔ la
