1Kings20:43 Tete dzi ku Israel-fia la wòɖo adã
1Kings21:1 Azɔ la
1Kings21:2 Gbe ɖeka la
1Kings21:3 Ke Nabot ɖo eŋu na Axab be: “Matsɔ tɔgbuinyewo ƒe domenyinu na wò! Aƒetɔ nete esia ɖa xaa tso gbɔnye.”
1Kings21:4 Tete Axab yi aƒeme. Eɖo adã eye dzi kui le nya si Yezreeltɔ Nabot gblɔ nɛ be: “Nyemate ŋu atsɔ tɔgbuinyewo ƒe domenyinu na wò o” ta. Eyi ɖamlɔ anyi
1Kings21:5 Srɔ̃a Izebel va egbɔ biae be: “Nu ka ta nèlé blanui ale gbegbe be nègbe nuɖuɖu?”
1Kings21:6 Eɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Elabe meƒo nu kple Nabot
1Kings21:7 Ke srɔ̃a Izebel gblɔ nɛ be: “Èle fia ɖum ɖe Israel dzi fifiaa? Fɔ nàɖu nu
1Kings21:8 Tete wòŋlɔ agbalẽwo le Axab ƒe ŋkɔ me
1Kings21:9 Eŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽawo me be: “Miɖe gbeƒã be woatsi nu adɔ
1Kings21:10 Mina yakame eve nadze ŋgɔe
1Kings21:11 Ale dua me ŋutsuwo
1Kings21:12 woɖe gbeƒã be woatsi nu adɔ
1Kings21:13 Tete yakame eve va nɔ anyi dze ŋgɔe. Woɖi ɖase tso enu le dukɔa ŋkume gblɔ be: “Nabot do ɖiŋu na Mawu kple fia la.” Ale wokplɔe yi dua godo
1Kings21:14 Tete wodɔ ame ɖe Izebel be: “Woƒu kpe Nabot; eku.”
1Kings21:15 Enumake esi Izebel se be woƒu kpe Nabot wòku la
1Kings21:16 Enumake esi Axab se be Nabot ku la
1Kings21:17 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Eliya
1Kings21:18 “Tso nàɖakpe Israel-fia Axab ame si le Samaria. Kpɔ ɖa
1Kings21:19 Gblɔ nɛ be: ‘Aƒetɔ be: Afi si avuwo ɖuɖɔ Nabot ƒe ʋu le la
1Kings21:20 Axab gblɔ na Eliya be: “O! Nye futɔ
1Kings21:21 Kpɔ ɖa
1Kings21:22 Mawɔ wò ƒome abe Yerobeam
1Kings21:23 Le Izebel hã gome la
1Kings21:24 Ne Axab ƒe ame aɖe ku le Yezreel-du me la
1Kings21:25 Ame aɖeke menɔ anyi kpɔ
1Kings21:26 Axab wɔ ŋunyɔnu kplɔ legbawo ɖo abe ale si Amoritɔwo
1Kings21:27 Esi Axab se Eliya ƒe nyaawo la
1Kings21:28 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Eliya Tisbitɔ la be:
1Kings21:29 “Èkpɔ ale si Axab bɔbɔ eɖokui le ŋkunye mea? Esi wòbɔbɔ eɖokui le ŋkunye me ta la
1Kings22:1 Ƒe etɔ̃ va yi
1Kings22:2 Ke le ƒè etɔ̃lia me la
1Kings22:3 Israel-fia gblɔ na eƒe dɔlawo be: “Mienya be Ramot
1Kings22:4 Tete wòbia Yosafat be: “Àyi aʋa kplim le Ramot-Gilead mahã?” Yosafat ɖo eŋu na Israel-fia be: “Nye kple wòe; nye amewo nye wò amewo
1Kings22:5 Ke Yosafat gagblɔ na Israel-fia be: “Bia gbe Aƒetɔ se gbã.”
1Kings22:6 Tete Israel-fia yɔ gbeƒãɖelawo ƒo ƒu; woade ame alafa ene lɔƒo
1Kings22:7 Gake Yosafat gabia be: “Aƒetɔ ƒe gbeƒãɖela bubu aɖeke megale afi sia
1Kings22:8 Israel-fia ɖo eŋu na Yosafat be: “Ɖeka aɖe gali
1Kings22:9 Tete Israel-fia dɔ aƒedzikpɔla aɖe be: “Yi ɖakplɔ Mixa
1Kings22:10 Fia eveawo
1Kings22:11 Zedekiya
1Kings22:12 Gbeƒãɖelaawo katã ɖe gbeƒã nenema be: “Ho yi Ramot-Gilead. Àɖu dzi; Aƒetɔ atsɔe ade asi na fia la.”
1Kings22:13 Amedɔdɔ si yi Mixa yɔ ge la gblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Kings22:14 Gake Mixa gblɔ be: “Metà Aƒetɔ ƒe agbe
1Kings22:15 Esi wòva ɖo fiaa gbɔ la
1Kings22:16 Gake fia la gblɔ nɛ be: “Zi nenie matà wò
1Kings22:17 Mixa gblɔ be: “Mekpɔ Israelviwo katã wokaka ɖe towo dzi abe alẽ siwo nu kplɔla mele o la ene
1Kings22:18 Tete Israel-fia gblɔ na Yosafat be: “Nyemegblɔe na wò oa? Megblɔa nya nyui aɖeke ɖi nam gbeɖe o; vɔ̃ ko.”
1Kings22:19 Mixa gblɔ be: “Eya ta se Aƒetɔ ƒe nya. Mekpɔ Aƒetɔ wòbɔbɔ nɔ eƒe fiazikpui dzi eye dziƒoʋakɔ la katã le tsitre ɖe eƒe ɖusime kple miame
1Kings22:20 eye Aƒetɔ gblɔ be: ‘Ame kae able Axab ade me wòayi aɖatsi aʋa le Ramot-Gilead?’ Ame si be ale
1Kings22:21 Tete gbɔgbɔ aɖe do va tsi tsitre ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋkume hegblɔ be: ‘Nyee ablee.’
1Kings22:22 Aƒetɔ biae be: ‘Ale ke nèle esia wɔ gee?’ Eɖo eŋu be: ‘Mayi
1Kings22:23 Eya ta azɔ la
1Kings22:24 Tete Zedekiya
1Kings22:25 Mixa ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Kings22:26 Tete Israel-fia ɖe gbe be: “Milé Mixa eye mikplɔe yi dumegã Amon kple fiavi Yoas gbɔ.
1Kings22:27 Migblɔ na wo be
1Kings22:28 Mixa be: “Ne ètrɔ gbɔ le ŋutifafa me la
1Kings22:29 Ale Israel-fia kple Yuda-fia Yosafat yi Ramot-Gilead.
1Kings22:30 Israel-fia gblɔ na Yosafat be: “Matrɔ ɖokuinye ado awu bubu ayi aʋa la nu; ke wò ya nɔ wò fiawuawo me.” Ale Israel-fia ɖɔli eƒe awuawo eye wòyi aʋa la nu.
1Kings22:31 Siria-fia ɖe gbe na eƒe tasiaɖam-megã bla etɔ̃ vɔ eveawo da ɖi tsã be: “Migakpe kple ame tsɛ alo amegã bubu aɖeke o
1Kings22:32 Esime tasiaɖam-megãwo kpɔ Yosafat la
1Kings22:33 Tete tasiaɖam-megãawo kpɔ be menye Israel-fiae o
1Kings22:34 Ke ŋutsu aɖe vu eƒe da me hedae kpɔ ko ɖeko aŋutrɔa yi ɖaté Israel-fia le gawu si fiaa do la ƒe kpeƒe ɖeka. Fia la gblɔ na eƒe tasiaɖamkula be: “Trɔ ne nàkɔm dzoe le aʋa la nu; mexɔ abi.”
1Kings22:35 Aʋa la nu sẽ ŋutɔ gbe ma gbe
1Kings22:36 Le ɣe ƒe toɖoɣi lɔƒo la
1Kings22:37 Ale fia la ku
1Kings22:38 Wova klɔ tasiaɖam la le Samaria-ta to. Avuwo va ɖuɖɔ fia la ƒe ʋu
1Kings22:39 Azɔ nu bubu siwo katã hã Axab wɔ
1Kings22:40 Ale Axab mlɔ tɔgbuiawo gbɔ
1Kings22:41 Yosafat
1Kings22:42 Yosafat xɔ ƒe bla etɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃ esime wòzu fia
1Kings22:43 Eto tɔ́a Asa ƒe ʋe me pɛpɛpɛ; medze to ɖusime alo miame o
1Kings22:44 Hekpe ɖe esiawo ŋu la
1Kings22:45 Azɔ nu bubu siwo katã hã Yosafat wɔ
1Kings22:46 Etsrɔ̃ ŋutsu nuxeƒe gbolowɔla siwo gasusɔ ɖe anyigba la dzi le tɔ́a Asa ŋɔli la katã.
1Kings22:47 Fia aɖeke menɔ Edom-nyigba nu o
1Kings22:48 Yosafat tu tɔdziʋu aɖewo wole abe Tarsis-ʋuwo ene be woayi Ofir aɖaku sika vɛ. Gake womete ŋu ɖo o; wonyrɔ le Ezeon-Geber.
1Kings22:49 Le ɣe ma ɣi la
1Kings22:50 Yosafat ku
1Kings22:51 Axazya
1Kings22:52 Eƒe agbenɔnɔ medze Aƒetɔ ŋu kura o; enɔ agbe abe tɔ́a kple nɔa ene; eƒe azɔli me sɔ kple Yerobeam
1Kings22:53 Esubɔ Baal

2Kings2:11 Wole nu ƒom le yiyim
2Kings2:12 Elisa nɔ ekpɔm

2Kings2:16 eye wogblɔ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
2Kings2:17 Gake woƒo nya ɖe enu wòwui eye wòlɔ̃. Ale wodɔ ŋutsu bla atɔ̃ ɖa woyi ɖadii ŋkeke etɔ̃

2Kings2:24 Elisa nyè kɔ kpɔ wo le megbe
2Kings2:25 Elisa tso le afi ma yi Karmel-toa dzi
2Kings3:1 Yoram
2Kings3:2 Ewɔ vɔ̃ le Aƒetɔ ŋkume; ɖeko eya tɔ mede tɔ́a kple nɔa tɔ nu o. Eɖe Baal ƒe legba si tɔ́a wɔ la ɖa.
2Kings3:3 Ke elé Yerobeam
2Kings3:4 Moab-fia Mesa nye alẽnyila
2Kings3:5 Ke esi fia Axab ku la
2Kings3:6 Enumake fia Yoram tso Samaria
2Kings3:7 Eyi ɖadɔ ame ɖo ɖe Yuda-fia Yosafat be: “Moab-fia dze aglã ɖe ŋunye; àho aʋa ɖe eŋu kplima?” Fia Yosafat ɖo eŋu be: “Míayi! Nye kpli wòe. Nye dukɔ kple wò dukɔe; nye sɔwo kple wò sɔwoe!”
2Kings3:8 Ebia be: “Mɔ ka míato?” Yoram ɖo eŋu be: “Míato Edom-gbedadaƒomɔ.” Ale Israel-fia kple Yuda-fia kpakple Edom-fia zɔ mɔ.
2Kings3:9 Esi wotrɔ to eme ŋkeke adrẽ la
2Kings3:10 Tete fia Yoram gblɔ be: “Evɔ na mí! Aƒetɔ yɔ mí fia etɔ̃ siawo ƒo ƒui be yeatsɔ mí de asi na Moabtɔwo!”
2Kings3:11 Fia Yosafat bia be: “Ðe Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela aɖeke mele afii
2Kings3:12 Yosafat gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe le esi.” Israel-fia kple Yosafat kpakple Edom-fia woyi egbɔ.
2Kings3:13 Elisa gblɔ na Israel-fia be: “Nya ka le nye kpli wò dome? Heyi gbeƒãɖela siwo tɔ́wò kple nɔwò biaa gbee la gbɔ.” Israel-fia ɖo eŋu be: “Kpao
2Kings3:14 Elisa ɖo eŋu be: “Metà Aƒetɔ
2Kings3:15 Miyɔ kasaŋkuƒola aɖe nam.” Esime kasaŋkuƒolaa le saŋkua ƒom la
2Kings3:16 eye wògblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ be: ‘Táwo ayɔ tɔyo sia me fũu.
2Kings3:17 Ya maƒo miase o
2Kings3:18 Elisa yi edzi be: “Esia wɔwɔ meɖi nu le Aƒetɔ gbɔ o. Etsɔ Moabtɔwo hã de asi na mi.
2Kings3:19 Ana miasi woƒe du sesẽwo kple du veviwo katã. Miatso kutsetsetiwo katã
2Kings3:20 Esi ŋu ke
2Kings3:21 Moabtɔwo se be fia etɔ̃awo ho aʋa ɖe yewo ŋu
2Kings3:22 Esi wofɔ ŋdi kanya la
2Kings3:23 Tete wodo ɣli be: “Ʋue! Fia etɔ̃awo wɔ aʋa kple wo nɔewo hetsrɔ̃. Moabtɔwo
2Kings3:24 Esi wova asaɖaa me la
2Kings3:25 Wogbã woƒe duwo. Wo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe fɔ kpe da ɖe woƒe agbledeƒewo katã ale be kpe yɔ wo dzi taŋtaŋ. Woxe tsidzɔƒewo katã hã eye wotso kutsetsetiwo keŋ ƒu anyi. Mlɔeba la
2Kings3:26 Esi Moab-fia kpɔ be aʋa si ye vɔ la
2Kings3:27 Ale wòlé eya ŋutɔ via ŋutsu ŋgɔgbea si aɖu fia ɖe eyome la sa vɔe le duglia dzi. Nuwɔna sia he dɔmedzoe gã aɖe va Israelviwo dzi ale gbegbe be wogbugbɔ ɖe megbe le dua ŋu
2Kings4:1 Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖelawo ƒe nusrɔ̃la ɖeka srɔ̃ va fa konyi na Elisa be: “Srɔ̃nye
2Kings4:2 Elisa biae be: “Nu ka mawɔ na wò? Nu ka le asiwò le aƒeme? Gblɔe nam.” Nyɔnua ɖo eŋu be: “Naneke mele wò dɔlanyɔnu si wu amigoe ɖeka pɛ ko o.”
2Kings4:3 Elisa gblɔ nɛ be: “Do yi nàɖaɣe amigo ƒuƒluwo le wò aƒelikawo si. Wonesɔ gbɔ fũu.
2Kings4:4 Eyome yi aƒeme eye wò kple viwòwo miado ʋɔ ɖe mia ɖokui nu. Azɔ mitrɔ ami la kɔ ɖe go siawo katã me
2Kings4:5 Ale nyɔnua dzo le Elisa gbɔ
2Kings4:6 Esi goeawo katã yɔ vɔ la
2Kings4:7 Eva gblɔe na Mawu ƒe ame la
2Kings4:8 Gbe ɖeka la
2Kings4:9 Nyɔnua gblɔ na srɔ̃a gbe ɖeka be: “Meka ɖe dzi be ŋutsu si va le mía gbɔ tom edziedzi la
2Kings4:10 na míatu glixɔ sue aɖe ɖe míaƒe xɔ tame nɛ. Míatsɔ abati
2Kings4:11 Eva eme be Elisa gayi Sunem
2Kings4:12 Edɔ eƒe dɔla Gexazi be: “Yɔ Sunem-nyɔnua nam.” Eyɔe. Esi wòva la
2Kings4:13 Elisa be Gexazi negblɔ nɛ be: “Aƒenɔ
2Kings4:14 Elisa bia Gexazi be: “Ke nu ka gɔ̃ woawɔ nɛ?” Eɖo eŋu be: “Nyateƒe vi mele esi o
2Kings4:15 Egblɔ be: “Gayɔe vɛ.” Eɖayɔe wòva tsi tsitre ɖe mɔa nu.
2Kings4:16 Elisa gblɔ nɛ be: “Le ƒe si gbɔna ƒe ɣeleawoɣi la
2Kings4:17 Nyɔnua va fɔ fu eye wòdzi ŋutsuvi le ɣeyiɣia dzi tututu abe ale si Elisa gblɔe ene.
2Kings4:18 Ðevia va tsi. Gbe ɖeka eyi tɔ́a gbɔ le nuŋelawo gbɔ.
2Kings4:19 Tete ɖevia yɔ tɔ́a be: “Ao
2Kings4:20 Dɔlaa kɔ ɖevia yi na nɔa. Elée ɖe akɔ va se ɖe esime wòku le ŋdɔ me.
2Kings4:21 Ekɔe yi Mawu ƒe ame la ƒe xɔa me
2Kings4:22 Tete wòyɔ srɔ̃a gblɔ nɛ be: “Taflatsɛ
2Kings4:23 Nu ka ta nèbe yeayi egbea? Egbe menye dzudzɔgbe alo Dzinu Yeye Ŋkeke Nyui hã o ɖe.” Eɖo eŋu be: “Menye naneke tae o.”
2Kings4:24 Tete wòna wobla akpa na tedzia
2Kings4:25 Ale wòdze mɔ va ɖo Mawu ƒe ame la gbɔ le Karmel-to la dzi. Esi Mawu ƒe ame la kpɔe le adzɔge la
2Kings4:26 Ƒu du yi ɖakpee nàbiae be: ‘Èdɔa? Srɔ̃wò dɔa? Ðevia hã dɔa?’ ” Eɖo eŋu be: “Wodɔ.”
2Kings4:27 Ke esi nyɔnua va Mawu ƒe ame la gbɔ le toa dzi la
2Kings4:28 Nyɔnua gblɔ nɛ be: “Nye aƒetɔ
2Kings4:29 Ale Elisa gblɔ na Gexazi be: “Dzra ɖo kaba nàdze mɔ. Tsɔ nye atizɔti nàyi. Ne èdo go ame aɖe la
2Kings4:30 Tete vi nɔa gblɔ be: “Metà Aƒetɔ ƒe agbe kple wò ame gbagbe sia! Ne magblẽ wò ɖi fĩi!” Ale wòtso dze nyɔnua yome.
2Kings4:31 Gexazi do ŋgɔ na wo va tsɔ atizɔti la da ɖe ɖevia ƒe mo
2Kings4:32 Esi Elisa va ɖo aƒea me la
2Kings4:33 Elisa ge ɖe xɔa me
2Kings4:34 Emegbe ede abatia dzi tsyɔ akɔ ɖe ɖevia dzi. Etsɔ eƒe nu ɖo eƒe nu
2Kings4:35 Efɔ le ɖevia dzi
2Kings4:36 Ale Elisa yɔ Gexazi gblɔ nɛ be: “Yɔ Sunem-nyɔnua nam.” Esi woyɔe vɛ la
2Kings4:37 Tete nyɔnua ɖabɔbɔ ɖe Elisa ƒe afɔnu de ta agu
2Kings4:38 Elisa gbugbɔ yi Gilgal. Eva eme be dɔ to le anyigbaa dzi. Gbe ɖeka esime gbeƒãɖelawo ƒe nusrɔ̃lawo bɔbɔ nɔ Elisa gbɔ la
2Kings4:39 Tete ame ɖeka yi agble be yeada ama vɛ. Ekpɔ gbemeka aɖe eye wògbe eƒe tsetsewo fũu lɔ ɖe avɔ me gbɔe. Esi wògbɔ la
2Kings4:40 Etsɔ nuɖuɖua ɖo ameawo kɔ me be woaɖu. Ke esi wode nua nu me la
2Kings4:41 Elisa gblɔ be: “Miku wɔ vɛ.” Ekɔ wɔa ɖe zea me
2Kings4:42 Ŋutsu aɖe tso Baal-Salisa va Elisa gbɔ kple lu yeye bolo bla eve kpakple bli yeye ɖe kotoku me. Elisa be: “Tsɔe na ameawo ne woaɖu.”
2Kings4:43 Ke eƒe dɔlaa bia be: “Ale ke matsɔ nu sia aɖo ame alafa ɖeka kɔmee?” Elisa ɖo eŋu be: “Mebe tsɔe na ameawo ne woaɖu elabe Aƒetɔ be: ‘Woaɖui
2Kings4:44 Ale dɔlaa tsɔ nuɖuɖua na wo
2Kings5:1 Naeman nye Siria-fia ƒe aʋakplɔla. Enye fiaa ƒe ame vevi

2Kings5:3 Nyɔnuvia gblɔ na eƒe aƒenɔ be: “A! Ne nye aƒetɔ ɖe wòayi Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela gbɔ le Samaria la
2Kings5:4 Naeman yi Siria-fia la gbɔ ɖagblɔ nu si nyɔnuvia gblɔ la nɛ.

2Kings5:6 Lɛta si wòtsɔ na Israel-fia la me nyawo nye esi: “Mele nye dɔla Naeman ɖom ɖe wò kple lɛta sia be nàda ŋutigbalẽdɔ si le eŋu la nɛ.”
2Kings5:7 Esi Israel-fia xlẽ agbalẽa la

2Kings5:17 Ale Naeman gblɔ be: “Ekema meɖe kuku
2Kings5:18 Ðeko nàtsɔ nu ɖeka sia ke wò dɔla: ne nye aƒetɔ fia la ziɔ ɖe nye abɔ ŋu yi Rimon subɔƒe
2Kings5:19 Elisa gblɔ nɛ be: “Heyi le ŋutifafa me!” Ke esi Naeman dzo yina ʋɛ ko la
2Kings5:20 Gexazi

2Kings5:26 Ke Elisa gblɔ nɛ be: “Ðe nye gbɔgbɔ meyi kpli wò

2Kings7:3 Azɔ ŋutsu ene siwo le ŋutigbalẽdɔ si amewo vɔ̃na la lém la le dua ƒe agbo nu. Wogblɔ na wo nɔewo be: “Nu ka ta míabɔbɔ nɔ afii

2Kings7:9 Ke wogblɔ na wo nɔewo be: “Nu si wɔm míele la menyo o. Nya nyui aɖee va na mí egbea. Ne míalala va se ɖe ŋu nake la
2Kings7:10 Ale woyi ɖayɔ agbonudzɔlawo gblɔ na wo be: “Míede Siriatɔwo ƒe asaɖa me
2Kings7:11 Agbonudzɔlaawo ɖe gbeƒã nya la
2Kings7:12 Fia la fɔ le zã ma me gblɔ na eƒe dɔlawo be: “Magblɔ nu si Siriatɔwo ɖo ɖe mía ŋu la na mi. Wonya be dɔ le mía wum
2Kings7:13 Eƒe dɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka xɔ edzi gblɔ be: “Na míadɔ ame
2Kings7:14 Ale woɖe ame kple tasiaɖam eve kpakple sɔwo dɔ ɖe Siriatɔwo ƒe asaɖa la me
2Kings7:15 Woti wo yome va ɖo keke Yordan nu ke. Awu kple aʋawɔnu siwo Siriatɔwo tsɔ ƒu gbe esime wole sisím la ko wokpɔ le mɔa dzi fũu. Ale amedɔdɔawo gbɔ va gblɔe na fia.
2Kings7:16 Tete dukɔ la do go yi ɖaha nuwo le Siriatɔwo ƒe asaɖa la me. Ale wɔ memee kilo etɔ̃ alo lu kilo ade xɔ klosaloga ɖeka le Aƒetɔ ƒe nya la nu.
2Kings7:17 Ke fia la ɖe aʋakplɔla si ƒe abɔ ŋu wòziɔna ɖo la ɖo agboa nu. Tete dukɔ la zɔ edzi
2Kings7:18 Esi Mawu ƒe ame la gblɔ na fia la be: “Lu kilo ade alo wɔ kilo etɔ̃ axɔ klosaloga ɖeka pɛ ko le Samaria-dua ƒe agbo nu etsɔ ɣealeawoɣi” la

2Kings8:1 Eva eme be Elisa gblɔ na nyɔnu si vi wògbɔ agbee la be: “Aƒetɔ le nana ge dɔ ato le anyigba sia dzi ƒe adrẽ eya ta kplɔ wò aƒemetɔwo ne míadzo aɖanɔ afi aɖe gbɔ.”
2Kings8:2 Ale nyɔnua tso wɔ Mawu ƒe ame la ƒe nyaa dzi. Ekplɔ eƒemetɔwo dzoe
2Kings8:3 Le ƒe adrẽa megbe la
2Kings8:4 Fia la nɔ nu ƒom kple Gexazi
2Kings8:5 Esime Gexazi le ale si Elisa gbɔ agbe ame kuku la gblɔm na fiaa la
2Kings8:6 Tete fiaa bia nyɔnua be neto nu si dzɔ la na ye
2Kings8:7 Elisa va Damasko esime Siria-fia Ben-Hadad le dɔ lém. Wogblɔ na fia la be: “Mawu ƒe ame va afi sia!”
2Kings8:8 Ale fia la gblɔ na Xazael be: “Tsɔ nunana aɖe ɖe asi yi na Mawu ƒe ame la. Na wòabia gbe Aƒetɔ na wò be àhaya le dɔléle sia me hã.”
2Kings8:9 Ale Xazael yi ɖakpɔe kple nunana nyuitɔ vovovo siwo le Damasko la; wole kposɔ bla ene ƒe agbatsɔtsɔ. Esi wòva ɖo la
2Kings8:10 Elisa ɖo eŋu be: “Yi ɖagblɔ nɛ be: ‘Àhaya godoo’ gake Aƒetɔ ɖee fiam be èle kuku ge kokoko.”
2Kings8:11 Elisa lé ŋku ɖe Xazael dzi gãa aɖabamaƒomaƒoe va se ɖe esime ŋukpe Xazael. Mawu ƒe ame la de asi avifafa me.
2Kings8:12 Tete Xazael biae be: “Nye aƒetɔ
2Kings8:13 Xazael bia be: “Nu ka nye
2Kings8:14 Tete wòdzo le Elisa gbɔ yi eƒe aƒetɔ gbɔ. Eƒe aƒetɔa biae be: “Nya ka Elisa gblɔ na wò?” Xazael ɖo eŋu be: “Ebe èle hayahaya ge.”
2Kings8:15 Gake esi ŋu ke la
2Kings8:16 Le Israel-fia Yoram
2Kings8:17 Exɔ ƒe bla etɔ̃ vɔ eve esime wòva zia dzi. Eɖu fia le Yerusalem ƒè enyi.
2Kings8:18 Eto Israel-fiawo ƒe ʋe me
2Kings8:19 Gake Aƒetɔ medi be yeatsrɔ̃ Yuda o
2Kings8:20 Le Yehoram ƒe fiaɖuɣi la
2Kings8:21 Tete Yoram ho kple eƒe tasiaɖamwo katã yi Zair
2Kings8:22 Ale Edom dze aglã ɖe Yuda-dziɖuɖu ŋu va se ɖe egbe. Ɣeyiɣi sia me kee Libna hã dze aglã.

2Kings9:2 Ne èɖo afi ma la
2Kings9:3 Tsɔ amigoe la eye nàkɔ ami ɖe tame nɛ agblɔ be: ‘Aƒetɔ be: Mesi ami na wò heɖo wò fiae ɖe Israel-dukɔ nu.’ Emegbe ʋu ʋɔa nàsí; mègalala o.”
2Kings9:4 Ale ɖekakpui nusrɔ̃la la yi Ramot-Gilead.

2Kings9:7 Tsrɔ̃ wò aƒetɔ fia Axab ƒe ƒome la

2Kings9:9 Ale si mewɔ Yerobeam

2Kings9:19 Wogadɔ ame bubu ɖa wòyi wo gbɔ ɖabia be: “Fia be ‘Ŋutifafa yea?’ ” Yehu ɖo eŋu be: “Ŋutifafanya ka tsɔ gbɔwò? Dze nam mayi.”

2Kings9:22 Esi Yoram kpɔ Yehu la

2Kings10:1 Viŋutsu bla adrẽ nɔ Axab si le Samaria. Yehu ŋlɔ agbalẽ ɖo ɖe Samaria na Yezreel dumegãwo

2Kings10:21 wòde afi sia afi le Israel-dukɔa me. Baal-subɔlawo katã va; ame aɖeke metsi anyi o. Woge ɖe Baal ƒe gbedoxɔa me wòyɔ taŋ ale be afɔɖoƒe aɖeke megali o.
2Kings10:22 Tete Yehu ɖe gbe na awudzikpɔla be: “Ðe awuwo do goe na Baal-subɔlawo katã!” Eɖe wo do goe.

2Kings12:2 Le Yoas ƒe agbenɔɣi katã la
2Kings12:3 Ðeko womeɖe nuxeƒeawo ɖa o. Ale dukɔa gasaa vɔ eye wotɔa dzo lifi le nuxeƒewo.

2Kings16:1 Le Pekax
2Kings16:2 Axaz xɔ bla eve esi wòdze fiaɖuɖu gɔme. Eɖu fia ƒe wui ade le Yerusalem. Mewɔ nu si dzɔ le Aƒetɔ
2Kings16:3 Ke eto Israel-fiawo ƒe afɔtoƒe. Etɔ dzo via ŋutsu gɔ̃ abe vɔsa ene
2Kings16:4 Esa vɔ eye wotɔ dzo lifi le nuxeƒewo
2Kings16:5 Tete Siria-fia Rezin kple Israel-fia Pekax
2Kings16:6 Ɣe ma ɣi la
2Kings16:7 Ale Axaz dɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Asiria-fia Tiglat-Pileser be: “Wò dɔla kple viwò ŋutsue menye. Va
2Kings16:8 Axaz gatsɔ klosalo kple sika siwo wokpɔ le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me kple esi le fia ƒe nudzraɖoƒe hã wɔ nunanae ɖo ɖe Asiria-fia.
2Kings16:9 Asiria-fia ɖo toe; Asiria-fia ho aʋa ɖe Damasko ŋu
2Kings16:10 Esi fia Axaz yi Damasko be yeaɖado go Asiria-fia
2Kings16:11 Nunɔla Uriya ɖi vɔsamlekpui la pɛpɛpɛ abe ale si fia Axaz ɖoe ɖa tso Damasko la ene. Ale nunɔla Uriya wɔe hafi fia Axaz gbɔ tso Damasko.
2Kings16:12 Esi fia la gbɔ tso Damasko la
2Kings16:13 Eme eƒe numemevɔsa kple nuɖuɖuvɔsa le edzi; ekɔ eƒe nunonovɔsa ɖe edzi
2Kings16:14 Ete akɔblivɔsamlekpui si nɔ Aƒetɔ ŋkume
2Kings16:15 Fia Axaz de se na nunɔla Uriya be: “Vɔsamlekpui gã la dzie nàsa ŋdi numemevɔsa kple fiẽ nuɖuɖuvɔsa fia ƒe numemevɔsa kple nuɖuɖuvɔsa
2Kings16:16 Nunɔla Uriya wɔ nu siawo pɛpɛpɛ
2Kings16:17 Fia Axaz gbã anyinɔawo kɔgo
2Kings16:18 Eɖe dzudzɔgbe kpata si wotu ɖe fiasã la me kple fia ƒe toƒe si le gota gome la ɖa le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ŋu le Asiria-fia ta.
2Kings16:19 Azɔ Axaz ƒe nuwɔna mamlɛ siwo wòwɔ la woŋlɔ wo ɖe “Yuda-fiawo Ŋutinyagbalẽ” la me.
2Kings16:20 Axaz trɔ megbe yi tɔgbuiawo gbɔ
2Kings17:1 Le Yuda-fia Axaz ƒe ƒè wui evelia me la
2Kings17:2 Ewɔ nu si nye vɔ̃ le Aƒetɔ ŋkume
2Kings17:3 Asiria-fia Salmanaser tso ɖe eŋu
2Kings17:4 Ke Asiria-fia kpɔ be Hosea ɖo nugbe ɖe ye ŋu
2Kings17:5 Tete Asiria-fia ho va anyigba blibo la dzi
2Kings17:6 Le Hosea ƒe ƒè asiekelia me la
2Kings17:7 Enɔ alea elabe Israel-dukɔ wɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe Aƒetɔ
2Kings17:8 Wozɔ le dukɔ siwo Aƒetɔ nyà ɖa le wo ŋgɔ la ƒe kɔnuwo nu kple kɔnu siwo Israel-fiawo to vɛ la nu.
2Kings17:9 Israel-dukɔ wɔ nuwo le bebeme ɖe Aƒetɔ
2Kings17:10 Woli aƒeliwo kple nyɔnumawu Aserawo ɖe togbɛ kɔkɔwo katã dzi kple ati damawo katã te
2Kings17:11 eye wotɔ dzo lifi le nuxeƒeawo katã abe dukɔ siwo Aƒetɔ nyà ɖa le wo ŋgɔ ene. Wowɔ nuvɔ̃ɖiwo tsɔ do dziku na Aƒetɔ.
2Kings17:12 Wosubɔ legbawo
2Kings17:13 Evɔ la Aƒetɔ gbe nya na Israel kple Yuda to eƒe gbeƒãɖelawo kple nukpɔla ɖe sia ɖe dzi be: “Mitrɔ tso miaƒe mɔ vɔ̃wo dzi
2Kings17:14 Ke womeɖo to o hafi boŋ wosẽ tame abe wo tɔgbui siwo mexɔ Aƒetɔ
2Kings17:15 Wodo vlo eƒe ɖoɖowo kple nu
2Kings17:16 Wogblẽ Aƒetɔ
2Kings17:17 Wome wo viŋutsuwo kple wo vinyɔnuwo le dzo me sa vɔe
2Kings17:18 Eya ta Aƒetɔ do dziku ɖe Israel ŋu vevie
2Kings17:19 Yuda hã melé Aƒetɔ
2Kings17:20 Ale Aƒetɔ gbe Israel ƒe dzidzimeviwo katã eye wòwɔ fu wo hetsɔ wo de asi na nugblẽlawo va se ɖe esime wòɖe wo ɖa le eƒe ŋku ta.
2Kings17:21 Esi wòfe Israel ɖa tso David ƒe aƒeme ŋu la
2Kings17:22 Israel-dukɔ wɔ nuvɔ̃ siwo katã Yerobeam wɔ la
2Kings17:23 va se ɖe esime Aƒetɔ ɖe Israel ɖa le eƒe ŋku ta
2Kings17:24 Asiria-fia kplɔ amewo tso Babilon
2Kings17:25 Le woƒe afi ma nɔnɔ me le gɔmedzedzea la
2Kings17:26 Ale wogblɔ na Asiria-fia be: “Dukɔ siwo nèkplɔ yi ɖada ɖe Samaria-duwo me la menya anyigba la ƒe mawu ƒe se o
2Kings17:27 Tete Asiria-fia ɖe gbe be: “Miɖo nunɔla siwo mieɖakplɔ tso afi ma vɛ la dometɔ ɖeka ɖa. Mina wòaɖanɔ afi ma be wòafia anyigba la ƒe mawu ƒe se la wo.”
2Kings17:28 Ale nunɔla siwo wokplɔ tso Samaria dzoe la dometɔ ɖeka va eye wònɔ Betel hefia ale si wòle be woavɔ̃ Aƒetɔ la woe.
2Kings17:29 Ke hã dukɔ sia dukɔ wɔ mawuwo na eɖokui
2Kings17:30 Babilontɔwo wɔ Sukot-Benot; Kuttɔwo wɔ Nergal
2Kings17:31 Avitɔwo wɔ Nibxaz kple Tartak
2Kings17:32 Wovɔ̃ Aƒetɔ hã
2Kings17:33 Ale wovɔ̃ Aƒetɔ
2Kings17:34 Egbegbe la
2Kings17:35 Aƒetɔ bla nu kpli wo
2Kings17:36 ke boŋ mivɔ̃ Aƒetɔ ame si kplɔ mi tso Egipte-nyigba dzi kple ŋusẽ triakɔ kple abɔ si wòdo ɖe dzi; mide ta agu na eya
2Kings17:37 Ɖoɖoawo
2Kings17:38 Migaŋlɔ nu si mebla kpli mi la be o. Migavɔ̃ mawu bubuwo o
2Kings17:39 ke boŋ mivɔ̃ Aƒetɔ
2Kings17:40 Ke hã la
2Kings17:41 Ale dukɔ siawo vɔ̃ Aƒetɔ
2Kings18:1 Le Israel - fia Hosea
2Kings18:2 Exɔ ƒe bla eve vɔ atɔ̃ esime wòzu fia
2Kings18:3 Ewɔ nu si dze la le Aƒetɔ ŋkume
2Kings18:4 Eɖe nuxeƒewo ɖa
2Kings18:5 Eɖo ŋu ɖe Aƒetɔ
2Kings18:6 Elabe eku ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu vevie; mete ɖa le eyome o
2Kings18:7 Afi sia afi si wòyi la
2Kings18:8 Esi Filistitɔwo va se ɖe keke Gaza kple eƒe nutowo me ke
2Kings18:9 Le fia Xizkiya ƒe ƒè enelia
2Kings18:10 Woxɔ Samaria le Xizkiya ƒe ƒè adelia
2Kings18:11 Asiria-fia kplɔ Israelviwo dzoe yi Asiria hetsɔ wo ɖada ɖe Xalax kple Xabor le Gozan-tɔsisi la nu kple Media-duwo me.
2Kings18:12 Elabe womeɖo to Aƒetɔ woƒe Mawu la ƒe gbe o
2Kings18:13 Le fia Xizkiya ƒe ƒè wui enelia me la
2Kings18:14 Yuda-fia Xizkiya dɔ ame ɖe Asiria-fia le Laxis ne woagblɔ nɛ be: “Mewɔ nuvɔ̃; gbugbɔ ɖe megbe tso gbɔnye
2Kings18:15 Xizkiya tsɔ klosalo siwo katã wòkpɔ le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒeme kple fia ƒe nudzraɖoƒe nɛ.
2Kings18:16 Ɣe ma ɣi la
2Kings18:17 Asiria-fia dɔ Tartan
2Kings18:18 Esime woyɔ fia la la
2Kings18:19 Rabsake gblɔ na wo be
2Kings18:20 Ɖe nèbu be numenya ƒuƒlu ye nye aɖaŋu kple ŋusẽ si wɔa aʋaa? Ame ka ŋue nèle gogom ɖo fifia hafi dze aglã ɖe ŋunye?
2Kings18:21 Kpɔ ɖa
2Kings18:22 Ke ne ègblɔ nam be: “Mieɖo ŋu ɖe Aƒetɔ
2Kings18:23 Azɔ
2Kings18:24 Ale ke nàte ŋu atutu aʋakplɔla ɖeka pɛ si nye nye aƒetɔ ƒe dɔlawo dome suetɔ hã ado ɖe megbe le esime wònye Egipte ŋue nèle dzi ɖom ɖo hena tasiaɖamwo kple sɔwo?
2Kings18:25 Gawu la
2Kings18:26 Tete Elyakim
2Kings18:27 Ke Rabsake ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Ɖe nye aƒetɔ dɔm ɖa be magblɔ nya siawo na mia kple wò aƒetɔ
2Kings18:28 Tete Rabsake tsi tsitre hedo ɣli sesĩe ɖo ɖa le Yuda-gbe me be: “Mise fia gã
2Kings18:29 Fia la be: ‘Migana Xizkiya nable mi o
2Kings18:30 Migana Xizkiya nawɔe be mianɔ gogom ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu anɔ gbɔgblɔm be: ‘Aƒetɔ aɖe mí godoo
2Kings18:31 Migaɖo to Xizkiya o
2Kings18:32 va se ɖe esime mava
2Kings18:33 Ɖe dukɔ aɖewo ƒe mawuwo te ŋu ɖe woƒe anyigba kpɔ tso Asiria-fia si mea?
2Kings18:34 Afi ka Xamat kple Arpad ƒe mawuwo le? Sefarvayim
2Kings18:35 Mawu kae le mawuwo katã dome
2Kings18:36 Ke dukɔ la zi ɖoɖoe toŋ
2Kings18:37 Tete Elyakim
2Kings19:1 Esi fia Xizkiya see la
2Kings19:2 Edɔ aƒedzikpɔla Elyakim
2Kings19:3 Wogblɔ nɛ be: “Xizkiya be: ‘Egbe nye xaxa
2Kings19:4 Ɖewohĩ Aƒetɔ
2Kings19:5 Esime fia Xizkiya ƒe dɔlawo va Yesaya gbɔ la
2Kings19:6 Yesaya gblɔ na wo be: “Migblɔ na miaƒe aƒetɔ be
2Kings19:7 Kpɔ ɖa
2Kings19:8 Rabsake gbugbɔ dzo
2Kings19:9 Esi fia la se nu tso Tirhaka
2Kings19:10 Migblɔ na Yuda-fia
2Kings19:11 Kpɔ ɖa
2Kings19:12 Ɖe dukɔ siwo tɔgbuinyewo tsrɔ̃: Gozan
2Kings19:13 Afi ka Xamat-fia
2Kings19:14 Xizkiya xɔ agbalẽ la le amedɔdɔawo si
2Kings19:15 Xizkiya do gbe ɖa le Aƒetɔ ŋkume gblɔ be: “O Aƒetɔ
2Kings19:16 Aƒetɔ
2Kings19:17 Aƒetɔ
2Kings19:18 Wotsɔ woƒe mawuwo de dzo me
2Kings19:19 Eya ta
2Kings19:20 Tete Yesaya
2Kings19:21 Nya si Aƒetɔ gblɔ tso eŋuti lae nye esi: Ɖetugbi
2Kings19:22 “Ame ka ŋu nèɖu fewu le hedo vloe? Ame ka tae nèdo ɣli ɖo eye ame kae nèkpɔ ŋkume na dàdatɔe? Israel ƒe Kɔkɔetɔ la ŋue!
2Kings19:23 Eɖo hehe ɖe Aƒetɔ ta to wò dɔlawo dzi
2Kings19:24 Meɖe vudowo eye meno dzronyigba dzi tsiwo nye afɔƒome ka Egipte tɔʋuwo katã me womie.’
2Kings19:25 “Mèsee kpɔ be meɖo kpe edzi tso blema ke oa? Nu si mena wòdzɔ fifia la
2Kings19:26 esime wo me nɔlawo ƒe lã me tu
2Kings19:27 Menya wò anyinɔnɔ
2Kings19:28 Esi wò agbodzedze ɖe ŋunye kple wò dàda ge ɖe to me nam ta la
2Kings19:29 “Esia anye dzesi na wò: Le ƒè sia me la
2Kings19:30 Yuda ƒe aƒe ame siwo tsi agbe susɔ la agato ke ayi to
2Kings19:31 Elabe ame asusɔ ado tso Yerusalem
2Kings19:32 “Eya ta
2Kings19:33 Mɔ si dzi wòto va la
2Kings19:34 Elabe maʋli du sia ta be maɖee
2Kings19:35 Le zã ma me la
2Kings19:36 Tete Asiria-fia Sanxerib dzo yi aƒe
2Kings19:37 Esi wònɔ gbe dom ɖa le Nisrox
2Kings20:1 Xemaɣi la
2Kings20:2 Tete Xizkiya trɔ mo ɖe gli ŋu
2Kings20:3 “Ao

2Kings20:5 “Trɔ yi naɖagblɔ na Xizkiya
2Kings20:6 Mada ƒe wui atɔ̃ ɖe wò agbenɔŋkekewo dzi. Maɖe wò kple du sia atso Asiria-fia si me. Maʋli du sia ta
2Kings20:7 Yesaya gblɔ be
2Kings20:8 Xizkiya bia Yesaya be: “Nu ka anye dzesi be Aƒetɔ ada gbe le ŋunye
2Kings20:9 Yesaya ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Esiae nye dzesi tso Aƒetɔ gbɔ na wò be Aƒetɔ awɔ nu si ƒe ŋugbe wòdo la: Ɖe vɔvɔli la ayi ŋgɔ ɖoƒe ewo loo
2Kings20:10 Xizkiya ɖo eŋu be: “Enye nu bɔbɔe be vɔvɔli la nayi ŋgɔ ɖoƒe ewo; ke negbugbɔ ɖe megbe ɖoƒe ewo boŋ.”
2Kings20:11 Gbeƒãɖela
2Kings20:12 Xemaɣi la
2Kings20:13 Xizkiya xɔ wo; efia eƒe nudzraɖoƒe katã wo. Efia klosalo
2Kings20:14 Tete gbeƒãɖela Yesaya va fia la gbɔ gblɔ nɛ be: “Nya ka ŋutsu siawo gblɔ? Afi ka wotso va gbɔwò?” Xizkiya ɖo eŋu be: “Wotso keke Babilon ke.”
2Kings20:15 Ebia be: “Nu ka wokpɔ le aƒewò me?” Xizkiya ɖo eŋu be: “Wokpɔ nu sia nu si le aƒenye me la; naneke mele nye nudzraɖoƒewo si nyemetsɔ fia wo o.”
2Kings20:16 Tete Yesaya gblɔ na Xizkiya be: “Se Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe:
2Kings20:17 ‘Kpɔ ɖa

2Kings20:19 Tete Xizkiya gblɔ na Yesaya be
2Kings20:20 Xizkiya ƒe ŋutinya mamlɛa kple eƒe kalẽwɔwɔ katã
2Kings20:21 Xizkiya trɔ megbe yi tɔgbuiawo gbɔ
2Kings21:1 Manase dze fiaɖuɖu gɔme esi wòxɔ ƒe wui eve. Eɖu fia ƒe bla atɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃ le Yerusalem. Nɔa ŋkɔe nye Xefziba.
2Kings21:2 Ewɔ nu si nye nuvɔ̃ɖi le Aƒetɔ ŋkume
2Kings21:3 Elabe egbugbɔ nuxeƒewo siwo tɔ́a Xizkiya gbã la tu
2Kings21:4 Eɖi vɔsamlekpuiwo ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe
2Kings21:5 Eɖi vɔsamlekpui na dziƒonuwo katã ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe ƒe xɔxɔnu eveawo.
2Kings21:6 Eme via ŋutsu abe vɔsa ene. Eka afa
2Kings21:7 Etsɔ nyɔnumawu Asera ƒe legba si wòwɔ la da ɖe aƒe si ŋuti Aƒetɔ gblɔ le na David kple via Salomo le be
2Kings21:8 nyemagaɖe mɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe azɔ be woatsa ado go le anyigba si metsɔ na wo tɔgbuiwo la dzi o
2Kings21:9 Ke womeɖo to o; Manase ble wo
2Kings21:10 Aƒetɔ gblɔ to eƒe dɔla
2Kings21:11 “Esi Yuda-fia Manase wɔ ŋunyɔnu siawo
2Kings21:12 Aƒetɔ
2Kings21:13 Mada Samaria ƒe dzidzeka kple Axab ƒe aƒe ƒe tsumikpe ɖe Yerusalem ŋu. Matutu Yerusalem abe ale si wotutua nuɖugbae ene
2Kings21:14 Matsɔ nye domenyinu la ƒe susɔea aƒu gbe
2Kings21:15 Elabe wowɔ nu si nye nuvɔ̃ɖi le nye ŋkume hedo dziku nam
2Kings21:16 Gawu la
2Kings21:17 Azɔ Manase ƒe nuwɔna mamlɛawo kple nu siwo katã wòwɔ kpakple nuvɔ̃ si wòwɔ la
2Kings21:18 Manase trɔ megbe yi tɔgbuiawo gbɔ
2Kings21:19 Amon dze fiaɖuɖu gɔme esime wòxɔ ƒe bla eve vɔ eve. Eɖu fia ƒe eve le Yerusalem. Nɔa ŋkɔe enye Mesulemet
2Kings21:20 Ewɔ nu si nye nuvɔ̃ɖi le Aƒetɔ ŋkume
2Kings21:21 Eto mɔ siwo katã tɔ́a to la dzi
2Kings21:22 Egblẽ Aƒetɔ

2Kings21:24 Ke dukɔ la me tɔwo wu ame siwo katã ɖo nugbe ɖe fia Amon ŋu
2Kings21:25 Azɔ Amon ƒe nuwɔna mamlɛawo la
2Kings21:26 Woɖii ɖe eƒe yɔdo me ɖe Uza ƒe abɔ la me. Via Yosiya zu fia ɖe eteƒe.
2Kings22:1 Yosiya xɔ ƒè enyi esi wòdze fiaɖuɖu gɔme. Eɖu fia ƒe bla etɔ̃ vɔ ɖekɛ le Yerusalem. Nɔa ŋkɔe nye Yesida
2Kings22:2 Ewɔ nu si nyo le Aƒetɔ ŋkume
2Kings22:3 Le fia Yosiya ƒe ƒè wui enyilia me la
2Kings22:4 “Yi nunɔlagã Xilkiya gbɔ ne wòaxlẽ ga siwo katã kpuinudzɔlawo dzɔ le dukɔ la si
2Kings22:5 Na woatsɔe de asi na dɔnunɔla siwo le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ƒe dɔwo dzi kpɔm la
2Kings22:6 Woawoe nye atikpalawo
2Kings22:7 Ke womabia akɔnta aɖeke tso wo si tso ga si wotsɔ de wo si la ŋu o
2Kings22:8 Nunɔlagã Xilkiya gblɔ na agbalẽŋlɔla Safan be: “Mefɔ segbalẽ aɖe le Aƒetɔ ƒeme.” Esi Xilkiya tsɔ agbalẽ la na Safan la
2Kings22:9 Agbalẽŋlɔla
2Kings22:10 Tete agbalẽŋlɔla Safan gblɔ na fia la be: “Nunɔla Xilkiya tsɔ agbalẽ aɖe nam.” Safan xlẽe na fia la.
2Kings22:11 Esime fia la se segbalẽa me nyawo la
2Kings22:12 Fia la ɖe gbe na nunɔla Xilkiya
2Kings22:13 “Miyi ɖabia gbe Aƒetɔ na nye kple dukɔ la kpakple Yuda katã ku ɖe agbalẽ si wofɔ la ƒe nyawo ŋuti. Elabe Aƒetɔ do dɔmedzoe gã ŋutɔ ɖe mía ŋu
2Kings22:14 Ale nunɔla Xilkiya
2Kings22:15 Egblɔ na wo be: “Aƒetɔ
2Kings22:16 Aƒetɔ be
2Kings22:17 Elabe wogbe nu le gbɔnye

2Kings22:19 esi nètrɔ dzime
2Kings22:20 Eya ta
2Kings23:1 Tete fia la dɔ ame be woaƒo ƒu Yuda kple Yerusalem ƒe ame tsitsiwo katã ɖe ye gbɔ.
2Kings23:2 Eyi Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me
2Kings23:3 Azɔ fia la tsi tsitre ɖe enɔƒe le sɔti la gbɔ
2Kings23:4 Azɔ Yosiya ɖe gbe na nunɔlagã Xilkiya kple nunɔla siwo va ɖe eyome kpakple Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ƒe mɔnudzɔlawo be woafɔ nu siwo katã ŋudɔ wowɔna subɔa Baal kple nyɔnumawu Asera kpakple dziŋgɔli me nuwo katã la do goe le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me. Etɔ dzo nuawo keŋ le Yerusalem godo le Kidron-bali me
2Kings23:5 Eɖe nunɔla siwo Yuda-fiawo ɖo be woasa vɔ le nuxeƒewo le Yuda-duwo kple Yerusalem-nutowo me la ɖa. Egaɖe esiwo tɔa dzo lifi na Baal
2Kings23:6 Yosiya ɖe nyɔnumawu Asera ƒe legba la ɖa tso Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me tsɔ yi Kidron-tɔʋu la nu le Yerusalem godo ɖatɔ dzoe ɖe afi ma. Etui memie
2Kings23:7 Emu ŋutsu nuxeƒegbolowɔxɔ siwo le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me
2Kings23:8 Ena nunɔlawo katã tso Yuda-duwo me va
2Kings23:9 Ke nunɔla siwo le nuxeƒewo la mevaa Aƒetɔ ƒe vɔsamlekpui si le Yerusalem la gbɔ o
2Kings23:10 Fia la do gu Tofet-nuxeƒe si le Ben-Him-balia me ale be ame aɖeke magatsɔ via ŋutsu alo via nyɔnu asa vɔ le dzo me na Molex azɔ o.
2Kings23:11 Eɖe sɔ siwo ŋu Yuda-fiawo kɔ̀ hena ɣesubɔsubɔ la ɖa
2Kings23:12 Fia la ɖe vɔsamlekpui siwo le Axaz ƒe xɔta siwo Yuda-fiawo ɖi la kple esiwo Manase hã ɖi ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ƒe xɔxɔnu eveawo la hã ɖa. Egbã wo gudugudu lɔ ɖaƒu gbe ɖe Kidron-tɔʋu me.
2Kings23:13 Fia Yosiya do gu nuxeƒe siwo le Yerusalem ƒe ɣedzeƒe le Amito la ƒe anyigbeme. Vɔsamlekpui siawo nye ŋunyɔnu siwo Israel-fia Salomo ɖi na Astarte
2Kings23:14 Yosiya gbã aƒeliwo
2Kings23:15 Nenema ke wòɖe vɔsamlekpui si le Betel kple nuxeƒe si Yerobeam
2Kings23:16 Yosiya tsa ŋku
2Kings23:17 Tete wò bia be: “Ŋkuɖodzikpe kae nye ekema kpɔm mele?” Dua me tɔwo ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela si tso Yuda va ɖe gbeƒã nu si nèwɔ ɖe vɔsamlekpuia ŋu le Betel la ƒe yɔdoe.”
2Kings23:18 Azɔ egblɔ be: “Miɖe asi le eŋu; ame aɖeke megaka asi eƒe ƒuwo ŋu o.” Ale womeka asi eya kple Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela si tso Samaria la ƒe ƒuwo ŋu o.
2Kings23:19 Gawu la
2Kings23:20 Ewu nunɔla siwo katã le nuxeƒea le afi ma la ɖe vɔsamlekpuiawo dzi
2Kings23:21 Fia la bia tso dukɔ blibo la si be: “Miɖu Paska la na Aƒetɔ
2Kings23:22 Womeɖu Paska aɖeke le Israel-ɖelawo ŋɔli alo le Israel kple Yuda fiawo ŋɔli nenema kpɔ o.
2Kings23:23 Ke azɔ ko le Yosiya ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒè wui enyilia me woɖu Paska la na Aƒetɔ le Yerusalem.
2Kings23:24 Gawu la
2Kings23:25 Fia aɖeke meɖu fia do ŋgɔ nɛ
2Kings23:26 Gake dɔmedzoe gã si fia Manase do na Aƒetɔ la gale dɔ me nɛ kokoko ɖe Yuda ŋuti.
2Kings23:27 Eya ta Aƒetɔ be: “Maɖe Yuda hã ɖa le nye ŋku ta abe ale si meɖe Israel ɖa ene. Nye ŋutɔe tia Yerusalem-du sia
2Kings23:28 Yosiya ƒe ŋutinya mamlɛa kple nu siwo katã wòwɔ la
2Kings23:29 Le Yosiya ŋɔli la
2Kings23:30 Eƒe dɔlawo tsɔ eƒe kukua ɖe tasiaɖam me tso Megido va Yerusalem
2Kings23:31 Yoaxaz xɔ ƒe bla eve vɔ etɔ̃ esime wòva zu fia. Eɖu fia le Yerusalem ɣleti etɔ̃. Nɔa tso Libna. Eŋkɔ nye Xamutal
2Kings23:32 Ewɔ nuvɔ̃ le Aƒetɔ ŋkume abe ale si tɔgbuiawo wɔ ene.
2Kings23:33 Eva eme be Egipte Fiagã Nexo lé Yoaxaz de gaxɔ me ɖe Ribla le Xamat-nyigba dzi be magaɖu fia le Yerusalem o. Azɔ ezi Yuda dzi be wòadzɔ klosalo kilo akpe etɔ̃ alafa ene kple sika kilo bla etɔ̃ vɔ ene na ye.
2Kings23:34 Nexo tsɔ Elyakim
2Kings23:35 Yehoyakim dzɔ klosalo kple sika si Egipte Fiagã Nexo bia tso esi la. Ena dukɔmevi ɖe sia ɖe dzɔe ɖe eƒe ŋutete nu wòtsɔ yi ɖade asi na Egipte Fiagã la.
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakim xɔ ƒe bla eve vɔ etɔ̃ esime wòzu fia le Yerusalem. Eɖu fia le Yerusalem ƒe wuiɖekɛ. Nɔa tso Ruma. Eŋkɔe nye Zebuda
2Kings23:37 Ewɔ nuvɔ̃ le Aƒetɔ ŋkume abe ale si tɔgbuiawo katã wɔ ene.
2Kings24:1 Esime Yehoyakim nye fia la
2Kings24:2 Ale Aƒetɔ na adzohawo tso Kaldea
2Kings24:3 Aƒetɔ ŋutɔe ɖe gbe be woawɔ Yuda alea
2Kings24:4 hekpe ɖe ame maɖifɔ ƒe ʋu si wòkɔ ɖi
2Kings24:5 Yehoyakim ƒe ŋutinya mamlɛa kple nu siwo katã wòwɔ la
2Kings24:6 Yehoyakim ku
2Kings24:7 Ke Egipte-fia megaho tso Egipte-nyigba dzi kpɔ o
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakin xɔ ƒe wui enyi esime wòzu fia. Eɖu fia le Yerusalem ɣleti etɔ̃. Nɔa tso Yerusalem. Eŋkɔ nye Nexusta
2Kings24:9 Ewɔ nuvɔ̃ le Aƒetɔ ŋkume abe ale si tɔ́a wɔ ene.
2Kings24:10 Ɣe ma ɣi la Babilonia-fia Nebukadnezar na eƒe aʋakɔwo tso ɖe Yerusalem ŋu
2Kings24:11 Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la
2Kings24:12 Tete Yehoyakin na ta eye eya ŋutɔ
2Kings24:13 Elɔ kesinɔnu siwo katã le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me kple fiasã la me la dzoe
2Kings24:14 Eɖe aboyo Yerusalem blibo la katã
2Kings24:15 Yehoyakin yi Babilonia. Fia nɔ
2Kings24:16 Ekplɔ aʋawɔla akpe adrẽ
2Kings24:17 Babilonia-fia tsɔ Matanya Yehoyakin tɔɖea
2Kings24:18 Zedekiya xɔ ƒe bla eve vɔ ɖekɛ esime wòzu fia. Eɖu fia le Yerusalem ƒe wuiɖekɛ. Nɔa tso Libna. Eŋkɔ nye Xamutal
2Kings24:19 Ewɔ nuvɔ̃ le Aƒetɔ ŋkume abe ale si Yehoyakim wɔ ene.
2Kings24:20 Eva eme na Yerusalem kple Yuda alea
2Kings25:1 Fia Zedekiya va dze aglã ɖe Babilonia-fia ŋu. Le Zedekiya ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒè asiekelia me
2Kings25:2 Woɖe to ɖe dua alea va se ɖe Zedekiya ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒè wui ɖekɛlia me.
2Kings25:3 Le ɣleti enelia ƒe ŋkeke asiekelia gbe le ƒe ma me la
2Kings25:4 Togbɔ be Babiloniatɔwo ƒo xlã dua hã la
2Kings25:5 Ke Babiloniatɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ ti fia la yome ɖatui le Yerixo-gbegbe. Eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la ka hlẽ
2Kings25:6 Ale wolé fia la
2Kings25:7 Wowu Zedekiya viŋutsuwo le eŋkume. Eyome wogbã Zedekiya ƒe ŋkuwo
2Kings25:8 Le ɣleti etɔ̃lia ƒe ŋkeke adrẽlia gbe
2Kings25:9 Etɔ dzo Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la
2Kings25:10 Babilonia-srafo siwo katã le woƒe tatɔa ŋu la gbã dugli siwo katã ƒo xlã Yerusalem va kpe ɖo la.
2Kings25:11 Nebuzaradan
2Kings25:12 Gake egblẽ ame siwo da ahe ŋutɔŋutɔ la ya ɖi be woade waingble kple agble bubuwo.
2Kings25:13 Babiloniatɔwo mu akɔblisɔti siwo le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me
2Kings25:14 Wotsɔ zeawo
2Kings25:15 Fia ŋu srafowo ƒe tatɔ la tsɔ dzoɖenuawo kple agba bubuawo kpakple nu sia nu si wotsɔ sika alo klosalo wɔ la siaa dzoe.
2Kings25:16 Nu siwo fia Salomo tsɔ akɔbli wɔ da ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me siwo nye sɔti eve
2Kings25:17 Sɔti si kɔ meta enyi
2Kings25:18 Fia ŋu srafowo ƒe tatɔ lé nunɔlagã Seraya kple nunɔla si va ɖe eyome
2Kings25:19 Le dua me la
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradan
2Kings25:21 Babilonia-fia la ƒo wo eye wòwu wo le Ribla le Xamat-nyigba dzi. Ale wokplɔ Yuda yi aboyo me tso wo denyigba dzi.
2Kings25:22 Babilonia-fia Nebukadnezar tsɔ Gedalya
2Kings25:23 Azɔ esi Yuda-srafowo ƒe tatɔwo kple woƒe asrafowo
2Kings25:24 Tete Gedalya ka atam na tatɔawo kple woƒe asrafoawo be: “Migavɔ̃ Babiloniatɔwo ƒe dɔlawo o. Minɔ anyigba la dzi
2Kings25:25 Ke le ɣleti adrẽlia me la
2Kings25:26 Tete dukɔmetɔwo katã
2Kings25:27 Le Yuda-fia Yehoyakin ƒe aboyo me nɔnɔ ƒe ƒè bla etɔ̃ vɔ adrẽlia me la
2Kings25:28 Babilonia-fia ƒo nu kplii lɔlɔ̃tɔe eye wòna nɔƒe kɔkɔtɔe ɖe eɖokui gbɔ le fia bubu siwo le eŋu le Babilonia la dome.
2Kings25:29 Ale ena Yehoyakin ɖe eƒe gaxɔmenɔwuwo ɖi
2Kings25:30 Fia kpɔa eƒe gbe sia gbe nuhiahiãwo gbɔ. Enaa kotokumegae gbe sia gbe le eƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã me.

1Chronicles10:1 Filistitɔwo wɔ aʋa kple Israelviwo
1Chronicles10:2 Filistitɔwo nya Saul kple viawo ɖe nu
1Chronicles10:3 Esi aʋa la nu sẽ ɖe edzi la

1Chronicles10:5 Esi aʋawɔnutsɔla la kpɔ be Saul ku la

1Chronicles10:8 Le ŋkeke evea gbe
1Chronicles10:9 Woɖe nu le eŋu

1Chronicles11:1 Israel-dukɔ blibo la va kpe ta ɖe David gbɔ le Xebron hegblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
1Chronicles11:2 Tso ɣe aɖe ɣi ke
1Chronicles11:3 Ale Israel-me tsitsiwo katã va fia la gbɔ le Xebron
1Chronicles11:4 David kple Israel-dukɔ blibo la ho yi Yerusalem si woyɔna be Yebus. Afi mae Yebusitɔ
1Chronicles11:5 Yebusitɔwo gblɔ na David be: “Mage ɖe afi sia o.” Gake David xɔ Zion ƒe mɔ́ si nye David ƒe du la.
1Chronicles11:6 David gblɔ be: “Ame si tre Yebusitɔwo sisi la lanye tatɔ kple aʋakplɔla.” Tete Yoab
1Chronicles11:7 David nɔ mɔ́ la me

1Chronicles11:11 David ƒe aʋakalẽtɔwo kple wo ŋu nyawo nye esi: Yasobeam
1Chronicles11:12 Ame evelia le Tatɔ Etɔ̃awo dome nye Eleazar Dodo
1Chronicles11:13 Enɔ David ŋu le Pas-Damim hafi Filistitɔwo kpe aʋa kple wo le afi ma. Agble aɖe le afi ma si me ƒo le fũu. Esi dukɔ la sí le Filistitɔwo nu la
1Chronicles11:14 eya kple David yi ɖanɔ te ɖe agblea titina. Wonyà Filistitɔwo ɖa le agblea me
1Chronicles11:15 Asrafoawo ƒe amegã bla etɔ̃awo dometɔ etɔ̃ va David gbɔ le agakpe la gbɔ le Abulam-agado la me
1Chronicles11:16 David nɔ mɔ́ la me
1Chronicles11:17 David gblɔ be: “Aa! Ame aɖe makpɔ tsi tso vudo si le Betlehem-gbo la nu me nam mano fifia oa?”
1Chronicles11:18 Tete Tatɔ Etɔ̃awo to Filistitɔwo ƒe asaɖaa me yi ɖaku tsia tsɔ vɛ na David. Gake David melɔ̃ no tsia o. Eƒoe ɖi na Aƒetɔ boŋ
1Chronicles11:19 wògblɔ be: “Nye Mawu nete esia ɖa xaa tso gbɔnye. Ðe mano ŋutsu siawo ƒe ʋu si nye woƒe agbe la? Wotsɔ woƒe agbe ke ɖaku tsia vɛ. Ale wògbe enono.” Kalẽtɔ etɔ̃awoe wɔ esia.

1Chronicles12:1 Ame siwo va David gbɔ esime wòsi aʋa le Saul
1Chronicles12:2 Wonye aŋutrɔdalawo; wotea ŋu daa aŋutrɔ eye wodaa kpe hã. Wowɔa ɖusi kple mia. Wonye Saul ƒe ƒometɔwo tso Benyamin-to la me.
1Chronicles12:3 Woƒe kplɔla nye Axiezer kple Yoas
1Chronicles12:4 Yismaya tso Gibeon
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai
1Chronicles12:6 Elkana

1Chronicles12:11 adelia nye Atai
1Chronicles12:12 enyilia nye Yehohanan

1Chronicles12:15 Woawoe tsò Yordan le ɣleti gbãtɔ le ƒè la me

1Chronicles12:17 Edo go yi ɖakpe wo

1Chronicles12:21 Esi wònye aʋakalẽtɔwo kple aʋakplɔlawo wonye ta la

1Chronicles12:24 Ame siwo tso Yuda-to la me
1Chronicles12:25 Kalẽtɔ siwo tso Simeon-to la me le ame akpe adrẽ alafa ɖeka.
1Chronicles12:26 Levi-to la me tɔwo le ame akpe ene alafa ade.
1Chronicles12:27 Ame siwo tso Aron ƒe dzidzimeviwo dome la le ame akpe etɔ̃ alafa adrẽ
1Chronicles12:28 Aʋakalẽtɔ Zadok

1Chronicles12:30 Ame akpe bla eve alafa enyi tso Efrayim-to la me. Wonye aʋakalẽtɔ xɔŋkɔwo le woƒe ƒomeawo me.
1Chronicles12:31 Wotia ame akpe wui enyi tso Manase-to afã si le ɣetoɖoƒe la me be woayi aɖaɖo David fiae.
1Chronicles12:32 Asrafomegã alafa eve kple wo nɔviwo tso Isaxar-to si nya ɣeyiɣi si Israel awɔ nu wòanyo la hã va.
1Chronicles12:33 Ame akpe bla atɔ̃ tso Zebulon-to la me va aʋakɔ la me. Wonya aʋawɔnu vovovowo ŋudɔwɔwɔ
1Chronicles12:34 Aʋakplɔla akpe ɖeka kple woƒe asrafo akpe bla etɔ̃ vɔ adrẽ siwo tsɔa akpoxɔnu kple akplɔ la tso Naftali-to la me va.
1Chronicles12:35 Ame siwo bla akpa na aʋawɔwɔ tso Dan-to la me la le ame akpe bla eve vɔ enyi alafa ade.
1Chronicles12:36 Ame siwo tso Aser-to la me yi eye wole klalo na aʋawɔwɔ la de akpe bla ene.
1Chronicles12:37 To siwo le Yordan ƒe ɣedzeƒe
1Chronicles12:38 Ame siawo katã bla akpa na aʋawɔwɔ. Wova Xebron kple tameɖoɖo kplikpaa be yewoaɖo David fiae ɖe Israel blibo la nu. Taɖodzinu ɖeka siae nɔ Israeltɔ bubuawo katã hã si.

1Chronicles19:10 Esi Yoab kpɔ be futɔwo ƒe aʋakɔa dze aʋa ɖe ye ŋu le ŋgɔ kple megbe la
1Chronicles19:11 Etsɔ aʋakɔ mamlɛa de nɔvia Abisai si ne woakpe aʋa kple Amontɔwo.
1Chronicles19:12 Egblɔ be: “Ne èkpɔ be Siriatɔwo sesẽ wum la
1Chronicles19:13 Sẽ ŋu
1Chronicles19:14 Ale Yoab kple aʋakɔ si le eŋu la lũ ɖe Siriatɔwo dzi. Siriatɔwo sí le wo nu.
1Chronicles19:15 Esi Amontɔwo kpɔ be Siriatɔwo le sisím la
1Chronicles19:16 Esi Siriatɔwo kpɔ be Israelviwo ɖu yewo dzi la
1Chronicles19:17 Wova gblɔe na David
1Chronicles19:18 Siriatɔwo sí le Israel nu. David wu Siria tasiaɖamdola akpe adrẽ kple afɔzɔsrafo akpe bla ene. Ewu Sofax
1Chronicles19:19 Esi Hadadezer teviwo kpɔ be Israelviwo ɖu yewo dzi la
1Chronicles20:1 Esi ƒe trɔ eye fiawo ƒe aʋahoɣi ɖo la
1Chronicles20:2 David ɖe woƒe fia ƒe kuku le eta. Eƒe kpekpeme de sika kilo bla etɔ̃ vɔ ene
1Chronicles20:3 Ekplɔ dua me tɔwo do go dzoe ɖaɖo laxalaxa
1Chronicles20:4 Esia megbe aʋa gadzɔ ɖe Israelviwo kple Filistitɔwo dome le Gezer. Aʋa sia mee Sibekai
1Chronicles20:5 Emegbe wogawɔ aʋa kple Filistitɔwo
1Chronicles20:6 Wogawɔ aʋa bubu le Gat. Ame dzɔtsu aɖe nɔ afi ma. Eto asibidɛ ade kple afɔbidɛ ade ale be wo katã le bla eve vɔ ene. Eya hã nye ame dzɔtsuwo ƒe dzidzimevi.
1Chronicles20:7 Eɖe alɔ me le Israelviwo ŋu
1Chronicles20:8 Ame siawo katã tso ame dzɔtsuwo ƒe ƒome la me le Gat. Wo katã wotsi David kple eƒe dɔlawo ƒe yi nu.
1Chronicles21:1 Satana tsi tre ɖe Israel ŋu
1Chronicles21:2 David ɖe gbe na Yoab kple asrafomegã bubuawo be: “Miyi ɖaxlẽ Israel-dukɔa me tɔwo
1Chronicles21:3 Yoab ɖo eŋu na fia la be: “Nye Aƒetɔ Fia
1Chronicles21:4 Gake fia la té nya la ɖe Yoab dzi
1Chronicles21:5 Yoab tsɔ dukɔ la ƒe xexlẽme vɛ na David ale: Ame siwo ate ade aʋa le Israel la de miliɔn ɖeka. Ame siwo ate ŋu ade aʋa le Yuda la de akpe alafa ene bla adrẽ.
1Chronicles21:6 Ke mexlẽ Levi kple Benyamin ƒe dzidzimeviwo ya ɖe eme o
1Chronicles21:7 Nu sia medze Mawu ŋu o
1Chronicles21:8 Tete David gblɔ na Mawu be: “Mewɔ nuvɔ̃ gã ŋutɔ be mewɔ nu sia; mewɔ lãnu
1Chronicles21:9 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Gad
1Chronicles21:10 “Yi ɖagblɔ na David be: ‘Aƒetɔ be: Metsɔ nu etɔ̃ le ŋkuwò me ɖom; tia ɖeka ne mawɔ wò?’ ”
1Chronicles21:11 Gad va David gbɔ
1Chronicles21:12 Dɔwuame ƒe etɔ̃ loo
1Chronicles21:13 David ɖo eŋu na Gad be: “Mexaxa ŋutɔ
1Chronicles21:14 Ale Aƒetɔ na dɔ vɔ̃ va Israel-nyigba dzi
1Chronicles21:15 Mawu ɖo dɔla ɖe Yerusalem be wòatsrɔ̃e
1Chronicles21:16 Esi David fɔ kɔ dzi la
1Chronicles21:17 David gblɔ na Mawu be: “Menye nyee be woaxlẽ dukɔa oa? Nyee da vo
1Chronicles21:18 Tete Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla gblɔ na Gad be wòaɖagblɔ na David be neyi ɖaɖi vɔsamlekpui na Aƒetɔ ɖe Ornan
1Chronicles21:19 David yi le Gad ƒe nya si wògblɔ le Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ me la nu.
1Chronicles21:20 Ornan le lu ƒom. Esi Ornan trɔ kɔ la
1Chronicles21:21 Esi David va Ornan gbɔ
1Chronicles21:22 David gblɔ na Ornan be: “Tsɔ lugbɔƒe la nam
1Chronicles21:23 Tete Ornan ɖo eŋu na David be: “Nye aƒetɔ fia
1Chronicles21:24 Ke fia ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Kpao
1Chronicles21:25 Ale David xe sikaga alafa ade na Ornan ɖe teƒe la ta.
1Chronicles21:26 David ɖi vɔsamlekpui la na Aƒetɔ ɖe afi ma
1Chronicles21:27 Ale Aƒetɔ ɖe gbe na eƒe dɔla be netsɔ eƒe yi la de aku.
1Chronicles21:28 Esi David kpɔ be Aƒetɔ tɔ na ye le Ornan
1Chronicles21:29 Elabe ɣe ma ɣi la
1Chronicles21:30 Ke le vɔvɔ̃ na yi si Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla la lé ɖe asi ta la
1Chronicles22:1 David gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ

1Chronicles23:1 Azɔ esi David tsi
1Chronicles23:2 David ƒo Israel-dumegãwo
1Chronicles23:3 Ena woxlẽ Levi vi siwo katã xɔ ƒe bla etɔ̃ kple vɔ
1Chronicles23:4 Ebe: “Wo dome akpe bla eve vɔ ene nanɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒea me dɔwo nu
1Chronicles23:5 akpe ene nanye agbonudzɔlawo
1Chronicles23:6 David ma Levi viwo ɖe hatsotso etɔ̃ me ɖe woƒe ƒomewo nu ale: Gerson
1Chronicles23:7 Gerson viŋutsuwo nye: Ladan kple Simei.
1Chronicles23:8 Ladan dzi viŋutsu etɔ̃ Yexiel
1Chronicles23:9 Simei viŋutsuwo nye: Selomot
1Chronicles23:10 Simei dzi ŋutsu ene. Woawoe nye: Yaxat
1Chronicles23:11 Yaxat nye gbãtɔ
1Chronicles23:12 Kehat viŋutsuwo nye: Amram
1Chronicles23:13 Amram viŋutsuwoe nye Aron kple Mose. Wotia Aron be wòakɔ nu siwo nye nu kɔkɔetɔwo ŋu. Eya kple eƒe dzidzimeviwo nawɔ esia tegbee. Woatɔ dzo lifi le Aƒetɔ ƒeme
1Chronicles23:14 Ke le Mawu ƒe ame Mose gome la
1Chronicles23:15 Mose viŋutsuwoe nye Gersom kple Eliezer.
1Chronicles23:16 Sebuel ye nye Gersom ƒe dzidzimeviwo ƒe tatɔ.
1Chronicles23:17 Rexabya ye nye Eliezer ƒe dzidzimeviwo ƒe tatɔ. Viŋutsu bubu aɖeke meganɔ Eliezer si o. Ke Rexabya viŋutsuwo va sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ.
1Chronicles23:18 Selomot ye nye Yizhar ƒe dzidzimeviwo ƒe tatɔ.
1Chronicles23:19 Yeriya ye nye Xebron ƒe dzidzimeviwo ƒe tatɔ. Amarya nye evelia
1Chronicles23:20 Mixa ye nye Uziel ƒe dzidzimeviwo ƒe tatɔ eye Yisiya nye evelia.
1Chronicles23:21 Maxli kple Musi wonye Merari viŋutsuwo
1Chronicles23:22 Eleazar medzi viŋutsu aɖeke hafi ku o; negbe nyɔnuviwo ko. Ale wo nɔvi Kis viŋutsuwo ɖe wo.
1Chronicles23:23 Musi viŋutsuwo nye: Maxli
1Chronicles23:24 Esiawoe nye Levi ƒe dzidzimeviwo ɖe wo tɔgbuiwo kple woƒe ƒometatɔwo nu. Woŋlɔ wo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe kple eƒe dzidzimevi si xɔ ƒe bla eve kple vɔ la ƒe ŋkɔ be woawɔ dɔ le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ŋu.
1Chronicles23:25 David gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ
1Chronicles23:26 eya ta megahiã azɔ be Levi viwo naganɔ nubablaɖaka la kple nu siwo katã kpe ɖe eŋu la kɔm tso teƒe yi teƒe o.”

1Chronicles23:29 Hekpe ɖe esiawo ŋu la

1Chronicles26:5 Amiel

1Chronicles26:7 Semaya viwoe nye: Otani

1Chronicles26:9 Meselemya viwo kple nɔviawo nye kalẽtɔwo. Wole ame wui enyi.
1Chronicles26:10 Xosa si tso Merari ƒe dzidzimeviwo dome la
1Chronicles26:11 Xilkiyae nye vi evelia. Tebalya nye etɔ̃lia

1Chronicles26:13 Wodzidze nu le ƒome ɖe sia ɖe me
1Chronicles26:14 Nudzidzea dze Selemya dzi be wòadzɔ ɣedzeƒe gome ŋu

1Chronicles26:16 Supim kple Xosa woxɔ ɣetoɖoƒe gome kple Salexet-gbo si ʋu ɖe mɔ si lia to la dzi. Dzɔla ɖe sia ɖe sɔ ɖe nɔvia tɔ nu.

1Chronicles26:18 Le Parbar la gome la
1Chronicles26:19 Esiawoe nye agbonudzɔlawo ƒe hatsotsowo tso Korax kple Merari ƒe ƒomeawo me.

1Chronicles26:21 Ƒome geɖewo dzɔ tso Ladan
1Chronicles26:22 Yexiel viwoe nye: Zetam kple nɔvia Yoel; woawoe woɖo Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒea ƒe kesinɔnuwo nu.

1Chronicles26:29 Wotia Kenanya kple viawo tso Yizhar ƒe dzidzimeviwo dome ɖo dudɔwo nu le Israel. Woawoe nye dudɔdzikpɔlawo kple ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo.

1Chronicles28:1 David ƒo Israel-dumegãwo katã nu ƒu ɖe Yerusalem. Ale toawo ƒe hatsotso siwo subɔa fia la ƒe kplɔlawo: ame akpewo kple ame alafawo ƒe tatɔwo
1Chronicles28:2 David fia la tso ɖe tsitre
1Chronicles28:3 Gake Mawu gblɔ nam be: ‘Màtu xɔ ade bubu ŋunye o
1Chronicles28:4 Ke Aƒetɔ
1Chronicles28:5 Le vi geɖe siwo Aƒetɔ nam la dome la
1Chronicles28:6 Egblɔ nam be: ‘Viwò Salomo ye atu nye aƒe kple eƒe xɔxɔnuwo
1Chronicles28:7 Mali ke eƒe fiaɖuƒe la tegbee
1Chronicles28:8 Eya ta mele nu xlɔ̃m mi le Israel bliboa
1Chronicles28:9 “Azɔ wò vinye Salomo
1Chronicles28:10 Kpɔ nyuie
1Chronicles28:11 David tsɔ gbedoxɔa
1Chronicles28:12 Etsɔ ɖoɖo siwo katã wòwɔ ɖe xɔxɔnuawo ŋu
1Chronicles28:13 Hekpe ɖe eŋu la
1Chronicles28:14 Egblɔ sika kpekpeme si hiã na sikagba siwo katã wòatsɔ asubɔe kple klosalo kpekpeme si hiã na klosalogba siwo katã hiã la nɛ.
1Chronicles28:15 Egblɔ sika kpekpeme si hiã na sikakaɖitiawo kple sikakaɖigbɛawo kple klosalo kpekpeme si hiã na klosalotɔwo katã nɛ: ɖe sia ɖe le ale si woawɔ eŋudɔe la nu.
1Chronicles28:16 Egblɔ sika kple klosalo kpekpeme si woatsɔ awɔ sikakplɔ̃ si dzi woada aboloawo ɖo kple klosalo si hiã na klosalokplɔ̃wo la nɛ.
1Chronicles28:17 Egblɔ sika nyuitɔ si woatsɔ awɔ gaflowo
1Chronicles28:18 Woatsɔ sika kɔkɔetɔ awɔ vɔsamlekpui si dzi woanɔ dzo tɔm lifi le
1Chronicles28:19 David gblɔ na Salomo be: “Esiawo katã nye Aƒetɔ
1Chronicles28:20 David gayi edzi gblɔ na via Salomo be: “Do ŋusẽ nu
1Chronicles28:21 Kpɔ ɖa
1Chronicles29:1 Azɔ David gblɔ na ameha blibo la be: “Vinye Salomo ame si tututu Mawu tia la nye ɖekakpui dzaa ko; mekpɔ nu teƒe fũu haɖe o. Evɔ la dɔ la keke ta elabe fiasã la manye amegbetɔwo tɔ o
1Chronicles29:2 Metsɔ nye ŋutete katã dzra ɖo ɖe nye Mawu ƒe aƒe la ŋu. Medi sika ɖe sikanuwo ŋu
1Chronicles29:3 Gawu la
1Chronicles29:4 Esiawoe nye: sika nyuitɔ ton akpe alafa ɖeka
1Chronicles29:5 Woatsɔ wo awɔ sikanuawo kple klosalonuawo katã kpakple aɖaŋuwɔlawo ƒe dɔ vovovoawoe. Azɔ mia dometɔ kae lɔ̃ be yeana nu Aƒetɔ faa egbea?”
1Chronicles29:6 Tete ƒometatɔawo
1Chronicles29:7 Wona sika abe ton alafa ɖeka bla adrẽ
1Chronicles29:8 Ame si si kpe xɔasi le la tsɔe vɛ na Yexiel
1Chronicles29:9 Dukɔ la lɔ̃ na nu tso dzi blibo me faa
1Chronicles29:10 Tete David kafu Aƒetɔ le ameha blibo la ŋkume gblɔ be: “Woakafu wò Aƒetɔ
1Chronicles29:11 O
1Chronicles29:12 Kesinɔnu kple bubu tso gbɔwò
1Chronicles29:13 Eya ta azɔ la
1Chronicles29:14 “Ke ame kae menye
1Chronicles29:15 Amedzrowo míenye le ŋkuwò me
1Chronicles29:16 O Aƒetɔ
1Chronicles29:17 Nye Mawu
1Chronicles29:18 O Aƒetɔ
1Chronicles29:19 Na vinye Salomo nalé wò sededewo
1Chronicles29:20 Tete David gblɔ na ameha blibo la be: “Mikafu Aƒetɔ
1Chronicles29:21 Esi ŋu ke la
1Chronicles29:22 Woɖu nu
1Chronicles29:23 Salomo bɔbɔ nɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe fiazikpui la dzi hezu fia ɖe tɔ́a David yome. Nu dze edzi nɛ
1Chronicles29:24 Dumegãwo katã
1Chronicles29:25 Aƒetɔ de bubu Salomo ŋu ŋutɔ le dukɔ blibo la ŋkume. Ena wòɖu fia kple atsyɔ̃ gã si tɔgbe menɔ Israel-fia siwo do ŋgɔ nɛ la ŋu o.
1Chronicles29:26 Ale David

2Chronicles1:1 Salomo
2Chronicles1:2 Salomo yɔ Israel blibo la ƒo ƒui: ame akpewo kple ame alafawo ƒe nunɔlawo
2Chronicles1:3 Ameha blibo la kpe ɖe Salomo ŋu
2Chronicles1:4 Ke Mawu ƒe nubablaɖaka la ya
2Chronicles1:5 Akɔblivɔsamlekpui si Bezaleel
2Chronicles1:6 Salomo te ɖe akɔblivɔsamlekpui si le Aƒetɔ ƒe agbadɔa me la ŋu
2Chronicles1:7 Gbe ma gbe ƒe zã me la
2Chronicles1:8 Salomo gblɔ na Mawu be: “Ève tɔ́nye David nu ŋutɔ
2Chronicles1:9 O Aƒetɔ
2Chronicles1:10 Azɔ na nunya kple sidzedzem
2Chronicles1:11 Mawu gblɔ na Salomo be: “Esi wònye nu siae le dzime na wò
2Chronicles1:12 eya ta metsɔ nunya kple sidzedze na wò. Hekpe ɖe esiawo ŋu la
2Chronicles1:13 Salomo gbɔ tso vɔsaƒe kple godoƒegbadɔ la gbɔ le Gibeon va Yerusalem
2Chronicles1:14 Salomo ƒo tasiaɖamwo kple sɔwo nu ƒu wode tasiaɖam akpe ɖeka alafa ene kple sɔ akpe wui eve. Etsɔ wo ɖo tasiaɖamdu tɔxɛwo me kple fia la ŋutɔ gbɔ le Yerusalem.
2Chronicles1:15 Fia la wɔe be klosalo kple sika bɔ ɖe Yerusalem abe kpe ene
2Chronicles1:16 Woƒle Salomo ƒe sɔwo tso Egipte kple Kue. Fia la ƒe asitsalawo ƒlea sɔawo le Kue ɖe asi aɖe dzi.
2Chronicles1:17 Ne wotsɔ wo va Egipte la
2Chronicles2:1 Salomo ɖo be yeatu xɔ si me woasubɔ Aƒetɔ le kple fiasã na ye ɖokui.
2Chronicles2:2 Edi agbatsɔla akpe bla adrẽ kple kpedɔwɔla akpe bla enyi tso tonyigba dzi de dɔa me. Wo dzikpɔlawo le ame akpe etɔ̃ alafa ade.
2Chronicles2:3 Fia Salomo ɖo du ɖe Tiro-fia Xuram be: “Èwɔ nyui na tɔ́nye David
2Chronicles2:4 Kpɔ ɖa
2Chronicles2:5 Xɔ lolo ŋutɔ mebe matu elabe mía Mawu la lolo wu mawu bubuwo katã.
2Chronicles2:6 Ke ame ka ate ŋu atu xɔ nɛ
2Chronicles2:7 Eya ta ɖo aɖaŋudɔwɔla aɖe ɖem. Amea nenya sika
2Chronicles2:8 Menya be wò amewo nya Lebanon-ti ŋudɔwɔwɔ
2Chronicles2:9 ne woadi atiwo nam geɖe fũu elabe xɔ si tu ge mala la alolo
2Chronicles2:10 Kpɔ ɖa
2Chronicles2:11 Tete Xuram Tiro-fia ŋlɔ agbalẽ ɖo ɖe Salomo be: “Aƒetɔ lɔ̃ eƒe dukɔ eya ta wòtsɔ wò ɖo fiae ɖe wo nu.”
2Chronicles2:12 Xuram gagblɔ be: “Woakafu Aƒetɔ
2Chronicles2:13 “Azɔ mele Xuram Abi ɖom ɖe wò. Enye aɖaŋudɔwɔla si nunya le tagbɔ na.
2Chronicles2:14 Nɔa tso Dan-to la me
2Chronicles2:15 Azɔ lu kple ƒo
2Chronicles2:16 Ati agbɔsɔsɔ sinu nèhiã la
2Chronicles2:17 Fia Salomo na woxlẽ amedzro siwo katã le Israel-nyigba dzi abe ale si tɔ́a David wɔ kpɔ ene. Ekpɔ ŋutsu akpe alafa ɖeka bla atɔ̃ vɔ etɔ̃ alafa ade.
2Chronicles2:18 Ena wo dome akpe bla adrẽ zu agbatsɔlawo
2Chronicles3:1 Ale Salomo dze Aƒetɔ ƒe xɔ la tutu gɔme le Yerusalem
2Chronicles3:2 Salomo dze xɔa tutu gɔme le eƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒè enelia me le ɣleti evelia ƒe ŋkeke evea gbe.
2Chronicles3:3 Dzidzeme si dzi Salomo ɖo be woatu Mawu ƒe xɔ la ɖo: Eƒe didime ɖe dzidzeme xoxoa nu le meta bla eve vɔ adrẽ; eƒe kekeme le meta asieke.
2Chronicles3:4 Akpata le xɔa ŋgɔ. Eƒe didime le meta asieke
2Chronicles3:5 Eklã sesewuʋuƒowo ɖe xɔa lolotɔ me
2Chronicles3:6 Eɖo kpe xɔasi ɖe xɔa me tsɔ ɖo atsyɔ̃ nɛ. Sika la tso Parvayim.
2Chronicles3:7 Efa sika ɖe daɖedziawo
2Chronicles3:8 Ewɔ kɔkɔeƒewo ƒe kɔkɔeƒe ɖe xɔa me. Edidi meta asieke
2Chronicles3:9 Gatagbadzɛawo ƒe kpekpeme le sika gram alafa atɔ̃ bla adrẽ. Efa sika ɖe xɔa tametɔwo me.
2Chronicles3:10 Ekpa kerubi eve ƒe nɔnɔme ɖe kɔkɔeƒewo ƒe kɔkɔeƒe la
2Chronicles3:11 Kerubi kpakpa eveawo ƒe aʋalawo didi abe meta ewo ene. Ðeka ƒe aʋala ɖeka didi abe meta eve kple afã ene
2Chronicles3:12 Kerubi evelia hã ƒe aʋala ɖeka didi abe meta eve kple afã ene
2Chronicles3:13 Kerubi siawo ƒe aʋalawo ƒe kekeme katã de meta ewo lɔƒo. Wole tsitre ɖe afɔ eve dzi
2Chronicles3:14 Salomo na wotsɔ aɖabɛ blɔtɔ kple dzẽtɔ ƒe ka
2Chronicles3:15 Fia la wɔ sɔti eve ɖe xɔ la ŋgɔ
2Chronicles3:16 Ewɔ kɔsɔkɔsɔwo
2Chronicles3:17 Etu sɔtiawo ɖe akpata la ŋgɔ
2Chronicles4:1 Ewɔ akɔblivɔsamlekpui. Edidi meta asieke
2Chronicles4:2 Ekɔ̀ gazɔ tegblẽ aɖe. Tso toga ɖeka yi toga kemɛ le meta ene kple afã
2Chronicles4:3 Wodo atsiã na gazɔ la gɔme kple goɖoɖowo ɖe agbaka eve me va kpe ɖo; atsiãdodo ɖe sia ɖe xɔ meta ene kple afã
2Chronicles4:4 Gazɔ la le akɔblinyitsu wui eve ƒe dzime. Etɔ̃etɔ̃ dze ŋgɔ dzigbeme
2Chronicles4:5 Gazɔ la tri abe asibidɛ ene ƒe kekeme ene. Eto le abe kplu toga ene
2Chronicles4:6 Ewɔ gagba ewo siwo me woaklɔ nuwo le. Etsɔ atɔ̃ ɖo gbedoxɔa ƒe anyigbeme
2Chronicles4:7 Salomo wɔ sikakaɖiti ewo ɖe woƒe ɖoɖoa nu
2Chronicles4:8 Ewɔ kplɔ̃ ewo hã da ɖe xɔa me; atɔ̃ le anyigbeme
2Chronicles4:9 Ewɔ nunɔlawo ƒe nɔƒe kple nɔƒe lolotɔ
2Chronicles4:10 Etsɔ gazɔ la ɖo ɖusime le xɔa ƒe anyigbeme ƒe ɣedzeƒe kpa dzi.
2Chronicles4:11 Xuram wɔ zeawo
2Chronicles4:12 Ewɔ sɔti eveawo
2Chronicles4:13 kple yevuboɖatsetse alafa ene siwo le gaɖɔ eveawo ŋu la. Yevuboɖatsetsewo le agbaka eve me le gaɖɔ ɖeka ŋu
2Chronicles4:14 Ewɔ anyinɔawo kple gagba siwo le anyinɔawo dzi;
2Chronicles4:15 gazɔ ɖeka kple nyi wui eve siwo le ete
2Chronicles4:16 zeawo
2Chronicles4:17 Fia la na wokɔ̀ nuawo le Yordan-balia me le tsunyigba dzi le Sukot kple Zaredata dome la.
2Chronicles4:18 Nu siwo Salomo wɔ la sɔ gbɔ ale gbegbe be akɔbli si ŋudɔ wowɔ la mele dadame o.
2Chronicles4:19 Salomo tsɔ sika nyuitɔ wɔ Mawu ƒe aƒea me nu siawo katãe: vɔsamlekpui la kple kplɔ̃ siwo dzi woada vɔsabolo ɖo
2Chronicles4:20 akaɖitiawo kple woƒe akaɖi siwo ɖoɖo la bia be woanɔ bibim le megbexɔ la ŋgɔ la
2Chronicles4:21 seƒoƒoawo
2Chronicles4:22 Akaɖitsinuawo
2Chronicles5:1 Ale dɔ siwo katã Salomo wɔ le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ŋu la wu enu. Salomo tsɔ nu siwo ŋu tɔ́a David kɔ̀ la kple klosalo kple sika kpakple nu bubuawo katã ɖada ɖe Mawu ƒe aƒe la ƒe nudzraɖoƒe la.
2Chronicles5:2 Ale Salomo ƒo ƒu Israel-dukɔ ƒe ame tsitsiwo
2Chronicles5:3 Tete Israelviwo ƒe ame tsitsiwo katã kpe ta ɖe fia la gbɔ na ŋkekenyui la le dzinu adrẽlia me.

2Chronicles5:7 Tete nunɔlaawo kɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe nubablaɖaka la va da ɖe enɔƒe le kerubiawo ƒe aʋala te le megbexɔ si nye kɔkɔeƒewo ƒe kɔkɔeƒe la me.
2Chronicles5:8 Kerubiawo keke woƒe aʋala ɖe aɖaka la ƒe nɔƒe ale be wotsyɔ aɖaka la kple etsɔtiawo dzi.
2Chronicles5:9 Atiawo didi ale be wokpɔa wo nu le megbexɔ la me tso kɔkɔeƒe la
2Chronicles5:10 Naneke mele aɖaka la me o
2Chronicles5:11 Nunɔla siwo katã va la kɔ̀ wo ɖokui ŋu eye womede vovo wo dome ɖe hatsotsowo nu o. Wodo tso kɔkɔeƒe la

2Chronicles7:1 Esi Salomo do gbe ɖa vɔ la
2Chronicles7:2 Nunɔlawo mete ŋu ge ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe xɔ la me o
2Chronicles7:3 Esi Israelviwo katã kpɔ ale si dzo la ɖiɖi ɖe anyi kple ale si Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe yɔ xɔa la
2Chronicles7:4 Tete fia la kple dukɔ la tsɔ lãwo sa vɔe le Aƒetɔ ŋkume.
2Chronicles7:5 Fia Salomo tsɔ nyi akpe bla eve vɔ eve kple alẽ akpe alafa ɖeka bla eve sa vɔe. Aleae fia la kple dukɔ blibo la kɔ Mawu ƒe xɔ la ŋui.
2Chronicles7:6 Nunɔlawo le tsitre ɖe wo nɔƒe
2Chronicles7:7 Salomo kɔ̀ nɔƒe titinatɔ si le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ŋgɔ la ŋu

2Chronicles7:9 Wotsɔ ŋkeke adrẽ kɔ̀ vɔsamlekpui la ŋu
2Chronicles7:10 Le dzinu adrẽlia ƒe ŋkeke bla eve vɔ atɔ̃lia gbe la

2Chronicles7:21 Ekema

2Chronicles8:1 Esi Salomo tsɔ ƒe bla eve tu Aƒetɔ ƒe xɔ la kple eya ŋutɔ ƒe fiasã la vɔ megbe la
2Chronicles8:2 egbugbɔ du siwo Xuram tsɔ nɛ la tso
2Chronicles8:3 Salomo ho yi ɖaxɔ Xamat kple Zoba nutowo me.
2Chronicles8:4 Etso Tadmor-du ɖe gbedadaƒo
2Chronicles8:5 Etso Dzigbe Bet-Xoron kple Anyigbe Bet-Xoron wonye du sesẽ siwo woɖo gli ƒo xlã
2Chronicles8:6 Salomo tso Baalat-du kple eƒe nudzraɖoƒedu siwo katã nɔ esi kple esiwo me tasiaɖamwo kple sɔdolawo katã nɔ kpakple teƒe siwo katã wòdi be yeatu ɖe Yerusalem
2Chronicles8:7 Dukɔ siwo katã susɔ le Xititɔwo
2Chronicles8:8 woƒe dzidzimevi siwo susɔ ɖe anyigba la dzi

2Chronicles9:1 Esi Seba-fianyɔnu se ale si Salomo ŋkɔ ɖii la
2Chronicles9:2 Salomo ɖo eƒe biabiawo katã ŋu nɛ; biabia aɖeke meli si Salomo do kpo eŋuɖoɖo nɛ o.
2Chronicles9:3 Esi Seba-fianyɔnu la kpɔ Salomo ƒe nunya
2Chronicles9:4 nuɖuɖu si woɖoa kplɔ̃ dzi nɛ

2Chronicles9:13 Sika si Salomo kpɔna le ƒè ɖeka me la ƒe kpekpeme de kilo akpe bla eve vɔ etɔ̃.
2Chronicles9:14 Esi nudzralawo kple asitsalawo hena vɛ la mele eme o. Arabia-fiawo kple anyigba la dzikpɔlawo hã hea sika kple klosalo vanɛ na Salomo.
2Chronicles9:15 Fia Salomo wɔ akpoxɔnu gã alafa eve. Wotsɔ sika kilo adrẽ si woƒo falɛfalɛ la fa ɖe ɖe sia ɖe ŋu.
2Chronicles9:16 Egawɔ akpoxɔnu evedomesitɔ alafa etɔ̃ hã. Wofa sika kilo etɔ̃ ɖe ɖe sia ɖe ŋu. Fia la tsɔ wo ɖo Lebanon-vexɔ me.
2Chronicles9:17 Fia la tsɔ nyiɖu wɔ fiazikpui lolo aɖe hã
2Chronicles9:18 Atrakpui fɔflɔ ade le fiazikpui la ŋgɔ
2Chronicles9:19 Dzata meme wui eve le atrakpui adeawo ƒe axawo dzi eveve. Womewɔ fiazikpui sia tɔgbe le fiaɖuƒe aɖeke me kpɔ o.
2Chronicles9:20 Fia Salomo ƒe kpluwo katã nye sika eye Lebanon-ve xɔ la me tsikunuwo katã nye sika nyuitɔ. Le Salomo ŋɔli la
2Chronicles9:21 elabe fia la ƒe tɔdziʋuwo dea Tarsis kple Xuram ƒe asitsalawo. Ʋuawo gbɔna zi ɖeka le ƒe etɔ̃ me
2Chronicles9:22 Ale fia Salomo zu kesinɔtɔ kple nunyala gã ŋutɔ wu xexemefiawo katã.

2Chronicles9:24 Ƒè sia ƒè la

2Chronicles10:7 Woɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Ne èwɔ nyui na dukɔ sia

2Chronicles10:9 Ebia wo be: “Aɖaŋu ka miaɖo nam be matsɔ ɖo dukɔ sia ƒe nya si wògblɔ be: ‘Ka tɔ́wò ƒe kɔkuti kpekpe la dzi ɖe na mí’ la ŋu?”
2Chronicles10:10 Tete ɖekakpui siwo tsi kplii la ɖo eŋu be: “Ðo eŋu na dukɔ si va gblɔ na wò be: ‘Tɔ́wò ɖo kɔkuti mía dzi
2Chronicles10:11 Tɔ́nye ɖo kɔkuti kpekpe mia dzi

2Chronicles10:13 Tete fia Rexabeam ɖo nya la ŋu dzretɔe. Egbe ame tsitsiawo ƒe aɖaŋu la

2Chronicles10:15 Ale fia la meɖo to dukɔ la o. Mawu trɔ nuwo alea

2Chronicles18:5 Tete Israel-fia la yɔ Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela alafa ene vɛ

2Chronicles18:7 Axab ɖo eŋu be: “Ame ɖeka gali. Eyae nye Mixa
2Chronicles18:8 Ale Israel-fia la yɔ dɔdzikpɔla aɖe gblɔ nɛ be: “Yi ɖayɔ Mixa
2Chronicles18:9 Azɔ Israel-fia kple Yuda-fia le woƒe fiawu me
2Chronicles18:10 Zedekiya
2Chronicles18:11 Gbeƒãɖela bubuawo katã hã gblɔ nenema ke. Wobe: “Ho nàyi Ramot-Gilead
2Chronicles18:12 Dɔla si yi Mixa yɔ ge la gblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
2Chronicles18:13 Ke Mixa ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Metà Aƒetɔ gbagbe la! Nya si nye Mawu gblɔ la
2Chronicles18:14 Esi wòva ɖo fia la gbɔ la
2Chronicles18:15 Ke fia la ɖo eŋu be: “Zi nenie mana nàka atam nam le Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ me
2Chronicles18:16 Mixa ɖo eŋu be: “Mekpɔ Israel blibo la ka hlẽ ɖe towo dzi abe alẽha siwo nu kplɔla aɖeke mele o la ene
2Chronicles18:17 Tete Israel-fia gblɔ na Yosafat be: “Nyemegblɔ na wò be meɖea gbeƒã nyui le ŋunye o
2Chronicles18:18 Mixa yi edzi be: “Azɔ ɖo to nàse nya si Aƒetɔ gblɔ. Mekpɔ Aƒetɔ wòbɔbɔ nɔ eƒe fiazikpui dzi
2Chronicles18:19 Tete Aƒetɔ bia be: ‘Ame ka aɖaflu Israel-fia Axab
2Chronicles18:20 va se ɖe esime gbɔgbɔ aɖe do va tsi tsitre ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋkume gblɔ be: ‘Maflui.’ Aƒetɔ biae be: ‘Ale ke nàwɔe?’
2Chronicles18:21 Gbɔgbɔa ɖo eŋu be: ‘Mayi aɖazu aʋatsogbɔgbɔ anɔ eƒe gbeƒãɖelawo katã ƒe nu me.’ Aƒetɔ gblɔ nɛ be: ‘Wòe aflui vavã. Wòe ate ŋui. Heyi nàɖaflui.’
2Chronicles18:22 Eya ta
2Chronicles18:23 Tete gbeƒãɖela Zedekiya
2Chronicles18:24 Mixa ɖo eŋu be: “Kpɔ ɖa
2Chronicles18:25 Tete Israel-fia ɖe gbe be: “Milé Mixa. Mikplɔe gbugbɔ yi mɔ́mefia Amon kple fiavi Yoas gbɔ.
2Chronicles18:26 Migblɔ na wo be: ‘Mitú ame sia ɖe gaxɔ me
2Chronicles18:27 Mixa ɖo eŋu be: “Ne ègbɔ le ŋutifafa me la
2Chronicles18:28 Ale Israel-fia kple Yuda-fia Yosafat ho yi Ramot-Gilead.
2Chronicles18:29 Israel-fia gblɔ na Yosafat be: “Maɖɔli awu ayi aʋa la nu
2Chronicles18:30 Siria-fia de se na eƒe tasiaɖamdolawo ƒe kplɔlawo be: “Migakpe aʋa kple ame tsɛ alo amegã aɖeke o; mikpe aʋa kple Israel-fia ɖeɖe ko.”
2Chronicles18:31 Esi tasiaɖamdolawo ƒe kplɔlawo kpɔ Yosafat la
2Chronicles18:32 Esi tasiaɖamdolawo ƒe kplɔlawo kpɔ be menye eyae nye Israel-fia la o la
2Chronicles18:33 Ke ŋutsu aɖe da eƒe aŋutrɔ ko wòɖate Israel-fia le eƒe gawu ƒe kpeƒe. Ale wòdo ɣli gblɔ na eƒe tasiaɖamdola be: “Trɔ ne nàkplɔm dzoe le aʋa la nu elabe mexɔ abi.”
2Chronicles18:34 Aʋa la nu sẽ gbe ma gbe

2Chronicles21:1 Yosafat ku

2Chronicles21:6 Eto Israel-fiawo ƒe ʋe me abe ale si Axab ƒomea wɔ la ene elabe Axab vinyɔnue nye srɔ̃a. Ewɔ nu si nye vɔ̃ le Aƒetɔ ŋkume.

2Chronicles25:10 Ale Amazya ɖe asi le ŋutsu siwo wòtsɔ tso Efrayim-to la me la ŋu be woayi aƒe. Tete wodo dziku ɖe Yuda ŋu
2Chronicles25:11 Amazya lé dzi ɖe ƒo
2Chronicles25:12 Wolé ame akpe ewo agbagbee. Wokplɔ wo yi Agakpe la tame. Wotutu wo tso afi ma de aga
2Chronicles25:13 Ke Israel-srafo siwo Amazya gbugbɔ be womagayi kple ye o la yi ɖakaka ɖe Yuda-duwo me tso Samaria va se ɖe Bet-Xoron. Wowu ame akpe etɔ̃
2Chronicles25:14 Esi Amazya ɖu Edomtɔwo dzi trɔ gbɔ la
2Chronicles25:15 Aƒetɔ do dziku ɖe Amazya ŋu vevie
2Chronicles25:16 Mekpɔ ɖe nu le nya la me o
2Chronicles25:17 Yuda-fia Amazya de adaŋu
2Chronicles25:18 Israel-fia Yoas ɖo eŋu ɖo ɖe Yuda-fia Amazya be: “Ŋuve le Lebanon dzi dɔ sederti le Lebanon dzi be: ‘Tsɔ viwò nyɔnu na vinye ŋutsu ne wòaɖe.’ Gbemelã aɖe tso Lebanon tso eme va yi
2Chronicles25:19 Azɔ ègblɔ be: ‘Kpɔ ɖa
2Chronicles25:20 Ke Amazya meɖo to o. Esia nye Aƒetɔ ƒe nuwɔna ale be wòatsɔ wo ade asi
2Chronicles25:21 Ale Israel-fia Yoas ho yi ɖakpe aʋa kple Yuda-fia Amazya. Wodo go le Bet-Semes si nye Yuda tɔ.
2Chronicles25:22 Israel si Yuda
2Chronicles25:23 Israel-fia Yoas lé Yuda-fia Amazya si nye Yoas vi kple Axazya tɔgbuiyɔvi la le Bet-Semes
2Chronicles25:24 Elɔ sika kple klosalo kpakple ŋudɔwɔnu siwo katã le Obed-Edom ƒe dzikpɔkpɔ te le Mawu ƒe aƒe la me hekpe ɖe fiasã me kesinɔnuwo ŋu. Ekplɔ ame siwo wòɖe aboyoe la kpe ɖe wo ŋu
2Chronicles25:25 Yuda-fia Amazya nɔ agbe ƒe wui atɔ̃ le Israel-fia Yoas ƒe ku megbe.
2Chronicles25:26 Amazya ƒe ŋutinya mamlɛawo tso eƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe gɔmedzedzea va se ɖe nuwuwua la
2Chronicles25:27 Tso esime Amazya trɔ le Aƒetɔ yome ko la
2Chronicles25:28 Wokɔ eƒe kukua ɖe sɔ dzi va ɖi ɖe tɔgbuiawo gbɔ le David ƒe du la me.

2Chronicles26:2 Le Amazya ƒe ku megbe la
2Chronicles26:3 Uziya xɔ ƒe wui ade esime woɖoe fiae
2Chronicles26:4 Uziya hã wɔ nu si dze Aƒetɔ ŋu abe tɔ́a Amazya ene pɛpɛpɛ.

2Chronicles26:6 Uziya wɔ aʋa kple Filistitɔwo. Egbã Gat
2Chronicles26:7 Mawu de edzi ɖe Filistitɔwo kple Arabiatɔ
2Chronicles26:8 Amontɔwo xe adzɔ na Uziya. Eva kpɔ ŋusẽ ale gbegbe be eŋkɔ de keke Egipte-liƒo dzi ke.
2Chronicles26:9 Uziya tu gbetakpɔxɔ sesẽwo ɖe Yerusalem ɖe Dzogoedzigbo
2Chronicles26:10 Etu gbetakpɔxɔwo ɖe gbedadaƒo
2Chronicles26:11 Asrafo hatsotso vovovo siwo nɔ klalo na aʋa la nɔ esi. Uziya ƒe agbalẽŋlɔla Yeiel kple dɔdzikpɔla Maaseya tia asrafoawo xlẽ
2Chronicles26:12 Ƒometatɔ siwo le asrafoawo nu la ƒe xexlẽme nye akpe eve alafa ade.
2Chronicles26:13 Ame siawo de aʋakalẽtɔ akpe alafa etɔ̃ kple adrẽ alafa atɔ̃. Wole klalo ɣe sia ɣi be yewoakpe ɖe fia la ŋu ɖe futɔwo ŋu.
2Chronicles26:14 Uziya na wotsɔ akpoxɔnu
2Chronicles26:15 Ewɔ mɔ̀ si aɖaŋuwɔlawo to vɛ la ɖe Yerusalem
2Chronicles26:16 Ke esi ŋusẽ ɖo eŋu la
2Chronicles26:17 Tete nunɔla Azarya kplɔe ɖo yi
2Chronicles26:18 Wotsi tre ɖe eŋu gblɔ nɛ be: “Wò
2Chronicles26:19 Ke Uziya do dziku. Ɣe ma ɣi la
2Chronicles26:20 Nunɔlagã Azarya kple nunɔla bubuawo nye kɔ be yewoakpɔe ɖa
2Chronicles26:21 Ŋutigbalẽdɔ dziŋɔ sia tsi fia Uziya ŋu va se ɖe eƒe kugbe. Le dɔlélea ta la
2Chronicles26:22 Nu bubu siwo Uziya wɔ
2Chronicles26:23 Uziya ku
2Chronicles27:1 Yotam va zu fia esime wòxɔ ƒe bla eve vɔ atɔ̃
2Chronicles27:2 Yotam wɔ nu si dze Aƒetɔ ŋu abe tɔ́a Uziya ene
2Chronicles27:3 Yotam ye tu Dzigbegbo ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ŋu. Eya kee gaɖo Ofel si nye Yerusalem ŋu gli la yi edzi.
2Chronicles27:4 Etso duwo ɖe towo dzi le Yuda
2Chronicles27:5 Ewɔ aʋa kple Amonviwo ƒe fia

2Chronicles28:1 Axaz xɔ ƒe bla eve esime wòzu fia

2Chronicles28:9 Ke Aƒetɔ ƒe gbeƒãɖela aɖe nɔ afi ma si ŋkɔe nye Oded. Eyi ɖakpe aʋakɔ si va Samaria la

2Chronicles28:12 Efrayim-tatɔwo dome ame aɖewo tsi tre ɖe Israel-ʋakɔa ƒe nuwɔna ŋu. Woawoe nye: Azarya

2Chronicles28:15 Tete ŋutsu siwo ŋkɔ woyɔ la tso ɖaxɔ aboyomeawo. Woɖe awu kple afɔkpa tso aboyonuawo me na ame siwo le amama la wodo. Wona woɖu nu
2Chronicles28:16 Ɣe ma ɣi la

2Chronicles29:1 Xizkiya xɔ ƒe bla eve vɔ atɔ̃

2Chronicles29:9 Kpɔ ɖa
2Chronicles29:10 Azɔ meɖoe tso nye dzime ke be mabla nu kple Aƒetɔ
2Chronicles29:11 Vinyewo
2Chronicles29:12 Tete Levi viwo tso ɖe woƒe ƒomeawo nu: Kehat ƒome la: Maxat
2Chronicles29:13 Elizafan ƒome la: Simri kple Yeiel. Asaf ƒome la: Zaxarya kple Matanya.
2Chronicles29:14 Heman ƒome la: Yexiel kple Simei. Yedutun ƒome la: Semaya kple Uziel.
2Chronicles29:15 Ame siawo ƒo wo nɔviŋutsuwo nu ƒu
2Chronicles29:16 Nunɔlaawo ge ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe xɔ la me be yewoakɔ eŋu. Woɖe nu makɔmakɔ siwo katã wokpɔ le Aƒetɔ ƒe gbedoxɔ me la do goe ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ƒe xɔxɔnua
2Chronicles29:17 Wodze xɔa ŋu kɔkɔ gɔme le ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi
2Chronicles29:18 Azɔ Levi viawo yi fia Xizkiya gbɔ ɖagblɔ nɛ be: “Míekɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe blibo la katã ŋu vɔ. Míekɔ numemevɔsamlekpui la
2Chronicles29:19 Gawu la
2Chronicles29:20 Tete fia Xizkiya fɔ ŋdi kanya ƒo dumegãwo nu ƒu
2Chronicles29:21 Wokplɔ nyitsu adrẽ
2Chronicles29:22 Wowu nyitsuawo
2Chronicles29:23 Azɔ wokplɔ nuvɔ̃vɔsa gbɔ̃tsuawo va fia la kple ameha la ŋkume

2Chronicles29:26 Levi viawo le tsitre

2Chronicles29:28 Ameha blibo la le gbe dom ɖa. Hadzilawo le ha dzim
2Chronicles29:29 Esi wowu enu la

2Chronicles29:31 Emegbe fia Xizkiya gblɔ na wo be: “Azɔ miekɔ mia ɖokui ŋu na Aƒetɔ vɔ. Mite va Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me kple vɔsanuwo kple akpedanunanawo.” Ameha blibo la tsɔ vɔsanuwo kple akpedanunanawo vɛ
2Chronicles29:32 Numemevɔsa si ameha la he vɛ la nye nyitsu bla adrẽ

2Chronicles30:1 Xizkiya ɖo du ɖe Israel blibo la kple Yuda
2Chronicles30:2 Fia la kple eƒe amegãwo kpakple ameha blibo la ɖo be yeawoaɖu Paska la le ɣleti evelia me.
2Chronicles30:3 Womete ŋu ɖui do ŋgɔ o
2Chronicles30:4 Ðoɖo la dze fia la kple ameha blibo la ŋu.
2Chronicles30:5 Ale woɖo kpe edzi be woaɖe gbeƒã na Israelviwo katã tso Beer-Seba va se ɖe Dan bene woava ɖu Paska na Aƒetɔ
2Chronicles30:6 Dɔtsɔlawo xɔ agbalẽawo tso fia la kple eƒe dumegãwo gbɔ
2Chronicles30:7 Miganɔ abe mia tɔgbuiwo kple mia nɔviwo
2Chronicles30:8 Miawo ya migalia kɔ abe mia tɔgbuiwo ene o; ke boŋ miɖe asi le mia ɖokui ŋu na Aƒetɔ ne miava eƒe kɔkɔeƒe si ŋu wòkɔ tegbee la. Miva subɔ Aƒetɔ
2Chronicles30:9 Elabe ne mietrɔ ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu la
2Chronicles30:10 Dutsɔlaawo tsa tso du me yi du me. Wozɔ to Efrayim kple Manase nutowo me va se ɖe keke Zebulon ke; ke ɖeko amewo ko wo heɖe alɔ me le wo ŋu.
2Chronicles30:11 Ke ame aɖewo bɔbɔ wo ɖokui le Aser
2Chronicles30:12 Le Yuda hã la
2Chronicles30:13 Le ɣleti evelia le ƒè la me la
2Chronicles30:14 Wolɔ vɔsamlekpui siwo katã le Yerusalem
2Chronicles30:15 Wowu ŋutitotolãawo le ɣleti evelia ƒe ŋkeke wui enelia dzi. Ŋukpe lé nunɔlawo kple Levi viwo
2Chronicles30:16 Wotsi tsitre ɖe wo nɔƒewo le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me le ɖoɖo si Mose
2Chronicles30:17 Ame geɖe ŋutɔ le ameha la me siwo mekɔ wo ɖokui ŋu o
2Chronicles30:18 Hekpe ɖe esia ŋu la
2Chronicles30:19 ƒe Mawu
2Chronicles30:20 Tete Aƒetɔ se Xizkiya ƒe gbedodoɖa
2Chronicles30:21 Ale Israelvi siwo va Yerusalem la ɖu Abolo Maʋamaʋã Ŋkeke Nyui la ŋkeke adrẽ kple dzidzɔ gã ŋutɔ
2Chronicles30:22 Xizkiya ƒo nu de dzi ƒo na Levi vi siwo katã nya ale si woasubɔ Aƒetɔ lae la. Ale dukɔ la ɖu ŋkekenyui nuɖuɖu la ŋkeke adrẽ eye wosa ŋutifafavɔ
2Chronicles30:23 Tete ameha blibo la ɖoe be yewoagaɖui ŋkeke adrẽ bubu. Ale wogaɖui kple dzidzɔ ŋkeke adrẽ sɔŋ.
2Chronicles30:24 Yuda-fia Xizkiya na nyitsu akpe ɖeka kple alẽ akpe adrẽ ameha la. Amegãwo hã na nyitsu akpe ɖeka kple alẽ akpe ewo. Nunɔla geɖe ŋutɔ hã kɔ wo ɖokui ŋu.

2Chronicles32:1 Le nyadzɔdzɔ siawo kple nuteƒewɔwɔ siawo megbe la
2Chronicles32:2 Esi Xizkiya kpɔ be Sanxerib va
2Chronicles32:3 eya kple eƒe dumegãwo kpakple aʋawɔlawo de adaŋu be yewoaxe tsivudo siwo le dua godo eye wokpe ɖe eŋu.
2Chronicles32:4 Woƒo ameha gã aɖe nu ƒu eye woxe vudowo katã kple tɔʋu si sí va to anyigba la dzi la. Wogblɔ be: “Nu ka ta tsi abɔ ɖi Asiria-fiawo nava kpɔ?”

2Chronicles32:13 Nu si nye kple tɔgbuinyewo míetu kple dukɔ bubuwo la
2Chronicles32:14 Dukɔ siwo tɔgbuinyewo tsrɔ̃ la ƒe mawuwo dometɔ kae te ŋu ɖee tso asinye me
2Chronicles32:15 Eya ta migana Xizkiya nable mi alo akplɔ mi trae o. Migaxɔ edzi se o. Dukɔ alo fiaɖuƒe aɖeke ƒe mawu aɖeke mete ŋu ɖe eƒe dukɔ tso nye kple tɔgbuinyewo si me kpɔ o. Miaƒe mawu la mate ŋu aɖe mi tso asinye me koŋ o.’ ”
2Chronicles32:16 Asiria-fia ƒe dɔlawo hã gblɔ nya geɖe ɖe Aƒetɔ
2Chronicles32:17 Asiria-fia ŋlɔ agbalẽ hã ɖe alɔ me le Aƒetɔ
2Chronicles32:18 Wodo ɣli sesĩe le Yuda-gbe me be yewoatsɔ de vɔvɔ̃ lã me na ame siwo le glia dzi le Yerusalem aɖe dzi le wo ƒo
2Chronicles32:19 Woƒo nu ɖe Yerusalem ƒe Mawu la ŋu abe ɖe wòle abe dukɔ bubuwo ƒe mawu

2Chronicles32:21 Tete Aƒetɔ dɔ dɔla aɖe ɖa wòva wu asrafoawo kple aʋakplɔlaawo keŋ le Asiria ƒe asaɖa la me. Ale Asiria-fia tsɔ ŋukpe gbugbɔ yi eƒe anyigba dzi. Esi wòge ɖe eƒe mawu ƒe aƒeme la
2Chronicles32:22 Ale Aƒetɔ xɔ na fia Xizkiya kple Yerusalemnɔlawo tso Asiria-fia Sanxerib kple futɔ bubuwo katã si me. Ena wonɔ kple dukɔ siwo katã ƒo xlã wo godoo va kpe le ŋutifafa me.

2Chronicles32:24 Le ŋkeke mawo me la

2Chronicles32:33 Xizkiya ku
2Chronicles33:1 Manase xɔ ƒe wui eve esime wòzu fia eye wòɖu fia ƒe bla atɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃ le Yerusalem.
2Chronicles33:2 Ewɔ nuvɔ̃ɖi le Aƒetɔ ŋkume. Ewɔ ŋunyɔnu siwo dukɔ siwo Aƒetɔ nyà ɖa le Israelviwo ŋgɔ la wɔ la.
2Chronicles33:3 Elabe egbugbɔ tu nuxeƒe siwo tɔ́a Xizkiya gbã la. Eɖi vɔsamlekpuiwo na Baalwo
2Chronicles33:4 Eɖi vɔsamlekpui ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe si ŋu Aƒetɔ gblɔ le be: “Yerusalem woasubɔm le tegbee” la me.
2Chronicles33:5 Eɖi vɔsamlekpui ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ƒe xɔxɔnu eveawo hã.
2Chronicles33:6 Manase mè viawo le dzo me tsɔ sa vɔe le Hinom vi ƒe bali la me. Esa dzo
2Chronicles33:7 Emè legba
2Chronicles33:8 Nyemate Israel ƒe afɔ ɖa le anyigba sia si metia na mia tɔgbuiwo la dzi o; ɖeko woaɖɔ ŋu ɖo awɔ se
2Chronicles33:9 Ke Manase na Yuda kple Yerusalemnɔlawo wɔ nuvɔ̃ɖi wu dukɔ siwo Aƒetɔ tsrɔ̃ ɖa le Israelviwo ŋgɔ gɔ̃ hã.
2Chronicles33:10 Togbɔ be Aƒetɔ gbe nya na Manase kple eƒe dukɔa hã la
2Chronicles33:11 Ale Aƒetɔ na Asiria-fia ƒe aʋakplɔlawo va dze wo dzi. Wolé Manase bɔ pãe
2Chronicles33:12 Esi Manase ɖo xaxa me la
2Chronicles33:13 Edo gbe ɖa na Mawu
2Chronicles33:14 Esia megbe la
2Chronicles33:15 Eɖe amedzrowo ƒe mawuwo kple legba la ɖa le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me
2Chronicles33:16 Edzra Aƒetɔ ƒe vɔsamlekpui la ɖo
2Chronicles33:17 Togbɔ be dukɔa gasaa vɔ le nuxeƒewo hã la
2Chronicles33:18 Manase ƒe ŋutinya mamlɛawo
2Chronicles33:19 Ke eƒe gbedodoɖa kple ale si Mawu se eƒe kokoƒoƒo nɛ
2Chronicles33:20 Manase ku
2Chronicles33:21 Amon xɔ ƒe bla eve vɔ eve esime wòzu fia eye wòɖu fia ƒe eve le Yerusalem.
2Chronicles33:22 Ewɔ nuvɔ̃ɖi le Aƒetɔ ŋkume abe tɔ́a Manase ene. Amon sa vɔ na legba siwo katã tɔ́a Manase wɔ la
2Chronicles33:23 Ke eya mede ta agu na Aƒetɔ abe ale si tɔ́a Manase bɔbɔ eɖokui la ene o
2Chronicles33:24 Eŋumewo ɖo nugbe ɖe eŋu
2Chronicles33:25 Ke dukɔmetɔwo hã wu ame siwo katã ɖo nugbe ɖe fia Amon ŋu la
2Chronicles34:1 Yosiya xɔ ƒè enyi esime wòzu fia
2Chronicles34:2 Ewɔ nu si dzɔ le Aƒetɔ ŋkume. Eto tɔgbuia David ƒe ʋe me
2Chronicles34:3 Le Yosiya ƒe ƒè enyilia me
2Chronicles34:4 Eya ŋutɔ le eteƒe wogbã Baalwo ƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo. Wokaka lifivɔsaƒe siwo le wo dzi la. Womu nyɔnumawu Asera ƒe ati kɔkɔawo ƒu anyi
2Chronicles34:5 Etɔ dzo nunɔlawo ƒe ƒuwo le woƒe vɔsamlekpui dzi
2Chronicles34:6 Ewɔ esia le duwo kple aƒedowo me le Manase
2Chronicles34:7 Esi wòto Israel-nyigba bliboa me

2Chronicles34:9 Wova Xilkiya
2Chronicles34:10 Wotsɔ gaa na dɔdzikpɔla siwo le gbedoxɔa dzi kpɔm la
2Chronicles34:11 Woawo tsɔ ga la na atikpalawo kple gliɖolawo ne woatsɔ aƒle kpe fúfuwo
2Chronicles34:12 Ameawo wɔ dɔa anukwaretɔe. Levi vi ene kpɔ wo dzi. Wotia: Yaxat kple Obadya siwo nye Levi viwo tso Merari-ƒome la me kple Zaxarya kpakple Mesulam tso Kehat-ƒome la me ɖo dɔwɔlawo nu. Wotsɔ Levi vi bubu siwo katã nya hadzinuwo ŋudɔwɔwɔ la
2Chronicles34:13 ɖo agbatsɔlawo nu. Dɔ vovovoawo wɔlawo dzikpɔlawo
2Chronicles34:14 Esime wotsɔ ga si amewo na Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me la do goe gbɔna la
2Chronicles34:15 Xilkiya gblɔ na agbalẽŋlɔla Safan be: “Mefɔ Segbalẽ la le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me”
2Chronicles34:16 Sefan tsɔ agbalẽa vɛ na fia la gblɔ be: “Dɔ siwo katã nèdɔ mí
2Chronicles34:17 Wolɔ ga si wokpɔ le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me la na dɔdzikpɔlaawo kple dɔwɔlaawo.”
2Chronicles34:18 Azɔ Safan
2Chronicles34:19 Esi fia la se agbalẽa me nyawo la

2Chronicles34:21 “Miyi ɖabia nu ɖe nye kple ame siwo susɔ le Israel kple Yuda la nu
2Chronicles34:22 Ale Xilkiya kple fia ƒe ameawo yi nyɔnugbeƒãɖela Xulda si nye Salum srɔ̃ la gbɔ. Enɔ Yerusalem ƒe to evelia me. Salum nye Tikva vi henye Xasra ƒe tɔgbuiyɔvi. Eyae kpɔa gbedoxɔmewuwo dzi. Woɖagblɔ nya la na nyɔnua.

2Chronicles34:33 Yosiya ɖe ŋunyɔnuwo katã ɖa le Israelviwo ƒe anyigba la katã dzi
2Chronicles35:1 Fia Yosiya ɖu Paska le Yerusalem tsɔ de bubu Aƒetɔ ŋu. Wowu Ŋutitotovɔsalãwo le ƒè la ƒe ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke wui enea gbe.
2Chronicles35:2 Ede dɔ asi na nunɔlawo
2Chronicles35:3 Egblɔ na Levi viwo
2Chronicles35:4 Miɖo ɖe hatsotsowo me ɖe mia tɔgbuiwo ƒe ƒomeawo nu
2Chronicles35:5 Mitsi tsitre ɖe kɔkɔeƒe la ɖe mia tɔgbuiwo ƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe hatsotso nu ɖe mia nɔvi siwo nye dukɔ la teƒe
2Chronicles35:6 Miwu ŋutitotovɔsalã la eye mikɔ mia ɖokui ŋu ne miadzrae ɖo na mia nɔviwo be woawɔ ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe ɖoɖo si wòna to Mose dzi la dzi.”
2Chronicles35:7 Yosiya na alẽvi kple gbɔ̃vi akpe bla etɔ̃ kple nyitsu akpe etɔ̃ tso eya ŋutɔ ƒe lãhawo me be woatso wo katã asa Paska vɔe ɖe vavalawo katã nu.
2Chronicles35:8 Eƒe dumegãwo hã na lɔlɔ̃nununana dukɔa
2Chronicles35:9 Azɔ Xananya
2Chronicles35:10 Esi wowɔ ɖoɖo ɖe subɔsubɔ la ŋu vɔ la

2Chronicles35:13 Womè ŋutitotolã la le dzo me ɖe ɖoɖoa nu
2Chronicles35:14 Emegbe wokpɔ woawo ŋutɔ kple nunɔlawo tɔ gbɔ. Nunɔlawo
2Chronicles35:15 Hadzilawo

2Chronicles35:18 Tso Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela Samuel ŋɔli va se ɖe ɣe ma ɣi kpa womeɖu Paska aɖeke alea kpɔ o. Israel-fia siwo katã do ŋgɔ na Yosiya la dometɔ aɖeke meɖu Paska aɖeke abe esi Yosiya
2Chronicles35:19 Woɖu Paska sia esime Yosiya le eƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒè wui enyilia me.

2Chronicles36:6 Babilon-fia Nebukadnezar tso ɖe eŋu
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadnezar lɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me ŋudɔwɔnu aɖewo ɖada ɖe eƒe fiasã me le Babilon.

2Chronicles36:17 Eya ta Aƒetɔ kplɔ Kaldea-fia vɛ wòho aʋa ɖe wo ŋu. Ewu woƒe ɖekakpuiwo kple yi le aƒe la ƒe kɔkɔeƒe la me. Mekpɔ nublanui na ɖekakpui alo ɖetugbi
2Chronicles36:18 Babilon-fia lɔ Mawu ƒe aƒe la me ŋudɔwɔnuwo katã

2Chronicles36:22 Le Kores
2Chronicles36:23 “ ‘Kores
Ezra1:1 Le Persia-fia Kores ƒe dziɖuƒè gbãtɔ me
Ezra1:2 “Persia-fia Kores be: Aƒetɔ
Ezra1:3 Eƒe dukɔmetɔ ɖe sia ɖe si le mia dome la
Ezra1:4 Na ame sia ame si susɔ ɖe teƒe si wòle la nɔlawo nakpe ɖe eŋu kple klosalo
Ezra1:5 Tete Yuda kple Benyamin ƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo
Ezra1:6 Woƒe aƒelikawo katã do alɔ wo kple klosalonuwo
Ezra1:7 Fia Kores hã he Aƒetɔ ƒe gbedoxɔ me nu siwo Nebukadnezar lɔ tso Yerusalem va eƒe mawuwo ƒeme la ɖe go.
Ezra1:8 Etsɔ wo na kesinɔnuwo dzikpɔla
Ezra1:9 Nuawo ƒe xexlẽmewoe nye esiawo: sikagba: akpe ɖeka; klosalogba: akpe ɖeka; lifigba: bla eve vɔ asieke;
Ezra1:10 sikagba globoe: bla etɔ̃; klosalogba globoe: alafa ene kple ewo; bubuwo akpe ɖeka.
Ezra1:11 Sikanuawo kple klosalonuawo katã ƒe xexlẽme le akpe atɔ̃ alafa ene bla ade vɔ asieke. Nu siawoe Sesbazar tsɔ gbɔe esime aboyomeawo gbɔ tso Babilonia va Yerusalem.
Ezra2:1 Azɔ anyigba la dzi tɔ siwo gbɔ va Yerusalem kple Yuda tso aboyo si me Babilonia-fia Nebukadnezar kplɔ wo yii le Babilonia lae nye esi: Ame sia ame yi wo dedu me.
Ezra2:2 Wogbɔ kple Zerubabel
Ezra2:3 Pareos viŋutsuwo le ame akpe eve alafa ɖeka bla adrẽ vɔ eve.
Ezra2:4 Sefatya viŋutsuwo le ame alafa etɔ̃ bla adrẽ vɔ eve.
Ezra2:5 Arax viŋutsuwo le ame alafa adrẽ bla adrẽ vɔ atɔ̃.
Ezra2:6 Paxat-Moab viŋutsuwo siwo nye Yesua kple Yoab ƒe dzidzimeviwo la le ame akpe eve alafa anyi wui eve.
Ezra2:7 Elam viŋutsuwo le ame akpe ɖeka alafa eve bla atɔ̃ vɔ ene.
Ezra2:8 Zatu viŋutsuwo le ame alafa asieke bla ene vɔ atɔ̃.
Ezra2:9 Zakai viŋutsuwo le ame alafa adrẽ bla ade.
Ezra2:10 Bani viŋutsuwo le alafa ade bla ene vɔ eve.
Ezra2:11 Bebai viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ade bla eve vɔ atɔ̃.
Ezra2:12 Azgad viŋutsuwo le ame akpe ɖeka alafa eve bla eve vɔ eve.
Ezra2:13 Adonikam viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ade bla ade vɔ ade.
Ezra2:14 Bigevai viŋutsuwo le ame akpe eve bla atɔ̃ vɔ ade.
Ezra2:15 Adin viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ene bla atɔ̃ vɔ ene.
Ezra2:16 Ater viŋutsuwo siwo nye Xizkiya-hawo le ame bla asieke vɔ enyi.
Ezra2:17 Bezai viŋutsuwo le ame alafa etɔ̃ bla eve vɔ atɔ̃.
Ezra2:18 Yora viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ɖeka wui eve.
Ezra2:19 Xasum viŋutsuwo le ame alafa eve bla etɔ̃ vɔ etɔ̃.
Ezra2:20 Gibar viŋutsuwo le ame bla asieke vɔ atɔ̃.
Ezra2:21 Betlehem viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ɖeka bla eve vɔ atɔ̃.
Ezra2:22 Netofa-ŋutsuwo le ame bla atɔ̃ vɔ ade.
Ezra2:23 Anatot-ŋutsuwo le ame alafa ɖeka bla eve vɔ enyi.

Ezra2:29 Nebo viŋutsuwo le ame bla atɔ̃ vɔ eve.

Ezra2:34 Yerixo viŋutsuwo le ame alafa etɔ̃ bla ene vɔ atɔ̃.
Ezra2:35 Senaa viŋutsuwo le ame akpe etɔ̃ alafa ade bla etɔ̃.
Ezra2:36 Nunɔlawoe nye: Yedaya
Ezra2:37 Imer viŋutsuwo le ame akpe ɖeka bla atɔ̃ vɔ eve.
Ezra2:38 Pasxur viŋutsuwo le ame akpe ɖeka alafa eve bla ene vɔ adrẽ.
Ezra2:39 Xarim viŋutsuwo le ame akpe ɖeka wui adrẽ.
Ezra2:40 Levi viwoe nye: Yesua kple Kadmiel
Ezra2:41 Hadzilawoe nye Asaf viŋutsuwo siwo le ame alafa ɖeka bla eve vɔ enyi.

Ezra3:6 Ale

Ezra4:1 Azɔ esi Yuda kple Benyamin ƒe ketɔwo se be aboyometsolawo le gbedoxɔ tum na Aƒetɔ
Ezra4:2 wova Zerubabel kple ƒomeawo ƒe tatɔwo gbɔ gblɔ na wo be: “Mina míakpe ɖe mia ŋu atu xɔa elabe míawo hã míesubɔa miaƒe Mawu la abe miawo ke ene. Eya míesaa vɔ na tso esime Asiria-fia Asar-Xadon kplɔ mí va afi siae.”
Ezra4:3 Ke Zerubabel
Ezra4:4 Tete anyigba la dzi nɔlawo ɖe dzi le Yudatɔwo ƒo
Ezra4:5 Wona zãnu amegã siwo le Persia-fia ŋu la be woagblẽ ɖoɖo si wowɔ la me. Wowɔ esia le Persia-fia Kores ƒe dziɖuɣi katã va ɖo Persia-fia Dario ŋɔli.
Ezra4:6 Esi Persia-fia Axasweros va zia dzi teti la
Ezra4:7 Nenema ke le Artaxsasta ŋɔli hã la
Ezra4:8 Fiateƒenɔla Rexum kple agbalẽŋlɔla Simsai woŋlɔ agbalẽ tso Yerusalem nu ɖo ɖe fia.
Ezra4:9 Ame siwo sɔ nu ŋlɔ agbalẽa la woe nye fiateƒenɔla Rexum kple agbalẽŋlɔla Simsai kpakple wo tɔ mamlɛawo
Ezra4:10 kple dukɔ bubu siwo fia gã bubutɔ Asnapar ɖe aboyoe yi ɖe Samaria-duwo me kple Tɔgodo Nutoa me ƒe akpa bubuawo. Azɔ la
Ezra4:11 agbalẽ si woɖo ɖa la nye esi: “Na Fia Artaxsasta: Wò dɔla Tɔgodo Nutometɔwo do gbe na wò. Azɔ
Ezra4:12 míele nyanya nam wò be Yudatɔ siwo tso gbɔwò va mía gbɔ le afii la yi Yerusalem. Wogbugbɔ du vɔ̃ɖi dzeaglã ma le tsotsom. Wole gliawo nu flɔm
Ezra4:13 Azɔ míedi be fia nanya be ne wogbugbɔ du sia tso
Ezra4:14 Esi wònye fiasã la mee míaƒe nuɖuɖu tsona
Ezra4:15 nàna woadzro tɔ́wòwo ƒe agbalẽ siwo woŋlɔ da ɖi la me. Àke ɖe eŋu le nuŋlɔɖiawo me be du sia la
Ezra4:16 Míedi be míana fia nanya be
Ezra4:17 Fia ɖo agbalẽa ŋu be: “Na Rexum
Ezra4:18 woxlẽ agbalẽ si mieɖo ɖe mí la nam.
Ezra4:19 Eya ta meɖe gbe be woadzro nuŋlɔɖiawo me tsitotsito. Wova ke ɖe eŋu be du sia tsia tre ɖe fiawo ŋu tso gbe aɖe gbe ke; emenɔlawo nye ame dzeaglã siwo hea ʋunyaʋunya kple zitɔtɔ vɛ zi geɖe.
Ezra4:20 Fia triakɔwo nɔ Yerusalem va yi. Woawoe ɖu Tɔgodo Nutome bliboa dzi
Ezra4:21 Eya ta mide se be ame siawo nadzudzɔ dɔa. Womagbugbɔ dua atso o va se ɖe esime mawɔ se yeye.
Ezra4:22 Gawu la
Ezra4:23 Esi woxlẽ Fia Artaxsasta ƒe agbalẽa na Rexum kple agbalẽŋlɔla Simsai kpakple wo tɔwo la
Ezra4:24 Tete Mawu ƒe xɔdɔ si wɔm wole le Yerusalem la tɔ
Ezra5:1 Azɔ eva eme be gbeƒãɖelawo Xagai kple Zaxarya
Ezra5:2 Tete Zerubabel
Ezra5:3 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Ezra5:4 Wobia wo hã be: “Xɔa tulawo ŋkɔwo ɖe?”
Ezra5:5 Ke Yudatɔwo ƒe Mawua ɖi na woƒe ame tsitsiawo be womezi wo dzi be woadzudzɔ dɔa ne yewoadɔ ame ɖe Dario
Ezra5:6 Agbalẽ si Tɔgodo Nutomedziɖula Tatenai kple Setar-Bozenai kpakple wo tɔ Tɔgodo Dziɖuɖudɔwɔlagã bubuawo ŋlɔ ɖo ɖe fia Dario nye esi:
Ezra5:7 Enye nutsogbalẽ si me nyawoe nye: “Ŋutifafa blibo na fia Dario!
Ezra5:8 Míele nyanya nam fia be míede Yuda Nutome ɖakpɔ Mawu gã la ƒe xɔ la. Wole etum kple kpe gãwo
Ezra5:9 Míeɖo dze kple ame tsitsi siwo le dɔa nu. Míebia wo be: ‘Ame kae na ŋusẽ mi be miatu xɔ sia
Ezra5:10 Míebia woƒe ŋkɔwo hã
Ezra5:11 Ŋuɖoɖo si wona mí lae nye be: ‘Dziƒo kple anyigba ƒe Mawu la ƒe dɔlawo míenye
Ezra5:12 Ke esi mía tɔgbuiwo do dɔmedzoe na dziƒo Mawu la ta la
Ezra5:13 Gake le Babilonia-fia Kores ƒe fiaɖuɣi ƒe ƒè gbãtɔ me la
Ezra5:14 Gawu la

Ezra6:1 Tete Dario ɖe gbe eye wotsa agbalẽ xoxo siwo le Babel-dua ƒe nuwo dzraɖoƒe la me.

Ezra6:3 Le fia Kores ƒe fiaɖuɣi ƒe ƒè gbãtɔ me la

Ezra6:5 Gawu la

Ezra6:8 Hekpe ɖe esia ŋu la

Ezra7:1 Azɔ le nya siawo megbe

Ezra7:8 le Babilonia-fia Artaxsasta ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒè adrẽlia me. Eva ɖo Yerusalem le ɣleti atɔ̃lia me le fia la ƒe fiaɖuɣi ƒe ƒè adrẽlia me.
Ezra7:9 Ezra dze mɔ tso Babilonia le ɣleti gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi
Ezra7:10 Ezra ɖoe kplikpaa be yeadzro Aƒetɔ ƒe se la me

Ezra7:14 Elabe nye
