Ezra7:16 Nenema ke nàtsɔ klosalo kple sika siwo katã nàkpɔ le Babilonia ƒe nutowo katã me kple nu siwo Israelviwo ŋutɔ kple nunɔlawo ana faa ɖe woƒe Mawu ƒe aƒe si le Yerusalem ŋu la hã yii.
Ezra7:17 Nàtsɔ ga sia ƒle nyitsuwo
Ezra7:18 Nu sia nu si dze mia kple nɔviwòwo ŋu miebe yewoatsɔ klosalo kple sika awɔe la
Ezra7:19 Nàtsɔ kplu kple gbedoxɔ me nu bubu siwo wotsɔ na wò be woawɔ wo ŋudɔ le subɔsubɔ me le wò Mawu ƒe aƒe la me la na le Yerusalem Mawu la ŋkume.
Ezra7:20 Ne nane gahiã le Mawu ƒe aƒe la ŋu si wòle be nàwɔ la
Ezra7:21 “Azɔ nye

Ezra8:1 Aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔ siwo gbɔ kplim tso Babilonia le fia Artaxsasta ƒe dziɖuɣi ŋkɔwo kple dzidzimeŋutinyae nye esi:
Ezra8:2 Ame si tso Pinehas viŋutsuwo domee nye Gersom. Ame si tso Itamar viŋutsuwo domee nye Daniɛl. Ame si tso David viŋutsuwo domee nye Xatus

Ezra8:29 Milé be na wo ne woanɔ dedie va se ɖe esime miagada wo le nunɔlagãwo kple Levi viwo kpakple aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo ŋkume le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ƒe xɔwo me le Yerusalem.”
Ezra8:30 Tete nunɔlawo kple Levi viawo xɔ klosalo

Nehemiah2:1 Gbe ɖeka le ɣleti Nisan me

Nehemiah2:5 eye megblɔ na fiaa be: “Ne edze ŋuwò

Nehemiah2:7 Megagblɔ be: “Meɖe kuku

Nehemiah2:13 Meto Balimegbo nu va do ɖe Lovudo gbɔ

Nehemiah2:15 Eya ta meto bali la me le vivitia me
Nehemiah2:16 Amegã siwo nɔ dua nu la menya kura be mede afi aɖeke o elabe va se ɖe ɣe ma ɣi la

Nehemiah3:17 Le eya yome Levi viwo hã dzra glia ƒe akpa aɖewo ɖo: Rexum
Nehemiah3:18 Bavai
Nehemiah3:19 Ame si dzra glia ƒe akpa si va ɖe Bavai tɔ yome ɖo lae nye Eser
Nehemiah3:20 Barux
Nehemiah3:21 Eya yome Meremot
Nehemiah3:22 Eyome nunɔla siwo nye ŋutsuwo tso Gbegbe la la dzra akpa si kplɔ Uriya tɔ ɖo la ɖo.
Nehemiah3:23 Benyamin kple Xasub dzra akpa si kplɔ nunɔlaawo tɔ ɖo la ɖo. Akpa sia dze ŋgɔ Benyamin ƒe aƒe kple Xasub ƒe aƒe. Azarya si nye Maaseya vi kple Ananya ƒe tɔgbuiyɔvi lae dzra akpa si kplɔe ɖo la ɖo. Akpa sia le eƒe aƒe gbɔ.
Nehemiah3:24 Benui
Nehemiah3:25 Palal
Nehemiah3:26 Pedaya
Nehemiah3:27 Tekoatɔwoe dzra akpa si va ɖe esia yome la ɖo. Wo tɔ tso Xɔ Tsrala gã si do gɔ̃ɔ la ŋkume va se ɖe Ofel ƒe gli gbɔ.
Nehemiah3:28 Tso Sɔgbo gbɔ heyi la
Nehemiah3:29 Zadok
Nehemiah3:30 Eyome Xananya
Nehemiah3:31 Sikaɖaŋudɔwɔla Malkiya nye ame si dzra akpa si va ɖe Mesulam tɔ yome la ɖo va se ɖe gbedoxɔ me dɔwɔlawo kple nudzralaawo ƒe aƒe gbɔ
Nehemiah3:32 Sikaɖaŋudɔwɔla mamlɛawo kple nudzralawoe dzra glia ƒe akpa mamlɛtɔ ɖo. Akpa sia tso le dziƒoxɔ dzogoedzitɔ gbɔ va se ɖe Alẽgbo la gbɔ.
Nehemiah4:1 Esi Sanebalat se be míele glia ɖom la
Nehemiah4:2 Egblɔ le exɔlɔ̃wo kple Samaria-ʋakɔ ŋkume be: “Nu ka wɔm Yudatɔ beli siawo le? Ðe woagbugbɔ nuwo aɖo tea? Ɖe wole vɔ sa gea? Ɖe woawu enu le ŋkeke ɖeka mea? Ðe woagaho gliɖokpe ƒodzowo tso gbeɖuɖɔwo tome ko atsɔ ɖo glia ko wòanyoa?”
Nehemiah4:3 Tobiya Amontɔ la hã nɔ exa hafi wònɔ nyaa gblɔm. Eya hã gbɔ ɖi ɖa be: “Tsuiã! Glie nye ema ɖom wolea? Ne abei kura gɔ̃ lia woƒe kpegli ma la
Nehemiah4:4 O
Nehemiah4:5 Mègatsyɔ nu woƒe vodada dzi o
Nehemiah4:6 Míeyi glia ɖoɖo dzi. Eteƒe medidi o
Nehemiah4:7 Esi Sanebalat
Nehemiah4:8 Eya ta wosɔ nu be yewo katã yewoaho aʋa ɖe Yerusalem ŋu aɖadze edzi
Nehemiah4:9 Ke míawo míedo gbe ɖa na mía Mawu
Nehemiah4:10 Ke Yuda gblɔ be: “Míelɔ gli gbagbã ʋuu ɖeɖi te
Nehemiah4:11 Míaƒe futɔawo gblɔ be: “Manɔ nyanya me na wo kura o; ɖeko woanɔ vo me ko míava do ɖe wo dzi
Nehemiah4:12 Ke Yudatɔ siwo kple míaƒe futɔawo le teƒe ɖeka la va kui ɖe to me na mí zi geɖe
Nehemiah4:13 Le esia ta
Nehemiah4:14 Mekpɔ be ameawo tsi dzodzodzoe eya ta megblɔ na woƒe bubumewo
Nehemiah4:15 Míaƒe futɔwo va se be míenya nugbe si ɖom wole ɖe mía ŋuti
Nehemiah4:16 Tso gbe ma gbe dzi la
Nehemiah4:17 le nu sia nu me le glidzraɖodɔ blibo la me. Ame siwo nɔ ke
Nehemiah4:18 Gliɖola ɖe sia ɖe hã kplaa yi ɖe ali hafi nɔa glia ɖom. Kpẽkula nɔa ŋunye.
Nehemiah4:19 Megblɔ na bubumewo
Nehemiah4:20 Ne miese kpẽ ƒe ɖiɖi ko la
Nehemiah4:21 Aleae míewɔa dɔ lae gbe sia gbe
Nehemiah4:22 Megblɔ na dukɔ la le ɣe ma ɣi me hã be wo dome ame sia ame kple eƒe dɔlawo nanɔ Yerusalem tsim dɔ
Nehemiah4:23 Ale nye kple nɔvinyewo kple nye subɔlawo kpakple ŋunyedzɔlawo míeɖea míaƒe awuwo dana ɖi ɣeaɖekeɣi o
Nehemiah5:1 Azɔ la ɣli ɖi hoo le dukɔ la kple wo srɔ̃wo dome hetsi tre ɖe wo nɔvi Yudatɔwo ŋu.
Nehemiah5:2 Ðewo be: “Mí kple mía viwo míesɔ gbɔ; ehiã godoo be míakpɔ nu aɖu
Nehemiah5:3 Bubuwo be: “Le ale si dɔ to ta la
Nehemiah5:4 Bubuwo hã be: “Ðe míedo ga hafi te ŋu xe duga ɖe míaƒe agblenyigbawo kple waingblewo ŋu na fia.
Nehemiah5:5 Evɔ la
Nehemiah5:6 Esi mese woƒe konyifafaawo la
Nehemiah5:7 Mebu tame sẽe
Nehemiah5:8 eye megblɔ na ƒuƒoƒea be: “Míawo míedze agbagba ale si míate ŋui hexɔ mía nɔvi Yudatɔ siwo tsɔ wo ɖokui dzra na dukɔ bubuwo la ƒe ɖewo ƒle tso kluvinyenye me. Fifi boŋ miawo ya miele miawo ŋutɔ mia nɔviwo dzi zim
Nehemiah5:9 Meyi edzi be: “Nu si wɔm miele menyo o. Ðe mele be miatsɔ bubu na mía Mawu oa? Ðe mele be miawɔ nu si dze
Nehemiah5:10 Nye ŋutɔ hã melɔ̃ amewo va do ga kple bli le asinye; nenema ke nɔvinyewo kple ame siwo le dɔ wɔm nam la hã do nu siawo na amewo. Mina míatsɔ feawo ake wo dzro.
Nehemiah5:11 Migbugbɔ fetɔwo ƒe nuɖuɖugblewo
Nehemiah5:12 Woɖo eŋu be: “Míexɔ wò aɖaŋua; míawɔ edzi. Míatrɔ nuawo na wo
Nehemiah5:13 Meʋuʋu nye akɔ nu hã
Nehemiah5:14 Azɔ tso ɣe ma ɣi dzi la
Nehemiah5:15 Mɔ́mefia siwo do ŋgɔ nam la zu agba kpekpe na dukɔ la. Woxɔa nuɖuɖu kple aha tsoa dukɔa gbɔ eye
Nehemiah5:16 Metsɔ nye ameti blibo la katã ƒo ɖe gligbugbɔɖodɔ la me. Nyemeƒle anyigba aɖeke na ɖokuinye o
Nehemiah5:17 Hekpe ɖe nu siawo ŋu la
Nehemiah5:18 Eya ta nu siwo woɖana le nye aƒeme le ŋkeke ɖeka dzie nye: nyitsu ɖeka
Nehemiah5:19 O nye Mawu
Nehemiah6:1 Sanebalat
Nehemiah6:2 Tete woɖo ame ɖem be: “Va ne míakpe le kɔƒe siwo le Ono-gbadzaƒe la dometɔ ɖeka me.” Ke ɖe woɖoe be mava ko ne yewoawɔ nu vevim le afi ma.
Nehemiah6:3 Eya ta medɔ ame ɖe wo be: “Dɔ vevi aɖe le ŋunye mele wɔwɔm; nyemate ŋu ava o. Ale ke magblẽ dɔa ɖi koŋ ko atso
Nehemiah6:4 Wodɔ ame ɖem alea zigbɔzi ene sɔŋ
Nehemiah6:5 Tete Sanebalat gaɖo eƒe subɔla ɖem. Emae nye zi atɔ̃lia wòɖo ame ɖem. Eŋlɔ agbalẽ de esi be netsɔ vɛ nam. Metre agbalẽa nu hã o.
Nehemiah6:6 Agbalẽa me nyawoe nye be: “Míele sesem le dukɔ siwo ƒo xlã mí la me tɔwo nu be wò kple Yudatɔwo mieɖo be yewoadze aglã
Nehemiah6:7 Wobe èdi gbeƒãɖelawo da ɖi gɔ̃ hã xoxo be ne eɖo dzi ko woanɔ gbeƒã ɖem le Yerusalem be: ‘Fia ɖo Yuda si azɔ!’ Nya siawo le ɖiɖi ge ade fia gã gbɔ tsã
Nehemiah6:8 Meɖo eŋu ɖo ɖee be: “Wò nya siawo ƒe ɖeke menye nyateƒe o. Wò ŋutɔ koe kpa wo le gbɔgblɔm.”
Nehemiah6:9 Woƒe taɖodzinue nye be yewoado vɔvɔ̃ na mí be míaƒe lã me natu ɖe dɔa ŋu ne wòase ɖe afi ma. Ke nye la
Nehemiah6:10 Azɔ la
Nehemiah6:11 Tete mexɔ edzi nɛ be: “Ko nye ŋutsu xoxo sia masía? Nye koŋ masí ayi ɖabè ɖe gbedoxɔ me be woava wum ta! Nyemayi o.”
Nehemiah6:12 Mekpɔ zi ɖeka be menye Mawue dɔe be wòaɖo afɔ afɔta nam o
Nehemiah6:13 Wona gae be woado ŋɔdzi nam ne mawɔ nu si medze o
Nehemiah6:14 Medo gbe ɖa be: “O Mawu
Nehemiah6:15 Glia ɖoɖo wu nu le ɣleti Elul ƒe ŋkeke bla eve vɔ atɔ̃lia dzi. Dɔ bliboa xɔ ŋkeke bla atɔ̃ vɔ eve.
Nehemiah6:16 Esi dukɔ siwo katã ƒo xlã mí
Nehemiah6:17 Ɣe ma ɣi katã la
Nehemiah6:18 Ame geɖewo nɔ Tobiya dzi le Yuda

Nehemiah7:1 Míegbugbɔ glia ɖo vɔ azɔ
Nehemiah7:2 Metsɔ Yerusalem-du la dzi kpɔkpɔ de asi na nɔvinye Xanani kple Xananya. Xananya siae nye asrafomegã si ƒe dzikpɔkpɔ te Yerusalem-mɔ́ la nɔ. Eyama nye ame ɖoŋuɖeŋua kple mawuvɔ̃la aɖe si tɔgbe mebɔ o.
Nehemiah7:3 Megblɔ na wo be: “Ne ŋu ke la
Nehemiah7:4 Yerusalem-du la lolo ŋutɔ. Ele nyadrii gake amewo mesɔ gbɔ le eme o. Xɔtuƒe geɖewo li siwo wometu xɔ ɖo haɖe o.
Nehemiah7:5 Tete Mawu na mese le ɖokuinye me be ele be mayɔ bubumewo
Nehemiah7:6 Ame siwo Babilonia-fia Nebukadnezar ɖe aboyo yi Babilonia la dometɔ geɖewo trɔ gbɔ va Yerusalem kple Yuda-nyigba dzi
Nehemiah7:7 Wogbɔ kple: Zerubabel
Nehemiah7:8 Pareos viŋutsuwo le ame akpe eve alafa ɖeka bla adrẽ vɔ eve.
Nehemiah7:9 Sefatya viŋutsuwo le ame alafa etɔ̃ bla adrẽ vɔ eve.
Nehemiah7:10 Arax viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ade bla atɔ̃ vɔ eve.
Nehemiah7:11 Paxat-Moab viŋutsu siwo tso Yesua kple Yoab viŋutsuwo dome la le ame akpe eve alafa enyi wui enyi.
Nehemiah7:12 Elam viŋutsuwo le ame akpe ɖeka alafa eve bla atɔ̃ vɔ ene.
Nehemiah7:13 Zatu viŋutsuwo le ame alafa enyi bla ene vɔ atɔ̃.
Nehemiah7:14 Zakai viŋutsuwo le ame alafa adrẽ bla ade.
Nehemiah7:15 Binui viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ade bla ene vɔ enyi.
Nehemiah7:16 Bebai viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ade bla eve vɔ enyi.
Nehemiah7:17 Azgad viŋutsuwo le ame akpe eve alafa etɔ̃ bla eve vɔ eve.
Nehemiah7:18 Adonikam viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ade bla ade vɔ adrẽ.
Nehemiah7:19 Bigevai viŋutsuwo le ame akpe eve bla ade vɔ adrẽ.
Nehemiah7:20 Adin viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ade bla atɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃.
Nehemiah7:21 Ater viŋutsuwo siwo nye Xizkiya-hawo le ame bla asieke vɔ enyi.
Nehemiah7:22 Xasum viŋutsuwo le ame alafa etɔ̃ bla eve vɔ enyi.
Nehemiah7:23 Bezai viŋutsuwo le ame alafa etɔ̃ bla eve vɔ ene.
Nehemiah7:24 Xarif viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ɖeka wui eve.
Nehemiah7:25 Gibeon viŋutsuwo le ame bla asieke vɔ atɔ̃.
Nehemiah7:26 Betlehem-ŋutsuwo kple Netofa-ŋutsuwo le ame alafa ɖeka bla eve vɔ enyi.
Nehemiah7:27 Anatot-ŋutsuwo le ame alafa ɖeka bla eve vɔ enyi.
Nehemiah7:28 Bet Asmavet-ŋutsuwo le ame bla ene vɔ eve.
Nehemiah7:29 Kiryat-Yearim-ŋutsuwo
Nehemiah7:30 Rama-ŋutsuwo kple Geba-ŋutsuwo le ame alafa ade bla eve vɔ ɖekɛ.
Nehemiah7:31 Mixmas-ŋutsuwo le ame alafa ɖeka bla eve vɔ eve.
Nehemiah7:32 Betel-ŋutsuwo kple Ai-ŋutsuwo le ame alafa ɖeka bla eve vɔ atɔ̃.
Nehemiah7:33 Nebo evelia ƒe ŋutsuwo le ame bla atɔ̃ vɔ eve.
Nehemiah7:34 Elam evelia ƒe ŋutsuwo le ame akpe ɖeka alafa eve bla atɔ̃ vɔ ene.
Nehemiah7:35 Xarim viŋutsuwo le ame alafa etɔ̃ bla eve.
Nehemiah7:36 Yerixo viŋutsuwo le ame alafa etɔ̃ bla ene vɔ atɔ̃.
Nehemiah7:37 Lod viŋutsuwo
Nehemiah7:38 Senaa viŋutsuwo le ame akpe etɔ̃ alafa asieke bla etɔ̃.
Nehemiah7:39 Nunɔlaawo: Yedaya
Nehemiah7:40 Imer viŋutsuwo le ame akpe ɖeka bla atɔ̃ vɔ eve.
Nehemiah7:41 Pasxur viŋutsuwo le ame akpe ɖeka alafa eve bla ene vɔ adrẽ.
Nehemiah7:42 Xarim viŋutsuwo le ame akpe ɖeka wui adrẽ.
Nehemiah7:43 Levi viawo: Yesua kple Kadmiel
Nehemiah7:44 Hadzilaawo: Asaf viŋutsuwo le ame alafa ɖeka bla ene vɔ enyi.
Nehemiah7:45 Agbonudzɔlaawo: Salum viŋutsuwo
Nehemiah7:46 Gbedoxɔ me dɔwɔlaawo: Zixa viŋutsuwo

Nehemiah7:53 Bakbuk viŋutsuwo
Nehemiah7:54 Bazlut viŋutsuwo
Nehemiah7:55 Barkos viŋutsuwo
Nehemiah7:56 Neziax viŋutsuwo kple Xatifa viŋutsuwo.
Nehemiah7:57 Salomo ƒe subɔlawo viŋutsuwo nye: Sotai viŋutsuwo
Nehemiah7:58 Yaala viŋutsuwo
Nehemiah7:59 Sefatya viŋutsuwo
Nehemiah7:60 Gbedoxɔ me dɔwɔlawo katã kple Salomo ƒe subɔlawo viŋutsuwo le ame alafa etɔ̃ bla asieke vɔ eve.
Nehemiah7:61 Ame siwo tso Tel-Melax
Nehemiah7:62 Delaya viŋutsuwo
Nehemiah7:63 Wo dometɔ siwo tso nunɔlawo dome hãe nye: Xabaya viŋutsuwo
Nehemiah7:64 Ame siawo di wo tɔgbuiŋkɔ le dzidzimegbalẽawo me gake womekpɔe o
Nehemiah7:65 Anyigba dzikpɔla la de se na wo be womekpɔ mɔ agaɖu vɔsanu kɔkɔetɔa ƒe ɖeke o
Nehemiah7:66 Ameha blibo la le akpe bla ene vɔ eve alafa etɔ̃ bla ade.
Nehemiah7:67 Woƒe dɔlaŋutsuwo kple woƒe dɔlanyɔnuwo mele xexlẽme sia me o; woawo le ame akpe adrẽ alafa etɔ̃ bla etɔ̃ vɔ adrẽ. Woƒe ŋutsuhadzilawo kple nyɔnuhadzilawo le ame alafa eve bla ene vɔ atɔ̃.
Nehemiah7:68 Woƒe sɔwo le alafa adrẽ bla etɔ̃ vɔ ade
Nehemiah7:69 kposɔwo le alafa ene bla etɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃
Nehemiah7:70 Aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔ aɖewo na nu ɖe dɔ la ŋu. Nu siwo anyigba dzikpɔla na hetsɔ de kesinɔnudzraɖoƒe la me la woe nye: sika kilo enyi
Nehemiah7:71 Nu siwo aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔ aɖewo na hetsɔ de kesinɔnuawo me ɖe dɔ la ŋu la woe nye: sika kilo alafa ɖeka bla ade vɔ enyi kple klosalo kilo akpe ɖeka bla ade vɔ enyi kpa kple klosalo kilo akpe ɖeka alafa eve bla atɔ̃.
Nehemiah7:72 Nu siwo dukɔ mamlɛa na la woe nye: sika kilo alafa ɖeka bla ene kple nunɔlawo ƒe dziwui bla ade vɔ adrẽ.
Nehemiah7:73 Ale nunɔlawo

Nehemiah8:4 Aɖakago gã gbadza aɖe si wokpa koŋ ɖe ŋkekea ŋu la dzie Ezra
Nehemiah8:5 Ezra ʋu agbalẽ la le ameawo katã ŋkume wokpɔ

Nehemiah8:13 Le ŋufɔke la

Nehemiah9:2 Do ŋgɔ la
Nehemiah9:3 Eyome woxlẽ Aƒetɔ
Nehemiah9:4 Nɔƒe kɔkɔ tɔxɛ aɖe li koŋ na Levi viwo
Nehemiah9:5 Azɔ Yesua
Nehemiah9:6 Ezra gblɔ be: “Wò ɖeka koe nye Aƒetɔ; wòe wɔ dziƒowo kple dziƒowo ƒe dziƒo kple wo ŋuti nuwo. Wòe wɔ anyigba kple atsiaƒu kpakple nu siwo katã le anyigba dzi kple atsiaƒu me. Wòe na agbe wo katã. Dziƒoʋakɔwo subɔa wò.
Nehemiah9:7 Wòe nye Aƒetɔ
Nehemiah9:8 Èkpɔe be eɖi anukware na ye
Nehemiah9:9 Èkpɔ ale si mía tɔgbuiwo kpe fu le Egipte; èse woƒe ɣli le Aƒlaƒu nu.
Nehemiah9:10 Èwɔ dzesiwo kple nukunu manyagblɔwo tsɔ tsi tre ɖe Egipte Fiagã kple eƒe dɔlawo kpakple eƒe anyigba dzi tɔwo katã ŋu elabe ènya ale si wowɔ amemabunu ɖe wo ŋui. To ema me èna wò ŋkɔ ɖi hoo
Nehemiah9:11 Èma ƒu la me ɖe eve le wò dukɔ la ŋgɔ
Nehemiah9:12 Ètsɔ alilikpo dodo kplɔ wo le ŋkeke me
Nehemiah9:13 Èɖi tso dziƒo va
Nehemiah9:14 Èfia wo be woawɔ wò dzudzɔgbewo kɔkɔe; ède sewo na wo to wò dɔla Mose dzi.
Nehemiah9:15 Esi dɔ wu wo la
Nehemiah9:16 “Gake dàda va xɔ aƒe ɖe mía tɔgbuiwo me; wolia kɔ
Nehemiah9:17 Wogbe be yewomaɖo to o. Woŋlɔ nu siwo katã nèwɔ la be. Womegaɖo ŋku nukunu siwo nèwɔ le wo dome la dzi o. Wolia kɔ tia kplɔla na wo ɖokui be wòakplɔ yewo ne yewoagbugbɔ ayi Egipte agazu kluviwo. Ke wò la
Nehemiah9:18 Wowɔ nyivilegba na wo ɖokui
Nehemiah9:19 mègblẽ wo ɖe gbedzi o
Nehemiah9:20 Èna wò gbɔgbɔ nyui la wo
Nehemiah9:21 Ènyi wo ƒe bla ene sɔŋ le gbedadaƒo
Nehemiah9:22 Ètsɔ dukɔwo kple fiaɖuƒewo de asi na wo. Èna woxɔ dukɔ siwo do liƒo kpli wo la ƒe anyigbawo. Èna woxɔ Xesbon-fia Sixon ƒe anyigba; èna woxɔ Basan-fia Og ƒe anyigba.
Nehemiah9:23 Èna wo viwo sɔ gbɔ abe ɣletiviwo le dziŋgɔli me ene
Nehemiah9:24 Woƒe dzidzimeviawo yi ɖadze anyigba la dzi
Nehemiah9:25 Woxɔ du sesẽ geɖewo
Nehemiah9:26 “To esiawo katã gbɔ hã wosẽ to
Nehemiah9:27 Eya ta ètsɔ wo de asi na woƒe futɔ siwo na wokpe fu vevie. Le woƒe fukpekpe me la
Nehemiah9:28 Ke esi wogakpɔ gbɔdzɔe ko la
Nehemiah9:29 Èxlɔ̃ nu wo kple susu be yeato ema me atrɔ wo ɖe wò se la ŋu. Gake dàda yɔ wo ameawo me
Nehemiah9:30 Ègbɔ dzi ɖi na wo ƒè geɖee; ètsɔ wò Gbɔgbɔ xlɔ̃ nu wo to wò gbeƒãɖelawo dzi gake wogbe
Nehemiah9:31 Gake le ale si gbegbe nèkpɔa nublanui ta la
Nehemiah9:32 “Eya ta azɔ la
Nehemiah9:33 Tɔwò dzɔ be nu siawo katã dzɔ ɖe mía dzi. Nu si wòle be nàwɔ lae nèwɔ. Ke míawo ya
Nehemiah9:34 Míaƒe fiawo
Nehemiah9:35 Esi wole woƒe fiaɖuƒe me kple wò kesinɔnu gbogbo si nètsɔ ke wo la dome
Nehemiah9:36 Kpɔ mí ɖa! Míezu kluviwo egbe le anyigba si nètsɔ na mía tɔgbuiwo
Nehemiah9:37 Anyigba la metsonu damiawo yina na fia siwo te nètsɔ mí de le míaƒe nuvɔ̃wo ta la. Fia siawo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe míaƒe ameti la kple míaƒe lãwo siaa dzi; wowɔa nu sia nu si dze wo ŋu la mí faa. Míaƒe nu wɔ nublanui ŋutɔ!”
Nehemiah9:38 Le nu siawo katã ta la

Nehemiah11:1 Dukɔ la ƒe amegãwo tsi Yerusalem-du me wòzu wo nɔƒe koŋ. Ke le ame mamlɛawo gome la

Nehemiah11:5 Maaseya
Nehemiah11:6 Kalẽtɔ siwo nɔ Yerusalem-du me la dometɔ alafa ene bla ade vɔ enyi nye Perez ƒe dzidzimeviwo.
Nehemiah11:7 Benyamin-to la me tɔ siwo hã ʋu va tsi Yerusalem la woe nye: Salu
Nehemiah11:8 Gabai kple Salai. Ale Benyamin-to la me ŋutsu siwo va tsi Yerusalem la ƒe xexlẽme le alafa asieke bla eve vɔ enyi.

Nehemiah11:14 Wo nɔvi alafa ɖeka bla eve vɔ enyi ye nɔ dua me. Wonye ŋutsu kalẽtɔwo. Wo nunɔlae nye Zabdiel

Nehemiah13:1 Gbe si gbe woxlẽ Mose ƒe se la na dukɔa la
Nehemiah13:2 Nu si ta wòle alea ɖo lae nye be wometsɔ abolo kple tsi va kpe Israelviwo le woƒe mɔzɔzɔ me o
Nehemiah13:3 Esi ameawo se sedede sia la
Nehemiah13:4 Do ŋgɔ la
Nehemiah13:5 edzra xɔdɔme lolotɔ ɖeka me ɖo tsɔ na Tobiya. Evɔ xɔ ma mee wotsɔa numemevɔsa
Nehemiah13:6 Nyemenɔ Yerusalem hafi nu sia nɔ dzɔdzɔm o; menɔ Babilonia elabe le Babilonia-fia Artaxsasta ƒe dziɖuɣi ƒe ƒè bla etɔ̃ vɔ evelia me la
Nehemiah13:7 eye metrɔ va Yerusalem. Ɣe ma ɣie meva ke ɖe nu gbegblẽ si Elyasib wɔ la ŋu. Edzra Mawu ƒe aƒeme xɔ ɖeka me ɖo na Tobiya wòle eme.
Nehemiah13:8 Dzi kum ŋutɔ. Mefɔ Tobiya ƒe xɔ me nuwo katã ƒu gbe ɖe gota.
Nehemiah13:9 Tete mena wokɔ̀ xɔa ŋu
Nehemiah13:10 Meva se hã be womeganɔa nu siwo amewo dzɔ ƒe akpa si nye Levi viwo tɔ kple esi nye hadzilawo tɔ la hã tsɔm na wo o; eya ta Levi viawo kple hadzilaawo
Nehemiah13:11 Meka mo na amegãawo be: “Nu ka ta miegblẽ Mawu ƒe aƒe la ɖi ale?” Eyome megaƒo Levi viawo kple hadzilaawo nu ƒu hetsɔ wo ɖo wo teƒe.
Nehemiah13:12 Tete Yuda blibo la gade asi woƒe nukuwo
Nehemiah13:13 Azɔ metia nunɔla Selemya
Nehemiah13:14 O nye Mawu
Nehemiah13:15 Le ɣe ma ɣiwo me le Yuda la
Nehemiah13:16 Tirotɔ siwo nɔ dua me la hã tsɔa tɔmelã kple nu bubu geɖewo vanɛ va dzrana na Yudatɔwo le dzudzɔgbe la le Yerusalem.
Nehemiah13:17 Tete meka mo na Yuda-bubumewo be: “Miele kɔ gblẽm ɖo na dzudzɔgbe la! Nu vɔ̃ɖi kae nye esi wɔm miele?
Nehemiah13:18 Ðe menye nu siae mia tɔgbuiwo wɔ ta mía Mawu na dzɔgbevɔ̃e siawo katã va míawo ŋutɔ kple du sia dzi oa? Gake miegale kɔ gblẽm ɖo na dzudzɔgbe la heto ema me le kɔ lim dɔmedzoe geɖe wu ɖi na Israel.”
Nehemiah13:19 Tso ɣe ma ɣi dzi la
Nehemiah13:20 Ke asitsalawo kple nu kpotoe dzrala aɖewo va tsi Yerusalem-dua godo dɔ zi ɖeka alo eve.
Nehemiah13:21 Meka mo na wo be: “Nu ka ta miava tsi glia godo adɔ? Ne miegawɔe la
Nehemiah13:22 Megblɔ na Levi viwo be woakɔ wo ɖokui ŋu
Nehemiah13:23 Mekpɔ dze sii le ɣe ma ɣiwo me hã be Yuda-ŋutsu aɖewo ɖe srɔ̃ tso Asdod
Nehemiah13:24 Wo viwo ƒe afã doa Asdod-gbe
Nehemiah13:25 Meka mo na wo
Nehemiah13:26 Ðe menye nyɔnu siawo ƒomevi ɖeɖee na Israel-fia Salomo wɔ nuvɔ̃ oa? Fia aɖeke mede enu le afi aɖeke o; eƒe Mawu lɔ̃e vevie
Nehemiah13:27 Ɖe míase le mia ŋu be miewɔ nu gbegblẽ gã sia hewɔ vɔ̃ ɖe mía Mawu la ŋu be mieɖe nyɔnu tso dutaa?”
Nehemiah13:28 Nunɔlagã Elyasib ƒe tɔgbuiyɔvi ɖeka
Nehemiah13:29 O nye Mawu

Job1:1 Ŋutsu aɖe nɔ Uz-nyigba dzi. Eŋkɔe nye Hiob. Ŋutsu sia nye ame dzɔdzɔe kple fɔmaɖila. Evɔ̃a Mawu
Job1:2 Wodzi viŋutsu adrẽ kple vinyɔnu etɔ̃ nɛ.
Job1:3 Eƒe lãhawo ƒe xexlẽme nye: alẽ akpe adrẽ
Job1:4 Via ŋutsuwo wɔ ɖoɖo
Job1:5 Ne dzidzɔkpɔɣi la wu nu gbe sia gbe la
Job1:6 Gbe ɖeka la
Job1:7 Aƒetɔ bia Satana be: “Afi ka nètso?” Satana ɖo eŋu be: “Metso tsatsa ge le anyigba dzi. Meɖi tsa le edzi katã.”
Job1:8 Aƒetɔ biae be: “Èlé ŋku ɖe nye dɔla Hiob ŋua? Ame aɖeke mede enu le anyigba dzi o. Mokaka mele eŋu o; enye ame dzɔdzɔe
Job1:9 Tete Satana ɖo eŋu na Aƒetɔ be: “Ðe menye nane tae Hiob vɔ̃a Mawu oa?
Job1:10 Ðe menye kpɔ nètɔ ƒo xlã eya ŋutɔ
Job1:11 Ke ka asi nu siwo katã le esi la ŋu kpɔ be maƒo fi ade wò ŋumakpetɔe oa.”
Job1:12 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Satana be: “Enyo! Eƒe nuwo katã le asiwò me; ɖeko mègaka asi eya ŋutɔ ŋu o.” Ale Satana dzo le Aƒetɔ gbɔ.
Job1:13 Gbe ɖeka
Job1:14 Kasia amedɔdɔ aɖe va Hiob gbɔ va gblɔ nɛ be: “Nyiawo le nu ŋlɔm
Job1:15 Kasia Sabatɔwo va dze wo dzi helé lãawo dzoe. Wowu dɔlaawo katã kple yi. Nye ɖeka hɔ̃ koe susɔ te ŋu sí va be magblɔe na wò.”
Job1:16 Esi amedɔdɔ sia gale nu ƒom la
Job1:17 Ame sia hã mekpɔ ɖe nu le eƒe nyaa me o
Job1:18 Dɔla sia hã mekpɔ wu eƒe nyaa nu hafi ame bubu hã va do o
Job1:19 Kasia ahom tu sesĩe tso gbedadaƒo va lɔ xɔ si me wole la ɖe nu hemui ƒu viwoawo dzi gbloo; wo katã woku. Nye ɖeka koe do le eme
Job1:20 Tete Hiob tso
Job1:21 be: “Amamae mele do tso nɔnye ƒe dɔme
Job1:22 Le nu siawo katã me la

Job3:9 Eƒe ŋukeɣletiviwo nado viviti. Nekpɔ mɔ na kekeli

Job4:3 Kpɔ ɖa
Job4:4 Wò nya léa anyidzela ɖe te
Job4:5 Ke azɔ la
Job4:6 Ðe menye wò Mawu-vɔvɔ̃ lae nye dzideƒo na wò oa? Ðe menye wò agbenɔnɔ fɔmaɖitɔe lae nye wò mɔkpɔkpɔ oa?
Job4:7 “Bu eŋu kpɔ! Ðe fɔmaɖila aɖe tsrɔ̃ kpɔa? Afi ka wotsrɔ̃ nu dzɔdzɔe wɔla le kpɔ?
Job4:8 Nyea mekpɔ be ame siwo dea nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ƒe agble
Job4:9 Mawu ƒe ƒuƒu tsrɔ̃a wo
Job4:10 Dzata le gbe ɖem

Job4:12 “Azɔ wofi tofi nam

Job4:14 nye lã me ble fu
Job4:15 Gbɔgbɔ aɖe ƒo ya to ŋkume nam
Job4:16 Etsi tsitre ɖe ŋkunye me; ke nyemenya nu si wònye o
Job4:17 ‘Ðe gbetɔ si kuna la ate ŋu anye dzɔdzɔetɔ le Mawu ŋkumea? Ɖe gbetɔ anye ame dzadzɛ le eƒe Wɔla gbɔa?
Job4:18 Kpɔ ɖa
Job4:19 Ale ke wɔ wòaɖo dzi ɖe gbetɔ siwo wowɔ kple tsu ŋu; ame siwo dzɔ tso ʋuʋudedi me
Job4:20 Gbetɔ nɔa agbe le ŋdi me
Job4:21 Ne wotso woƒe agbadɔka ɖa la
Job5:1 “Hiob
Job5:2 Nyateƒee
Job5:3 Mekpɔ bometsila aɖe le kè ƒom ɖe to; ke meƒo fi de enɔƒe enumake.
Job5:4 Viawo mele dedie kura o; wowɔa funyafunya wo le dutakpeƒe
Job5:5 Dɔwuitɔwo ɖua eƒe agblemenukuwo; woɖea wo tso ŋuwo me ke gɔ̃ hã
Job5:6 Fukpekpe memiena tso ke me o
Job5:7 Ke boŋ fu mee wodzi gbetɔ ɖo
Job5:8 “Nenye nyee la
Job5:9 Ame si wɔa nu dzɔtsu siwo me ame mate ŋu adzro o
Job5:10 Enana be tsi dzana ɖe anyigba dzi
Job5:11 Ekɔa ɖokuibɔbɔlawo ɖe dzi
Job5:12 Egblẽa ayetɔwo ƒe nugbeɖoɖo me
Job5:13 Eléa nunyalawo ne wole woƒe ayemenu wɔm
Job5:14 Viviti dona ɖe wo le ŋkeke me
Job5:15 Ke eɖea tsyɔ̃eviwo tso woƒe nu me kple hiãtɔwo tso ŋusẽtɔ si me.
Job5:16 Ale mɔkpɔkpɔ li na ame gblɔe
Job5:17 “Kpɔ ɖa
Job5:18 Elabe edea abi ame ŋu
Job5:19 Aɖe wò le fukpekpe me zigbɔzi ade sɔŋ
Job5:20 Ne dɔ to la
Job5:21 Mana woagblɔ nya aƒo ɖi wò o. Ne nu le gbegblẽm la
Job5:22 Àko tsɔtsrɔ̃ kple dɔwuame
Job5:23 Kpewo manɔ wò agble me o
Job5:24 Ekema ànɔ wò agbadɔ me aɖe dzi ɖi; ne èxlẽ wò alẽwo la
Job5:25 Viwòwo hã asɔ gbɔ fũu; woanɔ abe gbe siwo le wɔwɔm le afi sia afi ene.
Job5:26 Àtsi ŋutɔ hafi ayi yɔ me
Job5:27 Kpɔ ɖa
Job6:1 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu be:
Job6:2 “Ne ɖe woaƒo ƒu nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e kple dzikudodo ada le nudanu me la
Job6:3 anye ne woakpe wu ƒutake gɔ̃; eya tae mele nu ƒom kple adã alea.
Job6:4 Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ƒe aŋutrɔwo ƒo ɖem
Job6:5 Ðe gbetedzi xlɔ̃na ne wòle gbe dama ɖuma? Ðe nyi xlɔ̃na ne nuɖuɖu le egbɔa?
Job6:6 Ðe woɖua nu vɔvɔ dzemadeea? Alo ɖe azi ƒe ɣiƒe vivinaa?
Job6:7 Wowɔ yaa ɖe nu me nam; wole ŋu nyɔm nam.”
Job6:8 “Ao
Job6:9 Ne ɖe wòadze Mawu ŋu be wòagbãm gudugudu
Job6:10 Esia afa akɔ nam. Ne mele veve helihelĩ sem gɔ̃ hã
Job6:11 Ŋusẽ kae gale ŋunye
Job6:12 Kpee wotsɔ memea? Nye ŋutilã ɖe
Job6:13 Nyateƒe
Job6:14 “Ame siwo gbe dɔmenyowɔwɔ na wo xɔlɔ̃ la
Job6:15 Ke nɔvinyewo wɔ alakpanu abe tsidzadza si xa ɖi ene; wole abe ta siwo miena kaba
Job6:16 Tsi babla na wo me nyɔ vĩ
Job6:17 ke ne dzoxɔxɔ ɖo wo me ko la
Job6:18 Kposɔhawo dze le woƒe mɔ dzi yi wo gbɔ
Job6:19 Tema-kposɔhawo le afi ma kpɔm
Job6:20 Woka ɖe edzi kplikpaa
Job6:21 Alea tututu miawo hã mieva zu nam. Miekpɔ be dzɔgbevɔ̃e dzɔ ɖe dzinye
Job6:22 Ðe megblɔ be: ‘Mina nanem!’ alo be: ‘Mitsɔ miaƒe kesinɔnu na zãnui ɖe nunye’ mahã?
Job6:23 Alo ɖe mebe: ‘Miɖem tso ketɔ si me
Job6:24 “Enyo
Job6:25 Nyateƒenyawo wɔa dɔ ŋusẽtɔe! Ke nu ka le miaƒe nya si hem miele ɖe ŋunye la me?
Job6:26 Ðe miebu be yewoaɖe vodada nam abe nya gbɔlo koe le wɔnavɔleŋutɔ ƒe nu me tsom enea?
Job6:27 Miedi gɔ̃ hã be miadzidze nu ɖe tsyɔ̃eviwo dzi
Job6:28 “Ke azɔ milɔ̃ miakpɔ ŋkunye me. Nyemaka aʋatso na mi o.
Job6:29 Taflatsɛ
Job6:30 Aɖeveetɔ menyea? Ðe nyemele dzɔgbevɔ̃e gã
Job7:1 “Ðe menye aʋa mee amegbetɔ le le anyigba dzi oa? Eƒe ŋkekewo mele abe apaɖila tɔ ene oa?
Job7:2 Egale abe ale si kluvi dia vɔvɔli vevie
Job7:3 Ale tso ɣleti yi ɣleti la
Job7:4 Ne memlɔ anyi la
Job7:5 Nye ŋutilã katã dze nyé
Job7:6 Nye ŋkekewo ƒua du wu avɔlɔ̃ʋu; wo nu yina mɔkpɔkpɔ manɔmee.”
Job7:7 “O Mawu

Job7:9 Ale si alilikpo kakana hebunae la

Job7:17 Nu kae nye gbetɔ be nèbua eŋu vevie ale? Nu ka ta wòle susu me na wò ale?
Job7:18 Èléa ŋku ɖe eŋu ŋdi sia ŋdi
Job7:19 Màɖe kɔ ɖa le ŋunye vie
Job7:20 Wò amegbetɔwo ŋu dzɔla
Job7:21 Nu ka ta màte ŋu tsɔ nye dzidadawo ake o? Màte ŋu aŋe aɖaba ƒu nye vodadawo dzi oa? Elabe azɔ mele ke me mlɔ ge. Àdim

Job9:22 Nyemegatsɔ ɖeke le eme o. Eya ta mebe: ‘Etsrɔ̃a ame maɖifɔ kple ame vɔ̃ɖi siaa.’

Job9:35 Ekema maƒo nu vɔvɔ̃ manɔmee
Job10:1 “Nye agbe le ŋu nyɔm nam. Eya ta make nu ana nye konyifafa nado faa. Maƒo nu esime mele veve sem helihelĩ.
Job10:2 Magblɔ na Mawu be: ‘Mègabu fɔm o. Gblɔ nu si ta nèle avu wɔm kplim la nam.’
Job10:3 Ðe wòsɔ na wò be nàsẽ ŋuta le ame ŋu
Job10:4 Amegbetɔ ƒe ŋkue le asiwòa? Ðe nèkpɔa nu abe ame ko enea?
Job10:5 Ðe wò hã nèle abe gbetɔ si kuna ene
Job10:6 hafi nèle vodada dim le ŋunye
Job10:7 Evɔ la
Job10:8 Wò ŋutɔe tsɔ wò asi mem
Job10:9 Ðo ŋui be tsue nètsɔ wɔm; ɖe nèbe yeagbãm nyányanya magatrɔ zu ʋuʋudedia?
Job10:10 Ðe mèkɔm ɖi abe notsi ene
Job10:11 Ètsɔ ƒu kple ka lɔ̃ nye ameti lae
Job10:12 Èna agbem
Job10:13 togbɔ be èɣla nu siawo ɖe dzime hã menya be esiae nye wò tameɖoɖo.
Job10:14 Wò ŋku le ŋunye be ne mewɔ nuvɔ̃ la
Job10:15 Ne mesẽ tame la
Job10:16 Ke ne mefɔ ta dzi la
Job10:17 Eɖɔlia wò ɖasefowo ɖe ŋunye ɣe sia ɣi; wò dziku le dzi dem ɖe ŋunye
Job10:18 “Nu ka ta nèna medo tso nɔnye ƒe dɔme ɖo? Ne ɖe metsi ʋu me la
Job10:19 Anye ne nyemanɔ anyi kpɔ gbeɖe o; ɖeko woatsɔm tso nɔnye ƒe dɔme aɖade yɔdo me enumake.
Job10:20 Menye agbenɔŋkeke ʋɛ aɖewo koe le asinye oa? Ðe asi le ŋunye! Te ɖa le gbɔnye

Job11:7 “Ðe nàte ŋu adi Mawu ƒe nu goglowo me ake ɖe wo ŋua? Ðe nàte ŋu adi Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ƒe seɖoƒe

Job11:17 Wò agbenɔnɔ aklẽ wu ŋdɔ kutsu
Job11:18 Dzideƒo aɖo asiwò
Job11:19 Àmlɔ anyi ame aɖeke mava ɖi ɖe wò o. Ame geɖewo adi be nàve yewo nu.

Job12:5 Ame si le dedie la

Job15:1 Tete Elifaz
Job15:2 “Ðe nunyala aɖo nya ŋu kple bometsinya
Job15:3 Ðe wòatsɔ nuƒo maɖevi alo nya siwo me tsɔɖu aɖeke mele o la
Job15:4 Ke èle asi ɖem le Mawu-vɔvɔ̃ ŋu
Job15:5 Elabe wò nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ le nu fiam wò nu
Job15:6 Wò ŋutɔ wò nue le fɔ bum wò; menye nyee o. Wò ŋutɔ wò nuyiwoe nye ɖasefo ɖe ŋuwò.”
Job15:7 “Wòe nye amegbetɔ gbãtɔ wodzia? Alo wòe tre dzɔdzɔ na togbɛwoa?
Job15:8 Ðe nèɖo to Mawu ƒe adzamedaŋudede
Job15:9 Nu ka nènya si míawo míenya o? Nu ka gɔme nèse si me mekɔ na míawo ya o?
Job15:10 Kpɔ ɖa
Job15:11 Ðe Mawu ƒe akɔfanya kple gbe bɔbɔe
Job15:12 Nu ka ta wò dzi kplɔ wò yina tatra ge
Job15:13 Nu ka ta nètsi tre ɖe Mawu ŋu
Job15:14 Nu ka nye amegbetɔ
Job15:15 Kpɔ ɖa
Job15:16 Ko wòahaɖo dzi ɖe amegbetɔ
Job15:17 “Kpɔ ɖa
Job15:18 nu si nunyalawo gblɔ
Job15:19 ame siwo ɖeɖe ko wotsɔ anyigba la na
Job15:20 Ame vɔ̃ɖi la
Job15:21 Ŋɔdziɣli ɖina le eƒe to me
Job15:22 Mexɔe se be yeado le viviti me o; yi koe le elalam.
Job15:23 Ele tsa glalã tsam le nuɖuɖu dim le gbɔgblɔm be: ‘Afi ka wòakpɔe le?’ Enya be vivitidogbe tu ye vɔ.
Job15:24 Xaxa kple vevesese doa ŋɔdzi nɛ. Wodzea edzi abe fia si ho aʋa la ene.
Job15:25 Elabe edo asi ɖe Mawu ŋkume
Job15:26 Elũ ɖe Mawu dzi kɔlialiatɔe
Job15:27 elabe ekpɔ lã me ɖe mo gbɔ
Job15:28 Enɔ du gbagbãwo kple aƒedo siwo zu glikpo la me.
Job15:29 Ame sia mazu gatɔ akpɔ o
Job15:30 Masí le ku ƒe viviti nu o. Anɔ abe ati si ƒe alɔwo dzo fiã la ene
Job15:31 Meganɔ ŋu ɖom ɖe nu dzodzrowo ŋu
Job15:32 Hafi eƒe ŋkeke nade la
Job15:33 Alulũ abe waintsetse gbogboe le ka ŋu
Job15:34 Mawumavɔ̃lawo ƒe ha medzina ɖe edzi o
Job15:35 Wofɔ ayemenuwɔwɔ ƒe fu
Job16:1 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu be:
Job16:2 “Mese nya siawo tɔgbe zi geɖe. Akɔfala siwo miebe yewonye la
Job16:3 Nu kpoloe ƒoƒoa mevɔ kpɔ oa? Nu kae dɔ wò nèle nu ƒom alea gbegbe?
Job16:4 Nenye miawoe le tenyeƒe la
Job16:5 Maƒo nu ade dzi ƒo na mi
Job16:6 “Ne meƒo nu la
Job16:7 Le nyateƒe me la
Job16:8 Ena meɖi ku
Job16:9 Mawu do dɔmedzoe ɖe ŋunye
Job16:10 Wodo ɣli gblɔ nya vlowo ɖe ŋunye; woƒo tome nam fewuɖutɔe
Job16:11 Mawu gblẽm ɖe mawumavɔ̃lawo si me
Job16:12 Mele ŋutifafa me
Job16:13 Eƒe aŋutrɔdalawo ƒo xlãm. Efé nye ayikuwo me nublanuimakpɔtɔe. Etrɔ nye vevee kɔ ɖe anyigba.
Job16:14 Elũ ɖe dzinye abe asrafo ene
Job16:15 Metɔ akpanya ɖe nye ŋutigbalẽ ŋu
Job16:16 Mefa avi ʋuu nye mo do ʋusrã
Job16:17 Evɔ la
Job16:18 “O
Job16:19 Kpɔ ɖa
Job16:20 Konyelawo la
Job16:21 be wòana gbetɔ ƒe nya dzɔdzɔe nadze le eŋkume
Job16:22 Elabe nye ƒe ʋɛawo le dedem
Job17:1 Nu té nye gbɔgbɔ ŋu
Job17:2 Nyateƒe
Job17:3 “Mawu
Job17:4 Èwɔe be womase nu gɔme o
Job17:5 Ame si tsia tre ɖe xɔlɔ̃awo ŋu be yeakpɔ gome le woƒe nunɔamesiwo me la
Job17:6 “Etsɔm do hameloe na dukɔwo
Job17:7 Mexa nu ʋuu nye ŋkuwo megale nu kpɔm nyuie o. Nye ŋutinuwo zu abe vɔvɔli ene.
Job17:8 Esia na be ame dzɔdzɔewo ƒe nu ku
Job17:9 Ke hã la
Job17:10 Ke miawo la
Job17:11 Nye ŋkeke de; nye dzime didi kple ɖoɖowo me gblẽ.
Job17:12 Wotrɔ viviti zu ŋkekee. Wogblɔ le kekeli ŋu be egogo viviti.
Job17:13 Ne meɖo ŋu ɖe tsiẽƒe ŋu abe nye aƒe ene
Job17:14 ne meyɔ yɔdo be: ‘Tɔ́nye’
Job17:15 afi ka nye mɔkpɔkpɔ le? Ame kae akpɔ be mɔkpɔkpɔ gale asinye?
Job17:16 Ðe nye mɔkpɔkpɔ akplɔm yi ʋɔnu le tsiẽƒea? Afɔ ɖeka dzie nye kplii míazɔ ayi ke mea?”
Job18:1 Tete Bildad
Job18:2 “Ɣe ka ɣi nàdzudzɔ nyamɔ̀ɖoɖo? Mibu tame nyuie gbã hafi míaƒo nu.
Job18:3 Nu ka ta wobu mí lãwoe? Nu ka ta míenye movitɔwo le wo gbɔ?
Job18:4 Tsiã
Job18:5 “Nyateƒe
Job18:6 Kekeli zua viviti le eƒeme
Job18:7 Eƒe afɔɖeɖe ziaziazia tona ɖe eme
Job18:8 Eya ŋutɔ ƒe afɔ kplɔnɛ dea ɖɔ me; egena dzea domɔ̀ me.
Job18:9 Kamɔ̀e léa eƒe afɔkɔe
Job18:10 Woɖoa ƒoɖetoe nɛ
Job18:11 Ŋɔdzi lénɛ le afi sia afi
Job18:12 Dɔwuame na eƒe ŋusẽ vɔ keŋkeŋ. Dzɔgbevɔ̃e le klalo ɖe eƒe nukikli ŋu.
Job18:13 Dɔléame ɖua eƒe ŋutilã
Job18:14 Wohenɛ sesẽtɔe tso eƒe aƒe si ŋu wòɖo ŋu ɖo la me vaa fia ŋɔdzidonamela la gbɔ.
Job18:15 Naneke meganɔa eƒe aƒeme o
Job18:16 Eƒe ke kuna ɖe to me
Job18:17 Womegaɖoa ŋku edzi le anyigba dzi o
Job18:18 Wotua asii tso kekeli me dea viviti me; wonyànɛ dzonae le xexea me.
Job18:19 Vi alo tɔgbuiyɔvi manɔ esi le wo de o
Job18:20 Ɣetoɖoƒetɔwo ƒe nu aku
Job18:21 Nyateƒe
Job19:1 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu be:
Job19:2 “Ɣe ka ɣi miawɔ funyafunyam ase ɖo? Ɣe ka ɣi miatsɔ nyawo agbãm nyànyanya ase ɖo?
Job19:3 Kpɔ ɖa
Job19:4 Ne ele me be meda vo gɔ̃ hã la
Job19:5 Nenye nyateƒee miele mia ɖokui dom ɖe dzi be yewonyo wum
Job19:6 minya nyuie be Mawue bu fɔm
Job19:7 Kpɔ ɖa
Job19:8 Etɔ kpɔ xe mɔ nam; afi aɖeke toto meli o; ena viviti do ɖe nye mɔ dzi.
Job19:9 Eklo bubu ɖa le ŋunye
Job19:10 Egbãm nyànyanya
Job19:11 Mawu do dɔmedzoe ɖe ŋunye vevie
Job19:12 Eƒe aʋakɔwo ƒo ƒu
Job19:13 “Eɖe nɔvinye ŋutsuwo ɖa le ŋunye sãa
Job19:14 Ƒonyemewo kple xɔ̃nye veviwo gblẽm ɖi.
Job19:15 Nye amedzrowo
Job19:16 Meyɔ nye dɔlaŋutsu
Job19:17 Nye nu me le ʋeʋẽm ɖe srɔ̃nye
Job19:18 Ðevi suewo gɔ̃ hã do vlom
Job19:19 Mele ŋu nyɔm na xɔ̃nye veviwo
Job19:20 Nye ŋutigbalẽ kple lãkusi lé ɖe nye ƒuwo ŋu; mekpɔ ku ŋkume kple ŋkume.
Job19:21 Xɔ̃nyewo
Job19:22 Mawu le yonyeme tim
Job19:23 “O
Job19:24 Ðe woatsɔ nuŋlɔga ata wo ɖe agakpe dzi
Job19:25 Ke nye la
Job19:26 eye ne wovuvu nye ŋutigbalẽ ʋayaʋaya ale hã la
Job19:27 Makpɔe tututu. Nye ŋutɔ nye ŋkue akpɔe
Job19:28 Ne miegblɔ be: ‘Ale ke míati eyome? Nya la ƒe dzɔtsoƒe le egbɔ.’
Job19:29 Mivɔ̃ yi
Job20:1 Tete Zofar
Job20:2 “Kpɔ ɖa
Job20:3 Èdzum ɖe nya me
Job20:4 Ðe mènya o be tso tìtiti esime woɖo amegbetɔ ɖe anyigba dzi la
Job20:5 ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe aseyetsotso le kpuie ko
Job20:6 Ne ekɔ yi dzi ʋĩi
Job20:7 ayi to ʋĩi abe eya ŋutɔ ƒe mí ene
Job20:8 Enu ayi kaba abe drɔ̃e ene
Job20:9 Ame si kpɔnɛ la magakpɔe o
Job20:10 Viawo adi nyui na ame dahewo
Job20:11 Togbɔ be ɖekakpuime ŋusẽ gale eŋu hã la
Job20:12 “Ne nuvɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ le vivim le nu me nɛ abe anyitsi ene
Job20:13 lée ɖe nu me
Job20:14 nuɖuɖua atrɔ zu ƒli ƒe aɖi ɖe dɔme nɛ.
Job20:15 Emi amewo ƒe kesinɔnuwo
Job20:16 Ƒli ƒe aɖi wòno
Job20:17 Makpɔ gome le anyitsi kple notsi tòto siwo le tsatsam abe tɔsisi kple tɔʋu ene la me o.
Job20:18 Agbugbɔ nu si wòku kutri kpɔ la ana
Job20:19 Elabe egbã ame dahewo hegblẽ wo ɖi; exɔ xɔ si metu o la sesẽe.
Job20:20 Esi mele ƒo ɖim o ta la
Job20:21 Le eƒe nu tsu ɖuɖu ta
Job20:22 Ne nunɔamesiwo le esi fũu hã
Job20:23 Esime wòle didim be yeaɖi ƒo zã la
Job20:24 Ne esí le ga yibɔ lãnu nu la
Job20:25 Aŋutrɔ la aŋɔ eƒe vevegoe. Ahee doe tso eƒe lã me. Enu ada dzo wòakpɔ
Job20:26 Blukɔ ado ɖe eƒe kesinɔnuwo dzi. Dzo si amegbetɔ meƒlɔ ɖo o la afiãe
Job20:27 Dziƒowo aklo nu le eƒe vodada dzi. Anyigba atso ɖe eŋu.
Job20:28 Mawu ƒe dɔmedzoe alɔ agblemenuku siwo wòxa ɖe aƒeme la adzoe.
Job20:29 Esia nye ame vlo ƒe gome tso Mawu gbɔ. Enye domenyinu si Mawu ɖo ɖi nɛ.” ɛ.”
Job21:1 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu be:
Job21:2 “O
Job21:3 Migbɔ dzi ɖi nam ne maƒo nu
Job21:4 Amegbetɔ nu tsom melea? Nu ka ta nyematsi dzi o? Nu ka ta maɖe dzi ɖi?
Job21:5 Mitrɔ kpɔm ɖa! Miaƒe nu aku
Job21:6 Hm
Job21:7 Nu ka ta ame vɔ̃ɖiwo tsia agbe
Job21:8 Wonɔa agbe
Job21:9 Wonɔa woƒe aƒewo me dedie
Job21:10 Woƒe nyitsu yɔa asi woƒe nyinɔ
Job21:11 Woɖea asi le wo viwo ŋu wodoa go abe alẽha ene
Job21:12 Wodzia ha ɖe gakogoe kple gakasaŋku ŋu
Job21:13 Woƒe ŋkekewo yɔ fũu kple nunyoname
Job21:14 Wogblɔna na Mawu be: ‘Te ɖa le mía gbɔ! Mímedi be míanya naneke le wò mɔwo ŋu o.
Job21:15 Ame kae Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la nye be míasubɔe? Viɖe ka míakpɔ ne míedo gbe ɖa nɛ?’
Job21:16 Kpɔ ɖa
Job21:17 “Ðe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe akaɖi metsina enuenu oa? Ðe dzɔgbevɔ̃e medzɔna ɖe wo dzi oa? Ðe Mawu medoa dziku ɖe wo ŋu
Job21:18 Ðe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo mele abe gbe ƒuƒu si ya lɔna ɖe nu ene oa? Ðe womele abe tsro si ahom kplɔna dzonae ene oa?
Job21:19 Àgblɔ be: ‘Mawu lia kɔ ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe nuvɔ̃wo ɖi na wo viwo.’ Ao! Neɖo eteƒe na woawo ŋutɔ bene woanya ale si wòle.
Job21:20 Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo nekpɔ woawo ŋutɔ ƒe tsɔtsrɔ̃ kple ŋku. Woawo ŋutɔ neno Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ƒe dɔmedzoe helihelĩ la.
Job21:21 Ne woƒe ŋkeke de woku la
Job21:22 Mawu
Job21:23 Ame aɖe ku
Job21:24 Ekpɔ lã me
Job21:25 Ame bubu ya kpe fu geɖe
Job21:26 Ke wo kple eve la siaa mlɔ ke me sɔsɔe
Job21:27 “Kpɔ ɖa
Job21:28 Elabe miebia be: ‘Afi ka amegã ƒe aƒe le? Agbadɔ si me ame vɔ̃ɖi la nɔ la ɖe?’
Job21:29 Ðe miebia nya aɖeke mɔzɔlawo se kpɔ oa? Womegblɔ woƒe nuteƒekpɔkpɔ na mi kpɔ oa?
Job21:30 Womegblɔ be le dzɔgbevɔ̃e gbe la
Job21:31 Ame ka doa dzi gblɔa ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe nu siwo wòwɔna la nɛ
Job21:32 Ne wokɔe yi do gbɔ la
Job21:33 Anyikɔwo vivia enu
Job21:34 Ne ele alea ɖe
Job22:1 Tete Elifaz Temantɔ la ɖo eŋu be:
Job22:2 “Ðe amegbetɔ ate ŋu aɖe vi na Mawua? Le nyateƒe me la
Job22:3 Ne ènye ame dzɔdzɔe la
Job22:4 Wò mawuvɔvɔ̃ ta wòle to hem na wò
Job22:5 Menye wò nuvɔ̃ɖiwoe keke ta
Job22:6 Elabe èxɔ nu awɔbae le nɔviwòwo si dzodzro. Èɖe awu le numanɔsitɔwo ŋu
Job22:7 Mèna tsi ame siwo gbafa ƒo la wono o
Job22:8 Alɔkpa sesẽ tɔe xɔa anyigba
Job22:9 Ènya ahosiwo dzoe asi gbɔlo. Èwɔ nu vevi tsyɔ̃eviwo.
Job22:10 Eya ta èɖo mɔ̀ dziŋɔ me
Job22:11 Wò kekeli do viviti ale be mègale nu kpɔm o. Tsiɖɔɖɔ nyè tsyɔ dziwò.”
Job22:12 “Menye dziƒo ʋĩi ke Mawu le oa? Kpɔ ale si ɣletiviwo gbɔ metsɔ o la ɖa!
Job22:13 Ko nèbe: ‘Nu ka Mawu nya? Ðe wòate ŋu adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu to alilikpo dodowo mea?
Job22:14 Alilikpo do xe eŋkume ale be mele nu kpɔm o. Dziŋgɔli ƒe goawo dzi ke wòle tsatsam le.’
Job22:15 Blemamɔ si dzi ame vɔ̃ɖiwo zɔ la nèbe yeatoa?
Job22:16 Wohe wo dzoe hafi woƒe ɣeyiɣi de
Job22:17 Ame vɔ̃ɖi siawo gblɔ na Mawu be: ‘Te ɖa le mía gbɔ! Nu ka Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la awɔ mí?’
Job22:18 Evɔ wònye etsɔ nu nyuiwo yɔ xɔ na wo taŋ hafi. Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe adaŋudede te ɖa sãa tso gbɔnye.
Job22:19 Ne esia va eme la
Job22:20 gblɔna be: ‘Nyateƒe
Job22:21 “Wɔ ɖeka kple Mawu
Job22:22 Na Mawu nafia nu wò
Job22:23 Ne ètrɔ va Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la gbɔ
Job22:24 ne ètsɔ sika kɔ ɖe ke me
Job22:25 ne Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la nye wò sika kple klosalo xɔasi la
Job22:26 ekema àkpɔ dzidzɔ le Mawu Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ŋu
Job22:27 Ne èdo gbe ɖa nɛ la
Job22:28 Ne èɖo nane be yeawɔ la
Job22:29 Elabe Mawu bɔbɔa dàdalawo ɖe anyi; ke exɔna na ame siwo bɔbɔa wo ɖokui.
Job22:30 Eɖea ame maɖifɔ la; woaɖe wò esi wò asiwo le dzadzɛ ta!”
Job23:1 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu be:
Job23:2 “Egbe hã
Job23:3 Aa! Ne ɖe manya afi si make ɖe eŋu le
Job23:4 Matsɔ nye nyawo aɖo eŋkume
Job23:5 Masrɔ̃ nu tso ale si wòaɖo nya ŋu nam la me
Job23:6 Ðe wòatsɔ eƒe ŋusẽ triakɔ la aʋli nya kplima? Kpao! Aɖo tom boŋ.
Job23:7 Afi ma la
Job23:8 “Kpɔ ɖa
Job23:9 Medii to miame
Job23:10 Ke enya mɔ si dzi mele. Ne edom kpɔ la
Job23:11 Meto eƒe afɔtoƒe tututu; meto eƒe mɔ dzi tẽe. Nye afɔ meda le eƒe mɔ dzi o.
Job23:12 Nyemeda se siwo wòke nu de la dzi o
Job23:13 Ke eya metrɔna o. Ame ka atrɔ eƒe tameɖoɖo? Nu si wòɖo la
Job23:14 Elabe ɖoɖo si wòwɔ nam la
Job23:15 Esia tae vɔvɔ̃ ɖom le eŋkume. Ne mebu eyama ŋu la
Job23:16 Mawu ɖe dzi le ƒonye
Job23:17 Elabe blukɔ ƒo xlãm
Job24:1 “Nu ka ŋuti Ŋusẽkatãtɔ meɖoa ʋɔnudrɔ̃ɣi ɖi o? Nu ka ta ame siwo dze sii la
Job24:2 Amewo trɔa liƒowo. Wodaa dzo amewo
Job24:3 Wofia tsyɔ̃evi ƒe tedzi
Job24:4 Wotua asi ame dahewo ɖa le mɔ dzi
Job24:5 Kpɔ ɖa
Job24:6 Woŋea nu le ame bubu ƒe agble me
Job24:7 Zã me la
Job24:8 Tsi gãwo ƒoa wo le towo dzi tea wo ŋu; wokplana na agakpe elabe beɖoƒe aɖeke meli na wo o.
Job24:9 Amewo li daa adzo
Job24:10 Ame dahewo le yiyim amamae
Job24:11 Wole ami ɖam le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe amiɖaƒe; wole wain fiãm le wainfiãƒe gake tsikɔ le wo wum.
Job24:12 Kudɔƒolawo le ŋeŋem le duwo me; ame siwo ŋu wode abii le ɣli dom be woaxɔ na yewo
Job24:13 “Amewo li
Job24:14 Hlɔ̃dola fɔna hafi fɔŋli naɖo; ewua ame dahe kple hiãtɔ. Le zã me la
Job24:15 Ŋutsu ahasitɔ le mɔ kpɔm be zã nedo
Job24:16 Wodzea zã ɖe aƒewo ŋu. Ŋkeke me la
Job24:17 viviti tsiɖitsiɖi le na wo abe agudzedze ene
Job24:18 “Ègblɔ be: ‘Ame vɔ̃ɖi la ɖi aɖa fefee si le du dzi le tɔ ŋgɔ. Woƒo fi de etɔ gome le anyigba dzi
Job24:19 Abe ale si kuɖiɖi kple dzoxɔxɔ noa tsikpe kabae ene la
Job24:20 Woŋlɔ wo be le kpɔdomeewo le dua me
Job24:21 Ame siawo nɔa agbe ɖe konɔwo dzi
Job24:22 Ke Mawu didia ŋusẽtɔ la ƒe agbe ɖe edzi
Job24:23 Enana be wonɔna dedie
Job24:24 Wodoa wo ɖe dzi vie ko
Job24:25 Ne mele alea o la
Job25:1 Tete Bildad Suaxtɔ la ɖo eŋu be:
Job25:2 “Dziɖuɖu kple vɔvɔ̃ nye Mawu tɔ
Job25:3 Ame kae ate ŋu axlẽ eƒe aʋakɔwo? Ðe eƒe kekeli meklẽna ɖe ame sia ame dzi oa?
Job25:4 Ke ale ke wɔ amegbetɔ ƒe nya adzɔ le Mawu gbɔ? Ale ke wɔ nyɔnu tɔ dzidzia adza?
Job25:5 Kpɔ ɖa
Job25:6 Ko ame
Job26:1 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu be:
Job26:2 “Èkpe ɖe nye
Job26:3 Aɖaŋu pɛ nye esia nèɖo na nye
Job26:4 Wò kple ame ka ƒe nya nègblɔ
Job26:5 Aʋlimetɔwo le dzodzom nyànyanya le tometsiwo kple wo me nuwo te.
Job26:6 Woklo nu le ketu me dzi
Job26:7 Eyae keke dziŋgɔli me ɖe ya me le dzigbeme eye metsi anyigba ɖe naneke ŋu o.
Job26:8 Eya kee blaa tsiwo ɖe eƒe alilikpowo me
Job26:9 Exea ɣleti ŋkume kple alilikpo
Job26:10 Eɖe liƒowo ɖe atsiaƒu dzi godoo va se ɖe kekeli kple viviti ƒe godoƒe.
Job26:11 Enyra
Job26:12 Eƒe ŋusẽ na ƒu dzeagbo zi ɖoɖoe
Job26:13 Eɖo ƒuƒu dziŋgɔli me kɔ̀. Etsɔ eƒe asi tɔ nu da vɔ̃ɖi si le sisím la.
Job26:14 Kpɔ ɖa
Job27:1 Azɔ Hiob yi eƒe nya dzi be:
Job27:2 “Metà Mawu
Job27:3 Zi ale si mele gbɔgbɔm
Job27:4 ne busunya ado tso nunye alo make nu aka aʋatso fĩi.
Job27:5 Nyematso afia na mi akpɔ gbeɖe o. Nyemagbe nuteƒewɔwɔ va se ɖe nye kugbe o.
Job27:6 Nu dzɔdzɔe ko mawɔ ɖaa; nyemadzudzɔ gbeɖe o. Nye dzitsinya mebu fɔ nye agbenɔŋkeke ɖeka pɛ hã kpɔ o.”
Job27:7 “Na be nye futɔ nakpɔ ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe gome
Job27:8 Mɔkpɔkpɔ aɖe li na ame mavɔ̃mawu ne Mawu tso eƒe ta
Job27:9 Ðe Mawu ase eƒe ɣli ne exaxaa?
Job27:10 Ðe wòakpɔ dzidzɔ le Ŋusẽkatãtɔ ŋua? Ðe wòayɔ Mawu ɣe sia ɣia?
Job27:11 Mafia nu mi le Mawu ƒe ŋusẽ ŋu
Job27:12 Kpɔ ɖa
Job27:13 “Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe gome tso Mawu gbɔ kple ameteɖeanyilawo ƒe domenyinu si woxɔna tso Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la gbɔ la woe nye esi:
Job27:14 Ne wodzi vi sɔ gbɔ la
Job27:15 Dɔ vɔ̃ ade via mamlɛawo yɔ me
Job27:16 Ne ame vɔ̃ɖi li kɔ klosalo ɖi abe ʋuʋudedi ene
Job27:17 ewɔe dzodzro. Ame dzɔdzɔe ata wo
Job27:18 Xɔ si wòtu le abe yiyiɖɔ ene
Job27:19 Kesinɔtɔe wònye mlɔ anyi; ke emlɔe vɔ. Enyɔ
Job27:20 Ŋɔdzi akplɔe dzoe abe tsiɖɔɖɔ ene
Job27:21 Ɣedzeƒeya ɖo ete kɔe yii
Job27:22 Ya la lũ ɖe edzi nublanuimakpɔtɔe. Esí le eƒe ŋusẽ nu hetu ta ŋgɔ tẽe.
Job27:23 Eƒo akpe ɖe eta
Job28:1 “Klosalokuƒe li baa
Job28:2 To mee wokua ga yibɔ tsonɛ
Job28:3 Amegbetɔwo ɖoa seƒe na viviti; wodea teƒe goglotɔwo ke ɖadia gakpe ɣaɣla le to me
Job28:4 Eɖe dowo ɖe baliwo me le adzɔge le amemanɔƒe
Job28:5 Anyigba ya la
Job28:6 Tomekpewo me safirkpe xɔasi le; woawo mee sikawɔ nɔna.”
Job28:7 “Xe ƒonu aɖeke menya tomenukuƒemɔ sia o
Job28:8 Lã wɔadã ƒe afɔ meka edzi kpɔ o; dzata hã meto afi ma kpɔ o.”
Job28:9 “Gake amegbetɔ ya tsona ɖe kpetsu sesẽtɔ ŋu hegbãnɛ
Job28:10 Eɖea toƒe ɖe agakpewo to me
Job28:11 Ekua do ɖadona ɖe to me tɔsisiwo ƒe dzɔtsoƒe ke
Job28:12 “Ke nunya la
Job28:13 Amegbetɔ menya egbɔ mɔ o
Job28:14 Agume be: ‘Mele menye o
Job28:15 Womate ŋu ana sika nyuitɔ ɖe eta o
Job28:16 Ofir-sika loo
Job28:17 Sika alo kristalohuhɔ̃e mede enu o. Womate ŋu atsɔ sikanu nyuitɔwo aɖɔlii o.
Job28:18 Womaxa yi soe kple gbloti ŋkɔ yɔ ge ɖe eŋu o. Nunya nɔ ame si nyo wu adzagba.
Job28:19 Topas-kpe tso Nubia mede enu o
Job28:20 “Ekem afi ka nunya dzɔ tso? Afi kae nye gɔmesese ƒe nɔƒe?
Job28:21 Ele ɣaɣla ɖe agbagbeawo katã ƒe ŋkuwo
Job28:22 Nugblẽla kple Ku be
Job28:23 “Mawue dze si egbɔ mɔ
Job28:24 Elabe eyae kpɔa anyigba ƒe seƒe ke
Job28:25 Esime wòna kpekpeme yaƒoƒo
Job28:26 esime wòɖo seƒe na tsidzadza kple toƒe na dzikedzo la
Job28:27 ɣe ma ɣie wòkpɔe
Job28:28 Tete wògblɔ na amegbetɔƒomea be: ‘Kpɔ ɖa
Job29:1 Hiob yi eƒe nuƒoa dzi be:
Job29:2 “O
Job29:3 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Job29:4 Menɔ ame me
Job29:5 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Job29:6 Notsi tòto meɖi nu le gbɔnye o; eyae klɔa nye afɔtoƒe. Ami dzina bababa tso agakpe me nam.
Job29:7 Ne medo ɖe dutakpeƒe heɖo nye zikpui anyi gli
Job29:8 eye ɖekakpuiwo kpɔm la
Job29:9 Dumegãwo dzudzɔa nuƒoƒo heɖoa asi nu.
Job29:10 Gbɔgblɔ buna ɖe bubumewo
Job29:11 To siwo se nye nuƒo la
Job29:12 Elabe mexɔna na ame dahe si do ɣli bia kpekpeɖeŋu kple tsyɔ̃evi si tsi asi la.
Job29:13 Ame si nɔ ku kple agbe dome la
Job29:14 Dzɔdzɔenyenye nye awu
Job29:15 Mezu ŋku na ŋkuagbãtɔ kple afɔ na tekunɔ.
Job29:16 Tɔ́ menye na ame dahewo
Job29:17 Mefea glã na nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔla
Job29:18 Megblɔ na ɖokuinye be: ‘Manɔ agbe atsi
Job29:19 Menɔ abe tɔtoti ene
Job29:20 Bubu nɔ ŋunye ɖaa
Job29:21 Amewo léa to ɖe ŋunye; wodzɔa nye asi nu
Job29:22 Ne meƒo nu vɔ la
Job29:23 Wokpɔa mɔ nam abe tsidzadza lalam wole ene eye wokea nu ɖe te abe adatsi gbãtɔe dza ene.
Job29:24 Ne dzi ɖe le wo ƒo la
Job29:25 Nyee tia mɔ na wo; menye woƒe tatɔ
Job30:1 “Ke egbe la
Job30:2 Viɖe ka makpɔ le woƒe alɔka me? Ŋusẽ vɔ le wo ŋu keŋ.
Job30:3 Hiã kple dɔwuame na agbe vɔ le wo ŋu. Ame siawo kukoa anyigba ƒuƒu si nye gbegbe kple amemanɔƒe la.
Job30:4 Wokéa aŋɔto le gbeto
Job30:5 Ame siawo la
Job30:6 Ele be woanɔ tɔsisi ŋu
Job30:7 Woxlɔ̃na le avekɔewo me
Job30:8 Bometsilawo
Job30:9 “Azɔ ame siawo viwoe kpa ha dem le dzidzim! Mezu hamelo na wo.
Job30:10 Mele ŋu nyɔm na wo; wote ɖe megbe tso ŋunye
Job30:11 Esi Mawu gbɔdzɔ nye dati ƒe ka me
Job30:12 Yakamewo to nye ɖusime tutum ƒu anyi
Job30:13 Woxe mɔ nam
Job30:14 Woto gbagbãƒe lũ ɖe dzinye
Job30:15 Ŋɔdzi lém. Woti nye bubu yome abe yaƒoƒo ene
Job30:16 “Evɔ nam azɔ; medɔ̃! Fukpekpe ɖi kpem!
Job30:17 Zã le nu tɔm nye ƒuwo tome eye vevesese le kukoyem madzudzɔmadzudzɔe.
Job30:18 Elé awu ɖe ŋunye sesĩe eye wòmia dziwui ɖe ve nam.
Job30:19 Mawu tsɔm xlã ɖe ba me; mezu ke kple dzowɔ.
Job30:20 Medo ɣli yɔ wò; metɔna nam o. Metso tsi tsitre ɖi
Job30:21 Ètrɔ zu ŋutasẽla ɖe ŋunye
Job30:22 Èlém ɖe ya nu
Job30:23 Menya nyuie be àkplɔm ayi kuwode kple aƒe si wotia na agbagbeawo katã la me.”
Job30:24 “Ne ame le to yim la
Job30:25 Ðe nyemefa avi ɖe ame si ɖo ɣeyiɣi sesẽ me la ŋu kpɔ oa? Ðe nyemexa nu ɖe ame si hiã tu ŋu kpɔ oa?
Job30:26 Ke esi mekpɔ mɔ na dzɔgbe nyui la
Job30:27 Nye dzi le tsotsom madzudzɔmadzudzɔe. Fukpeŋkekewo ƒo ɖe dzinye.
Job30:28 Mele zɔzɔm le viviti me
Job30:29 Mezu akpataku nɔvi kple tsatsaboli hati le konyifaɣli dom.
Job30:30 Nye ŋutigbalẽ nyɔ vìi hele fofom; nye lã me dze dzo ʋuu
Job30:31 Nye gakasaŋku le konyifagbe dom
Job31:1 “Mebla nu kple nye ŋku. Ale ke wɔ magatsɔ ahiãŋku anɔ ɖetugbi kpɔmee?
Job31:2 Nu kae ate ŋu anye nye gome tso Mawu le dzi? Nu kae ate ŋu anye nye domenyinu tso Ŋusẽkatãtɔ si le dziƒo ʋĩi la gbɔ?
Job31:3 Menye nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔlae tsrɔ̃na
Job31:4 Ðe Mawu mele nye agbenɔnɔ kpɔm oa? Ðe meléa ŋku ɖe nye afɔɖeɖe ɖe sia ɖe ŋu oa?
Job31:5 Ne menɔ agbe alakpatɔe
Job31:6 mina woadam le nudanu nyuitɔ dzi
Job31:7 Ne medze ɖa le mɔa dzi nye ŋkuwo kplɔ nye dzi trae
Job31:8 ekema ne maƒã nu la
Job31:9 “Ne nye dzi trɔ ɖe nyɔnu ŋu
Job31:10 srɔ̃nye netu wɔ na ame tutɔ
Job31:11 Elabe nu sia nye ŋukpenanu gã
Job31:12 Ẽ
Job31:13 “Ne nye dɔlaŋutsu alo dɔlanyɔnu ƒo koko nam
Job31:14 nu ka mawɔ ne Mawu tso? Ne edzro nya la me kpɔ la
Job31:15 Ðe menye ame si wɔm ɖe dɔ me la kee wɔ eya hã oa? Ðe menye ame ɖekae me mí ɖe vidzidɔ me oa?”
Job31:16 “Ðe ame dahe aɖe bia num
Job31:17 Ðe nye ɖeɖe meka nu ɖu kpɔ
Job31:18 Elabe nyee nye tɔ́ nɛ tso eƒe ɖevime ke
Job31:19 Ne mekpɔ kotɔ wòle kukum
Job31:20 ɖe nye alẽwo ƒe fuwu medea dzo lã me nɛ
Job31:21 Ne medo asi ɖe mo na tsyɔ̃evi elabe ame ade dzinye le ʋɔnu la
Job31:22 ekema nye abɔgba netra le nye abɔta
Job31:23 Nu si ta mewɔ esiawo lae nye be mevɔ̃ Mawu ƒe tohehe dziŋɔ la
Job31:24 “Nyemeɖo dzi ɖe sika ŋu
Job31:25 Nyemeda ɖe nye kesinɔnuwo dzi kpɔ alo be metsɔ asi wɔ dɔ kpɔ nu geɖe o.
Job31:26 Nyemesubɔ ɣe kple eƒe keklẽ alo dzinu kple eƒe nyonyo kpɔ o.
Job31:27 Ame aɖeke meblem megbugbɔ asi ɖo ɖe wo kpɔ o.
Job31:28 Ne mewɔ esiawo ƒe ɖe la
Job31:29 “Ðe metso aseye esime nye futɔ dome gblẽ alo dzɔ dzi ne vɔ̃ dzɔ ɖe edzia?
Job31:30 Kpao! Nyemewɔ nuvɔ̃ ke nu
Job31:31 Ðe aƒenye me tɔwo mebiana be: ‘Ame kae li si mekpɔ nu ɖu kpɔ o?’
Job31:32 Amedzro metsi xexe dɔ kpɔ le gbɔnye o; mexɔ mɔzɔla ɖe aƒenye me ɣe sia ɣi.
Job31:33 Nyemetsyɔ nu nye dzidadawo dzi abe amegbetɔ ene o
Job31:34 Elabe dzidzi ƒoam le ameha gãwo ŋkume
Job31:35 O
Job31:36 Nyateƒe
Job31:37 Magblɔ nu sia nu si mewɔ la nɛ. Mazɔ abe amegã ene ayi egbɔ.
Job31:38 Ne nye agble le ɣli dom ɖe tanye
Job31:39 ne meɖu agblea me nuku aɖe femaxee
Job31:40 ŋu nemie ɖe lu teƒe
Job32:1 Ale ŋutsu etɔ̃awo dzudzɔ nya ŋu ɖoɖo na Hiob
Job32:2 Tete Elihu do dziku be Hiob bu eɖokui ame dzɔdzɔe wu Mawu. Elihu nye Baraxel vi
Job32:3 Edo dziku ɖe Hiob xɔlɔ̃ etɔ̃awo hã ŋu
Job32:4 Elihu ye nye ɖevitɔ. Ke Elihu tsɔ eƒe nyawo le Hiob dzɔmee elabe ame kemɛawo tsi wui.
Job32:5 Esi ame etɔ̃awo mete ŋu ɖo Hiob ƒe nyaawo ŋu nɛ o la
Job32:6 Elihu
Job32:7 Megblɔ na ɖokuinye be: ‘Tsitsiawo neƒo nu gbɔ; ƒè geɖee xɔlae fiaa nunya ame.’
Job32:8 Gake Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ƒe gbɔgbɔ si le amegbetɔ me lae naa gɔmesese.
Job32:9 Nunya mele tsitsime o
Job32:10 Eya ta mebe: ‘Miɖo tom; mina nye hã maɖe nye nunya afia.’ ”
Job32:11 “Kpɔ ɖa
Job32:12 Melé to ɖe miaƒe nyaawo ŋu tsitotsito
Job32:13 Ðeko migagblɔ be: ‘Míedo go nunya; eglo mí. Eya kple Mawu koe akpla’ o.
Job32:14 Menye gbɔnyee wòdo eƒe nya ɖo o
Job32:15 “Eglo wo. Womete ŋu le nya ŋu ɖom o; gbɔgblɔ bu ɖe wo.
Job32:16 Ko nyea manɔ anyi ɖi
Job32:17 Nye hã maɖo tɔnye nua ŋu
Job32:18 Nya le asinye kpaŋkpaŋ magblɔ; medo dzi ʋuu wòglo.
Job32:19 Mezu lãgbalẽgolo yeye si wain yɔ taŋ
Job32:20 Maƒo nu
Job32:21 Nyemade ame aɖeke dzi o
Job32:22 Elabe nyemenya ale si wovivia nu mee o; anye ne nye Wɔla aɖem ɖa kpuie.”
Job33:1 “Hiob
Job33:2 Kpɔ ɖa
Job33:3 Nye nyawo tso dzi dzadzɛ me

Job33:5 Ne ele ŋuwò la
Job33:6 Kpɔ ɖa

Job33:21 Eɖia ku; lã vɔna le eŋu keŋ
Job33:22 Ale eƒe agbe gogoa yɔdo
Job33:23 Ke ne dɔla akpeakpeawo dome ame ɖeka
Job33:24 eye wòve enu gblɔ be: ‘Ðee! Mègana wòayi kuwode o. Mekpɔ etafe axe. Ɖe asi le eŋu.
Job33:25 Na wòakpɔ lã me; ŋusẽ nagaɖo eŋu
Job33:26 ekema dɔnɔa ado gbe ɖa na Mawu. Mawu axɔe. Ava eŋkume kple dzidzɔ

Job33:31 Hiob

Job33:33 Gake ne meli o la
Job34:1 Tete Elihu yi eƒe nuƒoa dzi be:
Job34:2 “Mi nunyalawo
Job34:3 elabe to sea nyakpɔna abe ale si veme ɖɔa nuɖuɖu kpɔe ene.
Job34:4 Mina míatia nu dzɔdzɔetɔ na mía ɖokui
Job34:5 Elabe Hiob be: ‘Tɔnye dzɔ
Job34:6 Togbɔ be tɔnye dzɔ hã la
Job34:7 Ame kae le abe Hiob ene? Edoa ɖiŋu na ame abe ale si wonoa tsii ene.
Job34:8 Edea ha kple ame vlowo
Job34:9 Elabe egblɔ be: ‘Viɖe mele xɔlɔ̃dzedze Mawu me o.’ ”
Job34:10 “Eya ta
Job34:11 Boŋ la
Job34:12 Nyateƒe
Job34:13 Ame kae tsɔ anyigba de asi nɛ? Ame kae ɖo xexeme blibo la gɔme anyi?
Job34:14 Ne wòbe yeatrɔ axɔ yeƒe gbɔgbɔ
Job34:15 nu gbagbewo katã atsrɔ̃
Job34:16 “Ne èsea nu gɔme la
Job34:17 Ðe ame si lé fu nya dzɔdzɔe la
Job34:18 Eyae gblɔna na fia be: ‘Yakame!’
Job34:19 Gawu la
Job34:20 Wokuna kpata. Le zã titina la
Job34:21 “Elabe Mawu ƒe ŋku le amegbetɔ ƒe mɔwo ŋu
Job34:22 Viviti tsiɖitsiɖi alo blukɔ aɖeke meli si me vɔ̃wɔla abè ɖo o.
Job34:23 Mawu meɖoa ŋkeke na amegbetɔ be wòava ʋɔnu le ye ŋkume o.
Job34:24 Egbãa ŋusẽtɔwo gudugudu nya gɔme makumakui
Job34:25 Esi wònya woƒe nuwɔnawo ta la
Job34:26 Woƒe nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ta eƒoa wo le dutoƒo;
Job34:27 elabe wode megbe le eŋu
Job34:28 Ale wonana be ame dahewo ƒe ɣlidodo dea egbɔ
Job34:29 Ne ezi kpoo la
Job34:30 Ewɔ esia bene mawumavɔ̃lawo alo ame siwo trea mɔ̀ na ame la
Job34:31 “Ne ame aɖe agblɔ na Mawu be: ‘Tohehea té ŋunye
Job34:32 Nu si kpɔm nyemele o la
Job34:33 le wò
Job34:34 Nugɔmesela kple nunyala siwo le to ɖomem la agblɔ be:
Job34:35 ‘Hiob menya nu si gblɔm wòle o. Susu mele eƒe nyawo me o.’
Job34:36 Ðe wòle be woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu Hiob tsitotsito aɖase eseƒe hafi elabe eƒe ŋuɖoɖowo le abe vɔ̃wɔla tɔ ene.
Job34:37 Elabe etsɔ aglãdzedze kpe ɖe eƒe nuvɔ̃wo ŋu. Ele asi kpoloe ƒom
Job35:1 Elihu gblɔ yi edzi be:
Job35:2 “Ðe nèbu be esɔ be yeagblɔ be: ‘Tɔnye dzɔ wu Mawu tɔ’ mahã?

Job35:4 Maɖo eŋu na wò kple xɔ̃wòawo!
Job35:5 Fɔ mo dzi nàkpɔ dziŋgɔli ɖa! Lé ŋku ɖe alilikpowo ŋu. Wole dzi ʋĩi tso gbɔwò.
Job35:6 Ne èwɔ nuvɔ̃ la
Job35:7 Ne èwɔ nu dzɔdzɔe la
Job35:8 Nunana ka wòxɔ tso asiwò me? Ne èwɔ vɔ̃ o
Job35:9 “Le ameteɖeanyi gbogboawo ta amewo doa ɣli. Wodoa boboe ɖe dziɖula ŋutasẽla ta.

Job35:13 Le nyateƒe me la

Job35:15 Ke azɔ la
Job35:16 Hiob ke nu le nya ƒuƒluwo gblɔm ko. Nunya aɖeke mele wo me o.”
Job36:1 Elihu yi eƒe nuƒoa dzi be:
Job36:2 “Gbɔ dzi ɖi nam vie ne mafia nu wò elabe nya gali magblɔ ɖe Mawu nu.
Job36:3 Mahe nye nunya tso didiƒe ke vɛ afia be nye Wɔla tɔ dzɔ.
Job36:4 Elabe nyateƒe
Job36:5 “Kpɔ ɖa
Job36:6 Menana be ame vɔ̃ɖiwo tsia agbe o
Job36:7 Eléa be na ame dzɔdzɔewo. Edea bubu wo ŋu
Job36:8 Ne wode kunyowu wo
Job36:9 Mawu ɖea woƒe nɔnɔme kple nuvɔ̃ si wowɔ la fiaa wo
Job36:10 Enana be woɖoa to eƒe nuxɔxlɔ̃ hã
Job36:11 Ne woɖo toe
Job36:12 Gake ne womeɖo to o la
Job36:13 Ke ame mavɔ̃mawuwo la
Job36:14 Wokuna le ɖekakpuime
Job36:15 Mawu tsɔa fukpekpe ɖea fukpelawoe
Job36:16 Mawu aɖe wò tso xaxa me ava gbadzaƒe
Job36:17 “Ke ŋutasẽla ƒe nyametsotso yɔ tame na wò ale gbegbe be fɔbubu kple tohehe va dziwò.
Job36:18 Ke kpɔ nyuie be dɔmedzoe nagakplɔ wò de fewuɖuɖu me o
Job36:19 Ðe wò ɣlidodo ate ŋu aɖe wò tso xaxa me
Job36:20 Zã si me woatsrɔ̃ dukɔwo ɖa keŋkeŋ la
Job36:21 Kpɔ ɖokuiwò dzi nyuie! Mègatrɔ ɖe nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ŋu o
Job36:22 Kpɔ ɖa
Job36:23 Ame kae ɖo nu na Mawu be newɔ? Alo ame ka ate ŋu agblɔ na Mawu be: ‘Èwɔ nu gbegblẽ’?”
Job36:24 “Amewo dzia ha kafua nu siwo wòwɔ la. Wò hã ɖo ŋku edzi nàdo wo ɖe dzi.
Job36:25 Amegbetɔwo katã kpɔ nu siwo Mawu wɔ la
Job36:26 Kpɔ ɖa
Job36:27 Eyae hea tsi toŋtoŋwo yia dzii
Job36:28 Enana be alilikpowo ɖuɖua tsi yoo ɖe amegbetɔwo dzi.
Job36:29 Ðe ame aɖe nya ale si wòkekea alilikpowo me kple ale si eƒe dziɖegbegbadɔ ɖea gbe gbrrr… laa?
Job36:30 Kpɔ ɖa
Job36:31 Esiawo katã Mawu tsɔna drɔ̃a ʋɔnu dukɔwo eye wòtsɔna naa nuɖuɖu geɖe amegbetɔwo hãe.
Job36:32 Etsɔ dzikedzo tsyɔ asi
Job36:33 Eƒe gbeɖeɖe ɖea gbeƒã eƒe vava. Etsɔa dziku ʋãa ŋu vɔ̃wɔwɔ.”
Job37:1 “Esia na nye dzi lã kpo
Job37:2 Aléle! Mise Mawu ƒe gbeɖeɖe ɖa! Mise ale si wòle bublum la ɖa.
Job37:3 Eɖea asi le dzikedzo ŋu ɖona ɖe dziƒo bliboa te
Job37:4 Eyome Mawu ƒe gbe ɖina sesĩe. Ebluna kple eƒe fiagbe la
Job37:5 Mawu bluna nukutɔe. Ewɔa nu gãwo siwo gɔme míesena o.
Job37:6 Eɖe gbe na tsikpe be: ‘Dza ɖe anyigba dzi!’
Job37:7 Enana be amewo dea asi asitɛ me ɖi
Job37:8 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Job37:9 Yali dona tso eƒe xɔgãme
Job37:10 Mawu ƒe ƒuƒue nana be tsi blana
Job37:11 Mawu tsɔa tsi doa agba na alilikpo
Job37:12 Etrɔna ƒoa xlã godoo le eƒe kpɔkplɔ te
Job37:13 Enana be esia vaa eme
Job37:14 “Hiob
Job37:15 Ènya ale si Mawu ɖea gbe na eƒe alilikpowo
Job37:16 Ðe nènya ale si alilikpowo wɔna saa agba le ya me
Job37:17 Wò ame si ne anyigbemeya na xexeme lé ya keŋ
Job37:18 ɖe nàte ŋu ahe dziŋgɔli me dranyii
Job37:19 To nya si míagblɔ na Mawu la na mí! Míenya nya aɖeke agblɔ o; míaƒe susu me do viviti.
Job37:20 Ðee woaɖagblɔ nɛ be medi be maƒo nua? Ne ame aɖe katsa ƒo nu la
Job37:21 Ne ya ƒo alilikpowo ɖa la
Job37:22 Sikatsyɔ̃ tso dzigbeme gbɔna; fianyenye dziŋɔ le Mawu ŋu.
Job37:23 Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la
Job37:24 Eya ta
Job38:1 Tete Aƒetɔ ɖo eŋu na Hiob azɔ le yali me.
Job38:2 “Ame kae nye esi tsɔ nuƒo si me nunya mele o la le adaŋudede tɔtɔm ale?
Job38:3 Tso nàsa avɔ ɖe ali abe ŋutsu ene
Job38:4 “Afi ka nènɔ hafi meɖo xexeme gɔme anyi? Èbe nunyala yenye ɖe! Gblɔe mase.
Job38:5 Ame kae ɖo eƒe dzidzemewo? Ame kae da dzidzeka ɖe eŋu? Ènya ɖe!
Job38:6 Nu ka dzi woɖo xexeme gɔme anyi ɖo
Job38:7 Gbe ma gbe ŋdi
Job38:8 Alo ame kae tú ʋɔ ɖe atsiaƒu nu esime wòdo ʋlo tso vidzidɔme;
Job38:9 esi mewɔ alilikpowo tsyɔ nɛ
Job38:10 Meɖo seɖoƒewo nɛ
Job38:11 eye megblɔ nɛ be: ‘Afii nàva se; mèkpɔ mɔ agbɔ eme o. Afii wò ƒutsotsoe dàdala mawo atɔ ɖo.’ ”
Job38:12 “Wodzi wò kpa èɖe gbe na ŋu kpɔ be nekea? Èfia agudzedze ƒe nɔƒee kpɔ
Job38:13 be nedze tso anyigba toga
Job38:14 Ne ŋu le kekem la
Job38:15 Woxɔ ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe ‘kekeli
Job38:16 “Ðe nède afi si atsiaƒu me tsi dzɔ tso la kpɔ loo
Job38:17 Woʋu ku ƒe agbowo fia wò kpɔa? Èkpɔ viviti tsiɖitsiɖi ƒe agbowo kpɔa?
Job38:18 Èse anyigba ƒe kekeme gɔmea? Ne ènya nu siawo katã ko
Job38:19 Kekeli ƒe aƒememɔ ɖe? Ènya viviti nɔƒea?
Job38:20 Màkplɔ wo ayi woƒe nɔƒe oa? Maɖanya woƒe aƒememɔ oa?
Job38:21 Kò! Ènyae! Ènyae la! Elabe wodzi wò ɣe ma ɣiwo ke xoxo! Menye egbevi nènye o ɖe!”
Job38:22 Ède ava siwo me medzra tsikpe ɖo la me kpɔa? Èkpɔ xɔ siwo me medzra dzikpe ɖo la me kpɔa?
Job38:23 Èɖakpɔ tsikpe kple dzikpe siwo meli kɔ ɖi ɖe xaxaɣi
Job38:24 Mɔ ka kekeli tona dona
Job38:25 Ame kae dze mɔ na tsidzadza gãwo
Job38:26 be wòahe tsidzadza va xexeme ƒe akpa si gbetɔ mele o
Job38:27 ne tsi naté anyigba si ɖi ƒuƒlu
Job38:28 Ðe tɔ́ li na tsidzadzaa? Ame kae dzi zãmu ƒe gegeawo?
Job38:29 Ame ka ƒe vidzidɔ mee tsikpe do tso
Job38:30 Tsiwo lia abe kpe ene
Job38:31 “Àte ŋu asa atifieŋuwo ƒe ka
Job38:32 Àte ŋu akplɔ ŋukeɣletiviwo do goea? Alo afia mɔ koklovinɔ kple viawoa?
Job38:33 Ènya dziƒowo ƒe sewoa? Àte ŋu ana se siawo nakpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe anyigba hã dzia?
Job38:34 Àte ŋu aɖe gbe na alilikpowo be tsidzadza nedudu tsyɔ ye dzia?
Job38:35 Àte ŋu adɔ dzikedzowo ɖe dɔgbe
Job38:36 Ame kae tsɔ nunya de ame ƒe ememe ke
Job38:37 Ame kae nya nu kakaka
Job38:38 ale be ʋuʋudedi nazu ba
Job38:39 “Ɖe nàte ŋu ada ade na dzata alo ana be dzataviwo naɖi ƒo
Job38:40 ne wotsyɔ akɔ anyi ɖe wo nɔƒe
Job38:41 Ame kae dia nuɖuɖu na akpavia ne dɔ le viawo wum
Job39:1 “Ènya agamegbɔ̃ewo ƒe vidziɣia?
Job39:2 Àte ŋu xlẽ ɣleti si nu fu nɔa wo ƒoa? Ènya ɣe si ɣi wodzia via?
Job39:3 Ènya ɣe si ɣi wodzea klo
Job39:4 Ŋusẽ ɖoa wo viawo ŋu
Job39:5 “Ame kae na ablɔɖe gbetedzi be neyi afi si wòlɔ̃? Ame kae tu ka gbetedzi afɔɖablɛ
Job39:6 si metsɔ gbegbe na be wòanye eƒeme eye metsɔ dzeteƒe na be wòanye enɔƒe la?
Job39:7 Hoowɔwɔ si le du gã me ɖia kokoe nɛ; mesea ekplɔla ƒe ɣlidodo aɖeke o.
Job39:8 Eƒe gbeɖuƒe nye towo dzi afi siwo wòtsana le la
Job39:9 “Tò lɔ̃ be yeasubɔ wòa? Atsi wò lãkpo me adɔa?
Job39:10 Àte ŋu ade kae ɖe agbleŋlɔmɔ̀ ŋu alo ana wòanɔ anyigba gudum le yowòme le baliwo mea?
Job39:11 Ðe nàɖo ŋu ɖe eŋu
Job39:12 Ðe nàɖo dzi ɖe eŋu wòatrɔ aɖatsɔ wò agblemenukuwo ava wò nukugbɔƒe na wòa?”
Job39:13 “Tsatsaboli nɔ ƒoa eƒe aʋala kpakpakpa gake lɔlɔ̃ mele eƒe aʋalawo me na viawo o
Job39:14 elabe eɖaa azi ɖe anyigba be ke dzodzo naƒo wo.
Job39:15 Eŋlɔ be be ame aɖo afɔ wo dzi alo gbemelã aɖe azɔ wo dzi.
Job39:16 Esẽa ŋuta le viawo ŋu abe menye etɔwo wonye o ene. Ne eƒe agbagbadzedze zu dzodzro hã la
Job39:17 Elabe Mawu na wòŋlɔ nunya be
Job39:18 Gake ne ekɔ aʋala ɖe dzi la
Job39:19 “Wòe na ŋusẽ sɔa? Wòe tsɔ kɔdza ɖo atsyɔ̃ nɛa?
Job39:20 Wòe na wòtia kpo abe ʋetsuvi enea? Ne eʋlũ ŋɔti me nèse la
Job39:21 Etsɔa afɔ kaa anyigba kple ŋusẽ
Job39:22 Edoa vlo vɔvɔ̃
Job39:23 Daku
Job39:24 Edze agbo le du dzi hele anyigba kam do ɖe megbe kple adã; esi kpẽ nya ɖi ko la
Job39:25 Ne aʋakpẽa ɖi la
Job39:26 “Wò nunyae naa aʋako saa agba yia dzi ʋĩi
Job39:27 Wòe ɖea gbe na hɔ̃ hafi wòdzòna yia dzi ʋĩi ɖawɔa atɔ ɖe kɔkɔƒe kea?
Job39:28 Agakpewo dzie wònɔna
Job39:29 Afi ma ke wònɔna tsoa ŋku na eƒe nuɖuɖu. Ekpɔa nu le didiƒe ke.
Job39:30 Ʋu viawo nona. Ẽ
Job40:1 Azɔ Aƒetɔ gabia Hiob be:
Job40:2 “Ðe vɔ̃eɖenamela ahe nya kple Ŋusẽkatãtɔ laa? Ame si be yeaʋli nya kple Mawu la
Job40:3 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu na Aƒetɔ be:
Job40:4 “Kpɔ ɖa
Job40:5 Meƒo nu zi ɖeka va yi; ke zi evelia ya nyemele nya aɖeke ŋu ɖo ge o.”
Job40:6 Tete Aƒetɔ ɖo eŋu na Hiob le yali me be:
Job40:7 “Sa avɔ ɖe ali abe ŋutsu ene
Job40:8 Ðe nèbe yeatrɔ nye nyametsotso
Job40:9 Ŋusẽ le asiwò abe Mawu enea? Àte ŋu aɖe gbe abe eya enea?
Job40:10 Ekema tsɔ gãnyenye kple bubu
Job40:11 Trɔ wò dziku kɔ ɖe anyi duu. Ẽ
Job40:12 Lé ŋku ɖe dàdalawo dzi; te wo ɖe anyi. Tu afɔ ame vɔ̃ɖiwo dzi le woƒe teƒe.
Job40:13 Ði wo katã ɖe ke me; bla mo na wo ɖe blukɔ me.
Job40:14 Ekema nye hã maʋu eme na wò be wò ŋutɔ wò ŋusẽe ate ŋu axɔ wò ɖe agbea?”
Job40:15 “Kpɔ Behemot si mewɔ abe ale si mewɔ wò hãe la ene ɖa. Eɖua gbe abe nyitsu ene.
Job40:16 Kpɔ ɖa
Job40:17 Elĩa eƒe asikɛ ɖe dzi ka abe sederti ene
Job40:18 Eƒe ƒuwo le abe akɔbli siwo me to le la ene; ẽ
Job40:19 “Eyae nye gbãtɔ le Mawu ƒe nuwɔwɔ gãtɔwo dome
Job40:20 Ekpɔa eƒe nuɖuɖu bɔbɔe le towo dzi
Job40:21 Egbɔna ɖe eme le tɔŋgɔtrefewo te
Job40:22 Aguŋgbawo doa vɔvɔli nɛ
Job40:23 Kpɔ ɖa
Job40:24 Ðe ame aɖe ate ŋu alée kple ƒè alo aƒo ka ɖe ŋɔti me nɛa?”
Job41:1 “Ðe nàte ŋu atsɔ ƒè aɖe lo
Job41:2 Ðe nàte ŋu ade ka ŋɔti me nɛ
Job41:3 Ðe wòaƒo koko na wò ʋuu eye wòaƒo nu na wò kple gbe bɔbɔea?
Job41:4 Ðe wòabla nu kpli wò be nàtsɔ ye wɔ wò dɔla tegbeea?
Job41:5 Ðe nàfe kplii abe xevi ene alo ade kae na viwò nyɔnuviwoa?
Job41:6 Ðe asitsalawo ado asi ɖe eŋua? Alo ɖe adzɔnuƒlelawo aƒlee ama na asigbedelawoa?
Job41:7 Àte ŋu atsɔ ʋã geɖe aŋɔ eƒe ayi
Job41:8 Katsa nàka asi eŋu kpɔ! Wò ŋutɔ ànya be eléle anye avu manyagblɔ; màgatee kpɔ gbeɖe o!
Job41:9 Ne èkpɔ mɔ be yeate ŋu alée la
Job41:10 Gbetɔ adãwɔla aɖeke meli si ado dzi aʋuʋui o. Ame kae ate ŋu anɔ te ɖe enu?
Job41:11 Ame ka ŋu wòle
Job41:12 “Nyemagbe nuƒoƒo le eƒe ŋutinuwo
Job41:13 Ame kae ate ŋu afo akpa si le eŋuti gbã la ɖa
Job41:14 Ame kae ate ŋu ake eƒe glã
Job41:15 Eƒe dzime katã nye akpoxɔnu siwo woɖo wo ɖe fli me la ɖeɖe sɔŋ. Wolé ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu kplíkplikpli abe ɖe wotre wo nu goŋgoŋ ene.
Job41:16 Womimi ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu ale gbegbe; ya gɔ̃ hã mate ŋu ato wo dome o.
Job41:17 Ðe sia ɖe de nu nɔvia me. Wolé
Job41:18 Ne enyè la
Job41:19 Dzo ƒe aɖewo dona tso eƒe nu me
Job41:20 Eƒe ŋɔti me tua dzudzɔ
Job41:21 Eƒe gbɔgbɔ naa aka léa dzo
Job41:22 Ŋusẽ le eƒe kɔ me
Job41:23 Eƒe ŋuilã tsyɔ vĩi ɖe edzi kunyakunya
Job41:24 Eƒe dzi do akpa abe kpe ene
Job41:25 Ne efɔ ɖe afɔ dzi la
Job41:26 Ne wotsɔ lãnu ɖe eŋu la
Job41:27 Ga yibɔ ɖeko wòle nɛ abe be ene
Job41:28 Aŋutrɔ menana wòsína o. Akafokpe nye atsa le egbɔ.
Job41:29 Ne woda kpo ɖe edzi la
Job41:30 Eƒe dɔ me gbɔ ɖana abe ze gbagbã kakɛ nu ene. Eƒe toƒe ɖena ɖe ba me abe ale si lugbɔmɔ̀ ɖena ɖi ene.
Job41:31 Enana be tɔ gɔme fiena wlɔwlɔwlɔ abe nuɖaze me ene
Job41:32 Ne eho dzó yina la
Job41:33 Nuwɔwɔ si mevɔ̃a naneke o lae wònye. Etɔgbe aɖeke mele xexea me o.
Job41:34 Eklẽa ŋku ɖe nu gãwo katã. Eyae nye fia ɖe lã dàdalawo katã dzi.”
Job42:1 Tete Hiob ɖo eŋu na Aƒetɔ.
Job42:2 “Menya azɔ be ètea ŋu wɔa nu sia nu
Job42:3 ‘Ame kae ɣla adaŋudede nunya manɔmee?’ Eya tae nu si gɔme nyemese o la ge le nunye
Job42:4 ‘Ðo to
Job42:5 Tsã la
Job42:6 Eya ta nyemele ɖeke me koŋ o. Meɖi fɔ. Mele ke kple afi me hetrɔ dzime.”
Job42:7 Esi Aƒetɔ ƒo nu kple Hiob vɔ alea la
Job42:8 Eya ta mitsɔ nyitsu adrẽ kple agbo adrẽ ne miayi nye dɔla Hiob gbɔ
Job42:9 Ale Elifaz
Job42:10 Aƒetɔ gbugbɔ Hiob ƒe nunyonamewo ɖo te
Job42:11 Tete nɔvia ŋutsuwo kple nɔvia nyɔnuwo kpakple eƒe ame nyanyɛ xoxoawo katã va kpɔe ɖa
Job42:12 Aƒetɔ yra Hiob le eƒe agbe me ŋkeke mamlɛawo me sãa wu gɔmedzedzea. Alẽ akpe wui ene
Job42:13 Edzi viŋutsu adrẽ kple vinyɔnu etɔ̃ hã.
Job42:14 Ena ŋkɔ vinyɔnu gbãtɔ be Yemima
Job42:15 Nyɔnu aɖeke medze tugbe le dukɔ bliboa me de Hiob vinyɔnu siawo nu o. Azɔ wo tɔ́ na eƒe nunɔamesiwo ƒe akpa aɖe wo abe domenyinu ene
Job42:16 Esia megbe Hiob ganɔ agbe ƒe alafa ɖeka bla ene; enɔ agbe kpɔ tɔgbuiyɔviawo kple tɔgbuitɔgbuiyɔviawo kaka dzidzime ene sɔŋ.
Job42:17 Hiob tsi xɔ ƒè geɖee hafi ku.
Psalms1:1 Woyra ame si mezɔna ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖo nu loo
Psalms1:2 Ke boŋ ekpɔa dzidzɔ le Aƒetɔ ƒe se la ŋu
Psalms1:3 Ele abe ati si wodo ɖe tɔʋu to la ene
Psalms1:4 Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ya mele alea o. Ke woawo ya le abe nutsro si ya ƒona dzonae ene.
Psalms1:5 Eya ta ame vɔ̃ɖiwo manɔ te le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me loo
Psalms1:6 Elabe Aƒetɔ dze si ame dzɔdzɔewo ƒe mɔ
Psalms2:1 Nu ka ta dukɔwo le ɖoɖo vɔ̃wo wɔm
Psalms2:2 Anyigba dzi fiawo tso
Psalms2:3 “Mina míatso woƒe kɔsɔkɔsɔwo
Psalms2:4 Ame si bɔbɔ nɔ dziƒowo la
Psalms2:5 Tete wòaƒo nu na wo le eƒe dɔmedzoe me
Psalms2:6 “Meɖo nye fia ɖe Zion
Psalms2:7 Maƒo nu tso Aƒetɔ ƒe sedede ŋu: Egblɔ nam be: “Vinyee nènye
Psalms2:8 Bia tanye se
Psalms2:9 Àtsɔ gakpo agbã wo
Psalms2:10 Eya ta azɔ mi fiawo
Psalms2:11 Mitsɔ vɔvɔ̃ subɔ Aƒetɔ
Psalms2:12 gbugbɔ eƒe afɔ. Ne magado dɔmedzoe
Psalms3:1 Aƒetɔ
Psalms3:2 Ame geɖewo le gbɔgblɔm tso ŋunye be: Kpekpeɖeŋu aɖeke matso Mawu gbɔ nɛ o.
Psalms3:3 Ke wò Aƒetɔ
Psalms3:4 Medo ɣli sesĩe na Aƒetɔ
Psalms3:5 Memlɔ anyi
Psalms3:6 Nyemevɔ̃ ame akpeakpe siwo tso ɖe ŋunye ƒo xlãm godoo la o.
Psalms3:7 Aƒetɔ
Psalms3:8 Aƒetɔ tɔe nye ɖeɖe
Psalms4:1 O Mawu
Psalms4:2 Mi amegbetɔ viwo
Psalms4:3 Ke minyae be Aƒetɔ tia mawumeme la na eɖokui; ne meyɔ Aƒetɔ la
Psalms4:4 Mido dziku
Psalms4:5 Misa vɔ siwo dze
Psalms4:6 Ame geɖewo gblɔ be: “O
Psalms4:7 Wòe de dzidzɔ geɖe nye dzime wu wo
Psalms4:8 Mamlɔ anyi le ŋutifafa me
Psalms5:1 O Aƒetɔ
Psalms5:2 Nye Fia kple nye Mawu
Psalms5:3 O Aƒetɔ
Psalms5:4 Elabe menye Mawu si dzɔa dzi le ŋutasesẽ ŋu lae nènye o; nuvɔ̃ɖi mate ŋu anɔ gbɔwò o.
Psalms5:5 Dàdala mate ŋu anɔ te ɖe ŋkuwò me o; èléa fu nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo katã.
Psalms5:6 Ètsrɔ̃a ame siwo kaa aʋatso; Aƒetɔ lé fu ame siwo kɔa ʋu ɖi kple alakpatɔwo.
Psalms5:7 Ke nye ya to wò amenuveve sɔgbɔ la me
Psalms5:8 O Aƒetɔ
Psalms5:9 Elabe nyateƒe aɖeke mele woƒe nu me o
Psalms5:10 Mawu
Psalms5:11 Gake na ame siwo katã sí wò tso la nakpɔ dzidzɔ le mewò; na woadzi dzidzɔha tegbee
Psalms5:12 Elabe wò Aƒetɔ ye yraa ame dzɔdzɔe
Psalms6:1 Aƒetɔ
Psalms6:2 Aƒetɔ
Psalms6:3 Nye luʋɔ hã le fu kpem ale gbegbe! Ke Aƒetɔ
Psalms6:4 Aƒetɔ
Psalms6:5 Elabe le ku me la
Psalms6:6 Meɖea hũ ʋuu ɖeɖi tea ŋunye; nye aɖatsi ƒoa nye aba belee zã sia zã
Psalms6:7 Vevesese na nye ŋkuwo lé ayi; wogbɔdzɔ le nye ketɔwo ta.
Psalms6:8 Mi nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo katã
Psalms6:9 Aƒetɔ se nye kokoƒoƒo. Aƒetɔ xɔ nye gbedodoɖa.
Psalms6:10 Ŋu akpe nye futɔwo katã
Psalms7:1 O Aƒetɔ
Psalms7:2 Ne menye nenema o la
Psalms7:3 O Aƒetɔ
Psalms7:4 ne mewɔ vɔ̃ ɖe xɔ̃nye aɖe ŋu
Psalms7:5 ekema na futɔ la nati yonyeme
Psalms7:6 Tsi tre
Psalms7:7 Na dukɔwo ƒe amehawo naƒo ƒu
Psalms7:8 Aƒetɔ drɔ̃a ʋɔnu dukɔwo. Aƒetɔ
Psalms7:9 Na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ nu natso; ke li ke ame dzɔdzɔe la; wò si doa susuwo kple dziwo kpɔna
Psalms7:10 Nye akpoxɔnu le Mawu si
Psalms7:11 Mawue nye ʋɔnu dzɔdzɔe drɔ̃la. Enye Mawu si dzi kuna gbe sia gbe.
Psalms7:12 Ne ame aɖe metrɔ dzime o la
Psalms7:13 Etrɔ asi le eƒe lãnu wuameawo ŋu da ɖi
Psalms7:14 Kpɔ ɖa
Psalms7:15 Eɖe ʋe
Psalms7:16 Eƒe nu gbegblẽ wɔwɔ la trɔ va dze eya ŋutɔ ƒe ta dzi
Psalms7:17 Mada akpe si dze Aƒetɔ
Psalms8:1 Aƒetɔ
Psalms8:2 le vidzĩwo kple ɖeviwo nu. Èna wò ŋusẽ li ke le wò ketɔwo ta
Psalms8:3 Ne mekpɔ wò dziƒowo
Psalms8:4 nu kae nye amegbetɔ be nèbua eŋu kple amegbetɔ vi be nèléa be nɛ?
Psalms8:5 Ke nèwɔe wòsɔ kple Mawu kloe
Psalms8:6 Èna wòɖu wò asinudɔwɔwɔwo katã dzi
Psalms8:7 alẽwo kple nyitsuwo katã kpakple gbemelãwo hã
Psalms8:8 dziƒoxeviwo kple ƒumelãwo kpakple nu sia nu si zɔa atsiaƒu me.
Psalms8:9 Aƒetɔ
Psalms9:1 Mada akpe na Aƒetɔ kple nye dzi blibo; maxlẽ wò nukudɔwo katã afia.
Psalms9:2 Makpɔ dzidzɔ
Psalms9:3 Esi nye futɔwo trɔ gbugbɔ yi megbe la
Psalms9:4 elabe èhe nye nya dzɔdzɔe ɖe go. Èbɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpuia dzi
Psalms9:5 Èhe nya ɖe dukɔwo ŋu; ètsrɔ̃ ame vɔ̃ɖiwo
Psalms9:6 Futɔwo tsrɔ̃
Psalms9:7 Ke Aƒetɔ nɔ anyi ɖe eƒe fiazi dzi tegbee. Eɖo eƒe fiazikpui anyi glì ɖe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ ŋu.
Psalms9:8 Edrɔ̃a ʋɔnu xexea me ɖe nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ nu
Psalms9:9 Aƒetɔ nye mɔ́ sesẽ na ame siwo wote ɖe anyi la; mɔ́ sesẽe wònye le xaxaɣiwo me.
Psalms9:10 Ame siwo dze si wò ŋkɔ la
Psalms9:11 Midzi kafukafuha na Aƒetɔ
Psalms9:12 Elabe eya ame si biaa hlɔ̃ hlɔ̃dolawo la
Psalms9:13 O Aƒetɔ
Psalms9:14 be makafu wò le Zion vinyɔnu ƒe agbowo me. Matso aseye le ale si nèɖem la ta.
Psalms9:15 Dukɔwo ge dze do si woɖe ɖi la me

Psalms10:3 Elabe ame vɔ̃ɖi tsɔa eƒe dzimedidi ƒoa adegbee
Psalms10:4 Ne ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖo dàdamo la

Psalms18:1 Aƒetɔ
Psalms18:2 Aƒetɔ ye nye nye agakpe
Psalms18:3 Meyɔ Aƒetɔ
Psalms18:4 Ku ƒe kawo ɖe to ɖem
Psalms18:5 Tsiẽƒe ƒe kawo blam
Psalms18:6 Le nye xaxa me la
Psalms18:7 Tete anyigba ʋanya
Psalms18:8 Dzudzɔ de dzi tso eƒe ŋɔti me
Psalms18:9 Ebɔ dziƒowo heɖi va anyi; viviti tsiɖitsiɖi le eƒe afɔwo te.
Psalms18:10 Enɔ kerubi dzi hedzo; eɖiɖi kaba le ya ƒe aʋalawo dzi.
Psalms18:11 Eɣla eɖokui ɖe blukɔ me
Psalms18:12 Le keklẽ si le eŋkume me la
Psalms18:13 Aƒetɔ hã ɖe gbe le dziƒowo
Psalms18:14 Eɖo eƒe aŋutrɔwo ɖa wokaka wo me; eɖo dzikedzowo ɖa wotɔtɔ wo.
Psalms18:15 Atsiaƒu gɔme mɔwo dze
Psalms18:16 Edo abɔ ɖa tso dzi ke
Psalms18:17 Eɖem tso nye futɔ sesẽ la si me kple ame siwo lé fum la si me elabe wotri akɔ wum.
Psalms18:18 Wodze dzinye le nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e gbe; ke Aƒetɔ nye nye ziɔɖeŋutɔ.
Psalms18:19 Ekplɔm yi gbadzaƒe
Psalms18:20 Aƒetɔ wɔ nyui nam ɖe nye nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ nu; eɖo eteƒe nam le esi nye asi me dza ta.
Psalms18:21 Elabe melé ŋku ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe mɔwo ŋu
Psalms18:22 Elabe eƒe sewo katã le ŋkunye me
Psalms18:23 Mokaka mele ŋunye le eŋkume o
Psalms18:24 Ale Aƒetɔ ɖo eteƒe nam le nye nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ nu
Psalms18:25 Èwɔa nuteƒe na nuteƒewɔla

Psalms18:30 Mawu sia la
Psalms18:31 Elabe ame kae nye Mawu? Ɖe menye Aƒetɔ ye oa? Ame kae nye agakpe? Mía Mawu la koe ɖe!
Psalms18:32 Mawu si tsɔ ŋusẽ bla ali dzi nam
Psalms18:33 Ewɔ nye afɔwo abe zinɔ tɔwo ene
Psalms18:34 Efia aʋawɔwɔ nye asiwo ale be nye abɔwo ate ŋu avu akɔblida me.
Psalms18:35 Ètsɔ wò xɔname ƒe akpoxɔnu nam; wò nuɖusi lém ɖe te
Psalms18:36 Èna gbadzaƒem be maɖe afɔ
Psalms18:37 Meti nye futɔwo yome ɖatu wo
Psalms18:38 Megbã wo nyànyanya ale be womagate ŋu afɔ o; wodze anyi ɖe nye afɔ te.
Psalms18:39 Elabe ètsɔ ŋusẽ bla ali dzi nam ɖe aʋawɔwɔ ŋu; èna nye adikatɔwo yi to ɖe tenye.
Psalms18:40 Èna nye futɔwo trɔ megbe dem
Psalms18:41 Wodo ɣli be woakpe ɖe yewo ŋu; ke xɔnametɔ aɖeke meli o. Wodo ɣli na Aƒetɔ; ke metɔ na wo o.
Psalms18:42 Metu wo gudugudu abe ʋuʋudedi le ya nu ene
Psalms18:43 Èɖem tso dukɔwo ƒe avuwɔwɔ me; ètsɔm wɔ anyigba dzi dukɔwo ƒe tae. Dukɔ si nyemenya o lae subɔm.

Psalms25:10 Aƒetɔ ƒe toƒewo katã nye amenuveve kple nuteƒewɔwɔ na ame siwo léa eƒe nubabla kple ɖaseɖiɖiwo me ɖe asi.
Psalms25:11 Le wò ŋkɔ la ta
Psalms25:12 Ame kae vɔ̃a Aƒetɔ? Eyae wòafia mɔ si wòle be wòatia la.
Psalms25:13 Nu anyo na eya ŋutɔ
Psalms25:14 Aƒetɔ dzea xɔlɔ̃ ame siwo vɔ̃nɛ
Psalms25:15 Nye ŋku le Aƒetɔ ŋu ɖaa elabe eyae aɖe nye afɔ tso ɖɔ me.
Psalms25:16 Trɔ ɖe ŋunye ne nàve nunye
Psalms25:17 Ɖe xaxawo ɖa le nye dzime
Psalms25:18 Kpɔ fukpekpe kple xaxa siwo me mele la ɖa
Psalms25:19 Kpɔ nye ketɔ gbogboawo ɖa! Kpɔ ale si wolé fum ŋutasẽtɔe la ɖa!
Psalms25:20 O dzɔ nye agbe ŋu
Psalms25:21 Na fɔmaɖimaɖi kple nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ nadzram ɖo elabe wòe mele mɔ kpɔm na.
Psalms25:22 O Mawu
Psalms26:1 Aƒetɔ
Psalms26:2 Aƒetɔ
Psalms26:3 elabe wò amenuveve la le ŋkunye me
Psalms26:4 Nyemenɔa alakpatɔwo ƒe ha me o
Psalms26:5 Melé fu nu vlo wɔlawo hã eye nyemabɔbɔ nɔ nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo dome o.
Psalms26:6 Aƒetɔ
Psalms26:7 nɔa akpedaha dzim na wò kple gbe sesẽ henɔa wò nukudɔwɔwɔwo katã xlẽm fia.
Psalms26:8 Aƒetɔ
Psalms26:9 Mègakplɔm ƒu gbe kple nuvɔ̃wɔlawo ɖekae loo
Psalms26:10 Ame siawo ƒe asi mee nu vlo wɔwɔ ƒe aɖaŋu le
Psalms26:11 Ke nye la
Psalms26:12 Anyigba sɔsɔe dzie mele tsitre ɖo. Makafu Aƒetɔ le takpekpe gãwo me.
Psalms27:1 Aƒetɔ nye nye kekeli kple nye xɔname. Ame kae mavɔ̃? Aƒetɔ ye nye mɔ́ sesẽ na nye agbe. Ame kae adzi ŋɔ nam?
Psalms27:2 Ne ame vlowo lũ ɖe dzinye le ŋunye gblẽm
Psalms27:3 Togbɔ be aʋakɔ ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe ŋunye hã la
Psalms27:4 Nu ɖeka mebia Aƒetɔ
Psalms27:5 Elabe aɣlam ɖe enɔƒe le xaxagbe
Psalms27:6 Ekema nye ta akɔ dzi azɔ agbɔ nye futɔ siwo katã ɖe to ɖem la ta. Matsɔ dzidzɔɣli asa aseyetsovɔ le eƒe agbadɔ me
Psalms27:7 Aƒetɔ
Psalms27:8 Ègblɔ nam be: “Di ŋkunye me.” Nye dzi gblɔ na wò be: “Aƒetɔ
Psalms27:9 Mègaɣla wò mo ɖem o. Mègatutu wò dɔla ɖa le dɔmedzoe me o
Psalms27:10 Elabe tɔnye kple nɔnye gblẽm ɖi; ke Aƒetɔ axɔm.
Psalms27:11 Aƒetɔ
Psalms27:12 Mègaɖe asi le ŋunye ne mage ɖe nye ketɔwo si me o; woawɔ nu si wolɔ̃ lam
Psalms27:13 Mexɔe se be makpɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe nu nyuiwo le agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi.
Psalms27:14 Kpɔ Aƒetɔ sinu; sẽ ŋu
Psalms28:1 Aƒetɔ
Psalms28:2 Se nye kokoƒogbe
Psalms28:3 Mègatsɔm kpe ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo kple nu vlo wɔlawo ŋu o. Woawo la
Psalms28:4 Wɔ na wo ɖe woƒe nuwɔnawo nu
Psalms28:5 Esi womeléa ŋku ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo ŋu loo
Psalms28:6 Woakafu Aƒetɔ elabe ese nye kokoƒogbe.
Psalms28:7 Aƒetɔ ye nye nye ŋusẽ kple nye akpoxɔnu; eya ŋue meɖoa dzi ɖo ale wòxɔna nam. Nye dzi le aseye tsom
Psalms28:8 Aƒetɔ ye nye ŋusẽ na eƒe dukɔ; eyae nye sitsoƒe si xɔna na eƒe amesiamina la.
Psalms28:9 Xɔ na wò dukɔ la
Psalms29:1 Mi dziƒonɔlawo miɖe gbeƒã Aƒetɔ! Mitsɔ bubu kple ŋusẽ na Aƒetɔ!
Psalms29:2 Mitsɔ bubu si dze Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ la nɛ. Misubɔ Aƒetɔ le atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo kɔkɔe me.
Psalms29:3 Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe ɖi le tɔwo dzi. Mawu bubutɔ lae ɖe gbe. Aƒetɔ ɖe gbe le tɔ geɖewo dzi.
Psalms29:4 Ŋusẽ le Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe ŋu; Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe yɔ fũu kple fianyenye.
Psalms29:5 Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe ŋe sedertiwo
Psalms29:6 Ena Lebanon ti kpo abe nyivi ene
Psalms29:7 Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe ke dzo
Psalms29:8 Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe na gbedadaƒo ʋuʋu; Aƒetɔ ʋuʋu Kades ƒe gbedadaƒo.
Psalms29:9 Aƒetɔ ƒe gbe na logotiwo ta tro
Psalms29:10 Aƒetɔ bɔbɔ nɔ fiazi dzi le tɔɖɔɖɔ dzi. Aƒetɔ bɔbɔ nɔ fiazi dzi abe fia ene tegbee.
Psalms29:11 Aƒetɔ nena ŋusẽ eƒe dukɔ! Aƒetɔ netsɔ ŋutifafa yra eƒe dukɔ!

Psalms31:1 Aƒetɔ
Psalms31:2 Ƒu to anyi ɖe ŋunye; xɔ nam alɔ tsɔtsɔe. Zu agakpe si anye sitsoƒe nam; mɔ́ sesẽ si axɔ nam.
Psalms31:3 Ẽ
Psalms31:4 Ɖem le ɖɔ si woɖo nam le adzame la me elabe wòe nye nye sitsoƒe.
Psalms31:5 Metsɔ nye gbɔgbɔ de asiwò me; èɖem
Psalms31:6 Èlé fu ame siwo doa vivi ɖe legba siwo nye nu maɖinuwo ŋu
Psalms31:7 Matso aseye
Psalms31:8 Mèɖe asi le ŋunye na futɔ la o; ke boŋ èda nye afɔ ɖe gbadzaƒe.
Psalms31:9 Aƒetɔ
Psalms31:10 Elabe konyifafa xɔ nye agbenɔnɔ
Psalms31:11 Mezu alɔmeɖenu na nye ketɔwo katã; ŋɔdzinu na nye aƒelikawo
Psalms31:12 Amewo ŋlɔm be abe ame kuku ene; mezu abe ze gbagbã ene.
Psalms31:13 Ẽ
Psalms31:14 Ke meɖo ŋu ɖe ŋuwò
Psalms31:15 Nye ɣeyiɣiwo le asiwò me. Ɖem tso nye futɔwo kple yonyemetilawo si me.
Psalms31:16 Na wò mo naklẽ ɖe wò dɔla dzi; xɔ nam le wò amenuveve la ta.
Psalms31:17 Aƒetɔ
Psalms31:18 Na aʋatsokalawo ƒe nu nade ga
Psalms31:19 Wò dɔmenyo sɔ gbɔ loo! Èli kɔe ɖi na ame siwo vɔ̃a wò
Psalms31:20 Èɣla wo ɖe beɖoƒe si le ŋkuwò me tso amewo ƒe nugbeɖoɖo nu. Èna wole dedie le wò agbadɔ me; wovo tso amewo ƒe dzrewɔɖe si me.
Psalms31:21 Woakafu Aƒetɔ
Psalms31:22 Esi dzi ɖe le ƒonye la
Psalms31:23 Milɔ̃ Aƒetɔ

Psalms32:1 Woyra ame si wotsɔ eƒe dzidada kee
Psalms32:2 Woyra ame si Aƒetɔ mebu vodada aɖeke na o
Psalms32:3 Esi nyemeʋu nye nuvɔ̃ me o la
Psalms32:4 Elabe wò asi sẽ ɖe dzinye ŋkeke kple zã; nye ŋusẽ vɔ keŋ abe dzomeŋɔli ƒe dzoxɔxɔe wɔe ene.
Psalms32:5 Menya be mewɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe ŋuwò
Psalms32:6 Eya ta na ame sia ame si nye mawumeme la nado gbe ɖa na wò; le xaxaɣi
Psalms32:7 Beɖoƒee nènye nam; èdzram ɖo tso xaxa me. Ètsɔ ɖeɖe ƒo xlãm.
Psalms32:8 Mafia nu wò
Psalms32:9 Mèganɔ abe sɔ alo tedzisɔ si si gɔmesese mele o la ene o; ka kple numega wotsɔna mlanɛ. Ne menye nenem o la
Psalms32:10 Ame vɔ̃ɖi sea veve geɖe; ke ame si ɖoa ŋu ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu la
Psalms32:11 Mikpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu; mitso aseye
Psalms33:1 Mi ame dzɔdzɔewo
Psalms33:2 Mikafu Aƒetɔ kple kasaŋkuwo; midzi ha kple gbe vivi nɛ ɖe kasaŋku ka ewo tɔwo ŋu.
Psalms33:3 Midzi ha yeye nɛ; mika asi kaawo ŋu aɖaŋutɔe
Psalms33:4 Elabe Aƒetɔ ƒe nya toa mɔ ɖeka
Psalms33:5 Elɔ̃ nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ kple ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ dzɔdzɔe. Aƒetɔ ƒe amenuveve yɔ anyigba la dzi taŋ.
Psalms33:6 Nya Aƒetɔ tsɔ wɔ dziƒowoe
Psalms33:7 Eƒo atsiaƒu me tsiwo nu ƒu abe atukpa me woku wo ɖo ene
Psalms33:8 Mina anyigba dzi nɔlawo katã navɔ̃ Aƒetɔ. Mina xexemenɔlawo katã natsɔ bubu anɔ tsitre ɖe eŋkume kple vɔvɔ̃!
Psalms33:9 Elabe eƒo nu
Psalms33:10 Aƒetɔ na dukɔwo ƒe adaŋudede zu dzodzro; exe mɔ na dukɔwo ƒe ɖoɖowo.
Psalms33:11 Aƒetɔ ƒe adaŋudede le te tegbee
Psalms33:12 Woyra du si ƒe Mawu nye Aƒetɔ; dukɔ si wòtia be wòanye yeƒe domenyinu.
Psalms33:13 Aƒetɔ kpɔa nu tso dziƒo; ekpɔa amegbetɔ viwo katã.
Psalms33:14 Ekpɔa anyigba dzi tɔwo katã tso afi si wòbɔbɔ nɔ eƒe fiazikpui dzi le.
Psalms33:15 Eya ame si wɔ wo katã ƒe dzi
Psalms33:16 Fia ƒe dziɖuɖu mele eƒe aʋakɔ kpaŋkpaŋ me o
Psalms33:17 Mɔkpɔkpɔ meli be aʋawɔsɔ ana woaɖu dzi o
Psalms33:18 Kpɔ ɖa
Psalms33:19 be wòaɖe yewoƒe luʋɔ tso ku me
Psalms33:20 Míaƒe luʋɔ le mɔ kpɔm na Aƒetɔ; eyae nye mía kpeɖeŋutɔ kple akpoxɔnu.
Psalms33:21 Ẽ

Psalms35:4 Na ŋukpe kple vlododo nava ame siwo le nye agbe yome tim la dzi! Na ame siwo le vɔ̃e bum ɖe ŋunye le tame la nagbugbɔ ɖe megbe

Psalms36:1 Sedzidada le nu ƒom na ame vɔ̃ɖi le eƒe dzi ƒe gogloeƒe ke; Mawu-vɔvɔ̃ aɖeke metso ga ɖe ŋkume nɛ o.

Psalms37:1 Mègabi dzi le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ta loo
Psalms37:2 Elabe eteƒe madidi hafi woaɖi golo abe gbe ene
Psalms37:3 Ɖo ŋu ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu
Psalms37:4 Aƒetɔ ƒe nu nenyo ŋuwò
Psalms37:5 Gblẽ wò mɔ ɖe Aƒetɔ si me
Psalms37:6 Ahe wò nya dzɔdzɔe ɖe go abe kekeli ene
Psalms37:7 Zi ɖoɖoe kpoo le Aƒetɔ ŋkume
Psalms37:8 Mègado dziku o
Psalms37:9 Elabe wole ame vɔ̃ɖiwo tsrɔ̃ ge ɖa; ke ame siwo kpɔa Aƒetɔ sinu la
Psalms37:10 Esusɔ vie ko ame vɔ̃ɖi la maganɔ anyi o; ne èɖe ŋku ɖe enɔƒe nyuie hã la
Psalms37:11 Ke ame fafawo axɔ anyigba la
Psalms37:12 Ame vɔ̃ɖi le nugbe ɖom ɖe nu dzɔdzɔe wɔla ŋu
Psalms37:13 ke Aƒetɔ koa ame vɔ̃ɖi la
Psalms37:14 Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo he yi ɖe go
Psalms37:15 Woƒe yi aƒo ɖe woawo ŋutɔ ƒe dzi
Psalms37:16 Nu sue si le nu dzɔdzɔe wɔla si la
Psalms37:17 Elabe wole ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe alɔ ŋe ge
Psalms37:18 Aƒetɔ nya ame maɖifɔwo ƒe ŋkekewo
Psalms37:19 Womedoa ŋukpe wo le ɣeyiɣi vɔ̃wo me o; nu geɖe nɔa wo si le dɔŋɔli.
Psalms37:20 Ke ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ya tsrɔ̃na
Psalms37:21 Ame vɔ̃ɖi doa nugbana
Psalms37:22 Elabe ame siwo Aƒetɔ yra la
Psalms37:23 Amegbetɔ ƒe afɔɖeɖe la
Psalms37:24 Ne edze anyi hã la
Psalms37:25 Menɔ ɖevime kpɔ
Psalms37:26 Enaa nu faa ɣe sia ɣi
Psalms37:27 Te ɖa tso nuvɔ̃ɖi gbɔ
Psalms37:28 Elabe Aƒetɔ lɔ̃a nya dzɔdzɔe
Psalms37:29 Nu dzɔdzɔe wɔlawo axɔ anyigba la
Psalms37:30 Nunya dona tso nu dzɔdzɔe wɔla ƒe nu me
Psalms37:31 Eƒe Mawu ƒe se la le eƒe dzime
Psalms37:32 Ame vɔ̃ɖi léa ŋku ɖe nu dzɔdzɔe wɔla ŋu
Psalms37:33 Aƒetɔ maɖe asi wòakpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe edzi loo
Psalms37:34 Kpɔ Aƒetɔ sinu
Psalms37:35 Mekpɔ ame vɔ̃ɖi aɖe wòle eɖokui dom ɖe dzi; ekɔ
Psalms37:36 Megava to afi ma
Psalms37:37 De dzesi ame maɖifɔ la
Psalms37:38 Ke woatsrɔ̃ dzidalawo ya ɖa keŋkeŋ; ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe dzidzimeviwo atsrɔ̃.
Psalms37:39 Nu dzɔdzɔe wɔlawo ƒe xɔname tsoa Aƒetɔ gbɔ; eyae nyea woƒe sitsoƒe le xaxaɣiwo me.
Psalms37:40 Aƒetɔ kpena ɖe wo ŋu heɖea wo; eɖea wo tso ame vɔ̃ɖiwo si me
Psalms38:1 Aƒetɔ
Psalms38:2 Elabe wò aŋutrɔwo nyrɔ ɖe lã me nam
Psalms38:3 Le wò dɔmedzoe ta
Psalms38:4 Elabe nye nuvɔ̃wo zu agba medro ɖe ta

Psalms73:6 Eya ta dàda nye woƒe kɔga; ŋutasesẽ nye awu wodo.
Psalms73:7 Woda ami
Psalms73:8 Woɖea alɔ me
Psalms73:9 Wogblɔa nya vɔ̃ ɖe dziƒo ŋu
Psalms73:10 Eya ta amewo trɔna ɖe wo ŋu
Psalms73:11 Wogblɔna be: “Ale ke Mawu ate ŋu anya? Ɖe nunya le Dziƒoʋĩtɔ la sia?”
Psalms73:12 Kpɔ ɖa
Psalms73:13 Melé be na nye dzi wòle dzadzɛ dzodzro
Psalms73:14 Elabe mekpea fu ŋkeke blibo la
Psalms73:15 Ne ɖe megblɔ be: “Nye hã maƒo nu alea” la
Psalms73:16 Ke esi mebu tame be mase esia gɔme la
Psalms73:17 va se ɖe esime mege ɖe Mawu ƒe kɔkɔeƒe la
Psalms73:18 Nyateƒee
Psalms73:19 Wotsrɔ̃ le aɖabaƒoƒo ɖeka me
Psalms73:20 Wole abe drɔ̃ekuku ene ne ame nyɔ. Èdo vlo woƒe ŋɔli nɔnɔmewo le nyɔnyɔ tso drɔ̃e me megbe.
Psalms73:21 Esi nye luʋɔ se veve
Psalms73:22 mezu bometsila kple numanyala; menɔ abe lã ene ɖe ŋuwò.
Psalms73:23 Ke hã la
Psalms73:24 Wòe kplɔam kple wò adaŋudede
Psalms73:25 Ame kae le dziƒo nam
Psalms73:26 Nye ŋutilã kple nye dzi ate ŋu agbɔdzɔ
Psalms73:27 Elabe kpɔ ɖa
Psalms73:28 Ke nye la
Psalms74:1 Mawu

Psalms74:3 Ɖe afɔ ɖo ta gli
Psalms74:4 Wò ketɔwo blu le wò kɔkɔeƒe la titina. Woɖo woawo ŋutɔ ƒe dzesiwo ɖi ne woanye dzesiwo.
Psalms74:5 Ele abe ame aɖe si kɔ fía dzi le ave dodo me ene
Psalms74:6 eye wòtsɔ fía kple zu gbã eƒe ati
Psalms74:7 Wotɔ dzo wò kɔkɔeƒe la
Psalms74:8 Wogblɔ na wo ɖokui be: “Míele wo katã bɔbɔ ge ɖe anyi!” Wotɔ dzo Mawu ƒe takpeƒewo katã le anyigba la dzi.

Psalms74:16 Tɔwòe nye ŋkeke; tɔwò kee nye zã. Wòe ɖo nu keklẽwo kple ɣe anyi.
Psalms74:17 Wòe ɖo anyigba ƒe liƒowo katã; wòe wɔ dzomeŋɔli kple vuvɔŋɔli.
Psalms74:18 Aƒetɔ
Psalms74:19 Mègatsɔ wò ahɔnɛ ƒe luʋɔ de asi na gbemelãwo o; mègaŋlɔ wò hiãtɔwo ƒe agbe be yi mavɔ me o.
Psalms74:20 Ɖo ŋku wò nubabla la dzi! Elabe teƒe doviviti siwo le anyigba dzi la
Psalms74:21 Mègana woado ŋukpe ame siwo wote ɖe anyi la o. Na hiãtɔwo kple ame dahewo nakafu wò.
Psalms74:22 Mawu
Psalms74:23 Mègaŋlɔ wò ketɔwo ƒe zitɔtɔ be o; mègaŋlɔ wò futɔwo ƒe hoowɔwɔ si le dzi dem edziedzi la be o!

Psalms78:1 Nye dukɔ
Psalms78:2 Make nu le lododo me
Psalms78:3 Nya siwo míese henya
Psalms78:4 Mímaɣla wo ɖe wo viwo o; ke boŋ míaxlẽ nu siwo ta wòdze be woakafu Aƒetɔ kple eƒe ŋusẽ kpakple nukunu siwo wòwɔ la afia dzidzime siwo gbɔna la.
Psalms78:5 Eɖo ɖaseɖiɖi gɔme anyi ɖe Yakob
Psalms78:6 ale be dzidzime siwo le wo yome gbɔna
Psalms78:7 Ale be woada woƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ ɖe Mawu dzi
Psalms78:8 Woawo ya womeganɔ abe wo tɔgbui siwo nye dzidzime sẽto
Psalms78:9 Efrayim viwo tsɔ da kple dati bla
Psalms78:10 Womewɔ nu
Psalms78:11 Woŋlɔ nu siwo wòwɔ kple nukunu siwo wòɖe fia wo la be.
Psalms78:12 Ewɔ nukunu le wo tɔgbuiwo ŋkume wokpɔ
Psalms78:13 Ema atsiaƒu me ɖe eve
Psalms78:14 Le ŋkeke me la
Psalms78:15 Efé agakpewo me le gbedadaƒo
Psalms78:16 Ena tɔwo ŋɔ tso agakpe me
Psalms78:17 Ke woyi edzi ganɔ nuvɔ̃ wɔm ɖe eŋu. Wodze aglã ɖe Dziƒoʋĩtɔ la ŋu le kegbegbe.
Psalms78:18 Wote Mawu kpɔ le dzime
Psalms78:19 Wogblɔ ɖe Mawu ŋu be: “Ɖe Mawu ate ŋu aɖo nuɖukplɔ̃ na mí le gbedadaƒoa?
Psalms78:20 Eƒo agakpe
Psalms78:21 Eya ta esi Aƒetɔ see la
Psalms78:22 elabe womexɔ Mawu dzi se o
Psalms78:23 Ke hã eɖe gbe na dziŋgɔli
Psalms78:24 Ena dziƒobliku wo
Psalms78:25 Ale gbetɔ hã ɖu mawudɔlawo ƒe abolo! Ena nuɖuɖu wo fũu.
Psalms78:26 Ena ɣedzeƒeya ƒo tso dziƒo
Psalms78:27 Ena adelã dza ɖe wo dzi abe ʋuʋudedi ene; xewo dza abe ƒutake ene.
Psalms78:28 Ena woge dze woƒe asaɖa la titina
Psalms78:29 Ale woɖu lã ɖi ƒo nyuie
Psalms78:30 Ke hafi woƒe nudzroame la naɖi ƒo na wo esime nuɖuɖua ganɔ woƒe nu me la
Psalms78:31 Mawu do dziku ɖe wo ŋu
Psalms78:32 Togbɔ be nu siawo dzɔ hã
Psalms78:33 Ale wòna woƒe ŋkekewo bu abe ya si wogbɔ ene
Psalms78:34 Esi wòwu wo la
Psalms78:35 Woɖo ŋku edzi be
Psalms78:36 Ke wotsɔ nu flui
Psalms78:37 Woƒe dzi meku ɖe eŋu o. Womewɔ eƒe nubabla dzi le anukware me o.
Psalms78:38 Ke esi eya nye nublanuikpɔla ta la
Psalms78:39 Eɖo ŋui be ŋutilã ko wonye; ya si ƒona yina
Psalms78:40 Zi nenie womedze aglã ɖe eŋu le gbedadaƒo o! Zi nenie womedo dziku nɛ le kegbegbe o!
Psalms78:41 Wotee kpɔ
Psalms78:42 Womeɖo ŋku eƒe ŋusẽ dzi loo
Psalms78:43 esime wòwɔ eƒe dzesiwo le Egipte kple eƒe nukunuwo le Zoan-gbewo dzi o.
Psalms78:44 Etrɔ woƒe tɔsisiwo wozu ʋu
Psalms78:45 Eɖo togbatowo ɖe wo dome
Psalms78:46 Ena ʋetrawo ɖu woƒe agblemenukuwo
Psalms78:47 Etsrɔ̃ woƒe wainkawo kple tsikpe kple woƒe sikamortiwo kple ketsi.
Psalms78:48 Ewu woƒe nyihawo kple tsikpe
Psalms78:49 Eɖe asi le dziku helihelĩ
Psalms78:50 Eɖe mɔ na eƒe dziku; meɖe wo le ku nu o
Psalms78:51 Ewu ŋgɔgbeviwo katã le Egipte
Psalms78:52 Tete wòkplɔ eƒe dukɔ abe alẽwo ene dzoe
Psalms78:53 Ekplɔ wo dedie ale be womevɔ̃ o; ke atsiaƒu nyè tsyɔ woƒe futɔwo ya dzi.
Psalms78:54 Ekplɔ wo va eƒe anyigba kɔkɔe la dzi
Psalms78:55 Enyà dukɔwo ɖa le wo ŋgɔ; ema woƒe anyigbawo na wo wozu wo tɔ
Psalms78:56 Ke wote Mawu
Psalms78:57 ke wotrɔ megbe dee hegbe nuteƒewɔwɔ nɛ abe wo tɔgbuiawo ke ene. Woƒo asa nɛ abe dati si dzi womate ŋu aka ɖo o la ene.
Psalms78:58 Elabe wotsɔ woƒe nuxeƒewo do dziku nɛ
Psalms78:59 Esi Mawu va nya la

Psalms78:61 Etsɔ eƒe ŋusẽ de aboyo me kple eƒe atsyɔ̃ na ketɔ la.
Psalms78:62 Etsɔ eƒe dukɔ de asi na aʋawɔwɔ
Psalms78:63 Dzo fiã woƒe ɖekakpuiwo
Psalms78:64 Woƒe nunɔlawo tsi yi nu le aʋa me
Psalms78:65 Tete Aƒetɔ la tso
