Psalms87:1 Eɖo eƒe du la gɔme anyi ɖe to kɔkɔe la dzi.

Psalms87:5 Woagblɔ le Zion ŋu be: “Wodzi ame sia kple ame kemɛ ɖe eme.” Elabe Dziƒoʋĩtɔ la ŋutɔ ana wòali ke.

Psalms87:7 Hadzilawo kple ɣeɖulawo siaa agblɔ be: “Mewòe nye nu nyuiwo dzɔ tso.”

Psalms88:11 Ɖe woƒoa nu le wò amenuveve ŋu le yɔdo mea? Ɖe wogblɔa wò nuteƒewɔwɔ le tsiẽƒea?

Psalms88:14 Aƒetɔ

Psalms88:16 Wò dɔmedzoe la va lɔm ɖe me

Psalms88:18 Wòe na lɔlɔ̃tɔ kple xɔlɔ̃ ɖe ɖa le ŋunye; nye zɔhɛwo le viviti me.
Psalms89:1 Aƒetɔ
Psalms89:2 Elabe èɖo wò amenuveve gɔme anyi tegbee; wò nuteƒewɔwɔ li ke abe dziƒowo ene.
Psalms89:3 Wòe gblɔ be: “Mebla nu kple nye ame si metia. Meka atam na nye dɔla David be:
Psalms89:4 ‘Maɖo wò dzidzimeviwo gɔme anyi tegbee. Maɖo wò fiazikpui anyi na dzidzimewo katã.’ ”
Psalms89:5 Aƒetɔ
Psalms89:6 Elabe ame ka le dziŋgɔli me woatsɔ asɔ ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu? Ame kae le dziƒonɔlawo dome

Psalms89:8 Aƒetɔ

Psalms89:10 Wòe gbã ƒumeʋɔdriba
Psalms89:11 Tɔwòe nye dziƒo; tɔwòe nye anyigba hã. Xexea me kple emenuwo katã la
Psalms89:12 Wòe wɔ dzigbeme kple anyigbeme. Tabor-to kple Xermon-to le wò ŋkɔ kafum kple dzidzɔ.
Psalms89:13 Wò alɔ sesẽ
Psalms89:14 Nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ kple ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ dzɔdzɔe nye wò fiazikpui ƒe gɔmeɖokpe; amenuveve kple nuteƒewɔwɔ dzea ŋgɔwò.
Psalms89:15 Woyra dukɔ si nya wò ŋkekenyui ɖuɣi. Aƒetɔ
Psalms89:16 eye wotsoa aseye kafua wò ŋkɔ ŋkeke blibo la
Psalms89:17 Elabe wòe nye woƒe ŋusẽ ƒe bubu; wò amenuveve na míaƒe dzo kɔ dzi.
Psalms89:18 Elabe míaƒe akpoxɔnu nye Aƒetɔ tɔ
Psalms89:19 Èƒo nu na wò dɔla nuteƒewɔlawo le ŋutega me le blema be: “Meɖɔ fiakuku na kalẽtɔ aɖe
Psalms89:20 Mekpɔ David
Psalms89:21 ale be nye asi nanɔ eŋu tegbee

Psalms89:23 Magbã eƒe ketɔwo nyànyanya le eŋgɔ

Psalms89:25 Matsɔ eƒe asi aɖo atsiaƒu dzi

Psalms89:27 Matsɔe awɔ vinye ŋgɔgbea
Psalms89:28 Nye amenuveve anɔ kplii tegbee
Psalms89:29 Maɖo eƒe fiaƒome la gɔme anyi tegbee
Psalms89:30 Ne viawo gblẽ nye se la ɖi
Psalms89:31 ne wogblẽ kɔ ɖo na nye ɖoɖowo
Psalms89:32 ekema mahe to na wo kple ati le woƒe dzidada ta
Psalms89:33 Ke nyemana nye amenuveve nadzo le egbɔ loo
Psalms89:34 Nyemagbe nye nubabla la dzi wɔwɔ loo
Psalms89:35 Metà nye ŋutɔ nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la zi ɖeka; nyemable David o.
Psalms89:36 Eƒe fiaƒome la anɔ anyi tegbee
Psalms89:37 Ali ke tegbee abe ɣleti ene. Zi ale si dziŋgɔli li la anɔ te sesĩe.
Psalms89:38 Ke azɔ la
Psalms89:39 Wòe tu nu si nèbla kple wò dɔla la. Wòe gblẽ kɔ ɖo na eƒe fiakuku la le ʋuʋudedi me.

Psalms101:3 Nyematsɔ nu maɖinu aɖeke aɖo ŋkunye me o. Melé fu dzidalawo ƒe nuwɔna; malé ɖe ŋunye o.

Psalms102:1 Aƒetɔ

Psalms102:7 Metsi zãdomadɔlɔ̃e

Psalms102:11 Nye ŋkekewo le abe fiẽ vɔvɔli ene
Psalms102:12 Ke wò Aƒetɔ
Psalms102:13 Wò la àtso akpɔ nublanui na Zion; ɣeyiɣia de be nàve enu; gamea su azɔ.
Psalms102:14 Elabe eƒe kpewo le vevie na wò dɔlawo
Psalms102:15 Dukɔwo avɔ̃ Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ
Psalms102:16 Elabe Aƒetɔ atso Zion-du la
Psalms102:17 Atrɔ ɖe ame dahewo ƒe gbedodoɖa ŋu
Psalms102:18 Mina woaŋlɔ esia da ɖi na dzidzime si gbɔna la
Psalms102:19 ekpɔ nu le anyi me tso eƒe kɔkɔeƒe la le dzime ke
Psalms102:20 be yease gaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe ŋeŋe
Psalms102:21 be amewo naɖe gbeƒã Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ le Zion
Psalms102:22 ne dukɔwo ƒo ƒu
Psalms102:23 Ekaka nye ŋusẽ le mɔ ta
Psalms102:24 Mebe: “Nye Mawu
Psalms102:25 Gbe aɖe gbe kee nèɖo anyigba gɔme anyi
Psalms102:26 Wo nu ava yi
Psalms102:27 Ke wò la
Psalms102:28 Wò dɔlawo ƒe viwo anɔ anyi dedie; woƒe dzidzimeviwo ali ke le ŋkuwò me.
Psalms103:1 Luʋɔnye
Psalms103:2 Luʋɔnye
Psalms103:3 Eyae tsɔa wò nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔwo katã kea wò
Psalms103:4 eyae ɖe wò agbe tso aʋlime
Psalms103:5 eyae tsɔ nu nyui ɖi ƒo na wò zi ale si nèle agbe
Psalms103:6 Aƒetɔ drɔ̃a ʋɔnu dzɔdzɔe
Psalms103:7 Ena Mose nya eƒe mɔwo
Psalms103:8 Nublanuikpɔla kple amenuvelae nye Aƒetɔ
Psalms103:9 Maka mo na ame ɣe sia ɣi loo
Psalms103:10 Mewɔna na mí ɖe miaƒe nuvɔ̃wo nu loo
Psalms103:11 Elabe ale si dziƒo kɔ boo tso anyigba gbɔe la
Psalms103:12 Ale si ɣedzeƒe didi tso ɣetoɖoƒe gbɔe la
Psalms103:13 Ale si vi tɔ́ kpɔa nublanui na viawoe la
Psalms103:14 Elabe enya míaƒe wɔwɔme
Psalms103:15 Gbetɔ ya la
Psalms103:16 Gake ne ya ƒo to edzi ko la
Psalms103:17 Ke Aƒetɔ ƒe amenuveve li tso mavɔ me yi mavɔ me na ame siwo vɔ̃nɛ
Psalms103:18 Eli na ame siwo léa eƒe nubabla me ɖe asi
Psalms103:19 Aƒetɔ ɖo eƒe fiazikpui anyi ɖe dziƒowo

Psalms104:1 Luʋɔnye
Psalms104:2 wòe tsyɔ kekeli abe avɔ ene
Psalms104:3 Wòe tsɔ wò xɔtiwo ƒo tsiwo dzi
Psalms104:4 wòe wɔ yawo wò dɔtsɔlawoe
Psalms104:5 Wòe ɖo anyigba la gɔme anyi ɖe eƒe gɔmeɖoɖowo dzi; ale be mate ŋu aʋã akpɔ gbeɖe o.
Psalms104:6 Wòe do tɔ goglowo nɛ abe awu ene; tsiawo kɔ gbɔ towo ta.
Psalms104:7 Wosí le wò agbodzedze nu
Psalms104:8 Towo kɔ yi dzi
Psalms104:9 Wòe ɖo liƒo si ŋu womagbɔ o
Psalms104:10 Wòe na tsiwo ŋɔ le baliwo me; wosí to togbɛwo dome
Psalms104:11 wonaa tsi gbemelã ɖe sia ɖe le gbedzi be wòano; gbetedziwo faa woƒe tsikɔwuame nu.
Psalms104:12 Dziƒoxeviwo wɔa nɔƒe ɖe wo xa; wodzia ha le atilɔawo me.
Psalms104:13 Wòe dea tsi towo tso wò kɔkɔƒe la
Psalms104:14 Wòe nana be gbe tsina na lãwo kple nukuwo na amegbetɔ be wòade agble
Psalms104:15 Wòe naa wain be wòado dzidzɔ na ame ƒe dzi
Psalms104:16 Wodea tsi Aƒetɔ ƒe atiwo wòsua wo nyuie
Psalms104:17 Xeviwo wɔa atɔ ɖe wo me; damixe tso aƒe ɖe kpomitiwo me.
Psalms104:18 Gbemegbɔ̃wo tɔe nye to kɔkɔawo; agakpewo nye sitsoƒe na hotoklolowo.
Psalms104:19 Wòe wɔ ɣleti ne wòade dzesi ɣeyiɣiwo; ɣe nya ɣe si ɣi wòaɖo to.
Psalms104:20 Wòe wɔ viviti wònye zã
Psalms104:21 Dzataviwo ɖea gbe nɔa nuléle dim
Psalms104:22 Ne agu dze la
Psalms104:23 Amegbetɔ yia eƒe dɔ gbɔ
Psalms104:24 Aƒetɔ wò dɔwɔwɔwo sɔ gbɔ loo! Èwɔ wo katã le nunya me; anyigba yɔ fũu kple wò nuwɔwɔwo.
Psalms104:25 Atsiaƒue nye ekem ɖaa; elolo
Psalms104:26 Tɔdziʋuwo toa edzi
Psalms104:27 Nu siawo katã le asiwò nu kpɔm be nàna nuɖuɖu yewo le enaɣi.
Psalms104:28 Ne ètsɔe na wo la
Psalms104:29 Ne èɣla wò ŋkume la
Psalms104:30 Ne èɖo wò Gbɔgbɔ ɖa la
Psalms104:31 Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe nenɔ anyi tegbee; Aƒetɔ nekpɔ dzidzɔ le eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo ŋu
Psalms104:32 eya ame si kpɔa anyigba
Psalms104:33 Madzi ha na Aƒetɔ zi ale si mele agbe; madzi kafukafuha na nye Mawu esi menya le agbe ko.
Psalms104:34 Nye ŋugbledede nedze eŋu
Psalms104:35 Na nuvɔ̃wɔlawo natsrɔ̃ le anyigba dzi keŋkeŋ
Psalms105:1 Mida akpe na Aƒetɔ
Psalms105:2 Midzi ha nɛ
Psalms105:3 Mitsɔ eŋkɔ kɔkɔe la ƒo adegbee; mina ame siwo katã dia Aƒetɔ ƒe dzi natso aseye!
Psalms105:4 Midi Aƒetɔ kple eƒe ŋusẽ
Psalms105:5 Miɖo ŋku nukudɔ siwo wòwɔ la dzi
Psalms105:6 O
Psalms105:7 Eyae nye Aƒetɔ mía Mawu la
Psalms105:8 Eɖoa ŋu eƒe nubabla la tegbee
Psalms105:9 nu si wòbla kple Abraham
Psalms105:10 esi dzi wòɖo kpee na Yakob abe se ene
Psalms105:11 be: “Miawoe matsɔ Kanaan-nyigba la ana abe domenyinu si anye mia tɔ gome ene.”
Psalms105:12 Esi womesɔ gbɔ o
Psalms105:13 nɔa tsatsam tso dukɔ gbɔ yi dukɔ gbɔ
Psalms105:14 meɖe mɔ na ame aɖeke be wòate wo ɖe anyi o. Eka mo na fiawo le wo ta
Psalms105:15 be: “Migaka asi nye amesiaminawo ŋu o
Psalms105:16 Esi wòhe dɔwuame va anyigba la dzi
Psalms105:17 edɔ ŋutsu aɖe ɖe wo ŋgɔ
Psalms105:18 Kɔsɔkɔsɔ de abi afɔ nɛ
Psalms105:19 va se ɖe esi nya si wògblɔ la va eme
Psalms105:20 Fia la dɔ woɖaɖee le gaxɔ me
Psalms105:21 Etsɔe ɖo aƒetɔ ɖe eƒe aƒe dzi kple eƒe nuwo katã dzikpɔla
Psalms105:22 be wòafia nu eƒe amegãwo ale si dze eŋu
Psalms105:23 Tete Israel va Egipte; Yakob nɔ Xam-nyigba dzi amedzroe.
Psalms105:24 Aƒetɔ na eƒe dukɔ la dzi ŋutɔ
Psalms105:25 Etrɔ woƒe dziwo be woalé fu yeƒe dukɔ la
Psalms105:26 Edɔ eƒe dɔla Mose kple Aron
Psalms105:27 Wowɔ eƒe dzesiwo le wo dome kple nukunuwo le Xam-nyigba dzi.
Psalms105:28 Edɔ viviti ɖa
Psalms105:29 Etrɔ woƒe tsiwo wozu ʋu
Psalms105:30 Akpɔkplɔwo dzi ɖe woƒe anyigba dzi
Psalms105:31 Eƒo nu
Psalms105:32 Ena tsikpewo dza ɖe tsidzadza teƒe
Psalms105:33 Egblẽ woƒe wainkawo kple gbotiwo
Psalms105:34 Eƒo nu
Psalms105:35 Woɖu gbewo
Psalms105:36 Ewu ŋgɔgbeviwo katã le woƒe anyigba dzi
Psalms105:37 Tete wòkplɔ Israel do goe kple klosalo kpakple sika; ame aɖeke mekli nu le eƒe toawo dome o.
Psalms105:38 Egiptetɔwo kpɔ dzidzɔ esime wodzo
Psalms105:39 Ena alilikpo do vɔvɔli ɖe wo dzi
Psalms105:40 Wobia
Psalms105:41 Eʋu agakpe nu
Psalms105:42 Elabe eɖo ŋku eƒe ŋugbedodo kɔkɔe la kple eƒe dɔla Abraham dzi.
Psalms105:43 Ale wòkplɔ eƒe dukɔ la dzoe kple dzidzɔ; eƒe ame tiatiawo dzo kple hadzidzi.
Psalms105:44 Etsɔ dukɔwo ƒe anyigbawo na wo
Psalms105:45 kple taɖodzinu be ne woalé eƒe ɖoɖowo me ɖe asi ahawɔ eƒe sewo dzi. Mikafu Aƒetɔ.
Psalms106:1 Mikafu Aƒetɔ! Mida akpe na Aƒetɔ
Psalms106:2 Ame kae ate ŋu agblɔ nu klitsu siwo Aƒetɔ wɔ
Psalms106:3 Woyra ame siwo drɔ̃a ʋɔnu dzɔdzɔe
Psalms106:4 Aƒetɔ
Psalms106:5 na makpɔ wò ame tiatiawo ƒe nunyoname
Psalms106:6 Mí kple mía tɔgbuiwo míewɔ nuvɔ̃
Psalms106:7 Mía tɔgbuiwo
Psalms106:8 Ke exɔ na wo le eŋkɔ la ta
Psalms106:9 Eblu ɖe Aƒlaƒu la ta
Psalms106:10 Ale wòxɔ na wo tso ketɔ la si me
Psalms106:11 Tsi nyè tsyɔ woƒe ketɔwo; wo dometɔ ɖeka teti hã metsi agbe o.
Psalms106:12 Tete woxɔ eƒe nyawo dzi se
Psalms106:13 Ke eteƒe medidi hafi woŋlɔ eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo be o
Psalms106:14 Ke nu dzro wo vevie le gbedadaƒo
Psalms106:15 ena nu si wobia la wo
Psalms106:16 Esime amewo ʋã ŋu Mose kple Aron
Psalms106:17 anyigba ke nu mi Datan
Psalms106:18 Dzo hã bi nu le woƒe ameha la dome
Psalms106:19 Wowɔ nyivi le Xoreb
Psalms106:20 Woɖɔli Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe la kple nyitsu
Psalms106:21 Woŋlɔ Mawu
Psalms106:22 ame si wɔ nukudɔwo le Xam-nyigba dzi kple ŋɔdzinuwo le Aƒlaƒu la nu la
Psalms106:23 Eya ta egblɔ be yeatsrɔ̃ wo. Ɖe Mose
Psalms106:24 Tete wodo vlo anyigba nyui la
Psalms106:25 Wolĩ liʋiliʋĩ le woƒe agbadɔwo me
Psalms106:26 Eya ta ekɔ asi dzi
Psalms106:27 yeakaka woƒe dzidzimeviwo ɖe dukɔwo dome
Psalms106:28 Tete wotsɔ wo ɖokui lé ɖe Peor Baal ŋu
Psalms106:29 wotsɔ woƒe nuwɔnawo do dziku na Aƒetɔ
Psalms106:30 Tete Pinehas tsi tsitre de nu nyadzɔdzɔ la me
Psalms106:31 Wobu esia nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ nɛ
Psalms106:32 Wodo dziku nɛ le Meriba-tsi la gbɔ
Psalms106:33 elabe wona eƒe gbɔgbɔ se veve
Psalms106:34 Wometsrɔ̃ dukɔawo abe ale si Aƒetɔ gblɔ na wo la ene o.
Psalms106:35 Ke wotsaka kple dukɔwo
Psalms106:36 Wosubɔ woƒe legbawo
Psalms106:37 Wotsɔ wo viŋutsuwo kple wo vinyɔnuwo sa vɔe na gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo.
Psalms106:38 Wokɔ ʋu maɖifɔ ɖi
Psalms106:39 Ale woƒo ɖi wo ɖokui to woƒe nuwɔnawo me
Psalms106:40 Tete Aƒetɔ do dziku ɖe eƒe dukɔ la ŋu
Psalms106:41 Etsɔ wo de asi na dukɔwo ale be ame siwo lé fu wo la
Psalms106:42 Woƒe futɔwo te wo ɖe anyi eye wobɔbɔ wo ɖe woƒe ŋusẽ te.
Psalms106:43 Eɖe wo zi geɖe; ke woɖo tame dze aglã
Psalms106:44 Ke hã la
Psalms106:45 Exa ɖe wo ta ɖo ŋku eƒe nubabla dzi
Psalms106:46 Ena ame siwo katã ɖe aboyo wo la
Psalms106:47 Aƒetɔ
Psalms106:48 Woakafu Aƒetɔ
Psalms107:1 Mida akpe na Aƒetɔ elabe eƒe dɔme nyo
Psalms107:2 Mina ame siwo Aƒetɔ ɖe la nagblɔ nenema; ame siwo wòɖe tso xaxa me
Psalms107:3 eye wòƒo wo nu ƒu tso anyigbaawo dzi; tso ɣedzeƒe kple ɣetoɖoƒe tso dzigbeme kple anyigbeme.
Psalms107:4 Wo dometɔ aɖewo tsa tsaglalã le kegbegbewo; womekpɔ mɔ yi du aɖeke me be woaɖanɔ eme o.
Psalms107:5 Dɔ kple tsikɔ wu wo; nu te woƒe luʋɔ ŋu le wo me.
Psalms107:6 Tete wodo ɣli na Aƒetɔ le woƒe xaxa me
Psalms107:7 Ekplɔ wo to mɔ dzɔdzɔe dzi va se ɖe esime woɖo du aɖe gbɔ be woanɔ eme.
Psalms107:8 Mina woada akpe na Aƒetɔ
Psalms107:9 Elabe ena ame siwo tsikɔ wu la ɖi kɔ; etsɔ nu nyuiwo ɖi ƒo na ame siwo dɔ wu la.
Psalms107:10 Ame aɖewo bɔbɔ nɔ viviti me kple blukɔ tsiɖitsiɖi me; gamenɔlawo le fukpekpe kple ga me.
Psalms107:11 Elabe wodze aglã ɖe Mawu ƒe nyawo ŋu
Psalms107:12 Wote woƒe dziwo ɖe anyi kple dɔ sesẽ
Psalms107:13 Tete wodo ɣli na Aƒetɔ le woƒe xaxa la me
Psalms107:14 Ehe wo do goe tso viviti kple blukɔ tsiɖitsiɖi me
Psalms107:15 Mina woada akpe na Aƒetɔ le eƒe amenuveve kple eƒe nukudɔ siwo wòwɔ na amegbetɔ viwo la ta.
Psalms107:16 Elabe egbã akɔbliʋɔtruwo
Psalms107:17 Ɖewo dze dɔ to woƒe agbe vlo nɔnɔ me
Psalms107:18 Nuɖuɖu ɖe sia ɖe ƒomevi nyɔ ŋu na wo; wogogo ku ƒe agbowo.
Psalms107:19 Tete wodo ɣli na Aƒetɔ
Psalms107:20 Eɖo eƒe nya ɖa
Psalms107:21 Mina woada akpe na Aƒetɔ
Psalms107:22 Mina woasa akpedadavɔ
Psalms107:23 Ɖewo le tɔdziʋuwo me le ƒu dzi
Psalms107:24 Wokpɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo kple eƒe nukudɔwo le tɔ gɔme ke hã.
Psalms107:25 Elabe eɖe gbe
Psalms107:26 Ʋuawo yi dzi boo gbɔ va anyi; wo me nɔlawo bu dzideƒo le woƒe dzɔgbevɔ̃e la me.
Psalms107:27 Wotrɔ to me
Psalms107:28 Tete wodo ɣli na Aƒetɔ le woƒe xaxa la me
Psalms107:29 Ena ahom la dze kɔ anyi kpoo
Psalms107:30 Tete dzi dzɔ wo elabe ɖoɖoe zi azɔ
Psalms107:31 Mina woada akpe na Aƒetɔ le eƒe amenuveve kple eƒe nukudɔ siwo wòwɔ na amegbetɔ viwo la ta!
Psalms107:32 Mina woadoe ɖe dzi le dukɔa ƒe takpekpe me
Psalms107:33 Eyae trɔa tɔsisiwo
Psalms107:34 anyigba wɔnu trɔna zua dzeteƒe le edzinɔlawo ƒe nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ta.
Psalms107:35 Etrɔa kegbegbe wòzua tsitáwo; trɔa kuɖiɖinyigba wòzua tsidzɔƒe.
Psalms107:36 Ale wòɖea mɔ dɔwuitɔwo nɔa afi ma
Psalms107:37 Wodea nukugblewo kple waingblewo
Psalms107:38 To eƒe yayra me la
Psalms107:39 Ne wozu ʋɛ
Psalms107:40 edoa vlo woƒe amegãwo vevie
Psalms107:41 Ke ekɔa hiãtɔwo ya ɖe dzi tso fukpekpe me
Psalms107:42 Ame dzɔdzɔewo kpɔa esia
Psalms107:43 Ame sia ame si nya nu la
Psalms108:1 Nye dzi dze eme
Psalms108:2 Saŋku kple kasaŋku
Psalms108:3 Aƒetɔ
Psalms108:4 Elabe wò amenuveve kɔ gbɔ dziƒowo ŋu yi; wò nuteƒewɔwɔ yi ɖatɔ alilikpowo.
Psalms108:5 Mawu
Psalms108:6 Be woaɖe wò ame siwo nèlɔ̃ vevie la; tsɔ wò nuɖusi kpe ɖe mía ŋu
Psalms108:7 Mawu do ŋugbe le eƒe kɔkɔeƒe la be: “Makpɔ dzidzɔ ama Sixem
Psalms108:8 Gilead nye tɔnye; Manase nye tɔnye; Efrayim nye nye gakuku; Yuda nye nye fiatikplɔ.
Psalms108:9 Nye tsileze nye Moab. Maɖe nye afɔkpa aƒu gbe ɖe Edom. Mado dziɖuɣli ɖe Filistitɔwo ta.”
Psalms108:10 Ame ka akplɔm ayi du sesẽ la mee? Ame kae akplɔm aɖo Edom?
Psalms108:11 Mawu
Psalms108:12 O
Psalms108:13 Ne Mawu le mía dzi la
Psalms109:1 Wò
Psalms109:2 Elabe ame vɔ̃ɖi kple ameblela ke nu ɖe ŋunye
Psalms109:3 Wotsɔ fulényawo ɖe to ɖem
Psalms109:4 Ɖe lɔlɔ̃ si metsɔ na wo teƒe la
Psalms109:5 Ale wotsɔa vɔ̃ ɖoa nyui teƒe nam
Psalms109:6 Mida ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖe eŋu; mina amenutsola nakplɔe yi ʋɔnui.
Psalms109:7 Ne wodrɔ̃ ʋɔnui la
Psalms109:8 Eƒe ŋkekewo dzi neɖe kpɔtɔ; ame bubu nexɔ eƒe nuwo!
Psalms109:9 Viawo nezu tsyɔ̃eviwo; srɔ̃a nezu ahosi!
Psalms109:10 Viawo nenɔ tsa glãla tsam anɔ nu biam; wonenyà wo do goe le aƒedo si me wole la me.
Psalms109:11 Fetɔ nelɔ eƒe nuwo katã; ame tutɔwo neha nu siwo wòwɔ dɔ kpɔ la.
Psalms109:12 Ame aɖeke meganɔ anyi awɔ dɔmenyo nɛ loo
Psalms109:13 Eƒe dzidzimeviwo netsrɔ̃; eƒe ŋkɔ netutu ɖa le dzidzime evelia me.
Psalms109:14 Woneɖo ŋku tɔgbuiawo ƒe vodadawo dzi le Aƒetɔ gbɔ
Psalms109:15 Wonenɔ Aƒetɔ ŋkume ɖaa; womegaɖo ŋku edzi azɔ le anyigba dzi o.
Psalms109:16 Elabe meɖo ŋku edzi wɔ dɔmenyo o; ke boŋ eti ame dahe kple hiãtɔ kpakple ame si ƒe dzi gbã la yome yi ku me.
Psalms109:17 Elɔ̃ fiƒoƒo de ame; na fiƒodewo nava edzi. Melɔ̃ yayra o; yayra nenɔ adzɔge sãa tso egbɔ.
Psalms109:18 Edo fiƒode abe awu ene; neɖo lã me nɛ abe tsi ene
Psalms109:19 Nenɔ abe avɔ si wòtsyɔna la ene; nenɔ abe alidziblanu si wòtsɔna blaa ali dzi gbe sia gbe la ene!
Psalms109:20 Esia nenye ame siwo tsɔ nya ɖe ŋunye kple ame siwo le nya vɔ̃e gblɔm ɖe ŋunye la ƒe fetu tso Aƒetɔ gbɔ.
Psalms109:21 Ke wò
Psalms109:22 Elabe ame dahe kple hiãtɔ menye
Psalms109:23 Nunye yi abe vɔvɔli le fiẽ me ene; woʋuʋum ƒu gbe abe ʋetsuvi ene.
Psalms109:24 Metsi nu dɔ ʋuu nye klowo gbɔdzɔ; ami no le lã me nam.
Psalms109:25 Mezu alɔmeɖenu na nunyetsolawo. Ne wokpɔm la
Psalms109:26 Kpe ɖe ŋunye
Psalms109:27 Na woanya be wò asie nye esia; wò Aƒetɔ ye wɔe.
Psalms109:28 Woawo neƒo fi dem faa
Psalms109:29 Ame siwo le nunye tsom la
Psalms109:30 Matsɔ nye nu ada akpe gã ŋutɔ na Aƒetɔ. Makafui le ameha gã la dome.
Psalms109:31 Elabe etsia tsitre ɖe hiãtɔ ƒe ɖusime be yeaɖee tso ame siwo tso kufia nɛ la si me.
Psalms110:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na nye Aƒetɔ be: “Bɔbɔ nɔ nye ɖusime va se ɖe esime metsɔ wò futɔwo wɔ wò afɔɖodzinui.”
Psalms110:2 Aƒetɔ le wò fiatikplɔ
Psalms110:3 Wò dukɔmetɔwo atsɔ wo ɖokui ake faa le wò aʋakpegbe le to kɔkɔeawo dzi. Abe zãmu tso ŋdi ƒe dɔ me ene la
Psalms110:4 Aƒetɔ ka atam
Psalms110:5 Aƒetɔ la le wò ɖusime; agbã fiawo gudugudu le eƒe dɔmedzoedogbe.
Psalms110:6 Adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu le dukɔwo dome
Psalms110:7 Ano tsi le tɔʋu sue si le mɔ to la me; eya ta afɔ ta dzi.
Psalms111:1 Mikafu Aƒetɔ! Mada akpe na Aƒetɔ kple nye dzi blibo le nuteƒewɔlawo dome
Psalms111:2 Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo lolo; ame siwo katã kpɔa ŋudzedze le wo ŋu la
Psalms111:3 Eƒe dɔwɔwɔ yɔ fũu kple bubu kpakple gãnyenye
Psalms111:4 Enana be woɖoa ŋku eƒe nukudɔwo dzi; amenuvela kple nublanuikpɔlae nye Aƒetɔ.
Psalms111:5 Enaa nuɖuɖu ame siwo vɔ̃nɛ; eɖoa ŋu eƒe nubabla la ɖaa.
Psalms111:6 Eɖe eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo ƒe ŋusẽ fia eƒe dukɔ la
Psalms111:7 Eƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo le eteƒe
Psalms111:8 Eɖo wo gɔme anyi tso mavɔ me yi mavɔ me
Psalms111:9 Eɖo ɖeɖe ɖe eƒe dukɔ la
Psalms111:10 Aƒetɔ -vɔvɔ̃ nye nunya ƒe gɔmedzedze. Ame siwo katã léa eme ɖe asi la
Psalms112:1 Mikafu Aƒetɔ! Woyra ame si vɔ̃a Aƒetɔ
Psalms112:2 Ŋusẽ anɔ eƒe dzidzimeviwo ŋu le anyigba la dzi. Woayra nuteƒewɔlawo ƒe dzidzime.
Psalms112:3 Nunyoname kple kesinɔnuwo le eƒeme
Psalms112:4 Kekeli dona ɖe viviti me na nuteƒewɔlawo. Aƒetɔ nye amenuvela
Psalms112:5 Eme nyona na ame si nyoa dɔme
Psalms112:6 Elabe womaʋã ame dzɔdzɔe akpɔ o; woaɖo ŋku edzi tegbee.
Psalms112:7 Mevɔ̃a nyadzɔdzɔ vɔ̃ aɖeke o; eƒe dzi metsona o
Psalms112:8 Dzi le eƒo
Psalms112:9 Enaa nu faa
Psalms112:10 Ame vɔ̃ɖi kpɔa esia
Psalms113:1 Mikafu Aƒetɔ! Mikafui! Mi Aƒetɔ ƒe dɔlawo
Psalms113:2 Woakafu Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ tso fifia yi ɖe mavɔ me!
Psalms113:3 Edze be woakafu Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ tso ɣedzeƒe va se ɖe ɣetoɖoƒe.
Psalms113:4 Aƒetɔ kɔ gbɔ dukɔwo katã ta
Psalms113:5 Ame kae le abe Aƒetɔ
Psalms113:6 eye wòle dziƒowo kple anyigba kpɔm ɖa ʋĩi le ete?
Psalms113:7 Efɔa ame dahe tso ʋuʋudedi me
Psalms113:8 be yeawɔ wo woabɔbɔ nɔ amegãwo dome
Psalms113:9 Enaa aƒe konɔ wònɔa eme
Psalms114:1 Esime Israel ʋu tso Egipte
Psalms114:2 Yuda zu eƒe kɔkɔeƒe

Psalms114:4 Towo ti kpo abe agbowo ene
Psalms114:5 O atsiaƒu
Psalms114:6 O towo
Psalms114:7 Anyigba
Psalms114:8 Eyae trɔ agakpe wòzu tá
Psalms115:1 Menye míawo o
Psalms115:2 Nu ka ta dukɔwo nanɔ biabiam be: “Afi ka gɔ̃ woƒe Mawu la le?”
Psalms115:3 Míaƒe Mawu la le dziƒowo; nu sia nu si dze eŋu lae wòwɔna.
Psalms115:4 Woƒe legbawo nye klosalo kple sika
Psalms115:5 Nu li na wo; womeƒoa nu o. Ŋku li na wo; womekpɔa nu o.
Psalms115:6 To li na wo
Psalms115:7 Asi li na wo; wometéa nu kpɔ o. Afɔ li na wo; womezɔa azɔli o; womewɔa gbeɖiɖi aɖeke tso ve me o.
Psalms115:8 Wo wɔlawo sɔ kpli wo
Psalms115:9 Israel
Psalms115:10 Aron ƒe ƒome
Psalms115:11 Mi ame siwo vɔ̃a Aƒetɔ
Psalms115:12 Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋku le mía ŋu
Psalms115:13 ayra ame siwo vɔ̃a Aƒetɔ
Psalms115:14 Aƒetɔ nena miadzi fũu
Psalms115:15 Aƒetɔ neyra mi
Psalms115:16 Dziƒowo nye Aƒetɔ ƒe dziƒowo
Psalms115:17 Ame kukuwo mekafua Aƒetɔ o
Psalms115:18 Ke míawo míakafu Aƒetɔ tso fifia yi ɖe mavɔ me. Mikafu Aƒetɔ.
Psalms116:1 Melɔ̃ Aƒetɔ
Psalms116:2 Esi wòɖoa tom ta la
Psalms116:3 Ku ɖo mɔ̀ ƒo xlãm; tsiẽƒe ƒe ŋɔdzi lém
Psalms116:4 Tete meyɔ Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ be: “O Aƒetɔ
Psalms116:5 Amenuvela kple nu dzɔdzɔe wɔlae nye Aƒetɔ; mía Mawu la nye nublanuikpɔla.
Psalms116:6 Aƒetɔ kpɔa ame gblɔewo ta. Esi megbɔdzɔ la
Psalms116:7 Luʋɔnye
Psalms116:8 Elabe èɖe nye luʋɔ tso ku me; nye ŋku tso aɖatsi si me
Psalms116:9 Mele zɔzɔm le Aƒetɔ ŋkume le agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi.
Psalms116:10 Melé nye xɔse me ɖe asi
Psalms116:11 Esi dzi ɖe le ƒonye la
Psalms116:12 Nu ka matsɔ aɖo dɔmenyo gbogbo siwo katã Aƒetɔ wɔ nam la teƒe nɛ?
Psalms116:13 Makɔ́ xɔnamekplu la dzi ayɔ Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ.
Psalms116:14 Maxe nye adzɔgbeɖefe na Aƒetɔ le eƒe dukɔ blibo la ŋkume.
Psalms116:15 Aƒetɔ ƒe ame kɔkɔewo ƒe ku nye nu xɔasi le eŋkume.
Psalms116:16 O Aƒetɔ
Psalms116:17 Masa akpedadavɔ na wò
Psalms116:18 Maxe nye adzɔgbeɖefewo na Aƒetɔ le eƒe dukɔ blibo la ŋkume
Psalms116:19 le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la ƒe xɔxɔnuwo le mewò
Psalms117:1 Mi dukɔwo katã
Psalms117:2 Elabe eƒe amenuveve lolo na mí
Psalms118:1 Mida akpe na Aƒetɔ
Psalms118:2 Mina Israel nagblɔ be: “Eƒe amenuveve li tegbee.”
Psalms118:3 Mina Aron ƒe ƒome nagblɔ be: “Eƒe amenuveve li tegbee.”
Psalms118:4 Mina ame siwo vɔ̃a Aƒetɔ nagblɔ be: “Eƒe amenuveve li tegbee.”
Psalms118:5 Meyɔ Aƒetɔ le xaxa me; Aƒetɔ tɔ nam
Psalms118:6 Esi Aƒetɔ le dzinye ta la
Psalms118:7 Aƒetɔ le dzinye be yeakpe ɖe ŋunye. Le dziɖuɖu me makpɔ ame siwo lé fum la ɖa.
Psalms118:8 Enyo be woasí Aƒetɔ atso wu be woaɖo dzi ɖe amegbetɔ ŋu.
Psalms118:9 Enyo be woasí Aƒetɔ atso wu be woaɖo dzi ɖe amegãwo ŋu.
Psalms118:10 Dukɔwo katã ɖe to ɖem; Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ mee metsrɔ̃ wo ɖa le.
Psalms118:11 Woɖe to ɖem
Psalms118:12 Woƒo kɔ ɖe ŋunye abe anyiwo ene
Psalms118:13 Wotu asim sesĩe ale be menɔ anyi dzem; ke Aƒetɔ kpe ɖe ŋunye.
Psalms118:14 Aƒetɔ ye nye nye ŋusẽ kple nye ha; eyae zu nye xɔname.
Psalms118:15 Ɖo to
Psalms118:16 Aƒetɔ ƒe nuɖusi dea dzi
Psalms118:17 Nyemaku o
Psalms118:18 Aƒetɔ he to nam vevie
Psalms118:19 Miʋu nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ ƒe agbowo nam
Psalms118:20 Aƒetɔ ƒe agboe nye esia; ame dzɔdzɔewoe ato enu age ɖe eme.
Psalms118:21 Meda akpe na wò be nètɔ nam
Psalms118:22 Kpe si xɔtulawo gbe lae trɔ zu dzogoedzikpe la.
Psalms118:23 Aƒetɔ ƒe nuwɔnae nye esia
Psalms118:24 Esiae nye ŋkeke si Aƒetɔ wɔ; mina míatso aseye
Psalms118:25 O Aƒetɔ
Psalms118:26 Mawu neyra ame si gbɔna le Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ me. Míeyra mi tso Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me.
Psalms118:27 Aƒetɔ ye nye Mawu
Psalms118:28 Wòe nye nye Mawu; mada akpe na wò. Wòe nye nye Mawu
Psalms118:29 Mida akpe na Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:1 Mawu yra ame siwo ƒe mɔ ŋu mokaka mele o; ame siwo nɔa agbe ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe se la nu.
Psalms119:2 Mawu yra ame siwo wɔa eƒe ɖaseɖiɖiwo dzi
Psalms119:3 ame siwo hã mewɔa nuvɔ̃ɖi aɖeke o; ke wozɔa eƒe mɔwo dzi.
Psalms119:4 Ède wò sewo
Psalms119:5 O
Psalms119:6 Ekema womado ŋukpem ne melé ŋku ɖe wò seawo katã ŋu o.
Psalms119:7 Ne mesrɔ̃ wò se dzɔdzɔeawo la
Psalms119:8 Mawɔ wò ɖoɖowo dzi; mègagblẽm ɖi keŋkeŋ o.
Psalms119:9 Ale ke ɖekakpui ate ŋu anɔ agbe dzadzɛe? To eŋudzɔdzɔ kple wò nya la me ye.
Psalms119:10 Medi wò kple nye dzi blibo; mègana matra mɔ tso wò seawo gbɔ o.
Psalms119:11 Medzra wò nya ɖo ɖe nye dzime
Psalms119:12 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:13 Meke nu xlẽ se siwo katã do tso wò nu me la fia.
Psalms119:14 Mekpɔa dzidzɔ ɖe wò ɖaseɖiɖiwo ŋu
Psalms119:15 Made ŋugble le wò sewo ŋu
Psalms119:16 Madzɔ dzi ɖe wò ɖoɖowo ŋu; nyemaŋlɔ wò nya be o.
Psalms119:17 Lé wò dɔla nyuie be mate ŋu anɔ agbe alé ŋku ɖe wò nya la ŋu.
Psalms119:18 Ʋu nye ŋkuwo be mate ŋu akpɔ nukunu siwo le wò se la me.
Psalms119:19 Amedzroe menye le anyigba dzi; mègaɣla wò seawo ɖem o.
Psalms119:20 Nye luʋɔ se veve kakaka le wò sewo dim vevie ɣe sia ɣi.
Psalms119:21 Èblu ɖe dàdala
Psalms119:22 Ɖe woƒe ŋukpe kple vlodoame ɖa le ŋunye
Psalms119:23 Togbɔ be amegãwo bɔbɔ nɔ anyi le nugbe ɖom ɖe ŋunye hã la
Psalms119:24 Wò ɖaseɖiɖiwo doa dzidzɔ nam; woawoe nye nye adaŋudelawo.
Psalms119:25 Nye luʋɔ lé ɖe ʋuʋudedi ŋu; gbɔ agbem le wò nya la nu!
Psalms119:26 Esi megblɔ nye nuwɔnawo la
Psalms119:27 Na mase wò sewo gɔme
Psalms119:28 Nye luʋɔ xa nu ʋuu
Psalms119:29 Te aʋatsomɔ ɖa sãa tso gbɔnye
Psalms119:30 Metia nuteƒewɔwɔ ƒe mɔ; metsɔ wò sewo ɖo anyi ɖe ŋkunye me.
Psalms119:31 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:32 Manɔ du dzi ɖe wò seawo dzi wɔwɔ ŋu
Psalms119:33 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:34 Na gɔmesesem be mate ŋu alé wò se me ɖe asi
Psalms119:35 Kplɔm to wò sededewo ƒe mɔ dzi
Psalms119:36 Trɔ nye dzi ɖe wò ɖaseɖiɖiwo ŋu
Psalms119:37 Na maɖe kɔ ɖa le nu dzodzrowo kpɔkpɔ ŋuti. Gbɔ agbem le wò mɔ la dzi!
Psalms119:38 Ɖo kpe wò ŋugbedodo la dzi na wò dɔla; ame siwo vɔ̃a wò la ƒe ŋugbedodo la.
Psalms119:39 Na ŋukpe si vɔ̃m mele la nu nayi
Psalms119:40 Kpɔ ɖa
Psalms119:41 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:42 Ekema makpɔ ŋuɖoɖo na ame siwo ɖea alɔ me le ŋunye la
Psalms119:43 Mègaɖe nyateƒenya la ɖa le nunye keŋkeŋ o
Psalms119:44 Mawɔ wò se la dzi enuenu tegbee.
Psalms119:45 Mazɔ ablɔɖetɔe elabe mewɔ wò sewo dzi.
Psalms119:46 Maƒo nu le wò ɖaseɖiɖiwo ŋu le fiawo ŋkume
Psalms119:47 Elabe wò sededeawo doa dzidzɔ nam; melɔ̃ wo.
Psalms119:48 Medea bubu wò sewo ŋu
Psalms119:49 Ɖo ŋku wò nya si nègblɔ na wò dɔla la dzi; eyae na mele mɔ kpɔm.
Psalms119:50 Esia nye akɔfafa nam le nye fukpekpe me
Psalms119:51 Mawu mavɔ̃lawo le fewu ɖum le ŋunye vevie
Psalms119:52 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:53 Dzi kuam helihelĩ le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ta
Psalms119:54 Wò ɖoɖowo nye nye hadzidziwo le nye amedzroƒe la me.
Psalms119:55 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:56 Yayra sia su asinye elabe medzra wò sewo ɖo.
Psalms119:57 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:58 Mele kuku ɖem na wò kple nye dzi blibo be nàve nunye le wò ŋugbedodo la nu.
Psalms119:59 Ne mebu tame le wò mɔwo ŋu la
Psalms119:60 Mewɔna kaba
Psalms119:61 Togbɔ be ame vɔ̃ɖi tsɔ ka tre mɔ̀ ɖe to ɖem hã la
Psalms119:62 Le zã titina la
Psalms119:63 Menye ame siwo katã vɔ̃a wò kple ame siwo wɔa wò sewo dzi la
Psalms119:64 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:65 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:66 Fia nyametsotso nyui kple sidzedzem elabe mexɔ wò sededewo dzi se.
Psalms119:67 Hafi woahe to nam la
Psalms119:68 Ènyo
Psalms119:69 Mawu mavɔ̃lawo ka aʋatso ɖe asinye tsɔ gblẽ ŋunye; gake melé wò sewo me ɖe asi kple dzi blibo.
Psalms119:70 Woƒe dzi ku atri abe ami ene
Psalms119:71 Enyo nam ŋutɔ be wohe to nam be mate ŋu asrɔ̃ wò ɖoɖowo.
Psalms119:72 Se si tso wò nu me nyo nam wu klosalo kple sika akpe nanewo.
Psalms119:73 Wòe wɔm
Psalms119:74 Ame siwo vɔ̃a wò la akpɔm
Psalms119:75 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:76 Na wò amenuveve nafa akɔ nam abe ale si nèdo ŋugbe na wò dɔla ene.
Psalms119:77 Kpɔ nublanui nam ne manɔ agbe
Psalms119:78 Na ŋu nakpe Mawu mavɔ̃lawo elabe wotem ɖe anyi madzemadzee. Nye ya la
Psalms119:79 Na ame siwo vɔ̃a wò la
Psalms119:80 Na nye dzi nawɔ wò ɖoɖowo dzi mokaka manɔmee
Psalms119:81 Nye luʋɔ lala wò ʋuu be nàva xɔ nam; mele mɔ kpɔm na wò nya la.
Psalms119:82 Nye ŋkuwo kpɔ mɔ na wò ŋugbedodowo do kpo. Mebia be: “Ɣe ka ɣi nàfa akɔ nam?”
Psalms119:83 Elabe mezu abe lãgbalẽgolo si ŋu dzɔble bla ɖo ene; ke hã
Psalms119:84 Ɣe ka ɣi wò dɔla ado dzi ase ɖo? Ɣe ka ɣi nèle ʋɔnu drɔ̃ ge yonyemetilawo?
Psalms119:85 Mawu mavɔ̃lawo ɖe ʋewo ɖi nam; ame siwo mewɔa wò seawo dzi o.
Psalms119:86 Kakaɖedzi le wò sededewo katã ŋu; amewo le yonyeme tim alakpatɔe; kpe ɖe ŋunye!
Psalms119:87 Wowum kloe le anyigba dzi; nyemegblẽ wò sededewo ɖi o.
Psalms119:88 Na matsi agbe le wò amenuveve la ta
Psalms119:89 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:90 Wò nuteƒewɔwɔ li tso dzidzime yi dzidzime. Wòe ɖo anyigba anyi
Psalms119:91 Le wò gbeɖeɖe nu la
Psalms119:92 Ne wò sea ɖe medoa dzidzɔ nam o la
Psalms119:93 Nyemaŋlɔ wò sewo be akpɔ o; elabe to wo dzi la
Psalms119:94 Tɔwò menye; xɔm ɖe agbe
Psalms119:95 Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo de xa ɖi be yewoatsrɔ̃m; ke mebua wò ɖaseɖiɖiwo ŋu.
Psalms119:96 Mekpɔ be seɖoƒe li na nu siwo katã de blibo; gake wò se la ya keke ta ale gbegbe.
Psalms119:97 O
Psalms119:98 Wò sedede la wɔm menya nu wu nye futɔwo elabe ele gbɔnye ɣe sia ɣi.
Psalms119:99 Mesea nu gɔme wu nye nufialawo katã
Psalms119:100 Mesea nu gɔme wu ame tsitsiwo
Psalms119:101 Metea ɖokuinye ɖa tso nuvɔ̃ɖi ɖe sia ɖe wɔwɔ gbɔ
Psalms119:102 Nyemete ɖa le wò sewo ŋu o
Psalms119:103 Wò nyawo vivina nam ta! Wovivina nam wu anyitsi le nye nu me.
Psalms119:104 Wò sewo na mesea nu gɔme
Psalms119:105 Wò nya nye akaɖi na nye afɔ kple kekeli na nye toƒe.
Psalms119:106 Meka atam
Psalms119:107 Mele fu kpem vevie. Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:108 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:109 Nye agbe ɖoa ŋɔdzi me enuenu
Psalms119:110 Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo tre mɔ̀ ɖi nam
Psalms119:111 Wò ɖaseɖiɖiwo nye nye domenyinu tegbee; ẽ
Psalms119:112 Metrɔ nye dzi ɖe wò ɖoɖowo dzi wɔwɔ ŋu tegbee va se ɖe nuwuwu.
Psalms119:113 Melé fu susuevetɔwo; ke melɔ̃ wò se la.
Psalms119:114 Beɖoƒe kple akpoxɔnu nènye nam; mele mɔ kpɔm na wò nya la.
Psalms119:115 Mi nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo
Psalms119:116 Lém ɖe te le wò ŋugbedodo la nu be mate ŋu anɔ agbe. Mègana ŋu nakpem le nye mɔkpɔkpɔ me o.
Psalms119:117 Lém ɖe te
Psalms119:118 Ègbe ame siwo katã tra mɔ tso wò ɖoɖowo gbɔ; ẽ
Psalms119:119 Èwɔ ame vɔ̃ɖiwo katã wozu abe numaɖinu ene
Psalms119:120 Nye ame bliboa mele vɔ̃wòm hele dzodzom nyànyanya; wò ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃wo na vɔvɔ̃ ɖom.
Psalms119:121 Mewɔ nu si le eteƒe kple nu si dzɔ; mègagblẽm ɖe ame siwo tem ɖe anyi la si me o.
Psalms119:122 De megbe na wò dɔla hena nyui. Mègana Mawu mavɔ̃lawo natem ɖe anyi o.
Psalms119:123 Nye ŋkuwo kpɔ mɔ na wò xɔname kple wò ŋugbedodo dzɔdzɔe la do kpo.
Psalms119:124 Wɔ nyui na wò dɔla le wò amenuveve la nu
Psalms119:125 Wò dɔla menye
Psalms119:126 Aƒetɔ ƒe nuwɔɣi ɖo edzi
Psalms119:127 Eya ta melɔ̃ wò sededewo wu sika
Psalms119:128 Eya ta mewɔa wò sewo katã dzi; melé fu alakpamɔ ɖe sia ɖe.
Psalms119:129 Wò ɖaseɖiɖiwo wɔ nuku
Psalms119:130 Ne wohe wò nya ɖe go la
Psalms119:131 Metsi dzi
Psalms119:132 Trɔ ɖe ŋunye
Psalms119:133 Li ke nye afɔɖeɖewo le wò ŋugbedodo la nu
Psalms119:134 Ɖem tso amegbetɔ ƒe teteɖeanyi me
Psalms119:135 Na wò mo naklẽ na wò dɔla
Psalms119:136 Nye ŋkuwo le aɖatsi fam yoo elabe amewo mewɔa wò sewo dzi o.
Psalms119:137 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:138 Èɖo wò ɖaseɖiɖiwo anyi le nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ kple nuteƒewɔwɔ katã me.
Psalms119:139 Nye ŋuʋaʋã le wuyem
Psalms119:140 Wodo wò ŋugbedodo kpɔ nyuie
Psalms119:141 Nyemele ɖeke me o
Psalms119:142 Wò nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ le dzɔdzɔe tegbee
Psalms119:143 Fukpekpe kple nuxaxa va dzinye; ke wò sededewo doa dzidzɔ nam.
Psalms119:144 Wò ɖaseɖiɖiawo le dzɔdzɔe tegbee; na gɔmesesem be mate ŋu anɔ agbe.
Psalms119:145 Mele yɔwòm kple nye dzi blibo; Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:146 Medo ɣli yɔ wò
Psalms119:147 Mefɔna doa ŋgɔ na fɔŋli
Psalms119:148 Nye ŋkuwo le te hafi zãdzɔɣi naɖo bene made ŋugble le wò ŋugbedodo ŋu.
Psalms119:149 Le wò amenuveve ta
Psalms119:150 Ame siwo le yonyeme tim kple susu vɔ̃ɖi la
Psalms119:151 Ke wò Aƒetɔ la
Psalms119:152 Menya le wò ɖaseɖiɖiwo ŋu tso gbe aɖe gbe ke be èɖo wo anyi tegbee.
Psalms119:153 Kpɔ nye fukpekpe ɖa
Psalms119:154 Ɖe kuku ɖe tanye
Psalms119:155 Xɔname le aga sãa tso ame vɔ̃ɖiwo gbɔ
Psalms119:156 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:157 Yonyemetilawo kple nye ketɔwo sɔ gbɔ; ke hã
Psalms119:158 Ne mekpɔ ame mawɔnuteƒewo la
Psalms119:159 Bu ale si melɔ̃ wò sewo la ŋu! Dzram ɖo le wò amenuveve la nu.
Psalms119:160 Wò nya ƒe taƒoƒo nye nyateƒe; wò se dzɔdzɔeawo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe li tegbee.
Psalms119:161 Amegãwo le yonyeme tim madzemadzee
Psalms119:162 Mekpɔa dzidzɔ le wò nya la ŋu abe ame si kpɔ aboyonu gã ene.
Psalms119:163 Melé fu aʋatso; enyɔa ŋu nam
Psalms119:164 Le ŋkeke me la
Psalms119:165 Ame siwo lɔ̃ wò sea la kpɔa ŋutifafa gã. Naneke mate ŋu ana woakli nu o.
Psalms119:166 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:167 Nye luʋɔ dzraa wò ɖaseɖiɖiwo ɖo; melɔ̃ wo vevie ŋutɔ.
Psalms119:168 Meléa wò sewo kple ɖaseɖiɖiwo me ɖe asi
Psalms119:169 Aƒetɔ
Psalms119:170 Se nye kokoƒoƒo
Psalms119:171 Make nu akafu wò be èfia wò ɖoɖowom.

Psalms142:1 Metsɔ nye gbe do ɣli yɔ Aƒetɔ! Metsɔ nye gbe ƒo koko na Aƒetɔ!
Psalms142:2 Metsɔa nye nyawo ɖoa eŋkume
Psalms142:3 Ne nu te nye gbɔgbɔ ŋu la
Psalms142:4 Menyè kɔ kpɔ ɖusime ɖa; ke ame aɖeke meli si léa ŋku ɖe ŋunye o. Sitsoƒe aɖeke megasusɔ nam o; ame aɖeke megaléa be nam o.
Psalms142:5 Aƒetɔ
Psalms142:6 Lé to ɖe nye ɣlidodoa ŋu elabe wobɔbɔm ɖe anyi ŋutɔ! Ɖem tso yonyemetilawo si me

Psalms143:1 Aƒetɔ
Psalms143:2 Mègakplɔ wò dɔla yi ʋɔnui o
Psalms143:3 Elabe futɔ la ti yonyeme; exlã nye agbe ɖe anyi. Ena mebɔbɔ nɔ viviti me abe ame siwo ku xoxoxo la ene.
Psalms143:4 Eya ta nu te nye gbɔgbɔ ŋu; nye dzi lulu ɖe menye.
Psalms143:5 Meɖoa ŋku blemaŋkekewo dzi; medea ŋugble le nu siwo katã nèwɔ la ŋu
Psalms143:6 Mekea nye abɔwo me na wò. Nye luʋɔ le diwòm vevie abe kuɖiɖinyigbae le tsi dim ene.

Psalms145:2 Mada akpe na wò gbe sia gbe

Psalms145:4 Wò dɔwɔwɔwo kafukafu anɔ dzidzimewo nu

Psalms146:1 Mikafu Aƒetɔ! Nye luʋɔ
Psalms146:2 Makafu Aƒetɔ le nye agbe me ŋkekewo katã me. Madzi ha akafu nye Mawu esime mele agbe.
Psalms146:3 Migaɖo dzi ɖe amegãwo ŋu o; ɖe amegbetɔ vi si mate ŋu akpe ɖe ame ŋu o la ŋu o.
Psalms146:4 Ne eƒe gbɔgbɔ nu tsi la
Psalms146:5 Woyra ame si ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔe nye Yakob ƒe Mawu la
Psalms146:6 ame si wɔ dziƒo kple anyigba
Psalms146:7 ame si tsoa afia na ame siwo wote ɖe anyi; ame si naa nuɖuɖu dɔwuitɔwo. Aƒetɔ ɖea ga gamenɔlawo.
Psalms146:8 Aƒetɔ ʋua ŋku na ŋkuagbãtɔwo. Aƒetɔ fɔa ame siwo wobɔbɔ ɖe anyi la ɖe tsitre. Aƒetɔ lɔ̃a nu dzɔdzɔe wɔlawo.
Psalms146:9 Aƒetɔ kpɔa amedzrowo ta. Ekpena ɖe ahosiwo kple tsyɔ̃eviwo ŋu; ke enana be ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe mɔ yia tsɔtsrɔ̃ me.
Psalms146:10 Aƒetɔ aɖu fia tegbee! Zion

Psalms150:1 Mikafu Aƒetɔ! Mikafu Mawu le eƒe kɔkɔeƒe la me. Mikafui le eƒe alili sesẽ la me.
Psalms150:2 Mikafui le nu klitsu siwo wòwɔ la ta! Mikafui le eƒe gãnyenye manyagblɔ la nu.
Psalms150:3 Mikafui kple kpẽ ƒe ɖiɖi! Mikafui kple saŋku kpakple kasaŋku!

Psalms150:6 Mina nu sia nu si me gbɔgbɔ le la nakafu Aƒetɔ! Mikafu Aƒetɔ!

Proverbs13:2 Ame nyui ɖua nu nyui tso eƒe numenya ƒe kutsetse me; ke ŋutasesẽ nye alakpatɔ ƒe didi.
Proverbs13:3 Ame si kpɔa eƒe nu dzi la
Proverbs13:4 Nu dzroa kuviatɔ ƒe luʋɔ
Proverbs13:5 Ame dzɔdzɔe léa fu aʋatsokaka; ke ame vɔ̃ɖi wɔa ŋukpenanu kple vlodoamenu.
Proverbs13:6 Nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ dzɔa ame maɖifɔ ƒe nuwɔnawo ŋu; ke nu tovo wɔwɔ hea ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒua anyi.
Proverbs13:7 Ame aɖe wɔ eɖokui kesinɔtɔe
Proverbs13:8 Ame ƒe kesinɔnue ɖenɛ le awɔba me; ke ame dahe ya mekpɔa megbedenu aɖeke o.
Proverbs13:9 Ame dzɔdzɔe ƒe kekeli klẽna nyuie; ke ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe akaɖi tsina.
Proverbs13:10 Dàda la
Proverbs13:11 Kesinɔnu si wotsi dzi kpɔ bɔbɔe la azu ʋɛ; ke esi woku kutri kpɔ la
Proverbs13:12 Mɔkpɔkpɔ si wohe ɖe megbe la
Proverbs13:13 Ame si doa vlo nuxlɔ̃amenya la
Proverbs13:14 Nunyala ƒe nufiame la
Proverbs13:15 Nugɔmesese nyui hea ŋudzedzekpɔkpɔ vɛ; ke ame mawɔnuteƒewo ƒe mɔ hea wo dea gbegblẽ me.
Proverbs13:16 Aɖaŋudzela ɖe sia ɖe wɔa nu le nunya me; ke bometsila doa boblo eƒe bometsitsi.
Proverbs13:17 Dɔtsɔla vlo hea amewo dea xaxa me; ke amedɔdɔ nuteƒewɔla daa gbe le ame ŋu.
Proverbs13:18 Ahedada kple ŋukpe vaa ame si gbea nufiamexɔxɔ la dzi; ke wodea bubu ame si xɔa mokaname la ŋu.
Proverbs13:19 Ne ame ƒe didi va eme la
Proverbs13:20 Ame si zɔna kple nunyalawo la
Proverbs13:21 Dzɔgbevɔ̃e ɖea nuvɔ̃wɔlawo ɖe nu; ke nunyoname wotsɔna tua fe na ame dzɔdzɔewo.
Proverbs13:22 Ame nyui gblẽa domenyinu ɖi na viawo ƒe viwo; ke wolia kɔ nuvɔ̃wɔla ƒe kesinɔnu ɖi na ame dzɔdzɔe.
Proverbs13:23 Ame dahe ƒe afutimenuku ʋãna fũu; ke edome gblẽna to nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔwɔ me.
Proverbs13:24 Ame si gbea eƒe ameƒoti ŋudɔwɔwɔ na via la
Proverbs13:25 Ame dzɔdzɔe kpɔa nu ɖuna ɖia ƒo nyuie; ke dɔ wua ame vɔ̃ɖi ya.
Proverbs14:1 Nunya tsoa eƒe aƒe; ke bometsitsi gbãnɛ kple eya ŋutɔ ƒe asi.
Proverbs14:2 Ame si nɔa agbe dzɔdzɔe la vɔ̃a Aƒetɔ; ke ame si nɔa agbe trama la doa vloe.
Proverbs14:3 Bometsila ƒe nuƒo nye ameƒoti na eƒe dàda; ke nunyalawo ƒe nuƒo akpɔ wo ta.
Proverbs14:4 Ne nyitsuwo meli o la
Proverbs14:5 Ɖasefo wɔnuteƒe mekaa aʋatso o; ke aʋatsoɖasefo daa alakpa.
Proverbs14:6 Fewuɖula dia nunya doa kpoe; ke sidzedze le bɔbɔe na nugɔmesela.
Proverbs14:7 Te ɖa le bometsila gbɔ elabe màse nunya le enu o.

Proverbs14:9 Mawu ɖea alɔ me le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ŋu
Proverbs14:10 Ame ŋutɔe nya vevesese si le eƒe dzime

Proverbs14:12 Mɔ aɖe li si dzéna mɔ dzɔdzɔe na ame; ke eƒe seƒee nye ku.

Proverbs28:1 Ame aɖeke menyaa ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖe nu hafi wòsína o; ke ame dzɔdzɔe ya ɖea dzi ɖi abe dzata ene.
Proverbs28:2 Ne dukɔ da vo la
Proverbs28:3 Ame dahe si tea ame dahewo ɖe anyi la
Proverbs28:4 Ame siwo gbea nu le se la gbɔ la
Proverbs28:5 Nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo mesea nya dzɔdzɔe gɔme o; ke ame siwo dia Aƒetɔ la
Proverbs28:6 Ame dahe si ƒe zɔzɔme ŋu fɔɖiɖi mele o la
Proverbs28:7 Ame si léa se la me ɖe asi la
Proverbs28:8 Ame si tsɔa demexɔxɔ kple gadzìga tsɔna dzia eƒe kesinɔnuwo ɖe edzii la
Proverbs28:9 Ame si do toku sea la
Proverbs28:10 Ame si ble nuteƒewɔlawo yi mɔ vɔ̃ɖi dzii la
Proverbs28:11 Kesinɔtɔ bua eɖokui nunyalae; ke ame dahe nugɔmesela kpɔa egɔme.
Proverbs28:12 Ne ame dzɔdzɔewo ɖu dzi la
Proverbs28:13 Ame si tsyɔa nu eƒe dzidadawo dzi la
Proverbs28:14 Yayratɔe nye ame si vɔ̃a Aƒetɔ ɣe sia ɣi; ke ame si sẽ dzime goŋgoŋ la
Proverbs28:15 Dziɖula vɔ̃ɖi si le dukɔ dahe dzi ɖum la
Proverbs28:16 Dziɖula si si nugɔmesese mele o la
Proverbs28:17 Ame si dzi hlɔ̃fe le la
Proverbs28:18 Ame si wɔa nuteƒe la
Proverbs28:19 Ame si de agble la
Proverbs28:20 Yayra anɔ nuteƒewɔla dzi fũu; ke ame si tsi dzi ɖe gakpɔkpɔ ŋu la
Proverbs28:21 Amedzidede menyo o; ke le abolo kakɛ si ame axɔ ta la
Proverbs28:22 Nuvela tsia dzi ɖe kesinɔnu ŋu; ke menyae be hiã le ye dzi va ge o.
Proverbs28:23 Mokanamela axɔ akpe emegbe wu numevivila.
Proverbs28:24 Ame si da adzo tɔ́a alo nɔa hegblɔ be: “Menye nuvɔ̃ aɖeke o” la

Ecclesiastes1:3 Viɖe ka koŋ amegbetɔ kpɔna tso eƒe dagbadagba me le ɣea te?

Ecclesiastes6:2 Eya nye ame si Mawu na kesinɔnu
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ne ame aɖe dzi vi alafa
Ecclesiastes6:4 Elabe fu gegee la dzɔ yakatsyɔ gabu ɖe viviti me
Ecclesiastes6:5 Hekpe ɖe esia ŋu la
Ecclesiastes6:6 Nenye ame la ɖe wònɔ agbe ƒe akpe

Ecclesiastes6:8 Nu kae nunyala tsɔ wú bometsila? Viɖe ka ame dahe si nya zɔzɔ le agbe me la kpɔna?
Ecclesiastes6:9 Nukpɔkpɔ kple ŋku nyo wu nudzroame ƒe tsa glãla tsatsa. Esia hã nu dzodzro kple yadɔ ko wònye.
Ecclesiastes6:10 Nu si dzɔ la
Ecclesiastes6:11 Nuƒoƒo geɖe
Ecclesiastes6:12 Elabe ame kae nya nu si nyo na amegbetɔ le eƒe agbenɔɣi dzodzro si nu va yina abe vɔvɔli ene la me? Elabe ame kae ate ŋu agblɔ nu si ava eme le amegbetɔ megbe la nɛ le ɣea te?
Ecclesiastes7:1 Ŋkɔ nyui nyo wu ami ʋeʋẽe nyui; kugbe nyo wu dzigbe.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kuteƒeyiyi nyo wu agbeɖuƒeyiyi elabe kue nye ame sia ame ƒe nuwuwu ale be wòanɔ susu me na agbagbeawo.
Ecclesiastes7:3 Nuxaxa nyo wu nukoko
Ecclesiastes7:4 Nunyalawo ƒe susu nɔa kuteƒe; ke bometsilawo ƒe susu ya nɔa agbeɖuƒe.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Enyo be woase nunyalawo ƒe mokaname wu bometsilawo ƒe hadzidzi.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Elabe bometsilawo ƒe nukoko ɖina abe ale si ŋu wóna le dzo me kpotokpoto le ze te ene. Esia hã nu dzodzro ko wònye.
Ecclesiastes7:7 Nyateƒe
Ecclesiastes7:8 Nu ƒe nuwuwu nyo wu eƒe gɔmedzedze
Ecclesiastes7:9 Mègado dziku kabakaba o
Ecclesiastes7:10 Mègabia be: “Nu ka ta tsã nyo wu egbe?” hã o. Ne èbia nenema la
Ecclesiastes7:11 Nunya nye nu nyui abe domenyinu ene. Viɖe le eŋu na ame siwo le ɣe kpɔm la.
Ecclesiastes7:12 Nunya ɖoa vɔvɔli ɖe ame dzi abe ale si ga ɖoa vɔvɔli ɖe ame dzii ene. Nu si nyo le nunya ŋue nye be sidzedze léa ame si si wòle la ƒe agbe ɖe te.
Ecclesiastes7:13 Lé ŋku ɖe Mawu ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo ŋu. Ame kae ate ŋu adzɔ nu si wòglɔ̃ la?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Kpɔ dzidzɔ le ɣeyiɣi siwo me nu nyo na wò la
Ecclesiastes7:15 Le nye agbe dzodzro sia me la
Ecclesiastes7:16 Mègawɔ nu dzɔdzɔe vivivo o
Ecclesiastes7:17 Mègawɔ nuvɔ̃ɖi gbɔ me o
Ecclesiastes7:18 Menyo be nàlé esia me ɖe asi
Ecclesiastes7:19 Nunya naa ŋusẽ nunyala wu ŋusẽtɔ ewo le du me.
Ecclesiastes7:20 Le nyateƒe me la
Ecclesiastes7:21 Mègake to ɖi be yease nu sia nu si gblɔm amewo le o. Ne menye nenema o la
Ecclesiastes7:22 Wò ŋutɔ ènya nyuie le wò dzime be ye hã yeƒo fi de ame bubuwo zi geɖe.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Metsɔ nunya dzro nu siawo katã me kpɔ. Meɖo kpe edzi be madze nunya. Ke nunya le adzɔge ʋĩi tso gbɔnye.
Ecclesiastes7:24 Nu si li la gbɔ metsɔ o
Ecclesiastes7:25 Metrɔ ɖe sidzedze ŋu. Medi nunya

Ecclesiastes8:1 Ame kae le abe nunyala ene? Ame kae se nuwo ƒe gɔmeɖeɖe me? Nunyae nana be ame ƒe mo klẽna
Ecclesiastes8:2 Wɔ ɖe fia ƒe ɖoɖo dzi le atamkaka kɔkɔe la ta
Ecclesiastes8:3 mègayɔ be yeadzo le egbɔ o. Ne nya aɖe menyo o la
Ecclesiastes8:4 Elabe ŋusẽ le fia ƒe nya ŋu
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ame si wɔ ɖe fia ƒe se dzi la
Ecclesiastes8:6 Esi ɣeyiɣi kple nyametsotso li na nu sia nu ta la
Ecclesiastes8:7 Nyateƒe amegbetɔ menya nu si ava dzɔ etsɔ la o. Ame kae ate ŋu atoe nɛ?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Ame aɖeke mekpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe yaƒoƒo dzi ne wòaxe mɔ nɛ o. Ame aɖeke mekpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe kugbe dzi o. Womenaa mɔkeke asrafo le aʋakpeɣi o
Ecclesiastes8:9 Esi melé ŋku ɖe nu siwo katã amewo wɔna le ɣea te ŋu la
Ecclesiastes8:10 Azɔ mekpɔ ale si woɖi ame vɔ̃ɖiwoe. Le woƒe agbenɔɣi la

Ecclesiastes8:12 Togbɔ be nuvɔ̃wɔla wɔa nuvɔ̃ zi alafa
Ecclesiastes8:13 Gake dzɔgbe nyui matu nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔla o
Ecclesiastes8:14 Nu dzodzro aɖe hã dzɔna le anyigba dzi. Ame dzɔdzɔe aɖewo li siwo dzi nya dzɔna ɖo abe ame vɔ̃ɖi wonye ene. Nenema ke ame vɔ̃ɖi aɖewo hã li siwo dzi nya dzɔna ɖo abe ame dzɔdzɔe wonye ene. Mebe esia hã nye nu dzodzro ko!
Ecclesiastes8:15 Eya ta meda asi ɖe dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ dzi elabe naneke menyo na amegbetɔ be wòawɔ le ɣea te wu be wòaɖu nu
Ecclesiastes8:16 Esi mede ŋugble be manya nu si tututu nye nunya
Ecclesiastes8:17 mekpɔ dze sii le Mawu ƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo ŋu be ame aɖeke mate ŋu anya ta le nu siwo le edzi yim le ɣea te la nu o. Ale ke kee gbetɔ dze agbagba be yease nuwo gɔmee hã la

Isaiah1:14 Nye luʋɔ lé fu miaƒe dzinu yeyewo kple ŋkekenyuiwo. Wozu agba nam

Isaiah1:16 Mile tsi
Isaiah1:17 Misrɔ̃ nu nyui wɔwɔ
Isaiah1:18 Aƒetɔ be: “Miva ne míalé nya la kpɔ. Togbɔ be miaƒe nuvɔ̃wo le abe nyagãdzĩ ene hã la
Isaiah1:19 Ne mielɔ̃ ɖo to la
Isaiah1:20 Evɔ ne miegbe
Isaiah1:21 Ao! Ale ke wɔ du si wɔa nuteƒe
Isaiah1:22 Wò klosalo zu gamí
Isaiah1:23 Wò amegãwo va zu aglãdzelawo kple fiafitɔwo xɔlɔ̃wo. Wo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe lɔ̃a zãnu
Isaiah1:24 Eya ta azɔ la
Isaiah1:25 Matrɔ nye asi ɖe ŋuwò
Isaiah1:26 Magaɖo ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo na mi abe tsã ene kple aɖaŋuɖolawo na mi abe le blema ene. Emegbe woagayɔ wò be nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ ƒe du kple du wɔnuteƒe.”
Isaiah1:27 Woaɖe Zion to ʋɔnu dzɔdzɔe dɔdrɔ̃ me
Isaiah1:28 Ke woagbã aglãdzelawo kple nuvɔ̃wɔlawo siaa
Isaiah1:29 Ŋu akpe mi le ati gã siwo ŋu miekpɔ dzidzɔ le la ŋu
Isaiah1:30 Elabe miawo ŋutɔ mianɔ abe ati gã si yrɔ kple abɔ si mekpɔ tsi o la ene.
Isaiah1:31 Ame sesẽ la azu gbe ƒuƒu

Isaiah3:13 Aƒetɔ xɔ enɔƒe azɔ be yeahe nya. Ele tsitre be yeadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu eƒe dukɔ.

Isaiah10:15 Ɖe fía ado eɖokui ɖe dzi le ame si le eŋudɔ wɔm la ŋkumea? Alo laxalaxa atɔ asi akɔ ɖe ame si le ehem la ŋua? Ɖe ameƒoti awɔ ame si kɔe dzi la ŋu dɔa? Alo ɖe atizɔti atɔ̀ amea?

Isaiah11:1 Atilɔ adze tso Yese ƒe atitakpo me
Isaiah11:2 Aƒetɔ ƒe Gbɔgbɔ si nye sidzedze kple nugɔmesese ƒe gbɔgbɔ
Isaiah11:3 Akpɔ dzidzɔ le Aƒetɔ -vɔvɔ̃ ŋu; madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu le nu si eƒe ŋku kpɔna la nu o
Isaiah11:4 Ke boŋ adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu dzɔdzɔe
Isaiah11:5 Nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ anye alidziblanu le eƒe ali
Isaiah11:6 Amegãxi kple alẽvi anɔ teƒe ɖeka; lãkle atsyɔ akɔ ɖe gbɔ̃vi gbɔ. Nyivi kple dzata kpakple nyi dami anɔ wo nɔewo gbɔ
Isaiah11:7 Nyinɔ kple sisiblisinɔ aɖu gbe; wo viwo atsyɔ akɔ ɖe teƒe ɖeka. Dzata aɖu gbe abe nyitsu ene.

Isaiah26:2 Miʋu agboawo be dukɔ dzɔdzɔe

Isaiah26:4 Ka ɖe Aƒetɔ dzi tegbee elabe Aƒetɔ
Isaiah26:5 Elabe ebɔbɔ kɔkɔƒenɔlawo ɖe anyi; eɖiɖi du kɔkɔ la ɖe anyi; emui ƒu anyi
Isaiah26:6 Ezu afɔɖodzinu na ame dahewo kple hiãtɔwo be woafanyae.”
Isaiah26:7 Ame dzɔdzɔe ƒe toƒe le tẽe. Wò Dzɔdzɔetɔ lae wɔe be ame dzɔdzɔe ƒe mɔ dzi sɔ.

Isaiah26:12 Aƒetɔ

Isaiah27:1 Ɣe ma ɣi la

Isaiah27:4 Nyemekpɔ dziku ɖe wainbɔ la ŋu o. Ne mekpɔ aŋɔka kple ŋuwo le eme la
Isaiah27:5 Negbe ɖeko woava sim atso
Isaiah27:6 Le ŋkeke siwo gbɔna me la
Isaiah27:7 Ɖe wòƒo Israel abe ale si wòƒo eƒolawo enea? Alo ɖe wòwui abe ale si wòwu ame siwo wòwu la enea?
Isaiah27:8 Ʋɛʋɛʋɛ la

Isaiah28:1 Baba na dziɖula ahamula siwo dàna le Efrayim kple eƒe atsyɔ̃seƒoƒo dzeani si ɖi golo la. Baba na ahamula siwo le to dzi le bali wɔnu tame.
Isaiah28:2 Kpɔ ɖa
Isaiah28:3 Woafanya ahamula si le Efrayim la ƒe dàdafiakuku kple afɔ.
Isaiah28:4 Ava eme be eƒe atsyɔ̃seƒoƒo dzeani si ɖi golo
Isaiah28:5 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Isaiah28:6 Ana ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ dzɔdzɔe ƒe gbɔgbɔ ʋɔnudrɔ̃la
Isaiah28:7 Ke ame siawo hã no wain mu
Isaiah28:8 Elabe wotru kɔ ɖe kplɔ̃awo katã dzi nyamaa
Isaiah28:9 “Ame kae wòle nunya fia gee
Isaiah28:10 Elabe egblɔ be: Se ɖe se dzi; se ɖe se dzie. Ɖoɖo ɖe ɖoɖo nu; ɖoɖo ɖe ɖoɖo nue. Afii ʋɛ; afi mɛ ʋɛ.”
Isaiah28:11 Le nyateƒe me la
Isaiah28:12 Egblɔ na wo be: “Dzudzɔ nye esi
Isaiah28:13 Eya ta Aƒetɔ ƒe nya ava eme ɖe wo ŋu be: Se ɖe se dzi; se ɖe se dzie. Ɖoɖo ɖe ɖoɖo nu; ɖoɖo ɖe ɖoɖo nue. Afii ʋɛ
Isaiah28:14 Eya ta mi fewuɖula siwo le dukɔ sia dzi ɖum le Yerusalem
Isaiah28:15 Elabe miegblɔ be: “Míebla nu kple ku
Isaiah28:16 Eya ta Aƒetɔ Mawu be: “Kpɔ ɖa
Isaiah28:17 Matsɔ ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ dzɔdzɔe awɔ dzidzekae
Isaiah28:18 Ekema mia kple ku ƒe nubabla me agblẽ
Isaiah28:19 Ne eva le yiyim la
Isaiah28:20 Elabe aba anɔ kpuie ale be afɔdadra manɔ anyi o. Avɔ tsyɔtsyɔ malolo ne woaxatsa ame ɖokui ɖe eme o.
Isaiah28:21 Elabe Aƒetɔ akɔ eɖokui ɖe dzi abe ale si wòwɔe le Perazim-to la gbɔ ene. Anyra abe ale si wònyrae le Gibeon-bali me la ene; ne wòawɔ eƒe dɔ
Isaiah28:22 Azɔ la
Isaiah28:23 Miɖo to
Isaiah28:24 Ðe agbledela nɔa nuŋɔŋlɔ dzi ɖaa be wòaƒã nua? Ɖe wòdzraa anyigba ɖo hedzobonɛ ɖaa?
Isaiah28:25 Alo ne edzobo anyigba vɔ

Isaiah29:1 Ao
Isaiah29:2 ekema Ariel naɖo xaxa me. Konyifafa kple hũɖeɖe anɔ anyi
Isaiah29:3 Maƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe ŋuwò godoo. Mana aʋakɔwo namimi wò ɖo
Isaiah29:4 Woaɖiɖi wò ɖe anyi. Anyigba tume kee nàƒo nu tso. Wò gbe si ɖiɖi la
Isaiah29:5 Ke futɔ gbogbo siwo tso ɖe ŋuwò la
Isaiah29:6 Aƒetɔ
Isaiah29:7 Dukɔwo ƒe ameha siwo katã ho aʋa ɖe Ariel ŋu kple ame siwo katã tso ɖe eya kple eƒe mɔ́ sesẽ la ŋu
Isaiah29:8 Ale si dɔwuitɔ kua drɔ̃e be yele nu ɖum

Isaiah29:12 Ne wotsɔe na agbalẽmanyala be: “Xlẽe” la

Isaiah29:16 Mietrɔ nuwo ƒe ta tu. Ɖe tsu le abe zemela ene

Isaiah30:1 Aƒetɔ be: “Baba na vi dzeaglã siwo wɔa ɖoɖo siwo menye tɔnye o
Isaiah30:2 Ame siwo mebiaa mɔm hafi yia Egipte o be yewoasi Egipte Fiagã ƒe ŋusẽ atso
Isaiah30:3 Eya ta Egipte Fiagã la ƒe ametakpɔkpɔ azu ŋukpe na mi
Isaiah30:4 Elabe togbɔ be eƒe amegãwo le Zoan
Isaiah30:5 ŋu akpe wo dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe to dukɔ si mate ŋu aɖe vi aɖeke na wo o la dzi. Dukɔ si mahe kpekpeɖeŋu alo viɖe vɛ o; ke boŋ ŋukpe kple vlododo ko.”
Isaiah30:6 Gbedeasi ɖe anyigbemekegbegbe ƒe lãwo ŋu: To hiãkame kple xaxa ƒe anyigba dzi
Isaiah30:7 Egipte ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu mele ɖeke me o
Isaiah30:8 Azɔ la yi nàŋlɔe ɖe nuŋlɔkpe dzi le wo ŋkume
Isaiah30:9 Elabe dukɔ dzeaglã wonye

Isaiah30:12 Eya ta Israel ƒe Kɔkɔetɔ la gblɔ be: “Esi miegbe nya sia
Isaiah30:13 miaƒe vodada sia anɔ na mi abe gli kɔkɔ fefe si tre azã be yeamu la ene. Eƒe mumu ava eme
Isaiah30:14 Eƒe gbagbã anɔ abe ale si zemela ƒe ze gbãna gudugudu
Isaiah30:15 Elabe Aƒetɔ Mawu
Isaiah30:16 Miegblɔ be: “Kpao
Isaiah30:17 Ame akpe ɖeka así le ame ɖeka pɛ ƒe vɔvɔ̃doname nu
Isaiah30:18 Eya ta Aƒetɔ le mia si nu kpɔm be yeave mia nu
Isaiah30:19 O
Isaiah30:20 Togbɔ be Aƒetɔ la na nuɖuɖu mi le hiã me
Isaiah30:21 Ne mietrɔ ɖe ɖusime alo miame la
Isaiah30:22 Miado gu klosalo siwo wofa ɖe miaƒe aklama kpakpɛwo kple sika si le miaƒe legbawo ŋu. Miakaka wo abe ŋunyɔnuwo ene ahagblɔ be: “Midzo!”
Isaiah30:23 Ana tsi nadza ɖe miaƒe agblemenuku siwo mieƒã la dzi
Isaiah30:24 Nuɖuɖu si wotsaka kple dze
Isaiah30:25 Gbe si gbe woawu ame fũu
Isaiah30:26 Gawu la
Isaiah30:27 Kpɔ ɖa
Isaiah30:28 Eƒe gbɔgbɔ le abe tɔɖɔɖɔ si me woase ve le ene
Isaiah30:29 Miadzi ha abe le ŋkekenyui ɖuɣi ƒe zã me ene. Miaƒe dzi atso aseye abe ame si le zɔzɔm ɖe dzekuku nu yina ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe to la dzi
Isaiah30:30 Aƒetɔ ana woase eƒe fiagbe la
Isaiah30:31 Elabe ne Aƒetɔ ɖe gbe la

Isaiah32:1 Kpɔ ɖa

Isaiah32:3 Ale nukpɔlawo ƒe ŋku magatsi o

Isaiah33:2 Aƒetɔ
Isaiah33:3 Ne èɖe gbe la
Isaiah33:4 Woaƒo nu siwo mieha la nu ƒu abe ale si adeɛfɔnake ƒoa nu ƒui ene
Isaiah33:5 Wodo Aƒetɔ ɖe dzi elabe ele dziƒo ke. Ana ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ dzɔdzɔe kple nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ nayɔ Zion taŋ.
Isaiah33:6 Ana nàli ke le agbe me xɔname

Isaiah33:13 Mi ame siwo le didiƒe ʋĩi
Isaiah33:14 Vɔvɔ̃ ɖo nuvɔ̃wɔlawo le Zion
Isaiah33:15 Ame si zɔna le nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ me
Isaiah33:16 eyae anɔ kɔkɔƒewo. Mɔ́ siwo anɔ agakpewo dzi la anye eƒe sitsoƒe. Woana eƒe nuɖuɖui
Isaiah33:17 Wò ŋkuwo akpɔ fia la le eƒe atsyɔ̃ me. Woakpɔ anyigba si keke yi didiƒe ʋĩi ke la.
Isaiah33:18 Àde ŋugble le ŋɔdzi la ŋu abia be: “Afi kae nuxlẽla la le? Afi kae nudala si xɔa adzɔ la le? Afi kae ame si xlẽa xɔ tsralawo la le?”
Isaiah33:19 Màgakpɔ dukɔ mabuame si ƒe gbegbɔgblɔ me mekɔ o
Isaiah33:20 Kpɔ Zion-du si nye míaƒe ŋkekenyui ɖuƒe la ɖa! Wò ŋkuwo akpɔ Yerusalem
Isaiah33:21 Ke boŋ Aƒetɔ anye fia na mí le afi ma. Teƒe si tɔsisi gãwo kple tɔʋuwo sí to eye atablukulawo loo
Isaiah33:22 Elabe Aƒetɔ nye míaƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la
Isaiah33:23 Wò kaawo me gbɔdzɔ. Womegate ŋu abla abalati la sesĩe
Isaiah33:24 Dua me tɔ aɖeke magblɔ be: “Mele dɔ lém” o. Woatsɔ ame siwo le eme la ƒe nuvɔ̃ ake wo.
Isaiah34:1 Mi dukɔwo

Isaiah34:3 Woatsɔ woƒe ame siwo wowu la aƒu gbe. Woƒe ame kukuawo ƒe ʋeʋẽ kũu axɔ ya me
Isaiah34:4 Dziŋgɔli ŋu nuwo katã anyunyɔ; woaŋlɔ dziŋgɔli abe ale si woŋlɔa agbalẽe ene. Eŋu nuwo katã age abe ale si aŋgbawo gena le wainka kple gboti ŋui ene.
Isaiah34:5 Elabe nye yi mu aha le dziƒo. Kpɔ ɖa

Isaiah34:10 Zã kple keli la
Isaiah34:11 Ke azu aʋako kple hlɔ̃made tɔ
Isaiah34:12 Woana ŋkɔe be fiaɖuƒe aɖeke mele afi ma o
Isaiah34:13 Ŋuwo amie ɖe woƒe mɔ́ sesẽwo me; dzawo kple aŋɔkawo amie ɖe woƒe mɔ́wo me. Ava zu akpatakuwo kple tsatsaboliwo nɔƒe.
Isaiah34:14 Gbemelãwo kple agbotoewo ado go wo nɔewo. Azizãwo ado ɣli ayɔ wo nɔewo le afi ma
Isaiah34:15 Afi ma adzexewo awɔ atɔ ɖo

Isaiah36:1 Le fia Xizkiya ƒe ƒè wui enelia me esime wòɖu fia la
Isaiah36:2 Asiria-fia dɔ Rabsake tso Laxis ɖo ɖe fia Xizkiya le Yerusalem kple aʋakɔ gã aɖe
Isaiah36:3 Ale Elyakim
Isaiah36:4 Rabsake gblɔ na wo be: “Migblɔ na Xizkiya be: ‘Asiria-fia be: Nu ka ŋuti koŋ nèle dzi ɖom ɖo?
Isaiah36:5 Ɖe nèbu be numenya ƒuƒlue nye aɖaŋu kple ŋusẽ si wotsɔna wɔa aʋaea? Ame ka ŋue nèle dzi ɖom ɖo ta nèdze aglã ɖe ŋunye?
Isaiah36:6 Kpɔ ɖa
Isaiah36:7 Gake ne miegblɔ nam be: Míeɖoa ŋu ɖe Aƒetɔ
Isaiah36:8 Azɔ va ne wò kple nye aƒetɔ Asiria-fia la miatso gbe: Mana sɔ akpe eve wò
Isaiah36:9 Ale ke gɔ̃ nàte ŋu atutu aʋakplɔla ɖeka le nye aƒetɔ ƒe dɔla gblɔewo dome ayi megbee
Isaiah36:10 Gawu la
Isaiah36:11 Tete Elyakim
Isaiah36:12 Ke Rabsake ɖo eŋu be: “Wò kple wò aƒetɔ ko gbɔe nye aƒetɔ dɔm ɖo be mava gblɔ nya siawoa? Ɖe menye ame siwo bɔbɔ nɔ glia dzi siwo gbɔna woawo ŋutɔ ƒe mi ɖu ge
Isaiah36:13 Tete Rabsake tsi tsitre te va do ɣli sesĩe le Yuda-gbe me be: “Mise fiagã la
Isaiah36:14 Ebe migana Xizkiya naflu mi o

Isaiah36:16 Migaɖo to Xizkiya o

Isaiah45:17 Ke Aƒetɔ xɔ Israel ya ɖe agbe tegbee. Womado ŋukpe mi alo gbɔgblɔ nabu ɖe mi akpɔakpɔ o.
Isaiah45:18 Aƒetɔ ye wɔ dziƒowo; eya nye Mawu! Eyae mè anyigba wònye eƒe nuwɔwɔ. Eɖoe anyi be wòanɔ anyi tegbee. Mewɔe be wòanɔ anyi nyamaa o
Isaiah45:19 Nyemeƒo nu le vivime le anyigba ƒe afi aɖeke si do blukɔ o. Nyemegblɔ na Yakob ƒe dzidzimeviwo be: ‘Midim le teƒe si tɔtɔ la’ o. Nye Aƒetɔ la
Isaiah45:20 “Mi dukɔwo
Isaiah45:21 Miva to miaƒe nya. Mina woaƒo takpli ne woade adaŋu kple wo nɔewo. Ame kae gblɔ nya sia gbe aɖe gbe ke? Ame kae ɖe gbeƒãe le blema? Ɖe menye nye
Isaiah45:22 “Xexemedukɔwo katã
Isaiah45:23 Metà nye ŋutɔ ɖokuinye; nyateƒenya si do tso nye nu me la
Isaiah45:24 Woagblɔ be: Aƒetɔ ko gbɔ nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ kple ŋusẽ le. Ame siwo katã do dziku ɖe eŋu la
Isaiah45:25 Israel ƒe dzidzimeviwo katã aɖu dzi to Aƒetɔ dzi
Isaiah46:1 Bel de ta to
Isaiah46:2 Wobɔbɔ ta
Isaiah46:3 Yakob ƒe ƒome

Isaiah46:5 Ame ka ŋu miedi be yewoatsɔm aɖoe
Isaiah46:6 Amewo ɖea sika fũu tso kotoku me kɔna ɖi. Wodaa klosalo le nudanu me. Wotsɔa sikaɖaŋudɔwɔla
Isaiah46:7 Wokɔnɛ ɖe abɔta ɖadana ɖe enɔƒe enɔa tsitre ɖe afi ma
Isaiah46:8 “Mi nuvɔ̃wɔlawo

Isaiah47:1 Wò ɖetugbi leaƒe

Isaiah47:3 Wò ama me adze

Isaiah47:8 Eya ta

Isaiah47:10 Èɖe dzi ɖi le nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔm le gbɔgblɔm be: “Ame aɖeke mele kpɔyem o.” Wò nunya kple sidzedze kplɔ wò trae
Isaiah47:11 Gake nya vɔ̃ aɖe ava dziwò
Isaiah47:12 Lé wò gbesawo kple wò dzo gbogbo siwo ŋu nèku kutri le tso wò ɖetugbime ke la me ɖe asi sesĩe. Ɖewohĩ àte ŋu akpɔ dzidzedze. Ɖewohĩ àte ŋu ado ŋɔdzi na ame aɖe kpli wo.
Isaiah47:13 Ɖeɖi te ŋuwò le aɖaŋuɖoɖo geɖe si nèxɔ la ta. Na dziŋgɔli me nunyalawo natso axɔ na wò. Woawoe kpɔa ɣletiviwo

Isaiah48:17 Aƒetɔ

Isaiah50:1 Aƒetɔ be: “Afi ka mia nɔ ƒe srɔ̃gbegbalẽ si metsɔ gbee la le? Alo nye fetɔwo dometɔ ka medzra mi na? Kpɔ ɖa
Isaiah50:2 Nu ka ta ame aɖeke menɔ afi ma esi meva o? Nu ka ta meyɔ ame
Isaiah50:3 Metaa avɔ yibɔ na dziƒowo

Isaiah50:5 Aƒetɔ Mawu ʋu to nam

Isaiah50:8 elabe ame si tsoa afia nam la tsɔ ɖe gbɔnye kpuie. Ame kae ahe nya kplim? Mina mí katã míatsi tsitre. Ame kae nye nye futɔ? Mina wòate ɖe ŋunye!

Isaiah57:3 Ke mi nyɔnu dzosala ƒe viwo

Isaiah57:18 Mekpɔ eƒe mɔwo gake mayɔ dɔe. Makplɔe
Isaiah57:19 Mana nuyiwo nadzi kafukafuha. Aƒetɔ be: Ŋutifafa

Jeremiah2:24 Èle abe gbetedzinɔ si gbedadaƒo nɔnɔ ma

Jeremiah4:2 eye ne èta nu be: ‘Zi ale si Aƒetɔ le agbe la

Jeremiah4:4 Mitso aʋa na mia ɖokui na Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah4:5 Migblɔe fia le Yuda
Jeremiah4:6 Mikɔ aflaga dzi do ɖe Zion! Misí kaba ne miatsi agbe! Migalala o! Elabe mehe dzɔgbevɔ̃e kple tsɔtsrɔ̃ gã tso dzigbeme gbɔnae.
Jeremiah4:7 Dzatae do tso eƒe avekɔe me; dukɔwo gbãla ho
Jeremiah4:8 Esia ta mita akpanya
Jeremiah4:9 Aƒetɔ be: “Gbe ma gbe la
Jeremiah4:10 Tete megblɔ be: “O Aƒetɔ Mawu
Jeremiah4:11 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Jeremiah4:12 ya sesẽ ŋutɔ wu esiae wònye tso gbɔnye. Azɔ nye ŋutɔe le nu ƒom
Jeremiah4:13 Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah4:14 Yerusalem
Jeremiah4:15 Gbe aɖe le ɖiɖim tso Dan
Jeremiah4:16 Mikɔ to dzi na dukɔwo be egbɔna. Miɖe gbeƒã na Yerusalem be: “Futɔwo tso anyigba aɖe le didiƒe dzi gbɔna. Woƒe ɣli de dzi bobobo ɖe Yuda-duwo ŋu.
Jeremiah4:17 Woaƒo xlã Yerusalem abe agbledzɔviwo ene
Jeremiah4:18 Wò zɔzɔme kple wò nuwɔnawoe he esia va dziwòe. Wò tsɔtsrɔ̃ɣie nye esia; ele vevem kaɖikaɖi; ede keke wò dzi gbɔ ke.”
Jeremiah4:19 Ao! Ao! Mele veve sem lo! O
Jeremiah4:20 Dzɔgbevɔ̃e kplɔ dzɔgbevɔ̃e ɖo enumake. Wogblẽ anyigba blibo la. Wokaka nye avɔgbadɔwo kpatakpata
Jeremiah4:21 Va se ɖe ɣe ka ɣi makpɔ aʋaflaga? Ɣe ka ɣi kpẽ ƒe ɖiɖi adzudzɔ?
Jeremiah4:22 “Elabe nye dukɔ dzɔ movi; womedze sim o. Vi tsibome wonye; womesea nu gɔme o. Wodze aɖaŋu na nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ; ke ale si woawɔ nu nyui ya la
Jeremiah4:23 Mekpɔ anyigba dzi ɖa
Jeremiah4:24 Mekpɔ towo ɖa
Jeremiah4:25 Meɖo ŋku anyi be makpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah4:26 Meɖo ŋku anyi be makpɔ ɖa; ke anyigba wɔnu la zu kegbegbe. Wogbã eƒe duwo katã le Aƒetɔ ŋkume

Jeremiah4:28 Esia ta anyigba afa konyi

Jeremiah4:30 Ke wò

Jeremiah5:1 Miƒu du to Yerusalem ƒe ablɔwo dzi
Jeremiah5:2 Togbɔ be wotàa nu gblɔna be: “Zi ale si Aƒetɔ le agbe la” hã la
Jeremiah5:3 O Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah5:4 Ke nyea megblɔ be: “Ame dahe movitɔwo ko ame siawo nye
Jeremiah5:5 Mayi dziɖulawo gbɔ aɖaƒo nu kpli wo elabe woawoe nya Aƒetɔ ƒe mɔ la kple woƒe Mawu ƒe se la.” Ke wo katã gbe be Aƒetɔ maɖu yewo dzi o
Jeremiah5:6 Eya ta dzata ado tso ave me alé wo aɖu; amegãxi atso kegbegbe ava tsrɔ̃ wo. Lãkle ade xa ɖe woƒe duwo ŋu
Jeremiah5:7 “Nu ka tae matsɔ nuvɔ̃ siwo miewɔ la ake mi? Viwòwo gblẽm ɖi

Jeremiah5:9 Ðe mele be mahe to na wo le esiawo ta oa? Aƒetɔ lae gblɔe. Ðe mele be mabia hlɔ̃ dukɔ sia tɔgbe na ɖokuinye oa?

Jeremiah5:12 Dukɔ la gbe nu le Aƒetɔ gbɔ
Jeremiah5:13 Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖelawo azu ya; gbe vɔ le wo nu. Alea ko wòanɔ na wo.’ ”
Jeremiah5:14 Eya ta Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah5:15 Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah5:16 Woƒe daku le abe yɔdo nuvo ene
Jeremiah5:17 Woaɖu miaƒe nu siwo mieŋe kple miaƒe nuɖuɖuwo. Woavuvu mia viŋutsuviwo kple mia vinyɔnuviwo. Woaɖu miaƒe alẽhawo kple miaƒe nyihawo
Jeremiah5:18 Aƒetɔ be: “Ɣe ma ɣi gɔ̃ hã la
Jeremiah5:19 Ne wò dukɔmetɔwo bia be: ‘Nu ka tae Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah5:20 Ɖe gbeƒã nya sia na Yakob ƒe dzidzimeviwo kple Yuda-to la be:
Jeremiah5:21 “Dukɔ tsibome manyanu
Jeremiah5:22 Aƒetɔ be: Ɖe mievɔ̃am oa? Ɖe miedzona nyànyanya le ŋkunye me oa? Metsɔ ke do liƒo na atsiaƒu
Jeremiah5:23 Ke dukɔ sia dze aglã
Jeremiah5:24 Womegblɔna le woƒe dzime be: ‘Mina míavɔ̃ Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah5:25 Miaƒe nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ gblẽ ɖoɖo sia me
Jeremiah5:26 Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo le nye dukɔ la me. Wode xa
Jeremiah5:27 Ale si xevi yɔa xadza fũui la
Jeremiah5:28 Woda ami
Jeremiah5:29 Ðe mele be mahe to na wo le esiawo ta oa? Aƒetɔ lae gblɔe. Ðe mele be mabia hlɔ̃ dukɔ sia tɔgbe na ɖokuinye oa?”

Jeremiah11:13 Elabe
Jeremiah11:14 “Eya ta mègado gbe ɖa ɖe dukɔ sia ta o; mègado gbe ɖa be yeaɖe kuku alo aƒo koko ɖe wo ta o. Elabe ne woxaxa
Jeremiah11:15 Ŋusẽ kae gale nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ si le nye aƒeme
Jeremiah11:16 Aƒetɔ yɔa wò tsã be: Amiti dama si tse ku nyuiwo. Ke atɔ dzoe
Jeremiah11:17 Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah11:18 Aƒetɔ na be manyae
Jeremiah11:19 Ke nye la
Jeremiah11:20 O Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah11:21 Eya ta Aƒetɔ gblɔ le Anatotitɔ siwo le wò ku dim
Jeremiah11:22 “Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah11:23 wo dometɔ aɖeke masusɔ o. Elabe mahe dzɔgbevɔ̃e ava Anatotitɔwo dzi le ƒe si me meɖo be mahe to na wo la.”
Jeremiah12:1 O Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah12:2 Èɖo wo gɔme anyi
Jeremiah12:3 Ke Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah12:4 Ɣe ka ɣi anyigba axa nu ase
Jeremiah12:5 “Ne èke duɖime kple afɔzɔlawo
Jeremiah12:6 Elabe wò ŋutɔ nɔviwòwo kple tɔ́wò ƒemetɔwo gɔ̃ hã wɔ nu fitifiti ɖe ŋuwò. Togbɔ be wole vivi dom ɖe ŋuwò
Jeremiah12:7 “Megbe nu le nye aƒe la gbɔ; megblẽ nye domenyinu la ɖi. Metsɔ ame si nye luʋɔ lɔ̃na la de asi na eƒe futɔwo.
Jeremiah12:8 Nye domenyinu zu nam abe dzata le ave me ene. Ele gbe tem ɖe ŋunye
Jeremiah12:9 Ðe nye domenyinu la mele nam abe xe ƒonu ŋɔŋɔe ene oa? Ɖe xe ƒonu bubu siwo ƒo xlãe godoo la tso ɖe eŋua? Miyi ɖaƒo ƒu gbemelãwo katã! Mikplɔ wo vɛ ne woava vuvu nu.
Jeremiah12:10 Alẽkplɔla geɖewo gblẽ nye waingble. Wonyà avuzi le nu si nye tɔnye dzi
Jeremiah12:11 Wona wòzu gbedadaƒo; ezu gbedadaƒo le nu xam nam. Anyigba blibo la zu gbedadaƒo; gake meʋã dzi na ame aɖeke o.
Jeremiah12:12 Le to ƒeƒlewo katã tame le kegbegbewo
Jeremiah12:13 Woƒã lu
Jeremiah12:14 Aƒetɔ gblɔ tso dukɔ vɔ̃ɖi siwo katã ƒo xlã
Jeremiah12:15 Ne meho wo ɖa vɔ megbe la
Jeremiah12:16 Ava eme be ne wodo vevie nu
Jeremiah12:17 Ke ne dukɔ aɖe meɖo to o la
Jeremiah13:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ nam be: “Yi nàɖaƒle aklala
Jeremiah13:2 Ale meyi ɖatso avɔ la sa ɖe ali abe ale si Aƒetɔ la gblɔe ene.
Jeremiah13:3 Tete Aƒetɔ gaƒo nu nam zi evelia be:
Jeremiah13:4 “Ɖe avɔ si nèƒle hesa ɖe ali la; tso nàyi ɖaɣlae ɖe kpeto me le Frat-tɔsisi la to.”
Jeremiah13:5 Ale meyi ɖaɣlae ɖe Frat-tɔsisi la to abe ale si Aƒetɔ gblɔ nam ene.
Jeremiah13:6 Le ŋkeke geɖe megbe la
Jeremiah13:7 Ale meyi Frat-tɔsisi la to
Jeremiah13:8 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ nam be:
Jeremiah13:9 “Alea tututu magblẽ Yuda ƒe dàda kple Yerusalem ƒe dàda gã lae.
Jeremiah13:10 Dukɔ vɔ̃ɖi sia si gbe toɖoɖom
Jeremiah13:11 Elabe Aƒetɔ be: Ale si avɔ saɖeali nɔa ali na ame sesĩe la
Jeremiah13:12 Gblɔ nya sia na wo: “Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah13:13 Ekema nàgblɔ na wo be: ‘Aƒetɔ be: Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah13:14 Matsɔ wo axlã ɖe wo nɔewo
Jeremiah13:15 Ɖo to nàse nya la; mèganɔ dàdam o. Elabe Aƒetɔ ye ƒo nu.
Jeremiah13:16 Mide bubu Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah13:17 Ke ne miegbe toɖoɖo la
Jeremiah13:18 Gblɔ na fia kple nyɔnufia be: “Miɖi le miaƒe zi dzi elabe miaƒe atsyɔ̃fiakuku la ge le mia ta.”
Jeremiah13:19 Wotu du siwo le anyigbemekegbegbe la ƒe agbowo
Jeremiah13:20 “Fɔ mo dzi
Jeremiah13:21 Nu ka nàgblɔ ne woɖo ame siwo wò ŋutɔ nèfia nu
Jeremiah13:22 Ne èbia le wò dzime be: ‘Nu ka ta nu siawo dzɔ ɖe dzinye? la
Jeremiah13:23 Ðe ame aɖe ate ŋu trɔ eƒe ŋutigbalẽ alo lãkle natrɔ eƒe agbalẽ ŋɔtaŋɔtaa? Ekema mi ame siwo nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ma la
Jeremiah13:24 Makaka mi ahlẽ abe nutsro ye ya le ƒoƒom le kegbegbe ene.
Jeremiah13:25 Aƒetɔ be esia nye tɔwò gome si wodzidze na wò be nàxɔ la
Jeremiah13:26 Nye ŋutɔ maklo wò avɔ aƒu mo na wò
Jeremiah13:27 Mekpɔ wò ŋunyɔnuwo
Jeremiah14:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yeremya le kuɖiɖi la ŋu be:
Jeremiah14:2 “Yuda le konyi fam; eƒe duwo le nu xam
Jeremiah14:3 Eƒe bubumewo dɔa wo subɔlawo ɖa be woadu tsi vɛ. Woyia vudoa gbɔ
Jeremiah14:4 Esi tsi megale dzadzam o
Jeremiah14:5 Zinɔ si dzi vi fɛ̃ gɔ̃ hã gblẽa vidzĩa ɖi dzona le egbɔ elabe gbe mumu aɖeke meli o.
Jeremiah14:6 Gbetedziwo tsia tsitre ɖe to ƒeƒlewo tame noa ya abe akpatakuwo ene. Nu tea woƒe ŋku ŋu
Jeremiah14:7 Togbɔ be míaƒe nuwɔna vɔ̃ɖiawo le ɖase ɖim le mía ŋu hã la
Jeremiah14:8 Wòe nye Israel ƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ; eƒe xɔnametɔ le xaxa me. Nu ka ta nànɔ anyigba la dzi abe amedzro ene
Jeremiah14:9 Nu ka ta nèbe yeanɔ abe ŋutsu si tɔtɔ la ene
Jeremiah14:10 Aƒetɔ gblɔ le dukɔ sia ŋu be: “Wolɔ̃a tsa glãla tsatsa alea; womeɖua wo ɖokui dzi tɔna ɖe teƒe ɖeka o
Jeremiah14:11 Aƒetɔ gblɔ nam be: “Mègaɖe kuku nam be mawɔ nyui na dukɔ sia o.
Jeremiah14:12 Togbɔ be wotsi nu dɔ gɔ̃ hã la
Jeremiah14:13 Tete megblɔ be: “O Aƒetɔ Mawu
Jeremiah14:14 Ke Aƒetɔ gblɔ nam be: “Aʋatso kam gbeƒãɖela mawo le le nye ŋkɔ me. Nyemedɔ wo loo
Jeremiah14:15 Eya ta Aƒetɔ be gbeƒãɖela siwo nyemedɔ o
Jeremiah14:16 Dɔwuame kple aʋawɔwɔ atsrɔ̃ ame siwo wogblɔ nya siawo na la hã
Jeremiah14:17 Gblɔ nya sia na wo be: ‘Na nye ŋkuwo nafa aɖatsi yoo zã kple keli
Jeremiah14:18 Ne meyi gbe me la
Jeremiah14:19 Ɖe nègbe Yuda-dukɔa godogodoa? Ðe wò luʋɔ lé fu Ziontɔwoa? Nu ka tae nèƒo mí alea
Jeremiah14:20 Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah14:21 Le wò ŋkɔ la ta
Jeremiah14:22 Ðe dukɔwo ƒe alakpamawuwo dometɔ aɖe ate ŋu ana tsi nadzaa? Alo ɖe dziƒo ate ŋu ana agbafie nawɔa? Ɖe menye wò
Jeremiah15:1 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ nam be: “Ne Mose kple Samuel le tsitre ɖe ŋkunye me hã la
Jeremiah15:2 Ne wobia wò be: ‘Afi ka yi ge míala?’ Ɖo eŋu na wo be: ‘Aƒetɔ be: Ame siwo woɖo ɖi na dɔ vɔ̃ la
Jeremiah15:3 “Meɖoe be nu vevi ƒomevi ene nawɔ wo
Jeremiah15:4 Mawɔ wo woazu ŋɔdzinu na fiaɖuƒewo katã le anyigba dzi
Jeremiah15:5 “O Yerusalem
Jeremiah15:6 Miegbem

Jeremiah15:8 Mena woƒe ahosiwo sɔ gbɔ wu ƒutake. Metsrɔ̃ ɖekakpuiwo nɔwo le ŋdɔkutsu helihelĩ nu. Mena vɔvɔ̃ kple ŋɔdzi tu wo kpoyi.
Jeremiah15:9 Nyɔnu si dzi vi adrẽ la ku ƒenyi yi ɖi me; zã do ɖee
Jeremiah15:10 Nɔnye
Jeremiah15:11 Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah15:12 Ɖe ame aɖe ate ŋu aŋe ga yibɔ
Jeremiah15:13 “Matsɔ wò kesinɔnuwo kple wò nu xɔasiwo ana woaha femaxee
Jeremiah15:14 Mana miasubɔ miaƒe futɔwo le anyigba si mienya o la dzi
Jeremiah15:15 Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah15:16 Esi nèƒo nu nam la
Jeremiah15:17 Nyemebɔbɔ nɔ dzidzɔkpɔlawo dome alo ɖu agbe o; ke boŋ èna dzi kum vevie
Jeremiah15:18 Nu ka tae manɔ veve sem ɖaa? Nu ka ta nye abiawo nye abi makumaku? Ðe nèdi be yeanɔ nam abe tɔʋu si blea ame alo tsi si miena kaba la enea?
Jeremiah15:19 Eya ta Aƒetɔ be: “Ne ètrɔ va la
Jeremiah15:20 Mawɔ wò nànye akɔbligli sesẽ na dukɔ sia. Woawɔ aʋa kpli wò
Jeremiah15:21 “Maɖe wò le ame vɔ̃ɖiwo si me
Jeremiah16:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ nam be:
Jeremiah16:2 “Mele be nàɖe srɔ̃ alo adzi viŋutsuwo alo vinyɔnuwo ɖe teƒe sia o.
Jeremiah16:3 Elabe nya si Aƒetɔ gblɔ tso viŋutsu kple vinyɔnu siwo wodzi ɖe teƒe sia kple wo nɔ siwo dzi wo kpakple wo tɔ́ siwo dzi wo ɖe anyigba sia dzi la ŋu lae nye be:
Jeremiah16:4 Dɔ vɔ̃ awu wo. Womafa na wo loo
Jeremiah16:5 “Elabe Aƒetɔ be: Mègage ɖe aƒe si me wole konyi fam le la o. Mègayi ɖafa na ame aɖeke alo ado baba nɛ o. Elabe nye Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah16:6 Bubumewo kple ame gblɔewo katã aku le anyigba sia dzi
Jeremiah16:7 Ame aɖeke maɖu nu le kuteƒe afa akɔ na kutɔwo loo
Jeremiah16:8 Mele be nàge ɖe aƒe si me woɖo kplɔ̃ le agbe ɖum le la o. Mele be nàbɔbɔ nɔ wo dome aɖu nu
Jeremiah16:9 Elabe Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah16:10 “Ne ègblɔ nya siawo katã na wo la
Jeremiah16:11 Ekema ɖo eŋu na wo be Aƒetɔ be: ‘Elabe mia tɔgbuiwo gblẽm ɖi hedze mawu bubuwo yome. Wosubɔ wo
Jeremiah16:12 Ke nu si miawo mieva wɔ la vɔ̃ɖi wu mia tɔgbuiwo tɔ. Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah16:13 eya ta matsɔ mi aƒu gbe tso anyigba sia dzi
Jeremiah16:14 “Aƒetɔ be: Eya ta
Jeremiah16:15 Ke ‘Zi ale si Aƒetɔ le agbe
Jeremiah16:16 Aƒetɔ be: “Kpɔ ɖa

Jeremiah16:18 Gbã la

Jeremiah17:1 “Wotsɔ nuŋlɔga ŋlɔ Yuda ƒe nuvɔ̃e. Wotsɔ lotamekpe tsutsɔẽ ŋlɔe
Jeremiah17:2 esime wo viwo ƒe ŋku le woƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo kple nyɔnumawu Asera ƒe nu siwo le ati damawo te kple togbɛ kɔkɔwo
Jeremiah17:3 kpakple towo tame le gbegbe la dzi. Mana woaha miaƒe kesinɔnuwo kple miaƒe nu xɔasiwo katã le nuvɔ̃ siwo miewɔ le miaƒe anyigba katã dzi la ta.
Jeremiah17:4 Mana domenyinu si metsɔ na mi la nage le mia si
Jeremiah17:5 Aƒetɔ be: “Aɖi ame si ƒe dzi te ɖa le Aƒetɔ ŋu
Jeremiah17:6 Eyama le abe ati masemasẽ le kegbegbe ene; ne nu nyui va la
Jeremiah17:7 Woyra ame si ɖo dzi ɖe Aƒetɔ ŋu
Jeremiah17:8 Ele abe ati si wodo ɖe tɔ to
Jeremiah17:9 Amegbetɔ ƒe dzi nye alakpatɔ wu nu sia nu. Nu gbegblẽ ŋutɔŋutɔ wònye. Ame ka ate ŋu ase egɔme?
Jeremiah17:10 “Nye Aƒetɔ ye dzroa amegbetɔ ƒe susu me
Jeremiah17:11 Ame si to nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔwɔ me kpɔ kesinɔnu ƒo ƒui ɖi la
Jeremiah17:12 Míaƒe kɔkɔeƒe la le abe ŋutikɔkɔefiazikpui si woda ɖe to tame tso gɔmedzedzea me ke la ene.
Jeremiah17:13 Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah17:14 Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah17:15 Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah17:16 Nyemegbe be nyemaganye alẽkplɔla le yowòme loo
Jeremiah17:17 Mèganye ŋɔdzi nam o. Wòe nye nye sitsoƒe le dzɔgbevɔ̃egbe.
Jeremiah17:18 Na ŋu nakpe yonyemetilawo; ke mègana ŋu nakpe nye ya o. Dzi neɖe le wo ƒo
Jeremiah17:19 Aƒetɔ gblɔ nam be: “Yi ɖatsi tsitre ɖe Benyamin-gbo
Jeremiah17:20 Ðe gbeƒã be: ‘Mi Yuda-fiawo
Jeremiah17:21 Aƒetɔ be ame sia ame nese nya sia nyuie
Jeremiah17:22 Migatsɔ agba tso miaƒe aƒewo me do goe le dzudzɔgbe o. Migawɔ dɔ aɖeke ƒomevi hã o. Ke miwɔ dzudzɔgbe la kɔkɔe abe ale si mede se na mia tɔgbuiwo ene.
Jeremiah17:23 Ke wogbe toɖoɖom
Jeremiah17:24 “Aƒetɔ be: ‘Ke ne miawo ya mieɖo tom
Jeremiah17:25 ekema mana miaƒe fiawo kple fiaviwo age ɖe Yerusalem-dua ƒe agbowo me aɖu fia abe David ene. Woawo kple woƒe amegãwo
Jeremiah17:26 Amewo atso Yuda-duwo kple Yerusalem-gbletawo
Jeremiah17:27 Evɔ ne miegbe toɖoɖom

Jeremiah18:2 “Tso

Jeremiah18:6 “Israel-dukɔ

Jeremiah18:9 Nenema ke ne meɖoe be mawɔ dukɔ aɖe alo fiaɖuƒe aɖe
Jeremiah18:10 ke wòwɔ nuvɔ̃ɖi le ŋkunye me

Jeremiah18:13 “Eya ta Aƒetɔ be: Mibia se le dukɔwo dome be nya sia tɔgbe dzɔ ame aɖe se kpɔa? Nu gbegblẽ ŋutɔŋutɔe Israel-dukɔ
Jeremiah18:14 Ðe tsikpe vɔna le agakpewo dome le Lebanon-towo dzia? Ðe tɔʋu fafa siwo le sisím tso eƒe towo dzi la miena?

Jeremiah19:2 eye nàdo go to Zekakɛgbo nu. Yi ɖe Hinom vi ƒe bali me

Jeremiah21:4 “Migblɔ na Zedekiya be Aƒetɔ

Jeremiah21:6 Mele du sia me nɔlawo
Jeremiah21:7 Aƒetɔ be esia megbe la
Jeremiah21:8 “Gblɔ na ame siawo be: ‘Aƒetɔ be: Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah21:9 Ame si tsi du sia me la

Jeremiah21:13 “Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah21:14 Mahe to na mi ɖe nu siwo miewɔ la ƒe metsonuwo nu. Aƒetɔ lae gblɔe. Matɔ dzo eƒe ave la
Jeremiah22:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ be: “Yi ɖe Yuda-fia ƒe fiasã me ne nàgblɔ nya sia nɛ.
Jeremiah22:2 Gblɔ be: ‘Yuda-fia
Jeremiah22:3 Aƒetɔ be midrɔ̃ ʋɔnu ɖe eteƒe
Jeremiah22:4 Elabe ne miewɔ nya sia dzi tututu la
Jeremiah22:5 Aƒetɔ be
Jeremiah22:6 Elabe Aƒetɔ gblɔ le Yuda-dukɔ ƒe fiasã la ŋu be: ‘Èle nam abe Gilead le Lebanon-towo tame ene. Ke mawɔ wò nàzu kegbegbe kokoko
Jeremiah22:7 Maɖo nugblẽlawo ɖa
Jeremiah22:8 Emegbe dukɔ geɖewo ava to du sia ŋu ayi
Jeremiah22:9 Tete woaɖo eŋu be: Esi wogblẽ nu
Jeremiah22:10 Migafa avi na ame si ku la o; migafa konyi nɛ o. Ke mifa avi hehehe na ame si dzo yina la boŋ elabe megale tɔtrɔ ge agbɔ ne wòagakpɔ wo denyigba o.
Jeremiah22:11 Elabe Aƒetɔ gblɔ ɖe Salum
Jeremiah22:12 Ke boŋ aku ɖe teƒe si woɖe aboyoe yii la
Jeremiah22:13 “Baba na ame si tsɔ nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔwɔ le eƒe xɔ tum
Jeremiah22:14 Baba na ame si gblɔ be: ‘Matu xɔ gã aɖe na ɖokuinye
Jeremiah22:15 Ðe nèbuna be yenye fia elabe èle ɖi kem le sedertiwo ŋudɔwɔwɔ mea? Ɖe tɔ́wò meɖu nu
Jeremiah22:16 Eʋli ame dahewo kple hiãtɔwo ta
Jeremiah22:17 Ke ŋku kple dzi siwo le viɖe madzemadze kpɔkpɔ ŋu koe le asiwò. Be nàkɔ ʋu maɖifɔ ɖi
Jeremiah22:18 Eya ta Aƒetɔ gblɔ ɖe Yuda-fia Yehoyakim
Jeremiah22:19 Ke boŋ woaɖii tedziɖiɖii. Woatee le anyigba
Jeremiah22:20 “Yi Lebanon-towo dzi ne nàdo ɣli. Yi Basan-nyigba dzi ne nàna wò gbe naɖi bobobo. Wò gbe nede dzi le Moab-towo dzi elabe wogblẽ wò ahiãviwo katã dome.
Jeremiah22:21 Meƒo nu na wò esime eme nyo na wò; ke nègblɔ be: ‘Nyemasee o.’ Alea ko wò zɔzɔme le tso wò ɖekakpuime ke be mèse nye gbe o.
Jeremiah22:22 Yaƒoƒo akplɔ wò alẽkplɔlawo katã adzoe
Jeremiah22:23 Ke wò Lebanontɔ
Jeremiah22:24 Aƒetɔ gblɔ be: “Zi ale si mele agbe
Jeremiah22:25 Matsɔ wò ade asi na ame siwo le wò ku dim
Jeremiah22:26 Matsɔ wò kple nɔwò si dzi wò la aƒu gbe ɖe anyigba bubu dzi
Jeremiah22:27 Ke womagbugbɔ ava anyigba si dzi vava adzro wo vevie la dzi o.”
Jeremiah22:28 Ðe Xonya
Jeremiah22:29 O nye dukɔ
Jeremiah22:30 Aƒetɔ be: “Ŋlɔ ŋutsu sia ŋkɔ ɖi be medzi vi kpɔ o. Ame si naneke madze edzi na le agbe me o. Elabe dzidzimevi aɖeke manɔ esi aɖu fia le David ƒe fiazikpui dzi
Jeremiah23:1 Aƒetɔ be: “Baba na alẽkplɔla siwo tsrɔ̃ nye alẽwo le nye lãnyiƒe
Jeremiah23:2 Eya ta Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah23:3 Ekema maƒo nye alẽha mamlɛawo nu ƒu tso dukɔ siwo katã me menyà wo ɖo ɖa la
Jeremiah23:4 Maɖo alẽkplɔla siwo alé be na wo la na wo. Womagavɔ̃ azɔ o
Jeremiah23:5 Aƒetɔ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah23:6 Le eƒe fiaɖuɣi la
Jeremiah23:7 Eya ta Aƒetɔ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah23:8 ke boŋ be
Jeremiah23:9 Nya siwo gbɔna la ku ɖe gbeƒãɖelawo ŋu: Nye dzi gbã ɖe dɔme nam; nye ƒuwo katã le ʋuʋum. Mezu abe ahamula ene
Jeremiah23:10 Elabe ahasitɔwo yɔ anyigba la dzi taŋ. Anyigba le nu xam le fiƒode la ta. Lãnyiƒewo ƒu kplakplakpla le gbedadaƒo. Woƒe mɔwo vɔ̃ɖi
Jeremiah23:11 “Gbeƒãɖelawo kple nunɔlawo siaa nye nu tovo wɔlawo. Le keke nye aƒeme gɔ̃ hã
Jeremiah23:12 Eya ta woƒe mɔ anɔ na wo abe mɔ siwo le ɖiɖim le viviti me ene. Woanyà wo ɖo ɖe mɔ siawo dzi
Jeremiah23:13 Gbeƒãɖela siwo le Samaria hã le nane wɔm
Jeremiah23:14 Gake nu si wɔm gbeƒãɖela siwo le Yerusalem le mekpɔ la vɔ̃ɖi: Wole ahasi wɔm
Jeremiah23:15 Eya ta Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah23:16 Ale Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah23:17 Wole gbɔgblɔm edziedzi na ame siwo gbe Aƒetɔ ƒe nya la be
Jeremiah23:18 Gbeƒãɖela siawo dometɔ kae nɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe takpekpe me kpɔ be wòakpɔ nu
Jeremiah23:19 Mikpɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe ahom ɖa! Dɔmedzoe do yina. Ele totrom abe yali ene
Jeremiah23:20 Aƒetɔ ƒe dzi mafa o va se ɖe esime wòwɔ nu si wòɖo be yeawɔ wu enu vɔ keŋ hafi. Emegbe la
Jeremiah23:21 “Nyemedɔ gbeƒãɖelaawo o gake wolé du tsɔ. Nyemegblɔ nya aɖeke na wo o
Jeremiah23:22 Gake nenye ɖe wode adaŋu kplim
Jeremiah23:23 Aƒetɔ be: “Mawu si tsɔ ɖe ame gbɔ la ko menye
Jeremiah23:24 Aƒetɔ be: Ðe ame aɖe ate ŋu abè ɖe ɣaɣlaƒe
Jeremiah23:25 Mese gbeƒãɖela siwo le gbeƒã ɖem alakpanyawo le nye ŋkɔ me le gbɔgblɔm be
Jeremiah23:26 Ɣe ka ɣie gbeƒãɖelawo adzudzɔ alakpadada
Jeremiah23:27 ame siwo buna be yewoana nye dukɔ naŋlɔ nye ŋkɔ be to drɔ̃e siwo wokuna helĩna na wo nɔewo la me
Jeremiah23:28 Mina gbeƒãɖela si ku drɔ̃e la nalĩ eƒe drɔ̃e la abe ale si wolĩa drɔ̃e ene
Jeremiah23:29 Aƒetɔ be: Ɖe nye gbedeasi mele abe dzo ene

Jeremiah23:32 Aƒetɔ be: Kpɔ ɖa

Jeremiah23:36 Ke ame aɖeke megagblɔ be: ‘Aƒetɔ ƒe agba’ azɔ o

Jeremiah24:1 Esime Nebukadnezar

Jeremiah26:1 Le Yehoyakim

Jeremiah26:5 eye ne mieɖoa to nye dɔla gbeƒãɖela siwo medɔna ɖe mi enuenu la ƒe nyawo o la

Jeremiah26:7 Nunɔlawo kple Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖelawo kpakple dukɔ blibo la ɖo to se nya siwo Yeremya nɔ gbɔgblɔm le Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me.

Jeremiah26:9 Nu ka ta nèɖe gbeƒã le Aƒetɔ ŋkɔ me be: ‘Aƒe sia azu abe Silo ene
Jeremiah26:10 Esi Yuda-dumegãwo se nu si le dzɔdzɔm la

Jeremiah26:12 Tete Yeremya gblɔ na dumegãawo kple ameha blibo la be: “Aƒetɔ ye dɔm be magblɔ nya siwo katã miese la ɖe aƒe sia kple du sia ŋu.

Jeremiah30:5 “Aƒetɔ be: Míese ɣli aɖe
Jeremiah30:6 Azɔ mibia
Jeremiah30:7 Aléle! Ŋkeke ma dzi ŋɔ; ŋkeke aɖeke masɔ kplii o. Xaxaɣi wònye na Yakob gake woaɖee le eme.”
Jeremiah30:8 Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah30:9 Ke boŋ woasubɔ Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah30:10 Eya ta Aƒetɔ be: “Mègavɔ̃ o
Jeremiah30:11 Elabe meli kpli wò
Jeremiah30:12 Elabe Aƒetɔ be: “Nu vevi si wɔ wò la
Jeremiah30:13 Wò nya meka ame aɖeke o
Jeremiah30:14 Wò ahiãviwo katã ŋlɔ wò be; womegatsɔ ɖeke le eme na wò o
Jeremiah30:15 Nu ka tae nèle ɣli dom le nu vevi si wɔ wò la ta? Wò vevesese la manyada o. Mewɔ nu siawo wò
Jeremiah30:16 Eya ta ame siwo katã vuvu wò la
Jeremiah30:17 Elabe mana nàgakpɔ lãmesẽ
Jeremiah30:18 Aƒetɔ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah30:19 Akpedahawo aɖi tso teƒe mawo
Jeremiah30:20 Wo viwo aganɔ abe ale si wonɔ tsã la ene. Woƒe amehawo ali ke le ŋkunye me
Jeremiah30:21 Woƒe amegã anye wo dometɔ ɖeka
Jeremiah30:22 Mianye nye dukɔ
Jeremiah30:23 Mikpɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe ahom ɖa! Dɔmedzoe do yina. Ele totrom abe yali ene
Jeremiah30:24 Aƒetɔ ƒe dziku helihelĩ la nu mafa o va se ɖe esime wòwɔ nu si wòɖo be yeawɔ wu enu vɔ keŋ hafi. Emegbe la
Jeremiah31:1 Aƒetɔ be: “Ɣe ma ɣi la

Jeremiah31:4 Israel

Jeremiah31:8 Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah31:9 Woanɔ avi dzi ava
Jeremiah31:10 “Dukɔwo
Jeremiah31:11 Elabe Aƒetɔ xɔ Yakob ƒle tso aboyo me heɖee tso asi si sẽ wui la me.
Jeremiah31:12 Woava dzi ha sesĩe kple dzidzɔ le Zion-togbɛ la dzi
Jeremiah31:13 Ekema ɖetugbiwo akpɔ dzidzɔ aɖu ɣe; ɖekakpuiwo kple ame tsitsiwo atso aseye. Matrɔ woƒe nuxaxa wòazu dzidzɔ. Mafa akɔ na wo
Jeremiah31:14 Mana nuɖuɖu nasu nunɔlawo ƒe luʋɔ

Jeremiah31:16 Aƒetɔ be: “Dzudzɔ avia fafa
Jeremiah31:17 Mɔkpɔkpɔ li na wò le etsɔ me

Jeremiah31:19 Elabe esi meɖe ɖa le ŋuwò la
Jeremiah31:20 Ɖe Efrayim nye vinye ŋutsu lɔlɔ̃a? Eyae nye vinye si gbɔ nyemelɔ̃a nu le oa? Elabe zi ale si menyale nya aɖe gblɔm ɖe eŋu ko la
Jeremiah31:21 “Fɔ kpewo ɖo ɖe mɔ to na ɖokuiwò nàtsɔ de dzesi mɔ lae. Tu dzesidenu siwo akpe ɖe ŋuwò la ɖi. Lé ŋku ɖe mɔ gã si nèto yi la ŋu. Israel ɖetugbi leaƒe
Jeremiah31:22 Vinyɔnu mawɔnuteƒe
Jeremiah31:23 Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah31:24 Amewo anɔ Yuda kple eƒe duwo katã me. Agbledelawo kple ame siwo ʋuna kple woƒe lãhawo tso teƒe yi teƒe la hã akpe ɖe wo ŋu.
Jeremiah31:25 Elabe mana ŋusẽ naɖo ame siwo ŋu ɖeɖi te la ŋu
Jeremiah31:26 Afi mae menyɔ le
Jeremiah31:27 Aƒetɔ be: “Kpɔ ɖa

Jeremiah31:29 Le ɣe ma ɣi la
Jeremiah31:30 Ke ame sia ame aku ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe nuvɔ̃ si wòwɔ la ta; ame sia ame si ɖu waintsetse hɔhlɔ̃e la
Jeremiah31:31 Aƒetɔ be: Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah31:32 Eya manɔ abe esi mebla kple wo tɔgbuiwo esime melé woƒe alɔnu hekplɔ wo tso Egipte-nyigba dzi la ene o; nye nubabla si wotu togbɔ be menɔ na wo abe srɔ̃ŋutsu ene hã. Aƒetɔ lae gblɔe.
Jeremiah31:33 Ke Aƒetɔ be: Nu

Jeremiah32:1 Le Zedekiya

Jeremiah32:9 “Ale mexɔ agblea le tɔnyeɖea vi Xanameel si ƒle. Meda ga si metsɔ xe fea nɛ la nɛ. Ele klosaloga wui adrẽ.
Jeremiah32:10 Meŋlɔe ɖe agbalẽ me
Jeremiah32:11 Tete metsɔ nuƒlegbalẽ si me woŋlɔ nuƒleseawo kple ɖoɖo siwo ku ɖe eŋu la kpe ɖe eƒe gbugbɔŋlɔ si le ʋuʋu la ŋu.

Jeremiah32:17 ‘O Aƒetɔ Mawu! Wòe tsɔ wò ŋusẽ triakɔ kple wò abɔ sesẽ wɔ dziƒowo kple anyigbae. Naneke wɔwɔ megloa wò o.
Jeremiah32:18 Èɖe wò amenuveve fia ame akpe nanewo
Jeremiah32:19 Wò adaŋudede de to

Jeremiah32:21 Ètsɔ dzesiwo kple nukunuwo
Jeremiah32:22 Ètsɔ anyigba sia na wo
Jeremiah32:23 Woge ɖe anyigba la dzi hexɔe wòzu wo tɔ. Ke womeɖo to wò gbe alo wɔ wò seawo dzi o. Nu siwo katã nègblɔ na wo be woawɔ la

Jeremiah32:31 Du sia doa dziku kple dɔmedzoe nam tso gbe si gbe wotsoe va ɖo egbe
Jeremiah32:32 Mawɔ esia le nuvɔ̃ɖi siwo katã Israel-dukɔa kple Yuda-dukɔa
Jeremiah32:33 Wotrɔ megbe dem
Jeremiah32:34 Wotsɔ woƒe ŋunyɔnuwo ɖo aƒe si ŋu woyɔ nye ŋkɔ ɖo la me

Jeremiah36:1 Esime Yuda-fia Yehoyakim
Jeremiah36:2 “Tsɔ agbalẽ. Ŋlɔ nya siwo katã megblɔ na wò ɖe Israel kple Yuda kpakple dukɔwo katã ŋu la ɖe edzi. Dze egɔme tso esime mede asi nuƒoƒo me kpli wò le fia Yosiya ŋɔli va ɖo egbe.
Jeremiah36:3 Ðewohĩ Yuda-to la ase dzɔgbevɔ̃e siwo katã meɖo be mana woadzɔ ɖe wo dzi la
Jeremiah36:4 Ale Yeremya yɔ Barux
Jeremiah36:5 Azɔ Yeremya de se na Barux be: “Womeɖe mɔ nam be mayi Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me o.
Jeremiah36:6 Eya ta yi nàɖaxlẽ Aƒetɔ ƒe nya si mena nèŋlɔ la

Jeremiah36:14 Tete amegãawo katã dɔ Yehudi
Jeremiah36:15 Wogblɔ nɛ be: “Bɔbɔ nɔ anyi nàxlẽe!” Ale Barux xlẽe na wo.
Jeremiah36:16 Esi wose nyaawo katã la
Jeremiah36:17 Azɔ wobia gbe Barux be: “Ale ke nèwɔ ŋlɔ nya siawo katã? Ɖe wògblɔ wo na wò nèŋlɔa? Gblɔe míse!”
Jeremiah36:18 Barux ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Egblɔ nya siawo katã nam ɖekaɖeka
Jeremiah36:19 Tete amegãawo gblɔ na Barux be: “Yi
Jeremiah36:20 Amegãawo tsɔ agbalẽa gblẽ ɖe Elisama
Jeremiah36:21 Tete fia la dɔ Yehudi ɖa wòyi ɖatsɔ agbalẽa le Elisama
Jeremiah36:22 Ƒè la ƒe ɣleti asiekelia mee fia la bɔbɔ nɔ vuvɔŋɔlixɔ me
Jeremiah36:23 Ne Yehudi xlẽ agbalẽ ɖeɖi etɔ̃ alo ene vɔ la
Jeremiah36:24 Ke fia la kple eƒe dɔlawo siwo se nyaawo pɛpɛpɛ la
Jeremiah36:25 Togbɔ be Elnatan
Jeremiah36:26 Tete fia la ɖe gbe na fia vi Yeraxmeel kple Seraya
Jeremiah36:27 Azɔ esi fia la tɔ dzo agbalẽ si me Barux ŋlɔ nya siwo Yeremya gblɔ nɛ wòŋlɔ vɔ la
Jeremiah36:28 “Gatsɔ agbalẽ bubu nàŋlɔ nya siwo katã megblɔ na wò
Jeremiah36:29 Azɔ ku ɖe Yuda-fia Yehoyakim ŋu gblɔ be: ‘Aƒetɔ be: Ètɔ dzo agbalẽ sia gblɔ be: Nu ka ta nèŋlɔ ɖe eme be Babilon-fia le vava ge godoo agblẽ anyigba sia
Jeremiah36:30 Eya ta Aƒetɔ gblɔ ɖe Yehoyakim

Jeremiah37:2 Ke Zedekiya loo

Jeremiah37:6 Tete Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yeremya be:
Jeremiah37:7 “Aƒetɔ

Jeremiah37:15 Tete amegãawo do dɔmedzoe vevie ɖe Yeremya ŋu. Woƒoe
Jeremiah37:16 Esi Yeremya nɔ gaxɔ si nye tomexɔ la me eteƒe didi la

Jeremiah37:18 Yeremya bia Zedekiya be: “Nu vɔ̃ ka mewɔ ɖe ŋuwò loo
Jeremiah37:19 Afi ka miaƒe gbeƒãɖela siwo gblɔ na mi be: ‘Babilon-fia matso ɖe wò kple anyigba sia ŋu o’ la le?
Jeremiah37:20 Azɔ nye aƒetɔ fia
Jeremiah37:21 Ale fia Zedekiya ɖe gbe woda Yeremya ɖe dzɔlawo ƒe xɔxɔnu. Wotsɔa abolo ɖeka nɛ tso aboloƒolawo ƒe ablɔ me gbe sia gbe
Jeremiah38:1 Azɔ Sefatya
Jeremiah38:2 “Aƒetɔ be: Ame si tsi du sia me la atsi aʋa loo
Jeremiah38:3 Aƒetɔ be: Matsɔ du sia ade asi na Babilon-fia ƒe aʋakɔ kokoko
Jeremiah38:4 Tete amegãwo gblɔ na fia la be: “Na woawu ŋutsu sia elabe nya siwo gblɔm wòle la le dzi ɖem le aʋawɔla siwo susɔ ɖe dua me kple dukɔ bliboa me la ƒo. Ŋutsu sia mele dukɔa ƒe nyui dim o; eƒe vɔ̃e ko dim wòle.”
Jeremiah38:5 Fia Zedekiya gblɔ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah38:6 Ale wolé Yeremya
Jeremiah38:7 Ebedmelex

Jeremiah38:9 “Nye aƒetɔ fia

Jeremiah38:11 Ale Ebedmelex ɖe ŋutsuawo kpe ɖe eɖokui ŋu. Ege ɖe fia ƒe aƒe la me
Jeremiah38:12 Tete Ebedmelex Etiopiatɔ
Jeremiah38:13 Ale wolé ka la

Jeremiah38:17 Tete Yeremya gblɔ na Zedekiya be: “Aƒetɔ
Jeremiah38:18 Evɔ ne mèna ta Babilon-fia ƒe amegãawo o la

Jeremiah38:21 Evɔ ne ègbe godogodo be yemana ta o la
Jeremiah38:22 Kpɔ ɖa

Jeremiah38:25 Ne amegãawo se be meƒo nu kpli wò
Jeremiah38:26 ekema gblɔ na wo be: ‘Meƒo koko na fia la kple ɖokuibɔbɔ be megaɖom ɖe Yonatan ƒe aƒeme
Jeremiah38:27 Tete amegãawo katã va bia nya la Yeremya se
Jeremiah38:28 Ale Yeremya tsi dzɔlaawo ƒe xɔxɔnua va se ɖe gbe si gbe woxɔ Yerusalem-dua.

Jeremiah48:44 Ame si sí le ŋɔdzi nu la

Jeremiah49:1 Gbedeasi ɖe Amonviwo ŋu. Aƒetɔ be: “Viŋutsuwo mele Israel si oa? Domenyila aɖeke mele esi oa? Ke nu ka tae Milkom xɔ Gad wòzu etɔ
Jeremiah49:2 Eya ta

Jeremiah49:4 O

Jeremiah49:8 Dedantɔwo
Jeremiah49:9 Ne waintsetsexalawo va xa nu le mia gbɔ la
Jeremiah49:10 Ke nye ya
Jeremiah49:11 Migblẽ miaƒe tsyɔ̃eviwo ɖi; makpɔ wo ta woatsi agbe. Mina miaƒe ahosiwo naɖo dzi ɖe ŋunye.”
Jeremiah49:12 Elabe Aƒetɔ be: “Ne ame siwo medze be woano kplu la me nu o

Jeremiah49:19 Kpɔ ɖa

Jeremiah49:22 Kpɔ ɖa
Jeremiah49:23 Gbedeasi ɖe Damasko ŋu. “Gbɔgblɔ bu ɖe Xamat kple Arpad elabe wose nya vɔ̃. Dzi ɖe le wo ƒo. Wotsi dzodzodzoe abe atsiaƒu si mate ŋu azi ɖoɖoe o la ene.
Jeremiah49:24 Damasko gbɔdzɔ
Jeremiah49:25 Kpɔ ale si wogblẽ du xɔŋkɔ la
Jeremiah49:26 Eya ta woawu eƒe ɖekakpuiwo ɖe woƒe ablɔwo dzi
Jeremiah49:27 Matɔ dzo Damasko-dua ƒe gliwo
Jeremiah49:28 Gbedeasi ku ɖe Kedar kple Xazor ƒe fiaɖuƒe siwo dzi Babilon-fia Nebukadnezar ɖu la ŋu. Aƒetɔ be: “Mitso! Milũ ɖe Kedar dzi! Mitsrɔ̃ ɣedzeƒenɔlawo!

Jeremiah49:30 Xazornɔlawo

Jeremiah51:12 Mitu aflaga ɖe Babilon-gliwo dzi! Mina dzɔlaawo nasɔ gbɔ ɖe edzi! Mida gbetakpɔlawo ɖe wo nɔƒe! Mina amewo nade xa ɖi! Elabe Aƒetɔ wɔ nu si wògblɔ be yeɖo be yeawɔ Babilontɔwo la wu enu.
Jeremiah51:13 Mi tɔ geɖewo to nɔlawo

Jeremiah51:44 Mahe to na Bel
