Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya xɔ ƒe bla eve vɔ ɖekɛ esime wòzu fia
Jeremiah52:2 Ewɔ nu si nye nuvɔ̃ɖi le Aƒetɔ ŋkume abe ale si Yehoyakim wɔ tututu ene.
Jeremiah52:3 Le nyateƒe me la
Jeremiah52:4 eye le eƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒè asiekelia me le ɣleti ewolia ƒe ŋkeke ewoa gbe la
Jeremiah52:5 Woɖe to ɖe dua ʋuu va se ɖe esime Zedekiya ge ɖe eƒe ƒe wui ɖekɛlia me.
Jeremiah52:6 Le ɣleti enelia ƒe ŋkeke asiekea gbe la
Jeremiah52:7 Tete woŋɔ mɔ ɖe duglia ŋu
Jeremiah52:8 Gake Kaldeatɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ yɔ fia Zedekiya ɖe nu ɖatui le Yerixo-gbegbe. Eƒe aʋawɔlawo katã ka hlẽ le eŋu sí le egbɔ.
Jeremiah52:9 Tete wolé fia la
Jeremiah52:10 Tete Babilon-fia wu Zedekiya viŋutsuawo le eya ŋutɔ ŋkume
Jeremiah52:11 Azɔ egbã Zedekiya ƒe ŋkuwo
Jeremiah52:12 Le Babilon-fia Nebukadnezar ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒè wui asiekelia me
Jeremiah52:13 Etɔ dzo Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la
Jeremiah52:14 Kaldeatɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ siwo katã le fia ŋu srafowo ƒe tatɔ ŋu la mu Yerusalem ŋu gliawo katã ƒu anyi.
Jeremiah52:15 Azɔ Nebuzaradan ɖe aboyo dukɔa ƒe ame dahewo dometɔ aɖewo
Jeremiah52:16 Gake Nebuzaradan
Jeremiah52:17 Kaldeatɔwo gbã akɔblisɔti siwo le Aƒetɔ ƒe xɔa ŋu gudugudu
Jeremiah52:18 Wotsɔ zeawo
Jeremiah52:19 hekpe ɖe agba viwo
Jeremiah52:20 Nu siwo fia Salomo wɔ da ɖe Aƒetɔ ƒe aƒe la me: sɔti eveawo
Jeremiah52:21 Sɔti ɖeka ƒe kɔkɔme nye meta enyi
Jeremiah52:22 Wotsɔ akɔbli wɔ kɔ ɖe eta
Jeremiah52:23 Yevuboɖa bla asieke vɔ ade le axaawo dzi. Yevuboɖa siwo katã le ɖɔ la ŋu godoo va kpe la le alafa ɖeka.
Jeremiah52:24 Fia ŋu srafowo ƒe tatɔ kplɔ nunɔlagã Seraya kple Zefanya si le nunɔlagã la yome kpakple kpuinudzɔla etɔ̃.
Jeremiah52:25 Ame siwo wòkplɔ tso dua me la woe nye: asrafomegã ɖeka si le aʋawɔlawo nu
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradan kplɔ ame siawo katã yi na Babilon-fia le Ribla.
Jeremiah52:27 Babilon-fia dza wo
Jeremiah52:28 Ame siwo Nebukadnezar ɖe aboyoe la ƒe xexlẽmewo nye esi: Le eƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒè adrẽlia me la
Jeremiah52:29 Le eƒe ƒe wui enyilia me la
Jeremiah52:30 Le Nebukadnezar ƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒè bla eve vɔ etɔ̃lia me la
Jeremiah52:31 Esime woɖe aboyo Yuda-fia Yehoyakin le ƒe bla etɔ̃ vɔ adrẽ megbe
Jeremiah52:32 Evil-Merodax ƒo nu lɔlɔ̃tɔe kple Yehoyakin
Jeremiah52:33 Ale Yehoyakin ɖe eƒe gaxɔmewuwo ɖi
Jeremiah52:34 Wonaa dzikpɔga aɖee edziedzi le eƒe hiahiã nu gbe sia gbe le eƒe agbenɔɣi katã va se ɖe eƒe kugbe.
Lamentations1:1 Ao
Lamentations1:2 Ele avi fam hehehe le zã me
Lamentations1:3 Yuda-dukɔ yi aboyo me kple fukpekpe
Lamentations1:4 Zion-mɔwo le konyi fam
Lamentations1:5 Eƒe ketɔwo va zu eƒe aƒetɔ
Lamentations1:6 Zion vinyɔnu ƒe fianyenye katã bu. Eƒe amegãwo zu abe zi siwo mekpɔ gbeɖuƒe aɖeke o la ene. Ŋusẽ mele wo ŋu hafi wole sisím le wo yometilawo ŋgɔ o.
Lamentations1:7 Le Yerusalem ƒe fukpeɣi kple veveseɣi la
Lamentations1:8 Nu vɔ̃e Yerusalem wɔ
Lamentations1:9 Eƒe ɖiƒoƒo le dzedzem le eƒe awu ŋu. Menya be ava nɔ na ye alea o. Edze anyi vevie; akɔfala aɖeke meli o. Yerusalem do ɣli be: “Ao
Lamentations1:10 Futɔwo ha eƒe nu xɔasiwo katã. Ekpɔ dukɔ siwo Aƒetɔ meɖe mɔ na be woayi eƒe amehawo dome o la
Lamentations1:11 Eƒe amewo katã le hũ ɖem
Lamentations1:12 Mi ame siwo katã va le yiyim
Lamentations1:13 Eɖo dzo ɖa tso dzi wòva ge ɖe nye ƒuto me ke. Eɖo ɖɔ na nye afɔ
Lamentations1:14 Eƒo ƒu nye vodadawo katã
Lamentations1:15 Aƒetɔ ɖe nye kalẽtɔwo katã ɖa le ŋunye. Eɖe gbeƒã ɖe ŋunye be yeatsrɔ̃ nye ɖekakpuiwo gbidii. Aƒetɔ la fanya Yuda
Lamentations1:16 Esia ta mele avi fam; nye ŋkuwo le aɖatsi kplɔm yoyoyo. Akɔfala aɖeke meli ade dzi ƒo nam o. Futɔ la ƒe alɔ yi dzi; vinyewo tsrɔ̃.
Lamentations1:17 Zion ke abɔ me
Lamentations1:18 Aƒetɔ tɔ dzɔ
Lamentations1:19 Meyɔ nye lɔlɔ̃tɔwo
Lamentations1:20 Ao
Lamentations1:21 Wose mele ŋeŋem
Lamentations1:22 “Ðo ŋku woƒe nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔwo katã dzi. He to na wo abe ale si nèhee nam le nye nuvɔ̃wo katã tae ene. Nye hũɖeɖewo sɔ gbɔ; nye dzi gbã.”
Lamentations2:1 Ale ke wɔ Aƒetɔ la do dziku na tsizi do ɖe Zion vinyɔnu la dzi ale? Etsɔ Israel ƒe atsyɔ̃ la xlã ɖe anyi tso dziƒo. Gbe si gbe wòdo dziku la
Lamentations2:2 Aƒetɔ la gbã kɔƒe sia kɔƒe nublanuimakpɔmakpɔtɔe le Yakob. Ekaka Yuda ƒe mɔ́ sesẽwo le eƒe dɔmedzoe me. Ebɔbɔ fiaɖuƒe la kple edziɖulawo ɖe anyi ŋukpetɔe.
Lamentations2:3 Etsɔ dziku helihelĩ
Lamentations2:4 Ebi eƒe dati abe futɔ ene. Ehe eme kple ɖusi abe ketɔ ene
Lamentations2:5 Aƒetɔ la va zu abe futɔ ene

Ezekiel10:10 Dzedzeme ɖeka li na wo ame eneawo katã. Edze abe ɖe afɔ ɖeka le nɔvia me ene.
Ezekiel10:11 Ne wole yiyim la
Ezekiel10:12 Toga li na afɔ eneawo eye kekemegati lɛlɛlɛwo le wo si. Ŋkuwo le togaawo ŋu ƒo xlã godoo.
Ezekiel10:13 Mese wona ŋkɔ afɔawo be yalifɔwo.

Ezekiel16:11 Meɖo atsyɔ̃ na wò kple abɔgɛwo kple kɔwla.

Ezekiel16:14 Wò ŋkɔ ɖi hoo le dukɔwo dome le wò tugbedzedze ta

Ezekiel16:17 Sika kple klosalo siwo metsɔ ɖo atsyɔ̃ na wò la ƒe ɖewo hãe nètsɔ wɔ ŋutsu ƒe nɔnɔmewoe
Ezekiel16:18 Wò avɔ siwo wotsɔ ka ŋɔŋɔewo lɔ̃e la woe nègba na wo
Ezekiel16:19 Hekpe ɖe esiawo ŋu la
Ezekiel16:20 Èlé vi siwo nèdzi nam la
Ezekiel16:21 hafi nègamè vinyewo le dzo me abe vɔsalã ene na woa?
Ezekiel16:22 Le wò ŋunyɔnuwo kple gbolowɔwɔ me la
Ezekiel16:23 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: “Baba na wò
Ezekiel16:24 ètu trɔ̃xɔ na ɖokuiwò
Ezekiel16:25 Le ablɔ sia ablɔ ƒe dzogoe dzi la
Ezekiel16:26 Ègawɔ gbolo kple wò aƒelika Egiptetɔ siwo nyɔnunya vivina na la. Èna wò gbolowɔwɔ do gã ɖe edzi be nàtsɔ do dziku nam.
Ezekiel16:27 Eya ta kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel16:28 Èwɔ gbolo kple Asiriatɔwo hã
Ezekiel16:29 Wò gbolowɔwɔ dzi ɖe edzi de Kaldea-nyigba
Ezekiel16:30 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: “Ale ke gbegbe wò dzi di lɔlɔ̃ yomee! Mekpɔ wò nèwɔ nu siawo katã abe gbolo ŋumakpetɔ ene;
Ezekiel16:31 ètu trɔ̃xɔwo ɖe ablɔ ɖe sia ɖe ƒe dzogoe dzi
Ezekiel16:32 Srɔ̃nyɔnu wɔahasi
Ezekiel16:33 Ŋutsuwo naa nu gbolowo katã
Ezekiel16:34 Eya ta wò gbolowɔwɔ to vovo tso nyɔnu bubuwo tɔ gbɔ: Womedia ahiã wò
Ezekiel16:35 “Eya ta wò gbolo
Ezekiel16:36 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: Esi wò ŋukpegoe gbã
Ezekiel16:37 eya ta
Ezekiel16:38 Madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò abe ale si wodrɔ̃a ʋɔnu nyɔnu siwo gblẽa srɔ̃ɖeɖe me
Ezekiel16:39 Matsɔ wò ade asi na wò ahiãviwo. Woagbã wò trɔ̃xɔwo
Ezekiel16:40 Woayɔ amehawo ɖe ŋuwò
Ezekiel16:41 Woatɔ dzo wò xɔwo
Ezekiel16:42 Ale mawɔe be nyemagabi dzi ɖe ŋuwò o. Nyemagaʋã ŋu ɖe tawò o. Nye dzi adze eme
Ezekiel16:43 Elabe mèɖo ŋku wò ɖevime dzi o; ke boŋ nètsɔ nu siawo katã do dziku nam. Eya ta kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel16:44 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel16:45 Nɔwò ƒe vie nènye vavã
Ezekiel16:46 Nɔviwò nyɔnu tsitsiae nye Samaria. Eya kple via nyɔnuwoe nɔ wò dzigbeme. Ke ƒoewò si nɔ wò anyigbeme kple via nyɔnuviwo lae nye Sodom.
Ezekiel16:47 Ke nu si nèkpɔ le wo gbɔ la meɖi ƒo na wò loo
Ezekiel16:48 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: Zi ale si mele agbe la
Ezekiel16:49 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel16:50 Wokpɔa wo ɖokui
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria mewɔ wò nuvɔ̃wo ƒe afã gɔ̃ hã o. Èwɔ ŋunyɔnuwo wu wo
Ezekiel16:52 Wò hã ŋukpe nenɔ dziwò. Elabe wò wɔnawo na wotsò na nɔviwò nyɔnuawo be wo tɔ dzɔ. Elabe le wò nuvɔ̃ siwo me nèwɔ nu ŋunyɔtɔe wu wo le
Ezekiel16:53 “Magaɖo wo te: Sodom kple via nyɔnuwo ƒe nunyonamewo
Ezekiel16:54 be wò ŋukpe nanɔ dziwò
Ezekiel16:55 Le nɔviwò nyɔnuwo Sodom kple via nyɔnuwo gome la
Ezekiel16:56 Ɖe mèɖe alɔ me le nɔviwò nyɔnu Sodom ŋu le ɣeyiɣi si me nènɔ dàdam
Ezekiel16:57 hafi woklo nu le wò vɔɖivɔ̃ɖinyenye dzi oa? Fifia wò kplii miesɔ. Miezu kokoe na Edom-nyɔnuviwo kple eƒe aƒelikawo katã
Ezekiel16:58 Àkpɔ tohehe le wò ŋukpenanuwo kple ŋunyɔnu siwo nèwɔ la ta.” Aƒetɔ lae gblɔe.
Ezekiel16:59 Ẽ
Ezekiel16:60 Ke maɖo ŋku nu si mebla kpli wò le wò ɖevime la dzi
Ezekiel16:61 Ekema àva ɖo ŋku wò nuwɔnawo dzi
Ezekiel16:62 Mabla nu kpli wò
Ezekiel16:63 be nàte ŋu aɖo ŋku edzi
Ezekiel17:1 Aƒetɔ ƒe nya va nam be:
Ezekiel17:2 “Amegbetɔ vi
Ezekiel17:3 Gblɔ be
Ezekiel17:4 Eŋe eƒe ɖɔmea kekeake kple alɔ fɛ̃awo
Ezekiel17:5 Eyome etsɔ anyigba la ƒe nuku la va do ɖe anyigba wɔnu aɖe dzi. Edoe ɖe teƒe si tsi le fũu la. Edoe abe amuti ene
Ezekiel17:6 eye wòdzè hezu wainka si vu ɖe anyi me. Eƒe alɔwo trɔ ɖe eyama gbɔ lɔƒo
Ezekiel17:7 Ke hɔ̃ gã bubu si ƒe aʋalawo keke
Ezekiel17:8 ehoe va do ɖe anyigba si awɔ nuku la dzi
Ezekiel17:9 Gblɔ be
Ezekiel17:10 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel17:11 Tete Aƒetɔ ƒe nya va nam be:
Ezekiel17:12 Azɔ bia aƒe si dze aglã la be: Ɖe miese nu siawo gɔmea? Gblɔ na wo be: Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel17:13 Etia ame ɖeka le fiaƒome la me
Ezekiel17:14 ale be fiaɖuƒe la nabɔbɔ eɖokui
Ezekiel17:15 Ke edze aglã ɖe eŋu
Ezekiel17:16 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: Zi ale si mele agbe la
Ezekiel17:17 Nenye be woho aʋa ɖe eŋu
Ezekiel17:18 Elabe edo vlo atam la
Ezekiel17:19 Eya ta Aƒetɔ Mawu be: Zi ale si mele agbe la
Ezekiel17:20 Maɖo ɖɔ nɛ

Ezekiel17:23 Israel ƒe to kɔkɔtɔ dzie madoe ɖo

Ezekiel18:1 Aƒetɔ ƒe nya gava nam be:
Ezekiel18:2 “Nu ka tae miedoa lo sia kokoko le Israel-nyigba dzi be: ‘Vi tɔ́wo ɖu waintsetse siwo tea atse la
Ezekiel18:3 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: Zi ale si mele agbe la
Ezekiel18:4 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel18:5 “Ne ame aɖe nye nu dzɔdzɔe wɔla
Ezekiel18:6 ne meɖua nu le towo dzi alo subɔa Israelviwo ƒe legbawo o; ne media ame srɔ̃ alo dɔna kple nyɔnu si kpɔ dzinu la o;
Ezekiel18:7 ne metea ame ɖe to o
Ezekiel18:8 ne medoa ga be wòaɖe vi na ye alo xɔa deme o; ne wòtea asi ɖa tso nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ gbɔ; ne wòtsoa afia na ame kple ehavi ɖe eteƒe
Ezekiel18:9 zɔna ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu
Ezekiel18:10 “Ne edzi vi si nye adzodala kple ʋukɔɖila
Ezekiel18:11 ame si mewɔa dɔdeasi siawo ƒe ɖeke o
Ezekiel18:12 tea ame dahewo kple hiãtɔwo ɖe anyi
Ezekiel18:13 ne edoa ga be yeakpɔ viɖe
Ezekiel18:14 “Ke ne ame sia dzi vi si kpɔ nuvɔ̃ siwo katã tɔ́a wɔ
Ezekiel18:15 ame si meɖua nu le towo dzi loo
Ezekiel18:16 media ge le ame aɖeke ŋu o
Ezekiel18:17 etea asi ɖa tso nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ gbɔ
Ezekiel18:18 Ke le tɔ́a gome la
Ezekiel18:19 “Gake miawo ya miebe: ‘Nu ka tae vi makpe fu ɖe tɔ́a ƒe nuvɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ta o?’ Ne ɖevia wɔ nu si le dzɔdzɔe ɖe se nu
Ezekiel18:20 Luʋɔ si wɔa nuvɔ̃ la
Ezekiel18:21 “Ke ne ame vɔ̃ɖi aɖe trɔ
Ezekiel18:22 Womagaɖo ŋku se siwo katã dzi wòda va yi la dzi nɛ o. Anɔ agbe le nu dzɔdzɔe si wòwɔ la ta.
Ezekiel18:23 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: ‘Ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe ku doa dzidzɔ nama? Ɖe nyemadi be netrɔ dzime ne wòatsi agbe boŋ oa?’
Ezekiel18:24 Gake ne nu dzɔdzɔe wɔla dzudzɔ nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ
Ezekiel18:25 “Ke miawo miebe: ‘Aƒetɔ la ƒe mɔwo mele dzɔdzɔe kura o.’ Israel-dukɔ
Ezekiel18:26 Ne nu dzɔdzɔe wɔla trɔ le nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ gbɔ hewɔ nuvɔ̃ɖi la
Ezekiel18:27 Hekpe ɖe esia ŋu la
Ezekiel18:28 Elabe esi wòbu tame
Ezekiel18:29 Ke Israel-dukɔ la be: ‘Aƒetɔ la ƒe nuwɔnawo mele eteƒe o.’ Ao
Ezekiel18:30 Eya ta
Ezekiel18:31 Miɖe asi le se siwo katã dzi mieda le mia dome ɖe ŋunye la ŋu. Miwɔ miaƒe dziwo yeyee
Ezekiel18:32 Elabe Aƒetɔ Mawu be: Amegbetɔ aɖeke ƒe ku medzɔa dzi nam o. Eya ta mitrɔ azɔli ne miatsi agbe.”
Ezekiel19:1 Ke wò la

Ezekiel19:3 Enyi viawo dometɔ ɖeka
Ezekiel19:4 Dukɔwo de zi eŋu

Ezekiel20:1 Le ɣleti atɔ̃lia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi
Ezekiel20:2 Tete Aƒetɔ ƒe nya va nam be:
Ezekiel20:3 “Amegbetɔ vi
Ezekiel20:4 Àdrɔ̃ ʋɔnu woa? Amegbetɔ vi
Ezekiel20:5 Gblɔ na wo be
Ezekiel20:6 Gbe ma gbee meka atam na wo be makplɔ wo ado go tso Egipte-nyigba la dzi ava anyigba si medi da ɖi na wo la dzi
Ezekiel20:7 Megblɔ na wo be: Mitsɔ nu siwo katã melé fui
Ezekiel20:8 Ke wodze aglã ɖe ŋunye hegbe to ɖoɖom. Wo dome ame aɖeke metsɔ nu siwo melé fui
Ezekiel20:9 Gake melé ɖokuinye le nye ŋkɔ la ta. Nyemedi be maƒo ɖi nye ŋkɔ le dukɔ siwo dome wole la ŋkume o. Dukɔ mawo ŋkumee meɖe ɖokuinye fia le
Ezekiel20:10 Ale be mekplɔ wo do goe le Egipte-nyigba dzi hekplɔ wo va gbedadaƒo.
Ezekiel20:11 Metsɔ nye ɖoɖowo na wo
Ezekiel20:12 Gawu la
Ezekiel20:13 Ke Israel-dukɔ la dze aglã ɖe ŋunye le gbedadaƒo. Womezɔ nye ɖoɖowo dzi o; ke wogbe nye seawo
Ezekiel20:14 Gake melé ɖokuinye le nye ŋkɔ la ta. Nyemedi be maƒo ɖi nye ŋkɔ le dukɔ siwo ŋkume mekplɔ wo do goe le la o.
Ezekiel20:15 Gawu la
Ezekiel20:16 Elabe wogbe nye sewo
Ezekiel20:17 Ke hã la
Ezekiel20:18 Megbe nya na wo viwo le gbedadaƒo be: “Migawɔ mia tɔgbuiwo ƒe ɖoɖowo dzi loo
Ezekiel20:19 Nye Aƒetɔ ye nye mia Mawu. Mizɔ ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu
Ezekiel20:20 Mikɔ nye dzudzɔgbewo ŋu nam ale be woanye dzesi le nye kple miawo dome
Ezekiel20:21 Ke wo viwo dze aglã ɖe ŋunye. Womezɔ ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu o. Womeɖɔ ŋu ɖo wɔ nye sewo dzi o
Ezekiel20:22 Gake mehe nye asi ɖe megbe
Ezekiel20:23 Gawu la
Ezekiel20:24 Elabe womewɔ ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu o. Ke wogbe nye sewo dzi wɔwɔ. Woɖu kɔ na nye dzudzɔgbewo
Ezekiel20:25 Gawu la
Ezekiel20:26 Megblẽ kɔ ɖo na wo to woƒe vɔsawo kekeake me
Ezekiel20:27 Eya ta
Ezekiel20:28 Elabe esi mekplɔ wo va anyigba si ŋu meka atam ɖo be matsɔ na wo dzi la
Ezekiel20:29 Mebia wo be nuxeƒe ka ƒomevie nye esi miedena? Eya ta woyɔnɛ be Bama va se ɖe egbe.
Ezekiel20:30 Eya ta gblɔ na Israel-dukɔ la be
Ezekiel20:31 Elabe miena vɔsanuwo
Ezekiel20:32 “Nu si le tame na mi la mava eme akpɔ o. Miesusui be: ‘Mina mianɔ abe dukɔ bubuawo kple anyigba bubuwo ƒe towo ene
Ezekiel20:33 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: “Zi ale si mele agbe la
Ezekiel20:34 Makplɔ mi adoe le dukɔwo dome
Ezekiel20:35 eye makplɔ mi ayi dukɔwo ƒe gbedadaƒo. Afi mae madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu mi le ŋkume kple ŋkume.
Ezekiel20:36 Ale si medrɔ̃ ʋɔnu kple mia tɔgbuiwo le gbedadaƒo le Egipte-nyigba dzi la
Ezekiel20:37 Makplɔ mi ato amekplɔti la te
Ezekiel20:38 Matsra aglãdzelawo le mia dome
Ezekiel20:39 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: “Ke wò Israel-dukɔ
Ezekiel20:40 Elabe Aƒetɔ Mawu be: “Israel-dukɔ blibo la asubɔm le nye to kɔkɔe la
Ezekiel20:41 Maxɔ mi abe dzudzɔ si le ʋeʋẽm lílilĩ la ene
Ezekiel20:42 Ne mekplɔ mi va Israel-nyigba
Ezekiel20:43 Afi mae miava ɖo ŋku miaƒe zɔzɔme kple nuwɔna siwo mietsɔ ƒo ɖi mia ɖokui la dzi le. Ekema mianɔ ŋu nyɔm na mia ɖokui le nu vloe siwo katã miewɔ va yi la ta.
Ezekiel20:44 Azɔ miava dze sii be
Ezekiel20:45 Aƒetɔ ƒe nya va nam be:
Ezekiel20:46 “Amegbetɔ vi
Ezekiel20:47 Gblɔ na ave siwo le anyigbemekegbegbe la be: Mise Aƒetɔ ƒe nya
Ezekiel20:48 Ŋutilãwo katã akpɔe be nye Aƒetɔ ye tɔ dzo avea. Womate ŋu atsii o.”
Ezekiel20:49 Tete megblɔ be: “Ao

Ezekiel22:1 Gawu la
Ezekiel22:2 “Wò amegbetɔ vi
Ezekiel22:3 Gblɔ nɛ be
Ezekiel22:4 Le ʋu si nèkɔ ɖi ta la

Ezekiel22:6 “Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel22:7 Le mewò la
Ezekiel22:8 Miedo vlo nye nu kɔkɔeawo
Ezekiel22:9 Amewo le mewò le ame ŋu gblẽm ne woakɔ ʋu ɖi. Amewo le nu ɖum le towo dzi. Amewo dze ha kple fieŋufieŋu le mewò.
Ezekiel22:10 Amewo ɖe ama wo tɔ́wo le mewò; amewo zia nyɔnuwo dzi dɔna kpli wo le woƒe dzinukpɔɣiwo me.
Ezekiel22:11 Ame aɖewo wɔa ŋunyɔnu kple wo havi srɔ̃
Ezekiel22:12 Le mewò amewo xɔa zãnu be yewoakɔ ʋu ɖi. Èbaa ame to deme gã xɔxɔ me be yeakpɔ viɖe geɖe
Ezekiel22:13 “Eya ta kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel22:14 Ɖe àte ŋu ado dzi
Ezekiel22:15 Makaka wò ahlẽ ɖe dukɔwo dome. Mahlẽ wò ɖe anyigbawo dzi
Ezekiel22:16 Àwɔe be nàzu busu le dukɔwo ŋkume
Ezekiel22:17 Aƒetɔ ƒe nya va nam be:
Ezekiel22:18 “Amegbetɔ vi

Ezekiel22:21 Malɔ mi akɔ ɖi atsɔ nye dɔmedzoe aƒlɔ dzo ɖe mia ŋu
Ezekiel22:22 Ale si wolóloa klosalo le kpo me la
Ezekiel22:23 Aƒetɔ ƒe nya va nam be:
Ezekiel22:24 “Amegbetɔ vi
Ezekiel22:25 Eƒe amegãwo le dua me le ko abe dzata si le gbe tem
Ezekiel22:26 Eƒe nunɔlawo mewɔ nye seawo dzi o
Ezekiel22:27 Eƒe amegã siwo le wo dome la le abe amegãxi siwo lé nu le vuvum la ene. Wole ʋu kɔm ɖi
Ezekiel22:28 Eƒe gbeƒãɖelawo si akalo ɖe nu ŋu na wo. Wokpɔa ŋutega siwo nye aʋatso
Ezekiel22:29 Dukɔ bliboa tafaa ame
Ezekiel22:30 Medi ame ɖeka si aɖo gli la
Ezekiel22:31 Eya ta metrɔ nye dziku kɔ ɖe wo dzi. Mena nye dɔmedzoe fiã wo. Woƒe mɔ si woto la ƒe agbae medro ɖe ta na wo.” Aƒetɔ Mawu ye gblɔe.
Ezekiel23:1 Aƒetɔ ƒe nya va nam be:
Ezekiel23:2 “Amegbetɔ vi
Ezekiel23:3 Wowɔ gbolo le Egipte; wowɔe le woƒe ɖetugbime. Wolé woƒe nowo le afi ma
Ezekiel23:4 Tsitsitɔ ŋkɔe nye Ohola
Ezekiel23:5 “Ohola wɔ gbolo esime wònye tɔnye
Ezekiel23:6 aʋakalẽawo
Ezekiel23:7 Etsɔ eɖokui na wo
Ezekiel23:8 Meɖe asi le eƒe gbolo si wòwɔ tso keke eƒe Egipte nɔnɔ ŋɔli la ŋu o. Elabe tso eƒe ɖetugbime kee ŋutsuwo nɔa egbɔ dɔm
Ezekiel23:9 Eya ta meɖe asi le eŋu na eƒe ahiãviwo. Asiriatɔ siwo dzi wòbe yeaku ɖo la
Ezekiel23:10 Ame siawoe ɖe amae. Wolé via ŋutsuwo kple via nyɔnuwo dzoe. Wowu eya ŋutɔ kple yi
Ezekiel23:11 “Nɔvia nyɔnu Oholiba kpɔ esia
Ezekiel23:12 Ebe yeaku ɖe Asiriatɔwo dzi
Ezekiel23:13 Mekpɔ be wode asi eŋu. Wo kple eve la siaa to mɔ ɖeka.
Ezekiel23:14 Ke eya ƒe gbolowɔwɔ gade dzi wu. Ekpɔ ŋutsuwo ƒe nɔnɔmetata le gli ŋu
Ezekiel23:15 Alidziblanu le ali na wo
Ezekiel23:16 Esi wòkpɔ wo la
Ezekiel23:17 Ale Kaldeatɔwo va ahiãxɔ le egbɔ

Ezekiel23:30 he nu sia va dziwò

Ezekiel39:29 Nyemagaɣla nye ŋkume ɖe wo azɔ o
Ezekiel40:1 Le míaƒe aboyomenɔnɔ ƒe ƒè bla eve vɔ atɔ̃lia ƒe gɔmedzedze
Ezekiel40:2 Ekplɔm le ŋutega siwo Mawu ɖe fiam la me va Israel-nyigba dzi
Ezekiel40:3 Esi wòkplɔm va teƒe ma la
Ezekiel40:4 Ŋutsu la gblɔ nam be: “Amegbetɔ vi
Ezekiel40:5 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel40:6 Tete wòge ɖe agbo si dze ŋgɔ ɣedzeƒe la me. Elia eƒe atrakpuiwo
Ezekiel40:7 Xɔvi siwo nɔ agboa ƒe axawo dzi la didi meta etɔ̃
Ezekiel40:8 Tete wòdzidze agbo la ƒe akpata si le eme lɔƒo; ede meta ene.
Ezekiel40:9 Eƒe gli si le dome nɛ le meta ɖeka
Ezekiel40:10 Xɔvi etɔ̃ nɔ ɣedzeƒegbo la ƒe akpa eveawo
Ezekiel40:11 Tete wòdzidze agbo la ƒe mɔnu. Ekeke meta atɔ̃
Ezekiel40:12 Adzrala xe xɔviawo ƒe mɔwo nu. Wokeke meta afã le akpa sia akpa. Xɔvi ɖe sia ɖe ƒe didime le meta etɔ̃
Ezekiel40:13 Tete wòdzidze xɔviawo ƒe agbo tso ɖeka megbe va se ɖe evelia megbe
Ezekiel40:14 Edzidze akpata la
Ezekiel40:15 Tso agboa ƒe mɔnu le xexe va se ɖe akpata emetɔ la ƒe agbo ƒe nuwuwu le meta bla eve vɔ atɔ̃.
Ezekiel40:16 Fesrewo ƒo xlã agboawo va kpe. Wonɔ miamiam ɖo ta domegliawo kple xɔ siwo le axawo dzi la gbɔ
Ezekiel40:17 Eyome wòkplɔm yi ɖe xɔxɔnu si le egodo la me. Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel40:18 Woɖo kpewo ɖe agbo la ƒe axawo dzi ɖe eƒe didime nu. Esia nye kpenyigba si le anyigbeme.
Ezekiel40:19 Eyome wòdzidze kekeme si nɔ agbo si le anyigbeme ƒe eme lɔƒo va se ɖe xɔxɔnu si le egodo la nu le gota la dome wònɔ meta bla atɔ̃. Tete wòdzo le gbɔnye yi dzigbeme lɔƒo
Ezekiel40:20 eye kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel40:21 Xɔvi etɔ̃etɔ̃ le eƒe axawo kple eve dzi. Domegliawo kple akpata la ƒe dzidzeme sɔ kple agbo gbãtɔ tɔ. Wodidi meta bla eve vɔ atɔ̃ hekeke meta wui eve kple afã.
Ezekiel40:22 Eƒe fesrewo
Ezekiel40:23 Agbo aɖe dze ŋgɔ agbo si le dzigbeme la hege ɖe xɔxɔnu emetɔ la me abe ale si wònɔ le ɣedzeƒegbo la gome ene. Edzidze agbo nu yi agbo nu wònɔ meta bla atɔ̃.
Ezekiel40:24 Tete wòkplɔm ɖo ta anyigbeme
Ezekiel40:25 Fesrewo ƒo xlã eya kple eƒe akpata la abe bubuawo ƒe fesrewo ene. Edidi meta bla eve vɔ atɔ̃
Ezekiel40:26 Atrakpui adrẽ woflɔna dea edzi
Ezekiel40:27 Le xɔxɔnu emetɔ ƒe anyigbeme la
Ezekiel40:28 Tete wòkplɔm yi xɔxɔnu ememetɔ la me to anyigbemegbo la nu. Edzidze anyigbemegbo la; eƒe dzidzeme sɔ kple bubuawo tɔ.
Ezekiel40:29 Eƒe xɔviwo
Ezekiel40:30 Akpatawo ƒo xlãe godoo va kpe. Wodidi meta wui eve kple afã hekeke meta eve kple afã.
Ezekiel40:31 Eƒe akpata dze ŋgɔ xɔxɔnu si le kɔto la. Detiwo le eƒe domegliawo ŋu
Ezekiel40:32 Ekplɔm yi ɖe xɔxɔnu si le ememe le ɣedzeƒekpa dzi
Ezekiel40:33 Eƒe xɔviwo
Ezekiel40:34 Eƒe akpata dze ŋgɔ xɔxɔnu si le kɔto la. Detiwo le eƒe domegliawo ƒe akpa eve; deti ɖeka le akpa ɖeka
Ezekiel40:35 Ekplɔm va dzigbemegbo la nu
Ezekiel40:36 Eƒe xɔviwo
Ezekiel40:37 Eƒe akpata dze ŋgɔ xɔxɔnu kɔtoe tɔ
Ezekiel40:38 Xɔvi aɖe li si ƒe ʋɔtru le agbo la ƒe akpata me. Afi mae wokpalaa numemevɔsalãwo le.
Ezekiel40:39 Le agbo la ƒe akpata me la
Ezekiel40:40 Le akpata la ƒe gota gome le dzigbemegbo la nu la
Ezekiel40:41 Le ememe gome la
Ezekiel40:42 Wotsɔ kpe siwo wofú la wɔ kplɔ̃ ene hena numemevɔsawo. Woƒe kekeme kple didime le sentimeta bla adrẽ vɔ atɔ̃
Ezekiel40:43 Woɖo ga gɔdɔ̃ewo
Ezekiel40:44 Tete wòkplɔm tso gota ge ɖe xɔxɔnu emetɔ la me
Ezekiel40:45 Egblɔ nam be: Xɔvi si dze ŋgɔ anyigbeme la nye nunɔla siwo kpɔa gbedoxɔ la dzi la tɔ
Ezekiel40:46 eye xɔvi si dze ŋgɔ dzigbeme la nye nunɔla siwo kpɔa vɔsamlekpui la dzi la tɔ. Ame siawoe nye Zadok viwo
Ezekiel40:47 Edzidze xɔxɔnu la
Ezekiel40:48 Eyome ekplɔm va gbedoxɔ la ƒe akpata me
Ezekiel40:49 Akpata la didi meta ewo
Ezekiel41:1 Tete wòkplɔm ge ɖe gbedoxɔ la me
Ezekiel41:2 Eƒe ʋɔtru nu keke meta atɔ̃
Ezekiel41:3 Ege ɖe xɔ emetɔ la me
Ezekiel41:4 Edzidze xɔa me ƒe didime ɖo ta gbedoxɔ la gbɔ wònɔ meta ewo
Ezekiel41:5 Tete wòdzidze gbedoxɔa ƒe gliwo
Ezekiel41:6 Xɔŋuxɔeawo de bla etɔ̃
Ezekiel41:7 Xɔŋuxɔe ɖe sia ɖe ƒe tuɖedziwo nɔ kekem ɖe edzi tso tuɖedzi ɖeka dzi yi bubu dzi
Ezekiel41:8 Mekpɔ hã be woƒu kpo ɖe gbedoxɔa ŋu godoo va kpe. Woawoe nye xɔŋuxɔeawo ƒe gɔmeɖoɖo siwo tri dzidzeti ɖeka alo meta eve.
Ezekiel41:9 Xɔŋuxɔea ƒe gli si le gota gome la tri meta eve kple afã
Ezekiel41:10 gbedoxɔ la dome la
Ezekiel41:11 Xɔŋuxɔeawo ƒe ʋɔtruwo trɔ ɖo ɖe teƒe si wotso ɖi le kpo si woƒu ƒo xlã la gbɔ
Ezekiel41:12 Xɔ si dze ŋgɔ gbedoxɔ la le ɣetoɖoƒe gome la
Ezekiel41:13 Edzidze gbedoxɔ la
Ezekiel41:14 Gbedoxɔ la ŋkume le ɣedzeƒe gome kple teƒe si ŋu wotɔ kpɔ ɖo la hã keke meta bla atɔ̃.
Ezekiel41:15 Eyome wòdzidze xɔ la ƒe akpa si dze ŋgɔ teƒe si ŋu wotɔ kpɔ ɖo le ɣetoɖoƒe gome kple eƒe gliwo le akpa eveawo
Ezekiel41:16 Wofae ɖe wo ŋu ƒo xlã wo ame etɔ̃ la godoo
Ezekiel41:17 Le ʋɔtrua tame
Ezekiel41:18 Wonye kerubiwo kple detiwo ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo
Ezekiel41:19 Mo ɖeka nye ame ƒe mo dze ŋgɔ deti ɖeka eye mo evelia nye dzata ƒe mo si dze ŋgɔ deti evelia. Wota nu siawo ɖe gbedoxɔ blibo la me godoo va kpe.
Ezekiel41:20 Tso anyigba va se ɖe ʋɔtrua tame la
Ezekiel41:21 Gbedoxɔ la ƒe ʋɔtrutiwo le dzogoe ene me. Nane le kɔkɔeƒeawo ƒe kɔkɔeƒe la si ɖi
Ezekiel41:22 vɔsamlekpui si wotsɔ ati wɔe la. Ekɔ meta ɖeka kple afã
Ezekiel41:23 Ʋɔtru siwo ʋuna ɖo ɖe akpa eveawo la
Ezekiel41:24 Ʋɔtruawo dze eve le mɔawo nu
Ezekiel41:25 Wowɔ kerubiwo kple detiwo ɖe wo ŋu abe ale si wowɔ wo ɖe gliawo ŋui la ene
Ezekiel41:26 Fesreawo ʋu ɖo ɖe eme lɔƒo
Ezekiel42:1 Tete wòkplɔm yi ɖe xɔxɔnu si le ememe si le dzigbeme lɔƒo la
Ezekiel42:2 Xɔ si nɔ dzigbeme la ƒe didime nɔ meta bla atɔ̃
Ezekiel42:3 Etsyĩa ɖe xɔxɔnu si nye meta ewo la nu
Ezekiel42:4 Teƒe aɖe le xɔviawo nu ɖo ta xɔxɔnu si le eme la gbɔ. Ekeke meta atɔ̃
Ezekiel42:5 Azɔ la
Ezekiel42:6 Elabe tuɖedzi etɔ̃ wonye
Ezekiel42:7 Gli si dze ŋgɔ xɔviawo le gota gome heɖo ta xɔxɔnu si le kɔtotɔ gbɔ la
Ezekiel42:8 Elabe xɔvi siwo le xɔxɔnua ƒe gota gome la didi meta bla eve vɔ atɔ̃. Ke esiwo dze ŋgɔ gbedoxɔa la
Ezekiel42:9 Mɔnu le xɔviawo ŋu le egɔme le ɣedzeƒe gome nenye be ame aɖe di be yeage ɖe eme tso xɔxɔnu si le kɔto lɔƒo
Ezekiel42:10 afi si xɔxɔnu la ƒe gliwo dze egɔme tsoe. Xɔviwo le anyigbeme gome hã. Wodze ŋgɔ gbadzaƒe si ŋu wotɔ kpɔ ɖo kple xɔ la.
Ezekiel42:11 Toƒe le wo ŋgɔ
Ezekiel42:12 Le xɔvi siwo le anyigbeme gome la
Ezekiel42:13 Tete wògblɔ nam be: “Xɔvi siwo le dzigbeme kple anyigbeme
Ezekiel42:14 Nenye be nunɔlawo ge ɖe teƒe kɔkɔea la
Ezekiel42:15 Azɔ esi wòdzidze gbedoxɔ la me vɔ la
Ezekiel42:16 Edzidze ɣedzeƒe gome kple nudzidzeti la; enɔ meta alafa eve bla atɔ̃.
Ezekiel42:17 Tete wòtrɔ hedzidze dzigbeme lɔƒo kple nudzidzeti la
Ezekiel42:18 Etrɔ ɖe anyigbeme hedzidzee kple nudzidzeti la
Ezekiel42:19 Eyome la
Ezekiel42:20 Edzidze akpa eneawo. Gli ƒo xlãe; glia didi meta alafa eve bla atɔ̃ hekeke meta alafa eve bla atɔ̃. Wowɔe be nu siwo le kɔkɔe la ma ɖa tso esiwo mekɔ o la
Ezekiel43:1 Emegbe la
Ezekiel43:2 Kpɔ ɖa
Ezekiel43:3 Ŋutega si mekpɔ la nɔ abe esi mekpɔ esi wòva be yeatsrɔ̃ du la ene
Ezekiel43:4 Esi Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe la ge ɖe gbedoxɔ la me to agbo si dze ŋgɔ ɣedzeƒe me la
Ezekiel43:5 Gbɔgbɔ la kɔm ɖe dzi
Ezekiel43:6 Esime ŋutsu la nɔ tsitre ɖe axanye la
Ezekiel43:7 Egblɔ nam be: “Amegbetɔ vi
Ezekiel43:8 Wotsɔa woƒe kpuiwo ɖoa nye kpui nu
Ezekiel43:9 Azɔ la
Ezekiel43:10 “Wò amegbetɔ vi

Ezekiel43:12 Se si le gbedoxɔa ŋu lae nye esi: Teƒe si ƒo xlãe godoo va kpe ɖo le toa dzi la
Ezekiel43:13 “Vɔsamlekpui la ƒe dzidzeti nye meta afã (dzidzeme sia le abe sentimeta bla adrẽ ene)” Eƒe anyinɔ kɔ sentimeta bla atɔ̃
Ezekiel43:14 Tso eƒe anyinɔ dzi va se ɖe kɔ si le anyigbeme nye meta ɖeka
Ezekiel43:15 Afi si woado dzo ɖo le vɔsamlekpui la me kɔ meta eve. Dzo ene li nɛ
Ezekiel43:16 Mlekpui la kɔ meta ade
Ezekiel43:17 Kɔawo hã didi meta adrẽ hekeke meta adrẽ. To si woɖo nɛ ƒo xlã la le sentimeta bla eve vɔ atɔ̃
Ezekiel43:18 Egblɔ nam be: “Amegbetɔ vi

Ezekiel43:20 Ele be nàtsɔ eƒe ʋu ƒe ɖe asisi ɖe vɔsamlekpui la ƒe dzo eneawo
Ezekiel43:21 Ele na wò hã be nàtsɔ nuvɔ̃vɔsanyitsu la aɖatɔ dzoe ɖe teƒe si woɖo ɖi le gbedoxɔ la ŋu
Ezekiel43:22 Le ŋkeke evea gbe la
Ezekiel43:23 Ne èkɔ eŋuti vɔ la
Ezekiel43:24 Ele be nàtsɔ wo aɖo Aƒetɔ ŋkume
Ezekiel43:25 Gbe sia gbe le ŋkeke adrẽ me la
Ezekiel43:26 Ŋkeke adrẽ wòle be woatsɔ alé avu na vɔsamlekpui la

Ezekiel44:1 Tete wòkplɔm
Ezekiel44:2 Egblɔ nam be: “Ele be agbo sia nanɔ tutu. Mele be woaʋui o
Ezekiel44:3 Amegã la koe ate ŋu anɔ eme aɖu abolo le Aƒetɔ ŋkume. Ele be wòato agbo la ƒe akpata la xa age ɖe eme
Ezekiel44:4 Ekplɔm emegbe to agbo si le dzigbeme me heva gbedoxɔ la nu
Ezekiel44:5 Aƒetɔ gblɔ nam be: “Amegbetɔ vi
Ezekiel44:6 Gblɔ na Israel-dukɔ dzeaglã la be
Ezekiel44:7 elabe miekplɔa amedzrowo
Ezekiel44:8 Miegbe nye nu kɔkɔeawo dzi kpɔkpɔ. Ke mietsɔ amedzrowo ɖo nye nuwo nu le nye kɔkɔeƒe la.”
Ezekiel44:9 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: “Eya ta amedzrovi bolobolotɔ
Ezekiel44:10 Ke Levitɔ siwo tra yi adzɔge le gbɔnye
Ezekiel44:11 Woawoe asubɔ le nye kɔkɔeƒe la
Ezekiel44:12 Aƒetɔ Mawu be esi wosubɔ wo le woƒe legbawo gbɔ
Ezekiel44:13 Mele be woate ɖe ŋunye
Ezekiel44:14 Togbɔ be ele alea hã la
Ezekiel44:15 “Ke nunɔla siwo nye Levi viwo tso Zadok ƒe ƒome la me
Ezekiel44:16 Woawoe age ɖe nye kɔkɔeƒe la
Ezekiel44:17 Ne woge ɖe xɔxɔnu emetɔ ƒe agbowo me la
Ezekiel44:18 Ele be aklalatablanu nanɔ wo ta
Ezekiel44:19 Nenye be wodo go yi ɖe dukɔ la gbɔ le xɔxɔnu si le kɔto la
Ezekiel44:20 Mele be woalũ ta kolikoli alo ana woƒe ɖa nato ʋluyaa o. Ke boŋ woafiã ta woasɔ dzaa ko.
Ezekiel44:21 Mele be nunɔla aɖeke nano wain ne wòle gegem ɖe xɔxɔnu si le eme la me o.
Ezekiel44:22 Mele be woaɖe ahosi alo nyɔnu si wogbe la o. Ke boŋ woaɖe ɖetugbi leaƒe tso ƒome si tso Israel-dukɔ la me loo
Ezekiel44:23 Ele na wo be woafia vovototo si le nu kɔkɔe kple nu makɔmakɔ dome
Ezekiel44:24 Woawoe adrɔ̃ nya ne dzre dzɔ
Ezekiel44:25 Mele be woate ɖe ame kuku ŋuti agblẽ kɔ ɖo na wo ɖokui o. Ke woate ŋu awɔe nenye be wo tɔ́ alo wo nɔ
Ezekiel44:26 Nenye be egblẽ kɔ ɖo alea la
Ezekiel44:27 Gbe si gbe wòge ɖe kɔkɔeƒe la
Ezekiel44:28 “Domenyinu aɖeke manɔ wo si o. Nyee nye woƒe domenyinu
Ezekiel44:29 Woawoe aɖu nuɖuɖuvɔsa

Ezekiel44:31 Nunɔlawo mekpɔ mɔ aɖu lã alo xe kuku aɖeke o
Ezekiel45:1 “Ne miema anyigba la na mia ɖokui la

Ezekiel45:3 Le teƒe kɔkɔe sia la
Ezekiel45:4 Eya lanye anyigba la ƒe kɔkɔeƒe. Anye nunɔla siwo subɔna le kɔkɔeƒe la
Ezekiel45:5 Teƒe bubu si adidi kilometa wui eve kple afã
Ezekiel45:6 “Woaka anyigba ɖe teƒe kɔkɔe la xa na Israel-dukɔ blibo la be woatso du ɖe edzi. Nedidi kilometa wui eve kple afã
Ezekiel45:7 “Amegã la naxɔ anyigba ɖe kɔkɔeƒe la kple dukɔ la ƒe akpa eveawo le ɣetoɖoƒe kple ɣedzeƒe. Eƒe didime nesɔ kple toawo ƒe gomewo
Ezekiel45:8 Eyae anye eƒe anyigba le Israel
Ezekiel45:9 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: “O

Ezekiel45:12 Sekel ɖeka nanye gera bla eve
Ezekiel45:13 “Miaƒe adzɔ si miana ayi ale: Woaɖe lu efa adeliawo ƒe ɖeka le xomer ɖe sia ɖe ŋu; ƒo hã nenema.

Ezekiel45:15 Woaɖe alẽ ɖeka le alẽha alafa eve ɖe sia ɖe ŋu

Ezekiel46:1 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: “Woatu xɔxɔnu si le eme
Ezekiel46:2 Amegã la nato agbo la ƒe akpata nu le gota
Ezekiel46:3 Ele be dukɔ blibo la nado gbe ɖa le Aƒetɔ ŋkume le agbo sia nu le dzudzɔgbewo kple dzinu yeyewo dzi.
Ezekiel46:4 Numemevɔsa si amegã la nana woawɔ le dzudzɔgbe la dzi la nanye alẽvi ade siwo le blibo kple agbo ɖeka si le blibo
Ezekiel46:5 eye bli efa ɖeka nakpe ɖe agbo la ƒe nuɖuɖuvɔsa la ŋu. Nuɖuɖuvɔsa ƒe bli si akpe ɖe alẽviawo ŋu la nanɔ eya ŋutɔ ƒe ŋutete nu. Hekpe ɖe esiawo ŋu la
Ezekiel46:6 Le dzinu yeye dzi la
Ezekiel46:7 Nuɖuɖuvɔsa efa ɖeka nakpe ɖe nyitsuvi la kple agbo la hã ŋu. Le alẽviawo gome la
Ezekiel46:8 Ne amegã la be yeage ɖe eme la
Ezekiel46:9 “Ne dukɔ la va Aƒetɔ ŋkume le ŋkekenyuiwo dzi la
Ezekiel46:10 Ne woge ɖe eme la
Ezekiel46:11 “Le ŋkekenyuiwo dzi kple azãɖugbewo la
Ezekiel46:12 Nenye be amegã la ɖo be yeasa vɔ faa ko
Ezekiel46:13 “Ele nɛ be wòana alẽvi si xɔ ƒe ɖeka
Ezekiel46:14 Ele be wòatsɔ wɔ kilo eve kple ami lita ɖeka si woatsɔ ablu wɔ lae la akpe ɖe eŋu ŋdi sia ŋdi atsɔ wɔ nuɖuɖuvɔsae na Aƒetɔ. Numemevɔsa ƒe ɖoɖo mavɔe nye esia.
Ezekiel46:15 Ale woatsɔ alẽvi la
Ezekiel46:16 Aƒetɔ Mawu be: “Nenye be amegã la wɔ nunana na viawo dometɔ aɖe tso nu si nye eƒe domenyinu me la
Ezekiel46:17 Ke ne ewɔ nunana na eƒe subɔlawo dometɔ aɖe la
Ezekiel46:18 Amegã la mekpɔ mɔ axɔ amewo ƒe domenyinu le wo si ahanyà wo ɖa sesẽtɔe le woƒe nunɔamesiwo gbɔ o. Eya ŋutɔ ƒe domenyinu ko wòkpɔ mɔ atsɔ na viawo
Ezekiel46:19 Azɔ ekplɔm to mɔnu si le agbo la xa la me

Ezekiel46:22 Le dzogoe eneawo dzi la

Ezekiel46:24 Tete wògblɔ nam be: “Esiawoe nye dzodoƒe siwo anye ame siwo subɔna le gbedoxɔ la me la ƒe vɔsalãwo ɖaƒe hena dukɔ la.”
Ezekiel47:1 Egbugbɔm va gbedoxɔ la ƒe ʋɔtru nu

Ezekiel47:10 Ɖɔkplɔlawo anɔ atsiaƒua to tso En-Gedi va se ɖe En-Eglayim. Anye teƒe siwo woada ɖɔ ɖo. Eƒe tɔmelã vovovowo asɔ gbɔ kpaŋkpaŋ abe Atsiaƒu Gã la me lãwo ene.

Ezekiel47:14 Ele be nàmae sɔsɔe na ame sia ame. Meka atam be matsɔe na mia tɔgbuiwo

Ezekiel48:1 “Toawo ƒe ŋkɔwoe nye esiawo: Anyigba la dze egɔme tso dzigbeme liƒo dzi

Ezekiel48:3 Mama ɖeka natso Aser ƒe liƒo nu le ɣedzeƒe va ɖo ɣetoɖoƒe. Esia nanye Naftali tɔ.
Ezekiel48:4 Mama ɖeka natso Naftali ƒe liƒo nu le ɣedzeƒe va se ɖe ɣetoɖoƒe. Esia nanye Manase tɔ.
Ezekiel48:5 Mama ɖeka natso Manase ƒe liƒo nu le ɣedzeƒe va ɖo ɣetoɖoƒe. Esia nanye Efrayim tɔ.

Ezekiel48:10 Teƒe kɔkɔe si woaɖe ɖe aga lae nye esi: Nunɔlawo nakpɔ gome si adidi kilometa wui eve kple afã le dzigbeme lɔƒo
Ezekiel48:11 Teƒe sia anye nunɔla siwo ŋuti wokɔ la tɔ. Woawoe nye Zadok vi siwo wɔa nye subɔsubɔdɔ la. Woawo metrɔ dzo le yonyeme abe Levi viwo ene esime Israel tra mɔ ʋu le yonyeme o.
Ezekiel48:12 Anye nunana tɔxɛ na wo tso adzɔ kɔkɔe si woɖe le anyigba la ŋuti la me. Anye teƒe si kɔ̀ ŋutɔŋutɔ
Ezekiel48:13 Levi viwo nexɔe ɖe nunɔlawo ƒe liƒo nu. Wo tɔ nedidi kilometa wui eve kple afã
Ezekiel48:14 Womadzra eƒe akpa aɖeke alo aɖɔlii o. Womana anyigba nyui tɔxɛ sia nage ɖe ame bubu aɖeke si me o. Elabe nu kɔkɔe wònye na Aƒetɔ.”
Ezekiel48:15 “Anyigba la ƒe akpa si susɔ
Ezekiel48:16 Dua ƒe dzidzeme nayi ale: Eƒe dzigbeme nakeke kilometa eve kple meta alafa eve bla atɔ̃. Anyigbeme hã nakeke kilometa eve meta alafa eve bla atɔ̃; akeke le ɣedzeƒekpa dzi kilometa eve meta alafa eve bla atɔ̃
Ezekiel48:17 Lãnyiƒe si keke la nanɔ dua ƒe dzigbeme. Nekeke meta alafa ɖeka bla eve vɔ atɔ̃; anyigbeme tɔ hã nekeke meta alafa ɖeka bla eve vɔ atɔ̃. Le ɣedzeƒe la
Ezekiel48:18 Anyigba si susɔ
Ezekiel48:19 Dua me dɔwɔla siwo tso to vovovoawo me la
Ezekiel48:20 Akpa blibo sia si miaɖe ɖe aga la ƒe dzidzeme nasɔ le akpa sia akpa. Dzidzeme la nanɔ kilometa wui eve kple afã le go ɖe sia ɖe dzi. Teƒe sia lanye teƒe kɔkɔe la
Ezekiel48:21 “Teƒe si susɔ ɖe kɔkɔeƒe ƒe akpa eveawo
Ezekiel48:22 kple Levi viwo ƒe nunɔamesi kpakple dua ƒe nunɔamesi

Joel3:1 Aƒetɔ be: “Le ɣe ma ɣi me la

Joel3:3 Wodzidze nu ɖe nye amewo dzi. Wode gbolo gbɔ tsɔ ŋutsuvi xe fe nɛ. Wodzra nyɔnuvi tsɔ dze wain no.
Joel3:4 “Nu kae miedi be yewoawɔ ɖe ŋunye
Joel3:5 Miawoe lɔ nye klosalo kple sika dzoe
Joel3:6 Mietsɔ Yudaviwo kple Yerusalemviwo dzra na Helatɔwo be woakplɔ wo adzoe tso wo de ayi adzɔge ke.
Joel3:7 Kpɔ ɖa

Joel3:9 Miɖe gbeƒã nya sia na dukɔwo be: Mikɔ mia ɖokui ŋu. Mibla akpa ɖe aʋawɔwɔ ŋu. Miʋuʋu kalẽtɔwo ne woatso. Aʋawɔlawo katã nedo
Joel3:10 Mitsɔ miaƒe kodzoewo tu yiwoe. Mitsɔ miaƒe hɛ gobɛwo tu akplɔwoe. Ame beli negblɔ be: “Nyee nye aʋakalẽa.”
Joel3:11 Netsɔ! Miva! Mi dukɔ siwo katã ƒo xlã mí la. Miyi ɖaƒo ƒu ɖe afi ma. O Aƒetɔ
Joel3:12 Dukɔwo neho ne woava Yehosafat-bali me. Afi mae mabɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖo glì

Joel3:14 Ame akpewo

Amos8:4 Mise nya sia

Amos8:6 Míadzra bli gbegblẽ asi gãe. Míaƒle ame dahe ɖe klosaloga ƒe fe nu
Amos8:7 Aƒetɔ
Amos8:8 Ɖe anyigba maʋuʋu le esia ta

Amos8:10 Matrɔ miaƒe ŋkekenyuiwo woazu konyifaɣiwo

Amos9:1 Mekpɔ Aƒetɔ wòle tsitre ɖe vɔsamlekpui la gbɔ. Egblɔ be: “Ƒo sɔtiwo ta sesĩe ale be wo gɔme naʋuʋu. Ŋe wo ƒu ameawo ƒe ta dzi. Mele ame mamlɛawo wu ge le aʋa me. Wo dometɔ aɖeke masí o; ɖeka hɔ̃ hã masusɔ o.
Amos9:2 Ne woku do ge ɖe eme yi tsiẽƒe ke gɔ̃ hã
Amos9:3 Ne woyi ɖabè ɖe Karmel-to tame hã
Amos9:4 Ne woƒe futɔwo kplɔ wo ɖe ŋgɔ yi aboyo me gɔ̃ hã

Amos9:11 “Ɣe ma ɣi la

Obadiah1:1 Obadya ƒe ŋutega. Aƒetɔ Mawu ƒo nu ku ɖe Edom-dukɔ ŋu. Míese du tso Aƒetɔ gbɔ
Obadiah1:2 Kpɔ ɖa
Obadiah1:3 Dàda si le wò dzime la ble wò
Obadiah1:4 Togbɔ be nèyi dzi ʋĩi abe hɔ̃ ene
Obadiah1:5 Ne fiafiwo ƒo ɖe dziwò
Obadiah1:6 Ale ke womekaka Esau ƒe nuwo me
Obadiah1:7 Wò dzoɖuxɔlɔ̃wo katã ble wò; wonyà wò va ɖo liƒo dzi ke. Wò kple ame siwo katã nyi dzo la
Obadiah1:8 Aƒetɔ be: Gbe ma gbe la
Obadiah1:9 Teman

Obadiah1:12 Gake mele be nàkpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe nɔviwò ƒe ŋkeke la ŋu o
Obadiah1:13 Menye wòe age ɖe nye dukɔ ƒe agbo me
Obadiah1:14 Menye wòe atsi tsitre ɖe mɔ dzevee nu
Obadiah1:15 Elabe Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋkeke la tu aƒe na dukɔwo katã. Ale si nèwɔ la
Obadiah1:16 Elabe ale si mieno aha le nye to kɔkɔe dzii la

Jonah1:1 Aƒetɔ gblɔ na Yona

Jonah1:4 Ke Aƒetɔ lɔ ya sesẽ aɖe ƒo le atsiaƒu la dzi

Jonah1:6 Tete ʋumefia la va egbɔ

Jonah1:11 Ale wobiae be: “Nu ka míawɔ wò

Jonah1:13 Gake ŋutsuawo ku ʋua kple ŋusẽ be yewoatrɔ ayi gota

Jonah1:15 Ale wokɔ Yona ƒu gbe ɖe ƒua me. Enumake ƒua dze kɔ anyi.

Zechariah5:7 Kpɔ ɖa

Zechariah6:7 Esi sɔ dzĩawo ho la

Zechariah11:11 Ale nubabla la tu gbe ma gbe. Alẽsitsala siwo nɔ ŋku lém ɖe ŋunye la

Malachi1:1 Aƒetɔ ƒe nya si wògblɔ na Maleaxi be wòagblɔ na Israel-dukɔ lae nye esi:
Malachi1:2 Aƒetɔ gblɔ be: “Melɔ̃ mi.” Ke miawo miebia be: “Ale ke nèlɔ̃ mí?” Aƒetɔ ɖo eŋu be: “Esau ɖe
Malachi1:3 eye melé fu Esau ya. Mena tonyigba si nye eƒe domenyinu la zu kegbegbe
Malachi1:4 Ne Edomtɔwo
Malachi1:5 Miawo ŋutɔ miaƒe ŋkuwo akpɔ nu sia
Malachi1:6 Aƒetɔ
Malachi1:7 Miedoa vlom elabe mietsɔa nuɖuɖu makɔmakɔ va nanam le nye vɔsamlekpui dzi. Ke miele biayem be: ‘Nu ka míetsɔ ƒo ɖie?’ Miebuna be woate ŋu aɖi gbɔ Aƒetɔ ƒe kplɔ̃ la faa.
Malachi1:8 Ne mietsɔ lã ŋkuagbã va sa vɔe nam la
Malachi1:9 Azɔ la
Malachi1:10 Ne ɖe mia dometɔ ɖeka ayi aɖatu gbedoxɔa ƒe ʋɔwo be wòaxe mɔ na mi ne miadzudzɔ dzudzɔ ƒuƒlu dodo ɖe nye vɔsamlekpui dzi la
Malachi1:11 Elabe tso ɣe ƒe dzedze va se ɖe eƒe toɖoɖo la
Malachi1:12 Ke miawo ya mieƒo ɖim gblɔ be: ‘Aƒetɔ ƒe vɔsamlekpui ŋu mekɔ o; nuɖuɖu si le edzi la le ŋu nyɔm.’
Malachi1:13 Miegagblɔ hã be: ‘Nu sia ti mí!’
Malachi1:14 Aɖi ameflula la ŋu kpékpekpe! Lãtsu si le eƒe lãha mee wòtsɔ ɖe adzɔgbe be yeanam

Malachi3:9 Woƒo fi de mi elabe miele fiyem; miaƒe dukɔ blibo lae.

Matthew1:1 Yesu Kristo si nye Fia David tɔgbuiyɔvi
Matthew1:2 Abraham dzi Isak
Matthew1:3 Yuda kple srɔ̃a Tamar dzi Perez kple Zerax
Matthew1:4 eye eya dzi Aminadab; Aminadab dzi Naxeson
Matthew1:5 Salmon kple Raxab dzi Boaz
Matthew1:6 eye Isai dzi David
Matthew1:7 Salomo dzi Rexabeam
Matthew1:8 eye Asa dzi Yosafat. Yosafat dzi Yoram
Matthew1:9 Uziya dzi Yotam
Matthew1:10 eye Xizkiya dzi Manase. Manase dzi Amon si dzi Yosiya
Matthew1:11 eye Yosiya dzi Yexonya kple nɔviawo le Babilonia-boyomenɔɣi.
Matthew1:12 Le aboyomenɔnɔ le Babilonia vɔ megbe la
Matthew1:13 Zerubabel dzi Abihud
Matthew1:14 Azur dzi Zadok
Matthew1:15 eya hã dzi Eleazar. Eleazar dzi Matan
Matthew1:16 Yakob dzi Yosef. Eya srɔ̃e nye Maria si dzi Yesu si woyɔna be Kristo la.
Matthew1:17 Ale tso Abraham dzi va se ɖe David dzi le dzidzime wui ene
Matthew1:18 Ale Yesu Kristo ƒe dzidzi lee nye esi: Yosef bia Maria ta be yeaɖe. Ke do ŋgɔ na srɔ̃ɖeɖea la
Matthew1:19 Ale srɔ̃a Yosef si nye ame dzɔdzɔe
Matthew1:20 Esime wòle nu sia ŋuti bum la
Matthew1:21 Ele ŋutsuvi dzi ge
Matthew1:22 Nu siawo katã va eme bene nya si Aƒetɔ la gblɔ to eƒe gbeƒãɖela la dzi la nava eme. Gbedeasi siae nye:
Matthew1:23 “Kpɔ ɖa
Matthew1:24 Ale esi Yosef nyɔ la
Matthew1:25 Ke mede asi eŋu kpɔ o
Matthew2:1 Esi wodzi Yesu le Betlehem-dua me le Yudea le fia Herodes ŋɔli la
Matthew2:2 eye wobia be: “Afi ka wodzi Yudatɔwo ƒe fia la le? Eƒe ɣletivi do le ɣedzeƒe míekpɔ
Matthew2:3 Esi Herodes se esia la
Matthew2:4 Eyɔ dukɔa ƒe amegãwo kple agbalẽfialawo katã ƒo ƒu hebia wo be: “Afi ka woadzi Kristo la le?”
Matthew2:5 Woɖo eŋu be: “Woadzii le Betlehem-dua me le Yudea
Matthew2:6 ‘Wò Betlehem
Matthew2:7 Esia megbe la
Matthew2:8 Tete wòɖo wo ɖe Betlehem kple nya siawo be: “Miheyi ɖadi ɖevia nyuie
Matthew2:9 Ke woawo la
Matthew2:10 Esi wokpɔ ɣletivia la
Matthew2:11 Woge ɖe aƒea me
Matthew2:12 Mawu gbe nya na wo le drɔ̃eƒe be womegagbugbɔ yi Herodes gbɔ o
Matthew2:13 Esi nunyalaawo dzo yi vɔ la
Matthew2:14 Yosef fɔ eye wòkplɔ ɖevia kple dadaa le zã me heyi Egipte.
Matthew2:15 Enɔ afi ma va se ɖe esime Herodes ku. Esia dzɔ be Aƒetɔ ƒe nya si wògblɔ to eƒe gbeƒãɖela la dzi la nava eme be: “Tso keke Egipte kee meyɔ vinye la tsoe.”
Matthew2:16 Esi Herodes kpɔ be nunyalaawo flu ye la
Matthew2:17 Ale wɔ Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela Yeremya ƒe nya si wògblɔ ɖi la va eme. Ebe:
Matthew2:18 “Ɣli ɖi le Rama. Aviɣli kple konyifafa ye! Raxel ye le avi fam na viawo
Matthew2:19 Le Herodes ƒe ku megbe la
Matthew2:20 “Tso nàgbugbɔ ɖevia kple nɔa ayi ɖe Israel-nyigba dzi
Matthew2:21 Ale Yosef dze mɔ
Matthew2:22 Ke esi wòse be Arxelao ye wotsɔ ɖo fiae le Yudea
Matthew2:23 Eyi ɖanɔ du aɖe
Matthew3:1 Le ŋkeke mawo me la
Matthew3:2 “Mitrɔ dzime
Matthew3:3 Yohanes sia nye ame si ŋuti woƒo nu le to Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela Yesaya dzi be: “Ame aɖe le ɣli dom bobobo le gbedadaƒo. Ebe
Matthew3:4 Yohanes do kposɔfuwu ƒlatsa eye wòbla edzi kple lãgbalẽlidziblanu. Ʋetsuvi kple gbemenyitsi nye eƒe nuɖuɖu.
Matthew3:5 Amewo tso Yerusalem-du
Matthew3:6 Woʋu woƒe nuvɔ̃wo me
Matthew3:7 Esi Yohanes kpɔ Farisitɔ kple Zadukitɔ geɖe
Matthew3:8 Miwɔ nu si fia be mietrɔ dzime tso miaƒe nuvɔ̃wo me
Matthew3:9 eye migabu xaa le miaɖokuiwo me be Abraham nye yewo tɔ́ o. Misee nyuie be Mawu ate ŋu ana viwo nado tso kpe siawo me na Abraham!
Matthew3:10 Fifi gɔ̃ hã la
Matthew3:11 Nye ya
Matthew3:12 Elé eƒe lugbɔnu ɖe asi. Akplɔ eƒe lugbɔƒe keŋkeŋ
Matthew3:13 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Matthew3:14 Ke Yohanes melɔ̃ ɖe edzi nɛ gbã o. Egblɔ nɛ be: “Nye boŋ wòhiã be wò nàle mawutsi na. Ale ke wɔ wò boŋ nèva gbɔnye?”
Matthew3:15 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ gblɔ be: “Lɔ̃ nàwɔe nam fifia
Matthew3:16 Esi wole mawutsi na Yesu vɔ
Matthew3:17 Kasia gbe ɖi tso dziƒo be: “Ame sia nye Vinye
Matthew4:1 Azɔ Gbɔgbɔ la kplɔ Yesu yi gbedadaƒo bene Abosam natee kpɔ.
Matthew4:2 Esi wòtsi nu dɔ ŋkeke bla ene zã bla ene megbe la
Matthew4:3 Tete Abosam te ɖe eŋu gblɔ be: “Nenye Mawu Vie nènye la
Matthew4:4 Ke Yesu ɖo eŋu be: “Woŋlɔe ɖe mawunya me be
Matthew4:5 Tete Abosam kplɔ eyama yi ɖe Yerusalem
Matthew4:6 Egblɔ nɛ be: “Nenye Mawu Vi nènye la
Matthew4:7 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Woŋlɔ ɖi hã be: ‘Mègate Aƒetɔ
Matthew4:8 Azɔ Abosam gakplɔ Yesu yi to aɖe
Matthew4:9 gblɔ be: “Matsɔ nu siawo katã ana wò
Matthew4:10 Tete Yesu gblɔ nɛ be: “Te ɖa le gbɔnye
Matthew4:11 ùTete Abosam dzo le Yesu gbɔ
Matthew4:12 Esi Yesu se be wolé Yohanes la
Matthew4:13 Eʋu tso Nazaret
Matthew4:14 bene nya si Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela Yesaya gblɔ ɖi la nava eme be:
Matthew4:15 “Zebulon-nyigba kple Naftali-nyigba
Matthew4:16 Dukɔ si nɔ viviti me la kpɔ kekeli gã aɖe
Matthew4:17 Tso esia dzi la
Matthew4:18 Esi Yesu zɔ to Galilea-ƒua nu yina la
Matthew4:19 Yesu gblɔ na wo be: “Miva nɔ yonyeme
Matthew4:20 Enumake wogblẽ woƒe asabuawo ɖi
Matthew4:21 Yesu dzo le afi ma
Matthew4:22 eye enumake wogblẽ ʋua kple wo tɔ́ ɖi hedze eyome.
Matthew4:23 Yesu yi ɖatsa le Galilea-nuto blibo la me. Enɔ nu fiam amewo le woƒe ƒuƒoƒewo nɔ gbeƒã ɖem Mawu ƒe fiaɖuɖu ŋuti Nyanyui la
Matthew4:24 Ale eŋkɔ ɖi hoo to Siria-nyigba blibo la me
Matthew4:25 Ameha gã aɖe tso Galilea
Matthew5:1 Yesu kpɔ ameha gã la
Matthew5:2 eye wòfia nu wo gblɔ be:
Matthew5:3 “Woyra ame siwo da ahe le gbɔgbɔ me la
Matthew5:4 Woyra ame siwo le konyi fam la
Matthew5:5 Woyra ame fafawo
Matthew5:6 Woyra ame siwo Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nuwɔwɔ dzrona vevie
Matthew5:7 Woyra ame siwo kpɔa nublanui na ame la
Matthew5:8 Woyra ame siwo dza le dzime la
Matthew5:9 Woyra ame siwo léa avu la
Matthew5:10 Woyra ame siwo yome wotina elabe wowɔ Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu la
Matthew5:11 Woyra mi
Matthew5:12 Mikpɔ dzidzɔ
Matthew5:13 “Miele na xexea me abe ale si dze le na nu ene. Ke ne nu si wɔ dze wònye dze la do le eme la
Matthew5:14 “Miele abe kekeli ene na xexea me. Du si wotso ɖe to dzi la meɣlana o.
Matthew5:15 Gawu la
Matthew5:16 Nenema ke mina miaƒe akaɖi naklẽ na amewo
Matthew5:17 “Migabu xaa be meva be maɖe Mose ƒe se la
Matthew5:18 Nyateƒe tom mele na mi be zi ale si dziƒo kple anyigba gali la
Matthew5:19 Ale ame sia ame si da seawo dome suetɔ kekeake dzi
Matthew5:20 Eya ta mele egblɔm na mi be ne ale si miewɔa Mawu ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu meƒo agbalẽfialawo kple Farisitɔwo tɔ ta sãa o la
Matthew5:21 “Miese wogblɔ na blematɔwo be: ‘Mègawu ame o. Ame si wu ame la
Matthew5:22 Ke nye la
Matthew5:23 Eya ta ne ètsɔ wò nunana gbɔna ɖe vɔsamlekpuia dzi
Matthew5:24 gblẽ wò nunana la ɖe afi ma le vɔsamlekpuia ŋgɔ
Matthew5:25 “Ne ame aɖe sama wò
Matthew5:26 Mele egblɔm na wò be èle gaxɔ ma me nɔ ge
Matthew5:27 “Miese wogblɔ be: ‘Mègawɔ ahasi o.’
Matthew5:28 Ke nye la
Matthew5:29 Eya ta ne wò nuɖusiŋku hea wò dea nuvɔ̃ me la
Matthew5:30 Nenema ke ne wò nuɖusi hea wò dea nuvɔ̃ me la
Matthew5:31 “Wogblɔ hã be: ‘Ame si ke agbe srɔ̃a la
Matthew5:32 Ke nye la
Matthew5:33 “Miegase wogblɔ na blematɔwo be: ‘Mègatà nu alakpatɔe o
Matthew5:34 Ke nye la
Matthew5:35 Migatà anyigba hã o
Matthew5:36 Mègatà wò ta hã o
Matthew5:37 Ne nya la le eme la
Matthew5:38 “Miese wogblɔ be: ‘Ŋku ɖe ŋku teƒe
Matthew5:39 Ke nye la
Matthew5:40 Ne ame aɖe di be yeasama wò axɔ wò dziwui le asiwò la
Matthew5:41 Nenema ke ne ŋusẽtɔ aɖe zi dziwò be nàtsɔ yeƒe agba
Matthew5:42 Na nu ame si bia nu wò
Matthew5:43 “Miese wogblɔ be
Matthew5:44 Ke nye la
Matthew5:45 bene miazu mia Tɔ́
Matthew5:46 Ne mielɔ̃ ame siwo lɔ̃ mi ɖeɖe ko la
Matthew5:47 Alo ne miedoa gbe na mia nɔviwo ɖeɖe ko la
Matthew5:48 Mide blibo boŋ abe ale si mia Tɔ́ si le dziƒo la le blibo ene.”
Matthew6:1 “Mikpɔ mia ɖokui dzi nyuie
Matthew6:2 “Eya ta ne èna nane ame dahe la
Matthew6:3 Ke wò la
Matthew6:4 ale be wò nunana la nanɔ adzame
Matthew6:5 “Ne miele gbe dom ɖa la
Matthew6:6 Ke wò la
Matthew6:7 “Ne miele gbe dom ɖa la
Matthew6:8 Miganɔ abe woamawo ene o. Mia Tɔ́ nya nu siwo le mia hiãm xoxo hafi miebianɛ.
Matthew6:9 Eya ta mido gbe ɖa ale: ‘Mía Tɔ́ si le dziƒowo wò ŋkɔ ŋuti nekɔ.
Matthew6:10 Wò fiaɖuɖu neva; Ne wowɔ wò lɔlɔ̃nu le anyigba dzi
Matthew6:11 Na mí egbea míaƒe ŋkekenuɖuɖu
Matthew6:12 Natsɔ míaƒe nuvɔ̃wo ke mí
Matthew6:13 Eye megaɖe mɔ be míadze tetekpɔ me o. Ke ɖe mí ɖa le vɔ̃ la gbɔ.’
Matthew6:14 “Elabe ne mietsɔ amewo ƒe vodada ke wo la
Matthew6:15 Ke ne mietsɔ ke amewo o la
Matthew6:16 Yesu gagblɔ be: “Ne mietsi nu dɔ la
Matthew6:17 Ke ne ètsi nu dɔ la
Matthew6:18 ale be wò nutsitsidɔ la nagadze na amewo o
Matthew6:19 “Migadzra kesinɔnuwo ɖo na mia ɖokui le anyigba dzi afii o
Matthew6:20 Ke boŋ midzra kesinɔnuwo ɖo na mia ɖokui ɖe dziƒo. Afi ma la
Matthew6:21 Elabe afi si wò nu xɔasi le la
Matthew6:22 “Ame ƒe ŋku ɖe wòle abe akaɖi ene na ameti blibo la. Ne wò ŋku nyo la
Matthew6:23 ke ne wò ŋku menyo o la
Matthew6:24 “Ame aɖeke mate ŋu asubɔ aƒetɔ eve o
Matthew6:25 “Esia tae mele gbɔgblɔm na mi be migatsi dzimaɖi le nu si miaɖu kple nu si miano anɔ agbe
Matthew6:26 Mikpɔ dziƒoxewo ɖa
Matthew6:27 Ne mia dome ame aɖe tsi dzi ɖe eƒe agbe ŋu ʋuu hã la
Matthew6:28 “Nenema ke nu ka ta mietsi dzi ɖe nudodo kple nutata ŋu? Mibu ale si dzogbenya si le gbe me la tsinae la ŋuti kpɔ. Metrea ɖeti loo
Matthew6:29 Ke mele egblɔm na mi be fia Salomo
Matthew6:30 Azɔ ne Mawu ɖo atsyɔ̃ na gbe si le agbe egbe
Matthew6:31 “Eya ta migatsi dzimaɖi agblɔ be
Matthew6:32 Trɔ̃subɔlawoe dia nu siawo katã tɔgbe. Ke mia Tɔ́ si le dziƒo la nyae be nu siawo katã hiã mi.
Matthew6:33 Miaƒe nudidi vevitɔ nanye be Mawu naɖu fia ɖe yewo dzi ne yewoawɔ nu dzɔdzɔe
Matthew6:34 “Eya ta migatsi dzimaɖi le etsɔ si gbɔna la ƒe nuwo ŋuti o. Etsɔ si gbɔna la ƒe kuxiwo nenɔ aga. Egbe tɔwo sɔ gbɔ xoxo.”
Matthew7:1 “Migadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu ame bubuwo ne Mawu hã nadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu mi o.
Matthew7:2 Elabe ale si mietso nya me le ame bubuwo ŋui la
Matthew7:3 Ale ke wɔ nèle ati fefee sue
Matthew7:4 Ale ke wɔ nàte ŋu agblɔ na nɔviwò be: ‘Taflatsɛ
Matthew7:5 Wò
Matthew7:6 “Migatsɔ nu siwo le kɔkɔe la da ɖe ame siwo le abe avuwo ene la gbɔ o
Matthew7:7 “Mibia nu eye woana mi; midi nu
Matthew7:8 Elabe ame sia ame si biaa nu la
Matthew7:9 Mia dome ame kae li
Matthew7:10 Alo ne ebia kalãmii la
Matthew7:11 Ne mi
Matthew7:12 “Eya ta nu sia nu si miedina be amewo nawɔ na yewo la
Matthew7:13 “Mito agbo suetɔ la nu; elabe agboa keke
Matthew7:14 Ke agbo la le sue
Matthew7:15 “Mikpɔ mia ɖokui dzi nyuie le alakpagbeƒãɖelawo ŋuti. Wovaa mia gbɔ
Matthew7:16 Miadze si wo to woƒe nuwɔna me. Aŋɔka mate ŋu atse wainkpowo o
Matthew7:17 Ale ati nyui sia ati nyui tsea ku nyui
Matthew7:18 Ati nyui mate ŋu atse ku manyomanyo o
Matthew7:19 Ke ati si metsea ku nyui o la
Matthew7:20 Ale alakpatɔ siwo ɖea gbeƒã Mawu ƒe gbedeasi la ƒe nuwɔnawo miatsɔ adze si woe.”
Matthew7:21 “Menye ame sia ame si le yɔyem be
Matthew7:22 Ne ŋkekea ɖo edzi la
Matthew7:23 Ekema magblɔ na wo be

Matthew7:25 Tsi dza

Matthew7:27 Tsi dza

Matthew7:29 Elabe efia nu abe ame si si ŋusẽ le la ene
Matthew8:1 Esi Yesu ɖi tso togbɛa dzi la

Matthew8:3 Yesu do asi ɖa
Matthew8:4 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ nyuie
Matthew8:5 Esi Yesu ge ɖe Kapernaum-dua me la
Matthew8:6 “Aƒetɔ
Matthew8:7 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Mava da gbe le eŋu.”
Matthew8:8 Ke aʋakplɔla la gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ
Matthew8:9 elabe nye hã mele amegãwo te
Matthew8:10 Esi Yesu se nya siawo la
Matthew8:11 Meka ɖe edzi na mi be ame geɖewo latso ɣedzeƒe kple ɣetoɖoƒe
Matthew8:12 ke woatsɔ dzidzimevi
Matthew8:13 Esia yome la
Matthew8:14 Yesu yi ɖe Petro ƒeme. Ekpɔ Petro lɔ̃xo asrã lée
Matthew8:15 Yesu ka asi eƒe asi ŋu. Tete asrã la kɔ́ le edzi
Matthew8:16 Esi fiẽsi ɖo la
Matthew8:17 Ale wɔ nya si wogblɔ to Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela Yesaya dzi be: “Eyae tsɔ míaƒe gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔwo
Matthew8:18 Esi Yesu kpɔ ameha geɖe siwo ƒo xlãe la
Matthew8:19 Tete agbalẽfiala aɖe va egbɔ gblɔ nɛ be: “Nufiala
Matthew8:20 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Abeiwo kpɔ do
Matthew8:21 Nusrɔ̃laawo dome ame bubu gblɔ nɛ be: “Aƒetɔ
Matthew8:22 Ke Yesu ɖo eŋu be: “Dze yonyeme
Matthew8:23 Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo ge ɖe tɔdziʋu aɖe me.
Matthew8:24 Tete ahom sesẽ aɖe tu le ƒua dzi
Matthew8:25 Nusrɔ̃laawo te ɖe eŋuti
Matthew8:26 Ke Yesu ɖo eŋu be: “Nu ka ta miele vɔvɔ̃m? Xɔseʋɛtɔwo!” Tete wòfɔ heblu ɖe ya la kple ƒua ta; enumake
Matthew8:27 Amewo ƒe nu ku
Matthew8:28 Esi Yesu ɖi go ɖe Gadara-nyigba dzi la
Matthew8:29 Wodo ɣli be: “Wò Mawu Vi
Matthew8:30 Ke hawo ƒe hatsotso gã aɖe le nu ɖum le afi ma lɔƒo.
Matthew8:31 Gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃awo ɖe kuku na Yesu be: “Ne ànya mí ado goe la
Matthew8:32 Yesu gblɔ na wo be: “Midzo yi.” Ale wodo go
Matthew8:33 Ame siwo le haawo dzi kpɔm la sí yi dua me. Woɖaxlẽ nya si dzɔ ɖe ame siwo me gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃awo nɔ la kple haawo hã dzi la fia amewo.
Matthew8:34 Du blibo la ƒo zi
Matthew9:1 Yesu ge ɖe tɔdziʋua me
Matthew9:2 Ame aɖewo tsɔ lãmetututɔ aɖe ɖe aba dzi va egbɔ. Esi Yesu kpɔ woƒe xɔse la
Matthew9:3 Tete agbalẽfialawo dometɔ aɖewo gblɔ le wo ɖokui me be: “Ame sia le busunya gblɔm!”
Matthew9:4 Yesu dze si nu si le susu me na wo
Matthew9:5 Nya siawo dometɔ ka gbɔgblɔe le bɔbɔe wu? ‘Wotsɔ wò nuvɔ̃wo ke wò’ kple ‘Tsi tre nàzɔ azɔli’?
Matthew9:6 Azɔ la
Matthew9:7 Ŋutsua fɔ ɖe tsitrenu hedzo yi aƒeme.
Matthew9:8 Esi amewo kpɔe la
Matthew9:9 Yesu dzo le teƒe ma
Matthew9:10 Esi Yesu le nuɖuƒe le Mateo ƒeme la
Matthew9:11 Farisitɔ aɖewo kpɔ esia
Matthew9:12 Yesu see eye wògblɔ be: “Lãmesesẽtɔwo mehiã gbedala o; ke boŋ dɔnɔwoe hiãe.
Matthew9:13 Miyi ɖadi nya si woŋlɔ ɖi be: ‘Nublanuikpɔkpɔ dim mele
Matthew9:14 Nu siawo megbe la
Matthew9:15 Yesu ɖo eŋu be: “Ɖe miebuna be ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ la xɔlɔ̃wo afa konyi
Matthew9:16 Ame aɖeke metsɔa avɔ yeye ƒe nuɖeɖi kaa awu xoxo o
Matthew9:17 Nenema ke ame aɖeke metsɔa wain yeye dea lãgbalẽgolo xoxo me o
Matthew9:18 Esime Yesu le nu ƒom na wo alea la
Matthew9:19 Ale Yesu tso dze eyome; eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo le eŋuti.
Matthew9:20 Nyɔnu aɖe
Matthew9:21 Ewɔ esia elabe egblɔ le eɖokui me be: “Ne menyaka asi eƒe awu ŋu ko la
Matthew9:22 Yesu trɔ
Matthew9:23 Azɔ Yesu yi ɖe amegã la ƒe aƒeme
Matthew9:24 egblɔ be: “Midzo yi
Matthew9:25 Azɔ esi wonya amehawo do goe la
Matthew9:26 Nyadzɔdzɔ sia ɖi
Matthew9:27 Esi Yesu dzo le afi ma va tso eme yina la
Matthew9:28 Esi Yesu ge ɖe aƒea me la
Matthew9:29 Ale Yesu ka asi woƒe ŋkuwo dzi gblɔ be: “Neva eme na mi
Matthew9:30 Tete woƒe ŋkuwo ʋu. Ke Yesu gbe nya na wo vevie gblɔ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
Matthew9:31 Ke esi wodzo le afi ma ko la
Matthew9:32 Esime ame siawo dzo yina la
Matthew9:33 Enya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃a do goe
Matthew9:34 Ke Farisitɔwo gblɔ be: “Gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo ƒe fiae na ŋusẽe wòtsɔ le gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo nyam do goe.”
Matthew9:35 Yesu yi ɖatsa le duwo kple kɔƒewo me. Efia nu le ƒuƒoƒewo
Matthew9:36 Ke esi wòkpɔ amehaa la
Matthew9:37 Eya ta wògblɔ na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be: “Nuku si ŋe ge woala la sɔ gbɔ
Matthew9:38 Eya ta miɖe kuku na Aƒetɔ la
Matthew10:1 Yesu yɔ eƒe nusrɔ̃la wui eveawo vɛ
Matthew10:2 Amedɔdɔ wui eveawo ƒe ŋkɔwoe nye: Gbã
Matthew10:3 Filipo kple Bartolomeo; Toma kple Mateo
Matthew10:4 Simon si nye Ɖokuisinɔnɔdilawo ƒe habɔbɔmenɔla kple Yuda Iskariot la
Matthew10:5 Nenem me wui eve siawo Yesu dɔ kple gbedeasi siawo be: “Migayi ɖe trɔ̃subɔlawo ƒe anyigba dzi kple Samaria-duwo me o;
Matthew10:6 ke miyi ɖe Israel vi siwo le abe alẽ siwo bu ene la gbɔ boŋ.
Matthew10:7 Ne mieyi la
Matthew10:8 Miyɔ dɔ dɔlélawo
Matthew10:9 Migatsɔ ga aɖeke ɖe miaƒe kotokuwo me o.
Matthew10:10 Migatsɔ nubiakotoku
Matthew10:11 Ne miege ɖe du alo kɔƒe aɖe me la
Matthew10:12 Ne miege ɖe aƒe aɖe me la
Matthew10:13 Ne aƒea me tɔwo lɔ̃ xɔ mi la
Matthew10:14 Ke ne aƒe aɖe
Matthew10:15 Mele egblɔm na mi be nu anɔ bɔbɔe na Sodom kple Gomora tɔwo le ʋɔnudrɔ̃gbe la wu na nenem du ma.”
Matthew10:16 “Kpɔ ɖa
Matthew10:17 Mikpɔ mia ɖokui dzi nyuie le amewo ŋuti
Matthew10:18 eye woahe mi ayi dziɖulawo kple fiawo ŋkume le tanye bene esia nanye ɖase miaɖi na woawo kple dukɔawo.
Matthew10:19 Ne wokplɔ mi yi ʋɔnui la
Matthew10:20 elabe menye miawoe le nu ƒo ge o
Matthew10:21 “Nɔvi ade nɔvi asi kume
Matthew10:22 Amewo katã alé fu mi le tanye. Ke ame si lado dzi va se ɖe nuwuwu la
Matthew10:23 Ne woti mia yome le du aɖe me la
Matthew10:24 “Nusrɔ̃vi aɖeke mewúa eƒe nufiala o
Matthew10:25 Ale ele be wòasɔ gbɔ na nusrɔ̃vi be wòava zu abe eƒe nufiala ene
Matthew10:26 “Eya ta migavɔ̃ na amewo o. Nu sia nu si dzi wotsyɔ nui la
Matthew10:27 Nu si gblɔm mele na mi le viviti me la
Matthew10:28 Migavɔ̃ ame siwo wua ŋutilã gake womate ŋu awu luʋɔ la o. Ke boŋ mivɔ̃ ame si ate ŋu atsrɔ̃ ŋutilã kple luʋɔ siaa le dzomavɔʋe me.
Matthew10:29 Ho si wodzraa atsutsrɔe eve la meɖi naneke o
Matthew10:30 Ke miawo la
Matthew10:31 Eya ta migavɔ̃ o; miawo la
Matthew10:32 “Azɔ ame sia ame si aʋu nya me le amewo ŋkume be tɔnyee yenye la
Matthew10:33 ke ame si ke lagbe nu le gbɔnye le amewo ŋkume la
Matthew10:34 “Migabu be meva tomefafa na ge le anyigba dzi o. Nyemeva tomefafa na ge o
Matthew10:35 Elabe meva viŋutsuvi kple tɔ́a
Matthew10:36 eye ame ƒe ketɔ anye eya ŋutɔ ƒe aƒemetɔwo.
Matthew10:37 Ame sia ame si lɔ̃ tɔ́a alo nɔa wum la
Matthew10:38 Ame si ke metsɔ eƒe atitsoga
Matthew10:39 Ame si ke di be yeaɖe yeƒe agbe la
Matthew10:40 “Ame si xɔ mi la
Matthew10:41 Ame si xɔ Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela la
Matthew10:42 Ame si na tsi fafɛ kplu ɖeka pɛ nenem me sue siawo dometɔ ɖeka le tanye la
Matthew11:1 Azɔ esi Yesu de dɔ siawo asi na eƒe nusrɔ̃la wui eveawo vɔ la
Matthew11:2 Esi Yohanes mawutsilenamela
Matthew11:3 be woabia Yesu be: “Wòe nye ame si wobe ele vava ge loo
Matthew11:4 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Miheyi ɖagblɔ nu siwo miese kple nu siwo miekpɔ la na Yohanes:
Matthew11:5 Ŋkuagbãtɔwo le nu kpɔm; tokunɔwo le nu sem; tekunɔwo le azɔli zɔm; kpodɔlelawo ŋuti le kɔkɔm; wole ame kukuwo fɔm ɖe tsitre
Matthew11:6 Mawu yra ame si mekpɔ nuɖiaɖia le ŋunye o.”
Matthew11:7 Esi amedɔdɔ siawo dzo yina la
Matthew11:8 Nu ka ta koŋ miedo go? Be miakpɔ ame aɖe si do awu bɔbɔea? Kpɔ ɖa
Matthew11:9 Nu ka ta koŋ miedo go? Be miakpɔ Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela aɖe ta yea? Ẽ
Matthew11:10 Elabe eya ŋue woŋlɔ nya ɖi le be: ‘Kpɔ ɖa! Mele nye dɔla dɔm ɖa do ŋgɔ
Matthew11:11 Nyateƒe gblɔm mele na mi be le ame siwo nyɔnuwo dzi dome la
Matthew11:12 Tso Yohanes mawutsilenamela ŋɔli va se ɖe fifi la
Matthew11:13 Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖelawo katã kple Mose ƒe se la va se ɖe Yohanes dzi la
Matthew11:14 eye ne mielɔ̃ be yewoaxɔ wo dzi ase la
Matthew11:15 Ame si si to le la
Matthew11:16 “Ke azɔ la
Matthew11:17 ‘Míeku dzidzɔkpẽ na mi
Matthew11:18 Yohanes va
Matthew11:19 Amegbetɔ Vi la va
Matthew11:20 Du siwo me Yesu wɔ ŋusẽdɔ geɖeawo le la me tɔwo metrɔ dzime o. Ale wòfa na wo gblɔ be:
Matthew11:21 “Baba na wò
Matthew11:22 Mele egblɔm na mi le nyateƒe me
Matthew11:23 Ke wò Kapernaum
Matthew11:24 Mele egblɔm na wò be Mawu akpɔ nublanui na Sodom le ʋɔnudrɔ̃gbe la wu wò godoo!”
Matthew11:25 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Matthew11:26 Ẽ
Matthew11:27 “Tɔ́nye tsɔ nuwo katã de asi nam. Ame aɖeke menya ame si nye Vi la o
Matthew11:28 “Mite va gbɔnye

Matthew12:1 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Matthew12:2 Ke esi Farisitɔwo kpɔ esia la
Matthew12:3 Yesu ɖo eŋu be: “Ɖe miexlẽ nu si David wɔ
Matthew12:4 Ege ɖe Mawu ƒe aƒe la me
Matthew12:5 Alo ɖe miexlẽ le Mose ƒe se la me be enye nyateƒe be nunɔla siwo le mawuxɔa me la gblẽa kɔ ɖo na Dzudzɔgbe ɖe sia ɖe
Matthew12:6 Mele egblɔm na mi be nu si wu mawuxɔ la le afii.
Matthew12:7 Mawunya gblɔ be: ‘Nublanuikpɔkpɔ dim mele
Matthew12:8 elabe Amegbetɔ Vi la kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe Dzudzɔgbe la hã dzi.”
Matthew12:9 Esi Yesu dzo le afi ma la
Matthew12:10 Ŋutsu aɖe
Matthew12:11 Yesu bia wo be: “Ne alẽ ɖeka le mia dome ame aɖe si
Matthew12:12 Evɔ la
Matthew12:13 Tete wògblɔ na ame si ƒe asi siti lé la be: “Mlo asi.” Emloe
Matthew12:14 Tete Farisitɔwo dzo
Matthew12:15 Esi Yesu se be woɖo nugbe ɖe ye ŋuti la
Matthew12:16 eye wòde se na wo be womagana amewo nadze si ye o.
Matthew12:17 Egblɔ esia be Mawu ƒe nya si wògblɔ to eƒe gbeƒãɖela Yesaya dzi la nava va eme be:
Matthew12:18 “Kpɔ ɖa
Matthew12:19 Mahe nya o
Matthew12:20 Agbɔ dzi ɖi na gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔtɔwo
Matthew12:21 eye dukɔwo katã woada woƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ ɖe eyama dzi.”
Matthew12:22 Azɔ la
Matthew12:23 Ameha blibo la ƒe nu ku le nu si Yesu wɔ la ŋuti
Matthew12:24 Esi Farisitɔwo se esia la
Matthew12:25 Yesu dze si woƒe susu
Matthew12:26 Eya ta ne Satana le Satana nyam do goe la
Matthew12:27 Ne miele gbɔgblɔm be meto Belzebul
Matthew12:28 Ke ne Mawu ƒe Gbɔgbɔ la na ŋusẽm be manya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo ado goe la
Matthew12:29 Ame aɖeke mate ŋu age ɖe ŋusẽtɔ aɖe ƒeme ko
Matthew12:30 Ame si mele dzinye o la
Matthew12:31 Esia ŋuti mele egblɔm na mi be woatsɔ amewo ƒe nuvɔ̃ kple busunyagbɔgblɔ ɖe sia ɖe akewo
Matthew12:32 Ame sia ame si ƒo nu tsi tre ɖe Amegbetɔ Vi la ŋu la
Matthew12:33 “Ne ati aɖe nyo la
Matthew12:34 Mi da ƒe dzidzimeviwo
Matthew12:35 Ame nyui hea nu nyuiwo doa go tso eƒe nu nyui dzraɖoƒe
Matthew12:36 Mele egblɔm na mi be: ame sia ame ana akɔnta tso nya vlo ɖe sia ɖe si wògblɔ kpɔ ɖekematsɔlemetɔe la ŋuti le ʋɔnudrɔ̃gbe la.
Matthew12:37 Elabe wò nyawo tsɔ ge woala atso afia na wòe loo
Matthew12:38 Tete agbalẽfiala aɖewo kple Farisitɔ aɖewo gblɔ nɛ be: “Nufiala
Matthew12:39 Yesu ɖo eŋu gblɔ na wo be: “Dzidzime vɔ̃ɖi
Matthew12:40 Elabe abe ale si Yona nɔ ƒumelãtsua ƒe dɔme ŋkeke etɔ̃ zã etɔ̃ ene la
Matthew12:41 Ninivetɔwo atsi tsitre le ʋɔnudrɔ̃gbe la kple mi dzidzime sia
Matthew12:42 Le ʋɔnudrɔ̃gbe la
Matthew12:43 “Ne gbɔgbɔ makɔmakɔ do go le ame me la
Matthew12:44 egblɔna be: ‘Matrɔ ayi nye aƒe si me medo go le la me.’ Ne eva kpɔe wòle ƒuƒlu
Matthew12:45 eyina ɖakplɔa gbɔgbɔ adrẽ bubu siwo vɔ̃ɖi wu eya ŋutɔ la kpena ɖe eɖokui ŋu vanɛ. Wogena ɖe ame la me
Matthew12:46 Esi Yesu gale nu ƒom ko la
Matthew12:47 Ame aɖe gblɔ nɛ be: “Kpɔ ɖa
Matthew12:48 Yesu ɖo eŋu gblɔ nɛ be: “Ame kae nye nɔnye
Matthew12:49 Tete wòfia asi eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo gblɔ be: “Kpɔ nɔnye kple nɔvinye ŋutsuwo ɖa.
Matthew12:50 Ame sia ame si wɔa Tɔ́nye si le dziƒowo la ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu la
Matthew13:1 Gbe ma gbe Yesu do go le aƒea me yi ɖabɔbɔ nɔ ƒua nu.
Matthew13:2 Ameha si ƒo ƒu ɖe eŋu la sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ; ale wòge ɖe tɔdziʋu aɖe me hebɔbɔ nɔ anyi
Matthew13:3 Egblɔ nya geɖe na wo le lododowo me. Ebe: “Kpɔ ɖa
Matthew13:4 Esi wòle nukua wum la
Matthew13:5 Ɖewo ge ɖe kpenyigba dzi
Matthew13:6 Ŋdɔ va ʋu
Matthew13:7 Bubuwo ge ɖe ŋuwo me. Esi wotsi gbɔna la
Matthew13:8 Ke hã bubuwo ge ɖe anyigba nyui dzi
Matthew13:9 Ame si to senu li na la
Matthew13:10 Tete nusrɔ̃lawo va Yesu gbɔ biae be: “Nu ka ta nèle nu ƒom na ameawo le lododowo me?”
Matthew13:11 Yesu ɖo eŋu be: “Miawo la
Matthew13:12 Elabe ame si si nu le la
Matthew13:13 Nu si ta meƒo nu na wo to lododowo me lae nye be wole nu kpɔm kple ŋku
Matthew13:14 Yesaya ƒe gbeƒã si wòɖe la va eme pɛ be: ‘Ame siawo ase nu
Matthew13:15 Elabe ame siawo ƒe susu le dɔ̃ɔ
Matthew13:16 Ke miawo la
Matthew13:17 Mele egblɔm na mi be
Matthew13:18 “Azɔ miɖo to
Matthew13:19 Ame sia ame si sea gbeƒãɖeɖe le fiaɖuƒe la ŋuti
Matthew13:20 Nya si wowu ɖe kpenyigba dzi la nye ame si se nya la
Matthew13:21 ke meƒo ke ɖe to le eme o
Matthew13:22 Nya si wowu ɖe ŋuwo me la nye ame si se nya la
Matthew13:23 Ke nya si ge ɖe anyigba nyui dzi lae nye ame si sea nya la
Matthew13:24 Yesu do lo bubu na wo be: “Dziƒofiaɖuƒea ɖi ame aɖe
Matthew13:25 Esi ame sia ame dɔ alɔ̃ la
Matthew13:26 Ke esi luawo mie
Matthew13:27 Aƒea tɔ ƒe dɔlawo va egbɔ
Matthew13:28 Eɖo eŋu na wo be: ‘Futɔ aɖee wɔ esia!’ Dɔlawo be: ‘Èdi be míayi aɖaho gbe wuwluiawo ɖaa?’
Matthew13:29 Eɖo eŋu be: ‘Ao
Matthew13:30 Migblẽ luawo kple gbe wuwluiawo ɖi
Matthew13:31 Yesu gado lo bubu na wo be: “Dziƒofiaɖuƒe la le abe ame aɖe
Matthew13:32 Enye atikuwo katã dome suetɔ
Matthew13:33 Yesu gado lo bubu na wo be: “Dziƒofiaɖuƒe la le abe amɔwɔʋãnu
Matthew13:34 Yesu to lododowo me gblɔ nu siawo katã na amehaawo
Matthew13:35 Ale wɔ Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela la ƒe nya si wòɖe gbeƒãe la va eme be: “Maƒo nu le lododowo me
Matthew13:36 Yesu do mɔ ameha la
Matthew13:37 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Nuku nyui wula lae nye Amegbetɔ Vi la.
Matthew13:38 Agble lae nye xexea me; nuku nyui lae nye ame siwo le fiaɖuƒe la me; gbe wuwluiawoe nye ame siwo nye Vɔ̃ɖitɔ la tɔwo
Matthew13:39 eye futɔ si wu gbe wuwluiawo lae nye Abosam. Nuŋeɣi lae nye xexea me ƒe nuwuwu
Matthew13:40 Ale si woƒo gbe wuwluiawo nu ƒu
Matthew13:41 Amegbetɔ Vi la adɔ eƒe mawudɔlawo ɖa bene woaƒo ame siwo katã na be amewo wɔ nuvɔ̃ kple ame siwo katã wɔ nuvɔ̃ le eƒe fiaɖuɖu la me la nu ƒu
Matthew13:42 eye woatsɔ wo aƒu gbe ɖe kpodzo si le bibim la me; afi ma woafa avi ahaɖu aɖukli le.
Matthew13:43 Ke Mawu ƒe amewo laklẽ abe ɣe ene le wo Tɔ́ ƒe fiaɖuƒea me. Ame si to senu li na la
Matthew13:44 “Dziƒofiaɖuƒe la ɖi kesinɔnu si woɣla ɖe agble aɖe me
Matthew13:45 “Dziƒofiaɖuƒe la gaɖi asitsala aɖe
Matthew13:46 Esi wòke ɖe ɖeka aɖe
Matthew13:47 “Dziƒofiaɖuƒe la gaɖi ɖɔ si woɖi ɖe ƒu me
Matthew13:48 Esi ɖɔa yɔ la
Matthew13:49 Nenema ke wòanɔ le ɣeyiɣi mlɔetɔ dzi. Mawudɔlawo lado go ayi
Matthew13:50 eye woatsɔ ame vɔ̃ɖiawo aƒu gbe ɖe kpodzo la me afi si woafa avi ahaɖu aɖukli le.”
Matthew13:51 Yesu bia wo be: “Ɖe miese nu siawo gɔmea?” Woɖo eŋu be: “Ẽ.”
Matthew13:52 Ale Yesu gblɔ na wo be: “Ekema esia fia be agbalẽfiala ɖe sia ɖe si zu dziƒofiaɖuƒea ŋuti nusrɔ̃la la ɖi aƒetɔ aɖe
Matthew13:53 Esi Yesu do lo siawo vɔ la
Matthew13:54 Etrɔ yi eya ŋutɔ wo dedu me
Matthew13:55 Ɖe menye atikpala la vi lae nye ame sia oa? Menye nɔa ye nye Maria oa
Matthew13:56 Nɔvia nyɔnuwo katã hã mele mía dome afii oa? Afi ka gɔ̃ ame sia kpɔ nenem nu siawo katã tsoe?”
Matthew13:57 Ale eƒe nu zu nuɖiaɖia na wo
Matthew13:58 Esi womexɔ se o ta la
Matthew14:1 Ɣe ma ɣi la Herodes
Matthew14:2 Egblɔ na eƒe dɔwɔlawo be: “Yohanes mawutsilenamelae nye ame sia. Eyae wofɔ ɖe tsitre tso ame kukuwo dome
Matthew14:3 Do ŋgɔ na esia la
Matthew14:4 Nu si dzɔ lae nye be Yohanes mawutsilenamela gbe nya na Herodes gblɔ be: “Se meɖe mɔ be nàɖe Herodia o.”
Matthew14:5 Nya sia tae Herodes di be yeawu Yohanes ɖo
Matthew14:6 Ke le Herodes ƒe dzigbeŋkeke dzi la
Matthew14:7 Eya ta wòka atam do ŋugbe na nyɔnuvia be nu sia nu si wòabia la
Matthew14:8 Nyɔnuvia nɔ na wòbia tso Herodes si be: “Tsɔ Yohanes mawutsilenamela ƒe ta de agba me nam fifi laa!”
Matthew14:9 Nya la ve fia la
Matthew14:10 Ale wòdɔ ame ɖa be woaɖatso ta le Yohanes nu le gaxɔa me.
Matthew14:11 Wotsɔ ameta la ɖe agba me vɛ
Matthew14:12 Ke Yohanes ƒe nusrɔ̃lawo va kɔ eƒe kukua yi ɖaɖi
Matthew14:13 Esi Yesu se nya sia la
Matthew14:14 Esi Yesu ɖi go la
Matthew14:15 Fiẽsi la
Matthew14:16 Yesu ɖo eŋu be: “Mehiã be woadzo o. Miawo midi nu na wo ne woaɖu!”
Matthew14:17 Woɖo eŋu be: “Naneke mele mía si le afi sia o
Matthew14:18 Yesu gblɔ be: “Mitsɔ wo vɛ nam.”
Matthew14:19 Ebia tso ameawo si be woanɔ anyi ɖe gbe dzi le afi ma hena nuɖuɖu. Tete wòxɔ abolo atɔ̃ kple kalãmi eveawo
Matthew14:20 Ame sia ame ɖu nu
Matthew14:21 Ame siwo ɖu nua la ƒe xexlẽme anɔ ŋutsu akpe atɔ̃; womexlẽ nyɔnuwo kple ɖeviwo ya ɖe eme o.
Matthew14:22 Yesu gblɔ na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be woaɖo ʋu ado ŋgɔ ayi ɖe tá la ƒe go kemɛ dzi ne yeado mɔ ameha la.
Matthew14:23 Esi wòdo mɔ wo vɔ la
Matthew14:24 Ɣe ma ɣi la
Matthew14:25 Fɔŋli me la
Matthew14:26 Esi wokpɔe wònɔ tsia dzi zɔm gbɔna la
Matthew14:27 Enumake Yesu ƒo nu na wo gblɔ be: “Miaƒe dzi nedze eme. Migavɔ̃ o. Nyee.”
Matthew14:28 Petro gblɔ nɛ be: “Aƒetɔ
Matthew14:29 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be: “Va!” Ale Petro do go le ʋua me
Matthew14:30 Ke esi wòkpɔ ale si ya le ƒoƒomee la
Matthew14:31 Enumake Yesu do asi ɖa lée hegblɔ nɛ be: “Xɔseʋɛtɔ! Nu ka ta nèke ɖi ɖo?”
Matthew14:32 Esi woge ɖe ʋua me la
Matthew14:33 Tete ʋua me nɔlawo dze klo subɔ Yesu
Matthew14:34 Esi wotso ƒua heɖi go ɖe Genezaret-nyigba dzi la
Matthew14:35 amewo kpɔ Yesu dze sii le afi ma
Matthew14:36 Woɖe kuku na Yesu be wòaɖe mɔ be dɔnɔawo naka asi eƒe awu to pɛ ko. Ame siwo katã ka asi eŋu la ƒe lã me sẽ.
Matthew15:1 Farisitɔ kple agbalẽfiala aɖewo tso Yerusalem va Yesu gbɔ hebiae be:
Matthew15:2 “Nu ka ta wò nusrɔ̃lawo daa mía tɔgbuiwo ƒe kɔnuwo dzi? Elabe womeklɔa asi hafi ɖua nu o!”
Matthew15:3 Ke Yesu hã bia wo be: “Nu ka ta miawo hã miedaa Mawu ƒe se dzi le miaƒe kɔnyinyiwo ta?
Matthew15:4 Ɖe Mawu megblɔ be: ‘Bu tɔwò kple nɔwò’ eye wògagblɔ hã be: ‘Ame sia ame si gblɔ nya vɔ̃ ɖe tɔ́a alo nɔa ŋuti la
Matthew15:5 Ke miawo ya miegblɔ be: ‘Ne ame aɖe gblɔ na tɔ́a alo nɔa be: Nu si wòle be mana wò la
Matthew15:6 Eya ta to miaƒe kɔnyinyiwo dzi la
Matthew15:7 Alakpatɔwo! Yesaya ƒe nya si wògblɔ le mia ŋuti la le eme vavã. Egblɔ be:
Matthew15:8 ‘Dukɔ sia le subɔnyem kple numenya viviwo ko
Matthew15:9 Wole subɔnyem dzodzro
Matthew15:10 Yesu yɔ ameha la va eɖokui gbɔ hegblɔ na wo be: “Miɖo to ne miase nu gɔme!
Matthew15:11 Menye nu si yina ɖe ame ƒe nu me lae ƒoa ɖi ame o
Matthew15:12 Tete nusrɔ̃lawo va egbɔ hegblɔ nɛ be: “Ènya be esi Farisitɔwo se nya si nègblɔ la
Matthew15:13 Yesu ɖo eŋu gblɔ na wo be: “Ati sia ati si Tɔ́nye si le dziƒo medo o la
Matthew15:14 Miɖe asi le wo ŋu. Ŋkuagbãtɔwo wonye gale ŋkuagbãtɔwo kplɔm. Ne ŋkuagbãtɔ le ŋkuagbãtɔ kplɔm la
Matthew15:15 Petro gblɔ nɛ be: “Ɖe lododo sia gɔme na mí.”
Matthew15:16 Yesu gblɔ na wo be: “Ke miawo hã ame masenugɔmewo mieganye kokokoa?
Matthew15:17 Ɖe mienyae be nu sia nu si ge ɖe ame ƒe nu me la yina ɖe eƒe dɔme
Matthew15:18 Ke nu siwo doa go tso ame nu la tsoa ame ƒe dzime
Matthew15:19 Elabe ame ƒe dzimee susu vɔ̃ɖi
Matthew15:20 Nu siawoe ƒoa ɖi ame
Matthew15:21 Yesu dzo le teƒe ma yi ɖe Tiro kple Sidon nutowo me.
Matthew15:22 Kanaan-nyɔnu aɖe
Matthew15:23 Ke Yesu mede nu eme nɛ o. Eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo te ɖe eŋu
Matthew15:24 Yesu ɖo eŋu gblɔ be: “Alẽ siwo bu le Israel-ƒeme gbɔ ko wodɔm ɖo ɖa.”
Matthew15:25 Ke nyɔnua va dze klo ɖe eƒe afɔnu gblɔ nɛ be: “Aƒetɔ
Matthew15:26 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be: “Menyo be woatsɔ ɖeviwo ƒe nuɖuɖu aƒu gbe na avuviwo o.”
Matthew15:27 Nyɔnua ɖo eŋu be: “Nyateƒee
Matthew15:28 Esi Yesu see la
Matthew15:29 Yesu dzo le afi ma
Matthew15:30 Ameha gã aɖe va egbɔ kple tekunɔwo
Matthew15:31 Esi amehawo kpɔ aɖetututɔwo le nu ƒom
Matthew15:32 Yesu yɔ eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo va eɖokui gbɔ hegblɔ na wo be: “Ameha la ƒe nu wɔ nublanui nam
Matthew15:33 Eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo biae be: “Afi kae míakpɔ nuɖuɖu le
Matthew15:34 Yesu bia be: “Abolo nenie le mia si?” Nusrɔ̃lawo ɖo eŋu be: “Wo ame adrẽ kple tɔmelã sue ʋɛ aɖewo.”
Matthew15:35 Azɔ Yesu bia tso ameawo si be woabɔbɔ nɔ anyi.
Matthew15:36 Etsɔ abolo adrẽ kple lã la
Matthew15:37 Wo katã woɖu nu
Matthew15:38 Ame siwo ɖu nua la le ŋutsu akpe ene; womexlẽ nyɔnuwo kple ɖeviwo ya ɖe eme o.
Matthew15:39 Esi Yesu do mɔ amehaa la
Matthew16:1 Farisitɔwo kple Zadukitɔwo va Yesu gbɔ le etem kpɔ be wòaɖe dzesi aɖe afia yewo tso dziƒo.
Matthew16:2 Ke Yesu gblɔ na wo be: “Fiẽ me la
Matthew16:3 Nenema ke le ŋdi me la
Matthew16:4 Dzidzime vɔ̃ɖi
Matthew16:5 Esi nusrɔ̃lawo ɖi go ɖe tá la ƒe go kemɛ dzi la
Matthew16:6 Yesu gblɔ na wo be: “Mikpɔ nyuie eye milé be na mia ɖokui le Farisitɔwo kple Zadukitɔwo ƒe amɔwɔʋãnu la ŋuti.”
Matthew16:7 Nusrɔ̃laawo gblɔ le wo nɔewo dome be: “Esi míetsɔ abolo aɖeke ɖe asi o la tae wògblɔ esia ɖo.”
Matthew16:8 Esi Yesu se esia la
Matthew16:9 Ɖe miekpɔ nu dze sii kpɔ oa? Ɖe mieɖo ŋku abolo atɔ̃ kple ame akpe atɔ̃ la dzi oa? Kusi neni mee mielɔ susɔeawo ɖo?
Matthew16:10 Gawu la
Matthew16:11 Ale ke wɔ miedze sii be menye abolo ŋuti meƒo nu le na mi o? Mikpɔ nyuie le Farisitɔwo kple Zadukitɔwo ƒe amɔwɔʋãnu la ŋuti!”
Matthew16:12 Azɔ ko nusrɔ̃lawo se egɔme be menye amɔwɔʋãnu ŋutie wòle nu xlɔ̃m yewo le o
Matthew16:13 Esi Yesu va ɖo Kaisarea Filipi-dua me la
Matthew16:14 Woɖo eŋu be: “Ame aɖewo be Yohanes mawutsilenamelae nènye
Matthew16:15 Tete Yesu bia wo be: “Ke miawo ɖe
Matthew16:16 Simon Petro ɖo eŋu be: “Wòe nye Kristo la
Matthew16:17 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be: “Mawu yra wò
Matthew16:18 Azɔ la mele egblɔm na wò be wòe nye kpe eye wò
Matthew16:19 Matsɔ dziƒofiaɖuƒe la ƒe safuiwo ana wò. Nu sia nu si nàbla le anyigba dzi la anɔ babla le dziƒo
Matthew16:20 Yesu de se na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be womegagblɔe na ame aɖeke be yee nye Kristo la o.
Matthew16:21 Tso gbe ma gbe dzi la
Matthew16:22 Ke Petro ɖe kpɔe hede asi mokaka me nɛ gblɔ be: “Aƒetɔ
Matthew16:23 Yesu trɔ gblɔ na Petro be: “Dze nam mayi
Matthew16:24 Azɔ Yesu gblɔ na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be: “Ne ame aɖe di be yeanɔ yonyeme la
Matthew16:25 Elabe ame sia ame si di be yeaɖe ye ŋutɔ yeƒe agbe la
Matthew16:26 Ne xexeme blibo la zu ame aɖe tɔ
Matthew16:27 Amegbetɔ Vi la le vava ge le Tɔ́a ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe me kple dɔlawo
Matthew16:28 Mele egblɔm na mi be ame aɖewo le mia dome afii
Matthew17:1 Ŋkeke ade le esiawo megbe la
Matthew17:2 Esi wole afi ma la
Matthew17:3 Tete nusrɔ̃la etɔ̃awo kpɔ Mose kple Eliya wonɔ dze ɖom kple Yesu.
Matthew17:4 Tete Petro gblɔ na Yesu be: “Aƒetɔ
Matthew17:5 Esime wògale nu ƒom la
Matthew17:6 Esi nusrɔ̃lawo se gbe sia la
Matthew17:7 Yesu te ɖe wo ŋu
Matthew17:8 Esi wofɔ mo dzi la
Matthew17:9 Esi woɖi tso toa dzi gbɔna la
Matthew17:10 Azɔ nusrɔ̃laawo bia Yesu be: “Nu ka tae agbalẽfialawo gblɔna be ele be Eliya nava do ŋgɔ?”
Matthew17:11 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Nyateƒee
Matthew17:12 Ke mele egblɔm na mi be Eliya va xoxo
Matthew17:13 Ale nusrɔ̃laawo nya be Yohanes mawutsilenamela ŋue wògblɔ nya la le na yewo.
Matthew17:14 Esi Yesu kple nusrɔ̃la etɔ̃awo va ɖo ameha la gbɔ la
Matthew17:15 hegblɔ nɛ be: “Aƒetɔ
Matthew17:16 Mekplɔe va wò nusrɔ̃lawo gbɔe
Matthew17:17 Yesu gblɔ be: “O
Matthew17:18 Tete Yesu blu ɖe gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ la ta
Matthew17:19 Ke nusrɔ̃laawo va Yesu gbɔ le adzame hebiae be: “Ale ke wɔ míawo ya míete ŋu nya gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃a do goe o?”
Matthew17:20 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Elabe miaƒe xɔse mesɔ gbɔ o. Nyateƒe tututu tom mele na mi be
Matthew17:21 Ne menye to gbedodoɖa kple nutsitsidɔ me o la
Matthew17:22 Esi wova ƒo ƒu le Galilea la
Matthew17:23 Woawui gake le ŋkeke etɔ̃a gbe la
Matthew17:24 Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo va Kapernaum. Ame siwo xɔa adzɔ si amewo nana ɖe gbedoxɔa ta la va bia Petro be: “Ɖe miaƒe nufiala la naa adzɔa?”
Matthew17:25 Petro ɖo eŋu be: “Ẽ.” Esi Petro yi aƒeme la
Matthew17:26 Petro ɖo eŋu be: “Amedzrowo sie.” Yesu gblɔ be: “Enyo. Ekem deviawo voe!
Matthew17:27 Ke nyemedi be míaɖia wo nu o
Matthew18:1 Ɣe ma ɣi me la
Matthew18:2 Yesu yɔ ɖevi sue aɖe va wo titina
Matthew18:3 eye wògblɔ na wo be: “Mele egblɔm na mi le nyateƒe me be
Matthew18:4 Ame si nye ame vevitɔ le dziƒofiaɖuƒea me lae nye ame si bɔbɔ eɖokui
Matthew18:5 “Ame si anyo dɔme na ɖevi siawo tɔgbe ɖeka le tanye la
Matthew18:6 “Nenye be ame aɖe akplɔ nenem ɖevi sue siawo
Matthew18:7 “Baba na xexea me tɔwo le nu siwo hea ame dea nuvɔ̃ me la ŋuti. Ele be tetekpɔwo nava kokoko ya
Matthew18:8 Ne wò asi alo wò afɔ ana be nàwɔ nuvɔ̃ la
Matthew18:9 Nenema ke ne wò ŋku ana be nàwɔ nuvɔ̃ la
Matthew18:10 “Mikpɔ nyuie bene miagado vlo nenem ŋusẽmanɔŋutɔ siawo dometɔ aɖeke o. Mele egblɔm na mi le nyateƒe me be woƒe mawudɔlawo le dziƒo le Tɔ́nye si le dziƒo la ƒe ŋkume kpɔm ɖaa. [
Matthew18:11 Elabe ame siwo bu lae Amegbetɔ Vi la va be yeaxɔ ɖe agbe. ]
Matthew18:12 “Mibu esia ŋu kpɔ. Nenye be alẽ alafa ɖeka le ame aɖe si
Matthew18:13 Nyateƒee
Matthew18:14 Nenema ke mia Tɔ́ si le dziƒo la medi be nenem ŋusẽmanɔŋutɔ siawo dometɔ aɖeke natsrɔ̃ o.
Matthew18:15 “Ne nɔviwò wɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe ŋuwò la
Matthew18:16 Ke ne mese egɔme na wò o la
Matthew18:17 Ne egbe be yemaɖo to woawo hã o la
Matthew18:18 “Ke mele egblɔm na mi le nyateƒe me be nu sia nu si miabla le anyigba dzi la
Matthew18:19 Azɔ megale egblɔm na mi hã be
Matthew18:20 elabe afi si ame eve alo etɔ̃ ƒo ƒu ɖo le nye ŋkɔ me la
Matthew18:21 Petro va Yesu gbɔ biae be: “Aƒetɔ
Matthew18:22 Yesu ɖo eŋu be: “Nyemegblɔ na wò be zi adrẽ o
Matthew18:23 “Eya ta wotsɔ dziƒofiaɖuƒea sɔ kple fia aɖe
Matthew18:24 Esi wòdze egɔme teti la
Matthew18:25 Naneke mele esi wòatsɔ axe fe lae o
Matthew18:26 Ale dɔla la dze klo
Matthew18:27 Eƒe nu wɔ nublanui na eƒe aƒetɔ la
Matthew18:28 Ke esi dɔla sia do go dzo la
Matthew18:29 Ehati subɔla la dze klo
Matthew18:30 Ke melɔ̃ o
Matthew18:31 Ke esi dɔla bubuawo kpɔ nu si va dzɔ la
Matthew18:32 Tete eƒe aƒetɔa yɔe va eɖokui gbɔ hegblɔ nɛ be: ‘Dɔla vɔ̃ɖi! Esi nèɖe kuku nam la
Matthew18:33 Ɖe mele be wò hã nàkpɔ nublanui na hawòti subɔla la
Matthew18:34 Tete eƒe aƒetɔa do dɔmedzoe
Matthew18:35 Alea ye Tɔ́nye si le dziƒo la hã awɔ mia dometɔ ɖe sia ɖe
Matthew19:1 Esi Yesu gblɔ nya siawo vɔ la
Matthew19:2 Ameha gã aɖe kplɔe ɖo
Matthew19:3 Azɔ Farisitɔ aɖewo va egbɔ le etem kpɔ hebiae be: “Ɖe se ɖe mɔ na ŋutsu be wòagbe srɔ̃a le nya sia nya taa?”
Matthew19:4 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Miexlẽe kpɔ be ame si wɔ ame le gɔmedzedzea me la
Matthew19:5 Tete amea be
Matthew19:6 Elabe tso esia dzi yina la
Matthew19:7 Farisitɔawo biae be: “Ke nu ka tae Mose ya ɖe mɔ be woana srɔ̃gbegbalẽe

Matthew19:9 Ke mele egblɔm na mi be ŋutsu si gbe srɔ̃a
Matthew19:10 Eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo gblɔ nɛ be: “Ne ŋutsu kple srɔ̃a domenya le alea la
Matthew19:11 Yesu gblɔ na wo be: “Menye ame sia amee ate ŋu ase nya sia gɔme o
Matthew19:12 Elabe ame tata aɖewo li siwo wodzi nenema; ame tata bubu aɖewo hã li siwo wota
Matthew19:13 Wotsɔ ɖeviwo va Yesu gbɔe bene wòada asi ɖe wo dzi
Matthew19:14 ke Yesu gblɔ be: “Mina ɖeviawo nava gbɔnye; migaxe mɔ na wo o
Matthew19:15 Tete wòda asi ɖe wo dzi
Matthew19:16 Ŋutsu aɖe va Yesu gbɔ gbe ɖeka hebiae be: “Nufiala
Matthew19:17 Yesu ɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Nu ka ta nèle nya biamem tso nu nyui ŋuti? Ame ɖeka pɛ koe nye ame nyui. Ke ne èdi be yeayi ɖe agbe la me la
Matthew19:18 Ebia be: “Kawoe?” Yesu ɖo eŋu be: “Mègawu ame o; mègawɔ ahasi o; mègafi fi o; mègaɖi aʋatsoɖase o;
Matthew19:19 bu tɔ́wò kple nɔwò kple lɔ̃ hawòvi
Matthew19:20 Ɖekakpuia gblɔ nɛ be: “Mewɔ se siawo katã dzi. Nane gasusɔ si hiã be mawɔa?”
Matthew19:21 Yesu gblɔ nɛ be: “Ne èdi be yeade blibo la
Matthew19:22 Esi ɖekakpuia se esia la
Matthew19:23 Tete Yesu gblɔ na eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo be: “Mele egblɔm na mi be
Matthew19:24 Megale egblɔm na mi hã be ele bɔbɔe na kposɔ be wòato abi ƒe vo me
Matthew19:25 Esi nusrɔ̃laawo se esia la

Matthew20:1 “Dziƒofiaɖuƒea le abe waingbledela aɖe

Matthew20:3 Egado go abe ga asieke me ene
Matthew20:4 Egblɔ na wo be: ‘Miawo hã miheyi ɖe waingblea me
Matthew20:5 Egado ake le ŋdɔ ga wui eve kple ɣetrɔ ga etɔ̃ me
Matthew20:6 Le ga atɔ̃ me lɔƒo la
Matthew20:7 Woɖo eŋu nɛ be: ‘Ame aɖeke meva tsɔ mí o tae.’ Egblɔ na wo be: ‘Ekema miawo hã miheyi ɖe waingblea me.’
Matthew20:8 Esi fiẽsi ɖo la

Matthew20:11 Esi woxɔ ga sia la

Matthew20:14 Tsɔ nu si nye tɔwò nàdzo. Nye ŋutɔe ɖoe be maxe fe si mexe na wò la na ame mamlɛtɔ sia hã.
Matthew20:15 Ɖe nyemekpɔ mɔ awɔ nu si nye tɔnye la ŋudɔ

Matthew20:18 “Miɖo to ne miasee ɖa! Míeyina Yerusalem; woatsɔ Amegbetɔ Vi la ade asi na nunɔlagãwo kple agbalẽfialawo. Woatso kufia nɛ
Matthew20:19 eye woadee asi na ame siwo menye Yudatɔwo o la bene woaɖu fewu le eŋu. Woaƒoe ahaklãe ɖe ati ŋu
Matthew20:20 Tete Zebedeo srɔ̃ kplɔ via ŋutsuvi eve va dze klo ɖe Yesu gbɔ henɔ nane biamee.
Matthew20:21 Ebia nyɔnua be: “Nu ka dim nèle?” Eɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Wɔe be vinye ŋutsuvi eve siawo dometɔ ɖeka nanɔ wò ɖusime
Matthew20:22 Ke Yesu ɖo eŋu gblɔ be: “Mienya nu si biam miele la o. Ɖe miate ŋu ano fukpekpekplu si no ge mala laa?” Woɖo eŋu nɛ be: “Míate ŋui.”
Matthew20:23 Yesu gblɔ na wo be: “Nyateƒee
Matthew20:24 Esi nusrɔ̃la ewoawo se nya sia la
Matthew20:25 Ke Yesu yɔ wo va eɖokui gbɔ gblɔ na wo be: “Mienya be ame siwo ɖua trɔ̃subɔlawo dzi la ɖua amegã ɖe wo dzi
Matthew20:26 Migana wòanɔ nenema le miawo ya mia dome o
Matthew20:27 Nenema ke ame si di be yeanye gbãtɔ le mia dome la

Matthew21:1 Esi Yesu kple eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo gogo Yerusalem

Matthew21:4 Esia dzɔ be nya siwo Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela ɖe gbeƒãe ɖi la nava eme be:

Matthew21:14 Azɔ ŋkuagbãtɔwo kple tekunɔwo va egbɔ le gbedoxɔ la me

Matthew21:19 Ekpɔ gboti aɖe le mɔ to eye wòte ɖe eŋu
Matthew21:20 Esi eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo kpɔe la
Matthew21:21 Yesu ɖo eŋu be: “Nyateƒe tututu tom mele na mi be
Matthew21:22 Azɔ ne xɔse le mia si la

Matthew21:24 Yesu ɖo eŋu na wo be: “Nye hã mabia nya ɖeka mi
Matthew21:25 Ame ka gbɔ Yohanes xɔ ŋusẽ tsoe hele mawutsi na amewo? Mawu gbɔ ye wòxɔe tsoe loo
Matthew21:26 Ke ne míegblɔ be: ‘Amewo gbɔe wòxɔe tsoe’ hã menyo o; míele vɔvɔ̃m na ameha la elabe wo katã woxɔe se be Yohanes nye Mawu ƒe gbeƒãɖela.”
Matthew21:27 Ale woɖo eŋu na Yesu be: “Míenya o.” Egblɔ na wo be: “Ekema nye hã nyemagblɔ afi si mexɔ ŋusẽ tsoe hele nu siawo wɔmee la na mi o.”

Matthew21:30 Eyi ɖe evelia gbɔ gagblɔ nya mawo ke na eya hã. Eya ɖo eŋu be: ‘Yoo
Matthew21:31 Vi eve siawo dometɔ kae wɔ wo tɔ́a ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu?” Woɖo eŋu be: “Gbatɔ̃ lae.” Yesu gblɔ na wo be: “Mele egblɔm na mi le nyateƒe me be nudzɔlawo kple ahasiwɔlawo tre mawufiaɖuƒea me yiyi na mi.
Matthew21:32 Elabe Yohanes va mia gbɔ be yeafia mɔ dzɔdzɔe

Matthew22:1 Yesu gaƒo nu na wo le lododowo me. Egblɔ be:
Matthew22:2 “Dziƒofiaɖuƒea ɖi fia aɖe
Matthew22:3 Edɔ eƒe dɔlawo ɖo ɖa be woayi aɖayɔ ame siwo wokpe la ava srɔ̃ɖe ŋkekenyuia ɖuƒee
Matthew22:4 Ke egadɔ dɔla bubuwo ɖo ɖe ameawo gblɔ be: ‘Nuɖuɖua sɔ gbe vɔ. Wowu nye nyitsu kple nyivi damiwo
Matthew22:5 Ke ame siwo wokpe la mebu eƒe nya la kura o
Matthew22:6 Ame mamlɛawo lé eƒe dɔlawo
Matthew22:7 Fia la do dɔmedzoe ale gbegbe be wòdɔ eƒe asrafowo ɖo ɖa woyi ɖawu hlɔ̃dola siawo
Matthew22:8 Esia megbe la
Matthew22:9 Eya ta fifia la
Matthew22:10 Ale dɔlaawo do go yi ɖe ablɔ kple mɔdodo veviwo dzi
Matthew22:11 “Ke esi fia la va be yeakpɔ ame kpekpeawo ɖa la
